name: =?utf-8?Q?Perdue=20Press?=
subject: Perdue Dominates Kemp In All 3 Debates
body:
| | | |
---
| | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
MAY 1, 2022
---
**CONTACT
[PRESS@DAVIDPERDUEGA.COM](mailto:press@davidperduega.com)**
---
| **_PERDUE DOMINATES KEMP IN ALL 3 DEBATES_**
---
| **ATLANTA, GA** – Perdue Spokeswoman Jenni Sweat released the following statement at the conclusion of three televised debates in gubernatorial primary:

“After three debates, the people of Georgia have clearly seen that Brian Kemp is a weak Governor who sold us out and cannot win in November. First, Kemp said ‘there’s fraud in every election,’ and he wants us to accept it and move on. Then, he admitted to keeping his ‘powder dry’ instead of making tough decisions. That’s not leadership – it’s cowardice. Georgians need a Governor who will enforce our laws, stand strong for conservative values, and make waves and knock heads to get things done. David Perdue is proud to be endorsed by President Trump, and as Governor, he will secure our elections, eliminate the state income tax, crush crime, and stop the indoctrination of our kids. With early voting starting tomorrow, we encourage conservatives to get out and vote for the only candidate who can defeat Stacey Abrams in November – that’s David Perdue.”
---
| ###
---
| _**Trump-endorsed David Perdue**_ launched his campaign for Governor of Georgia on Dec. 6th, 2021. As an outsider, Perdue’s bold, conservative vision includes fighting for election integrity, eliminating the state income tax, empowering parents to make decisions in their children’s education, and making our cities and state safe again. Perdue is taking on incumbent Brian Kemp as the only candidate who can unite Georgia’s fractured Republican Party and defeat Stacey Abrams in November. Perdue grew up in Middle Georgia, the son of two public school teachers, and paid his way through Georgia Tech by working warehouse and construction jobs. He has over 40 years of business experience, leading the Reebok athletic brand and Dollar General stores, where he created thousands of jobs for hard-working Americans.
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=12517a88d9&e=89fb4d5220)

I'm proud that we're also doing Spanish mail and running an inclusive campaign to represent _all_ Nebraskans -- **_but the fact is, it 's expensive to run an operation this big._**

That's why your donation has never been more impactful.

So please, rush $5 to:

➜ COUNTER Don Bacon's special interest money.
➜ SUPPORT an inclusive, truthful grassroots campaign.
➜ FLIP a must-win Congressional district blue and hold the House.
[**In a race so close, Bacon 's attacks and special interest cash will cost me my chance to defeat Bacon if I can't respond. I still need $5,800 to reach the voters who will decide this race. Whether or not Democrats keep the House depends on what we do right now. So I'm urgently asking: Will you split a $5 donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project right now to help me get my last piece of mail to key undecided voters? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10408?t=9&akid=2018%2E878179%2EgOVxSh)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: “A white insult to Black people”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
_**" I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Peter,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_" Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_" I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." _
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284977:6ToX_HoDN:m:1:3317145305:6256E90DD4B87E118C8B6718C7AD3B7F:r)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284977:6ToX_HoDN:m:1:3317145305:6256E90DD4B87E118C8B6718C7AD3B7F:r)**

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284977:6ToX_HoDN:m:1:3317145305:6256E90DD4B87E118C8B6718C7AD3B7F:r)

Herschel Walker

subject: Brad Raffensperger could decide my fate

body:
Peter: I testified last week in the Georgia election hearing that may kick me off the ballot. **_It 's not looking good._** Now, Brad Raffensperger, the Georgia Secretary of State, is deciding my fate. What better way for the Never-Trumpers and the Democrats to defeat me... no, not at the ballot box. But by abusing the law to disqualify me from running - or bleed me dry trying to defend myself in court. That's why I desperately need your help today to ensure that when I do win this case, I have enough funds to defeat my opponent at the ballot box. | | | [CHIP IN $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284912:JGgjxHoNR:m:1:3253819041:3282DCC6E398D1990426F3640D5068D6:r "CHIP IN $25")

---
Fighting to stay on the ballot will not be cheap. At a minimum, it's going to cost tens of thousands, maybe more.
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284916:JGgjxHoNR:m:1:3253819041:3282DCC6E398D1990426F3640D5068D6:r "Headline")But this is what the Left, Pelosi, and the Squad are hoping for. They don't care that this lawsuit is 100% unconstitutional, they just want to bleed me dry and prevent me from defending my seat from my opponent.
That's why I need your help today. If you believe in America First values, if you believe in free and fair elections, if you believe Joe Biden must be impeached and removed from office, then I need you all in.
**[Can you donate $100, $500, $1,000, or even the maximum donation of $2,900 to help me get re-elected to Congress and stop Pelosi, Biden, and the Squad from destroying this country?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284916:JGgjxHoNR:m:1:3253819041:3282DCC6E398D1990426F3640D5068D6:r "Can you donate $100, $500,
$1,000, or even the maximum donation of $2,900 to help me get re-elected to Congress and stop Pelosi, Biden, and the Squad from destroying this
country?")**
Please hurry with your donation today. **I 'm going to have to pull money out of upcoming television buys in order to pay for this lawsuit if I don't raise $42,183.18 by midnight tonight.** **[Donate today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60284916:JGgjxHoNR:m:1:3253819041:3282DCC6E398D1990426F3640D5068D6:r "Donate today.")**
Thank you. God Bless America.

Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Great America Update
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6843%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gHzqfPWLJ7CLCE32ROiXRA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61572%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q7QoyfX5j8gcn65P3H%2bofw&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61573%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qpLqqG0iRd24kdjllvCTMA&sysid=1)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61574%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WvtGjw75k1qT%2fj3I7Ee8wA&sysid=1) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6843%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gHzqfPWLJ7CLCE32ROiXRA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6843%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=gHzqfPWLJ7CLCE32ROiXRA&sysid=1)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc92tej3anqnagfnvjhhah0b7r3q0acprp4gie8o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor4c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tpm66on5cpmmgqn3djhmaq7fcpnm4qefc5mm5hb6tdgcdgm0thlelir8shhe9o6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p32phlcsqj8dtie5j38o5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4cv5b2coab7pe6s1cibjpfa2pdnror2h6q2vlvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor4c1h2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb52mjqetmjk6ac4vt07g1kkd9t3hra5b40mgsug_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor4c1h2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0h2k30pqko2b1ru0270g7jud3ctatu7csgdp6ao_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor4c1h2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdj4ihgfprjpdmhsrh5gohq0ou459rrarhf76t2o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor4c1h2bs)**
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! name: Jim DeMint
subject: Stop the Left's Grooming
body:
The Left is sick. There’s no other explanation. The Vast Left-Wing Conspiracy to sexualize young children, long hidden, is n
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zke3dhfud6qi9ve6af8tu7fcj8u58728j3cn6rng_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onnckrbathmmlh6eoj4ceon2ddke5g69d1kccr3bcr46hj37dj6mpr6atbn6qp7fduie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdg74cb66ljjad1nm9r6cdj0m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi4no)
| | |
---
|
---
Fellow Conservative: **The Left is sick.** There’s no other explanation.
The Vast Left-Wing Conspiracy to sexualize young children, long hidden, is now out in the open for all to see.
**Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s appalling record of leniency toward sexual abuse and child pornography is the story of her Supreme Court nomination.**
Her anti-Constitution judicial philosophy is enough for any conservative to oppose her, but her record on sex offenders is different. _**Jackson repeatedly reduced prison sentences for men convicted of abusing children and using child porn.**_
The Left says it’s no big deal, just a misunderstanding. Then why did the White House withhold documents about those cases? Why did the Senate rush her nomination vote? Because time and again, _**Judge Jackson sided with child predators over the wishes of prosecutors, federal guidelines, and victims’ families.**_
Jackson’s creepy affinity for child abusers is matched by the Left’s bizarre outrage about the Florida law prohibiting public schools from teaching students about transgenderism and sexual transitioning until the 4th grade. Woke socialists around the country are mad because apparently, _this_ is what they want to teach kindergarteners!
Now leaked videos from a Disney staff meeting show an executive producer bragging about “adding queerness” to children’s programming as part of a “not-at-all-secret gay agenda.”
**Enough!** **[Please help CPI stop it by training, equipping, and uniting conservatives in the fight for our values!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zri27vcl6ie3uibcqirs4uveqghblkib98nkh16g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h2bs)**
What the Left is doing is not advocacy – it’s perverted. It doesn’t matter if it’s billion-dollar corporations or Supreme Court judges; sexualizing kids is an abusive violation of parents’ and children’s rights. **We have a moral duty to stop it.** The Left’s obsession with sexualizing our kids has no place in civilized society, and it’s time to take the gloves off.
As you know, the Conservative Partnership Institute has been leading the fights against corporate porn peddlers, including Big Tech, and trans extremism in our schools and sports leagues.
This fight won’t end with the Senate's confirmation of Judge Jackson’s nomination. Or when the controversy in Florida dies down. Progressives have crossed a line and need to be _exposed_ – and _defeated_.
**[Please help protect our kids and destroy the kindergarten-grooming Left by supporting CPI today!](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zerolhu6qfop50l4srd0las00hu87valcihl8ii8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h2bs)**
We don’t work for a party – we work for patriots, in Congress, in the conservative movement, and within the grassroots across the country. True conservatives know how to fight. We teach them how to win.
Thank you for being part of our team and for doing so much to help secure America's future. For Freedom,
---
---
Jim DeMint
CPI Chairman
---
|
---
**Donate $25 or more and we will send you a copy of _Woke, Inc._ to thank you for your support.**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr09ir2q6iep33mj0ti983pn0tlmit0iivi2m288_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h2bs)
---
|
---
---
**CONSERVATIVE PARTNERSHIP INSTITUTE**
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
(202) 742-8988 Tel | (202) 595-0282 Fax
[CPI.org](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znqidh320e2j7g4vq85jpl2hhgmbhang3t9jamj0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h2bs)
---
[**SUPPORT CPI**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr201skrbrb9a62969jjc1o1ic821in33dl8pfqg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4c5geaor3c3h2bs)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: Senate Update: GA, NV, and FL
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Herschel Walker, Marco Rubio, and Adam Laxalt need our immediate help! |
---
Fellow American,

**To stop the Biden-Harris agenda and flip the Senate in November, we need to win in Georgia, Florida, and Nevada. These are three of the most important Senate races in the country.**

That means Herschel Walker (R-GA), Marco Rubio (R-FL), and Adam Laxalt (R-NV) need our immediate help!

I'll give it to you straight, Fellow American. Everything is on the line this year. We can win back the Senate majority this November, but Democrats are HEAVILY outraising our Republican candidates across the country.

**In these three must-win seats, our Republican candidates were outraised $28 million to $13 million in the last three months._That's a massive 2:1 fundraising disadvantage!_**

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)
Our Republican candidates are working hard, but they are being outraised by millions of dollars from liberal billionaires and out-of-state donors!

**If we want to flip the Senate, we need to help Herschel, Marco, and Adam close the massive fundraising gap.[Will you donate to help them RIGHT NOW? With one click, your contribution will go to help all 3 campaigns and our RECLAIM THE MAJORITY effort!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)**

I am determined to make sure our candidates have all the resources they need to win this November. **_That's why I am emailing you today._**

Conservatives from around the country helped me in the past, and now I'm asking for you to help in Georgia, Florida, and Nevada. **[Will you send $4, $10, or even $22 right now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)**

In the last election, Hollywood elites and radical left activists funneled over $130 million to my Democrat opponent because they knew what was at stake - the Senate majority. While I won my race in South Carolina, we lost the Senate majority because we lost the runoff elections in Georgia.

**There is a silver lining.** Right now, it's forecasted that a Senate in 2022 "leans Republican," but if Democrats keep outraising us 2:1 in the top targeted races, they could spend their way to victory.

Fellow American, I am asking for your help today so that these three Republican candidates are not outraised again.

**[Please chip in to help Herschel Walker in Georgia, Marco Rubio in Florida, and Adam Laxalt in Nevada so we can stop the Biden agenda!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)**

Thanks,

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)

Lindsey Graham

| [** Donate Today -> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066399:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)
---

* * *
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066400:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

| [** Support Senator Graham! **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066400:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)
---

We want to make sure you're a proud member of Team Graham, and we don't want to bother you. To receive only the most important emails, please [click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066401:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r) We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, please [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWG97YRHyN).

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066402:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066403:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066404:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r) | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60066405:WG97YRHyN:m:1:877327319:1DDFCF1E00CC6482CA087063F960051A:r)
---|---|---|---

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: being attacked for my military service
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44813771/343224680/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM5MzNkYi0xN2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAbTyR9kSotn-au68U6bUqwqk0TV1X-q7hHOuUqrcuI=&emci=ce949b10-d4c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=293933db-17ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44813772/343224683/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM5MzNkYi0xN2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAbTyR9kSotn-au68U6bUqwqk0TV1X-q7hHOuUqrcuI=&emci=ce949b10-d4c9-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=293933db-17ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $40,000 before midnight tomorrow, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical fundraising deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44813773/343224684/-42398318?refcode=em20220502am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTM5MzNkYi0xN2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XAbTyR9kSotn-au68U6bUqwqk0TV1X-q7hHOuUqrcuI=)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Hello, When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful. People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened. They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service. And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other. This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue. In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $40,000 before midnight tomorrow, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = All the Super PAC money in the world can’t defeat grassroots support from people like you. I’m so grateful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

# The Work to Reclaim Our Freedoms Will Continue

# Primary moved to August 23, 2022
---
| | |
---|---
|
### THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT!!!!

On behalf of my family and our campaign, I want to thank the countless volunteers that braved snow, wind and freezing rain walking door to door meeting with thousands of Republican voters in District 1.

### As you may have heard, the state's highest court has ruled that the Democrat drawn Congressional lines were unconstitutional. The court has moved our primary to August 23, 2022. We believe the new district lines will be drawn by May 20th, per a court order. As the only Republican candidate born and LIVING in this district we are not backing down.
These past few months truly showed me how committed the people are to making their country great again and putting America First.

But we have powerful forces who are more interested in advancing their own selfish interests than representing you. Sadly, we are seeing it in our own party. That's why I need your help to defeat these RINOs in the voting booth.

[We are at the end of the month and need to meet our fundraising goals. Please consider chipping in $20, $50, or even $100 to our movement. It will help us with signs and literature as we continue to walk this district and get our message out. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001IweAnw49CJmakWjuyM5V94mVm4rosTBkXNwcFk1iqwFFBR5mS06rRI6vFf2QzJmi8S8HclsmMLbr8z5zmLabCqFzzsaDIK-vOcchCVgB7GF3TQBm7YRis4d2cMeV2lcEEMjlCDEdis0zETkllQOo0V_1CGjY9KNTuW_I3FRVFXSDUVlBrSAksDqw4cStTHgA2qVD0wNlC2o=&c=VenqqvBWi8hgWuVFY_kolPl7AUsc8qGEnniw_8NJ1go4WohyvBKO0Q==&ch=2BQjTh8u0Xadz35xpAPkgKPvSV2Mvw-SpT8lqNo28iJ0MOaZGvD9cw==)

This campaign is NOT about me. This is about We the People reclaiming our freedoms - reminding those in Washington that they work for us!!!!

In Service to the People,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Humbly asking — $5 to help fight back against these attacks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friends —
I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $5 or whatever you can afford — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.
Here’s the truth:
This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there.
But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger.
So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum.
And friends it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal and set the record straight. Even $1 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.
We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking:
**[Can you please make a split donation today to help me and Kirsten Gillibrand hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? I would not ask were it not so important.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44814635/343228423/1415649524?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3426-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTQ0YzU4Yi0xOGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fLtaidvJuz70sEBIYpdFCIRmT2Vkd0PSlKD9Z1r2t3I=)**

clean_body: | | | Friends — I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $5 or whatever you can afford — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now. Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. And friends it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal and set the record straight. Even $1 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in. We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Kelly and Kirsten Gillibrand: | | | = | = | | = | = Thank you again. Your donation today — especially today — really means a lot. Mark Kelly | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to . name: Sen. Chuck Edwards
subject: News Out of Raleigh; Major Updates
body:
You Won't Want to Ignore This!
---
| | | | | |
---
|
---
| Having Trouble Viewing This Email? [CLICK HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8GcHd_241RxDw1uJdIbvt8rOM9h8AJ8xE1PI4pQwFQPS1RaTncxbOhpwjar9gCurcCd7mpzTGbgpN8XCg-bFf7bL1Vuxz6Fa3w==&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==)
---
| | |
---
| Legal Challenges, Constituent Services, & More
---
| | |
---|---
|
FROM MY SENATE DESK

While the NC Senate is not currently in session; our month has been loaded with constituent services, legal challenges, recruiting staff for my Raleigh office, and continuing to deal with the Governor's abuse of power. Following are some highlights from this interim, but busy period in Raleigh that I believe will be most interesting to you.

To get legislative news closer to the time it's happening, be sure to follow me on [Facebook](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8CgxFpwF7yGCqlEJc0wv1t9HuGk6rq4zRUlz5WNhi_iJHREbbmo0raArjHVKgI69VGXThHzg66sGZ5DqAMjd25_sjtmVlCmy2w-ls8nDmTLW6b0S4J1Ue_E=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==) or frequently visit my [website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8AMqRlIP3lq-tOe64YyBnHys03cHeoZxC11TI65GODtmk9gvNXjkdeVBrGBaibGZC-3hQOE6B_3OS490qQ6v0H8=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==).
| | |
---|---
|

Chuck Edwards, Senator
NC District 48
| | |
---
| Update on Voter ID
---
| | |
---|---
|
Much has been asked recently about the status of Voter ID in NC. Let's take a brief look back. In 2016 NC's Voter ID law was ruled unconstitutional by the courts. So in 2018, I was proud to help bring you the option of making Voter ID a constitutional requirement by supporting [SL 2018-128](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8GcHd_241RxDJHecikOLAeX12teMMnTC9zz1uUM0UylFtl67imp7uJu-DC8hzc0ZFlwdZY1PlzuZ5kMptb2LS2ys3iKsSSeEMME4J52iYiMrqb8vHnxjO0o=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==). Of course, I voted YES to add it to the November ballot.

Our citizens overwhelming voted YES. So I was proud to help pass the enacting legislation by voting YES to [SL 2018-144](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8GcHd_241RxDxkuf6pAccqDmIKEbrFWfKS2QCjmU_YGBPRxXsFZB0G8bMLAyQV1A5zIW7n0fVij0I_Q2D4ovYcq9Lq09KjKgAVzFS9cLmm4WnVra-VJIVcU=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==), and then I voted YES again to override the Governor's veto.

Voter ID remains a high priority. However, we have continued to be met with executive and judicial resistance, preventing voter ID criteria from being actively implemented, and I continue to advocate to defend your choice through the courts.

The legislature has engaged in numerous legal challenges to defend the will of the people, currently, there are three voter ID-related cases pending. I would like to update you on them now.

Holmes et. al. v. Moore et. al. (State Voter ID)
* Holmes is the state court challenge to SB 824, the original bill vetoed by the Governor and overridden by the legislature. Plaintiffs allege the voter ID law was enacted with discriminatory intent and therefore, violates the NC Constitution's Equal Protection Clause.
* We lost at the trial court level in a 2-1 ruling in September 2021. Two democrats agreed with the Plaintiffs. The lone Republican on the panel, Judge Poovey, wrote a 100-page dissent explaining why he believed the law was constitutional. After which, we filed an appeal with the NC Court of Appeals.
* The case is now pending with the NC Supreme Court due to an appeal by the Plaintiff to bypass the Court of Appeals. Despite no rush, the Democratic-majority Supreme Court granted the petition to circumvent the Court of Appeals. We can only assume this appeal to bypass was done in an effort to rush the standard judicial process before judicial elections in November. This is just another instance of a forming trend of judicial interference to gain partisan outcomes.
* All parties have filed briefs with the Court and we are waiting on the Court to schedule oral arguments. We expect that will occur sometime in the late spring to early summer. The NC Supreme Court will likely decide the case before November's election.

Berger v. NC NAACP (Federal Voter ID)
* In addition to a state court challenge to SB 824, different plaintiffs groups filed a lawsuit in federal court against the same law. In this case, the General Assembly was not named as a defendant in court and has to ask the trial court for permission to intervene.
* The lower federal courts have thus far kept us from participating by rejecting our attempts to "intervene" in the case. We have appealed those decisions and taken the issue of intervention all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States.
* On March 21, 2022, our counsel argued in front of the Supreme Court in DC, explaining to the Court why we are entitled to participate in the case and defend SB 824 - a bill produced and passed in the legislature.
* Now that oral arguments are finished, we are waiting on the justices to issue their opinion. We expect a decision sometime in June.
* If our petition succeeds, we will be able to participate in the federal voter ID case, which is currently "stayed" pending the resolution of our US Supreme Court appeal.

NAACP v. Moore (Usurper/Constitutional Amendment Case)
* In this case, plaintiffs have challenged the voter ID constitutional amendment, arguing that, because the legislature put the amendment on the ballot after a federal court declared certain districts to be the product of racial gerrymandering, the General Assembly was a "usurper" body lacking power to place such an amendment on the ballot.
* This case is fully briefed and was argued in February in front of the NC Supreme Court. We are waiting on a decision, which we expect will come before or at the beginning of summer.

As you can tell, the legislature is aggressively fighting to defend voter ID laws. We are hopeful that the conclusion of these legal challenges will pave the way for the implementation of voter ID in North Carolina. Something that should have been done in 2018.

*Oral arguments in front of the Supreme Court in the case detailing the General Assembly's ability to intervene to defend our Voter ID law took place on Monday, March 21, and audio recordings of the arguments [can be found here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8GcHd_241RxDnH2UvSMrZEJaIkWG3wXD9mMJFoT7NU6tQMFR-_jGilXWIw4MqX0bW_EaHvh24RLGxUg4RruqweTJkq0mpgzEneJpvDVLSk20HuzB7wbeuy3h-Mryw-AUupWukAbOflTFZnmQohBYoC4=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==).
| | |
---
| NC Values Coalition A+ Rating
---
| | |
---|---
|
I'm honored to be recognized with an A+ rating as a 2022 "Champion of the Family" by the NC Values Coalition, a non-partisan, non-profit organization that supports and advocates for the life, liberty, and families of NC citizens.

This award comes as a result of my steadfast actions to support the rights of WNC citizens.

A few of the accomplishments that led me to this recognition during the 2021 Session include:
* Sponsorship of S105, North Carolina's most recent budget which continues to prioritize working-class families and the financial security of NC communities.
* Sponsorship of S326, which would have helped to preserve the integrity of our elections by requiring mail-in ballots be received by the Board of Elections by the closing time of county polls before Governor Cooper proved his lack of support for securing state elections by vetoing the bill.
* Sponsorship of S693, requiring faster permanency placements for children in foster care.
* Vehement opposition to the injection of CRT in public schools
* Opposition to legalizing sports betting in North Carolina
* Opposition to discriminatively ending the life of an unborn child in North Carolina based on race or projected disorders.

| | |
---
| NC Anti-CRT Bill Deemed National Standard
---
| | |
---|---
|
In September of 2021, in an effort to eliminate critical race theory from penetrating the public school curriculum, I supported HB 324, Ensuring Dignity & Nondiscrimination/Schools.

I have steadfastly fought against CRT to reduce ideological adoptions from forcibly permeating our students' history classes, and I was confident that HB 324 struck a balance between continued education and the protection of our state's youth necessary to preserve history classes void of indoctrination.

My views on this bill were only solidified when policy analysts across the nation began to praise North Carolina's HB 324 as being the national standard to combat CRT. The American Enterprise Institute stated that our policy, "strikes the best balance between addressing parents' concerns about indoctrination without posing any risk of substantive curriculum imposition", going on to state that HB 324 was "worthy of emulation in other states".

It was also noted that HB 324 uniquely and narrowly avoids the politicization of public school classrooms while preserving honest instruction.

Our language has become the poster child for CRT bans, with numerous states duplicating our bill. But despite support from across the nation towards our attempt to limit discrimination in the classroom, Governor Cooper vetoed HB 324 almost as quickly as it was passed. Although this veto serves as a setback to putting an end to CRT in NC, it has in no way prevented me from continuing to adamantly oppose CRT.

We continue to work towards a solution that preserves our children's education while dispelling discrimination, and I am proud that the General Assembly's previous efforts have successfully protected students in other states across the nation from indoctrination.
| | |
---
| First in Constituent Services
---
| | |
---|---
|
Regardless of whether we are in session or not, our top priority is constituent services. Often, I'm able to use the position you have entrusted me with to help our citizens solve problems. Often these problems are with state departments. Many times they are issues with the private sector, where sometimes I can act as a mediator.

Over the past few months, we've been receiving exorbitantly high numbers of calls from constituents experiencing difficulties with NCDOT, NC DMV, the Department of Revenue, the Department of Natural and Cultural Resources, and NC DHHS.

Our most consistent request for assistance is with NCDOT, and I've made numerous field visits across Transylvania, Henderson, and Buncombe Counties to meet with community members and NCDOT staff. Issues that don't require in-person remedy are typically resolved through my office staff, who diligently communicate with representatives of state departments to remedy our constituent's issues.

Sometimes all it takes to resolve an issue is a little shake of the tree. My office is happy to serve as the shaker.

Of the hundreds of constituents who have reached out to us in 2022, we have successfully resolved about 93% of the issues brought to our attention. Many of the remaining issues are from late last week, we are working through them and we are hopeful they will be resolved soon.

If we can help you or someone you know, be sure to call us at (919) 733-5745 where you will reach a live person or a frequently monitored line. You may also email me directly at chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov.
| | |
---
| Overused Party Trick: No End in Sight
---
| | |
---|---
|
783 days. That's how long Gov. Roy Cooper has kept North Carolina in a "state of emergency", despite the disappearance of numerous COVID-19 restrictions and guidelines.

Traditionally, emergency declarations are used for a short period of time to address immediate needs, like severe weather, when the General Assembly cannot convene quickly enough. After more than 2 years, the General Assembly has convened for complete sessions to draft and pass legislation supportive of COVID relief and recovery, and there is no longer an immediate need to respond to the pandemic.

North Carolina's COVID-19 metrics are on a steady downward curve. According to the Mayo Clinic, as of April 25, 2022, positive COVID-19 tests have dropped since February to 7.1%. NC DHHS has reported that hospitalizations have declined to 254, compared to 1,248 at the end of February. And the seven-day average of new COVID-19 cases dropped to 1,254, compared to over 3,470 at the end of February.

Today's state of emergency continued through Governor Cooper's abuse of power, has granted public officials the ability to encroach on civilian rights in the name of 'public safety'. Enough is enough. It is well past time for Gov. Cooper to acknowledge what everyone else already knows: This is no longer an emergency. The state of emergency needs to end immediately.

When the pandemic began public health officials and elected leaders said they would be guided by science and data. Now, Gov. Cooper is ignoring the science. He's continuing to extend a state of emergency when no emergency exists. It's like an overused party trick. His desire to cling to power is overwhelming and atrocious, all at the expense of North Carolinians.

Gov. Cooper's office claimed the reason the state of emergency hasn't ended is because he wants to work with the legislature to "pass laws that serve the same purpose." Well, we're waiting Governor Cooper? The General Assembly was in session for over a year, from January 2021 to February 2022; yet, we never heard from him on specific measures relating to his emergency declaration.
| | |
---
| Broadband Connectivity & Grant Applications
---
| | |
---|---
|
In North Carolina's 2021-22 Budget, my co-legislators and I appropriated $1 billion for broadband infrastructure development and expansion to rural communities across the state. These funds have turned the attention of multiple broadband companies around NC, and applications are flooding to fund broadband expansion across the state and in WNC.

I'm proud to say I've supported applications to bridge the gap in rural and urban access to broadband infrastructure in all three counties of District 48.

These funds are the first step towards uniting our communities, increasing employee pools/employment opportunities for businesses and citizens state-wide, providing rural citizens with critical healthcare and educational resources, and ensuring rural communities - such as those that cover my mountainous district - do not get left behind.
| | |
---
| Judicial Meddling Appeal by Legislature
---
| | |
---|---
|
In late February, an NC court challenged the separation of powers by unconstitutionally outsourcing for, and approving, Congressional district maps produced by a non-legislative panel. Both the Federal and North Carolina Constitutions specifically vest redistricting and elections law authority in the legislature. Nonetheless, the judicial branch, which is responsible for upholding the Constitution, has become the same branch violating it by attempting to devise its own elections law.

The General Assembly challenged the court's decision to approve non-legislatively drawn Congressional maps in early March, but the Supreme Court denied this challenge. Regardless of this ruling, we did not give up on fighting for the restoration of order among North Carolina's three branches.

The General Assembly has recently taken the next step in challenging the court's actions by petitioning the United States Supreme Court to take up the question of whether the federal constitution, through its Election Clause, prevents state courts and election officials from devising their own election laws. Article 1, Section 4, Clause 1 specifically designates "the Times, Places, and Manner of holding Elections for Senators and Representatives, shall be prescribed in each State by the Legislature thereof". The clause does not vest power in the state, but in an organ of government - the legislature.

Though this petition specifically deals with the court-enacted congressional plan, the goal of limiting judicial meddling in congressional redistricting is just the beginning of what this case could mean for legislative power and elections law. If accepted for review by the Court, this case will determine how much power, if any, state courts and executive branch bureaucrats have to influence a whole waterfront of voting issues from absentee voting deadliness to witness requirements, voter ID to curbside voting.

The case has not been accepted yet. Challengers will file a response to our filing in about a month, after which it could sit for a few more months while the justices decide if they want to take the case. But rest assured we have not given up on vying for the proper restoration of powers.
| | |
---
| Felon Enfranchisement
---
| | |
---|---
|
In an all too common theme, judges once again tried to legislate from the bench by rewriting NC's felon voting law.

Under Article VI, Section 2 of the North Carolina constitution, convicted felons may not vote 'unless that person shall be restored to the rights of citizenship in the manner prescribed by law'. A felon must complete the entirety of their sentence including parole, probation, jail time, or post-release supervision, after which they shall automatically have their citizenship rights restored.

Felony disenfranchisement was ruled to not violate 14th Amendment rights and was deemed constitutional in the 1974 US Supreme Court ruling of Richardson v. Ramirez. States were given the freedom to determine if and how they would like to enact disenfranchisement laws for felons following the Ramirez ruling. In two states, Maine and Vermont, as well as the District of Columbia, felons never lose the right to vote. But in the remainder of the states, felons are stripped of the ability to vote until the completion of their prison time or sentence. 27 states, including NC, currently require felons to complete their entire sentence before potentially regaining the ability to vote.

Despite the Supreme Court ruling, plaintiffs of Community Success Initiative v. Moore are challenging state law preventing felon enfranchisement, arguing it is racially motivated and unconstitutional. On March 28, 2022, a divided three-judge panel of 2 Democratic judges versus one dissenting Republican, ruled NC's 1973 felon enfranchisement law unconstitutional. They didn't strike the law down though, instead, they tried to rewrite the law by allowing all felons not currently serving an active sentence to register to vote.

This would have allowed nearly 56,000 convicted felons who are actively still serving their sentence the ability to vote with elections approaching, if not for our appeal to the NC Court of Appeals, where a "stay" was issued blocking felons from registering to vote until appeals in the case are resolved.

The State Supreme Court has the opportunity to hear the case next if they so choose; however, the bottom line is simple: North Carolina's felon enfranchisement laws are not discriminative against a specific population, nor do they unconstitutionally prevent law-abiding citizens from exercising their right to vote. NC's judicial system needs to stop trying to legislate from the bench.

| Raleigh Office Seeking Summer Intern
---
| | |
---|---
|
Are you a college student interested in gaining knowledge and experience of the legislative process? Are you an ambitious, go-getter with a knack for hard work and problem-solving? Are you creative and innovative? Are you seeking an internship for the Summer of 2022?

We want to hear from you!

My Raleigh office is seeking a paid intern for the Summer of 2022. The Summer term begins May 1st and ends August 30th. Interns may select to work full-time or part-time at the onset of their employment term. Actual start and end dates may vary based on the quality of the applicant and availability.

An internship with my Raleigh office is an immersive opportunity to experience the inner workings of government on an intimate level. Interns may be tasked with answering emails or phone calls to get to know and support the needs of constituents; utilizing problem-solving techniques while communicating with state departments to address constituent concerns; researching important policy topics for use in developing new State legislation; attending daily sessions and committee meetings; assisting with the production and distribution of written documents, including but not limited to: newsletters, social media posts, and press releases; among more. No two days are the same.

At the end of the program, interns can expect to have a strong understanding of the North Carolina State Government in action, and what full-time public service affords and demands.

The internship is located in Raleigh, North Carolina. North Carolina residents or out-of-state students attending a North Carolina school who are 18-years of age or older are eligible to apply.

Please contact my office at (919) 733-5745 or email me at chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov if you are interested in applying.

| Page Program Now LIVE
---
| | |
---|---
|
Calling all high school juniors and seniors interested in government and the legislative process!

Applications for the North Carolina Senate Page Program are now live and you should apply!

The Senate Page program offers young men and women an opportunity to learn about and participate firsthand in the legislative process of North Carolina. Senate Pages assist members and staff of the Senate during the legislative session. They are provided the unique opportunity of working alongside North Carolina's legislative leaders on the Senate Chamber floor in the midst of legislative action.

Do I have your attention? If so, I'm sure you're curious about what a Senate Page might do during their time in my office. Pages may be tasked with an array of duties including, but not limited to delivering messages and materials within the legislative complex, participating in daily sessions and committee meetings, answering constituent phone calls, collaborating with my office staff, and passing out documents or running errands in the Senate Chamber during daily sessions.

I'm excited to have the opportunity to once again sponsor new Pages this legislative session. If you or someone you know might be interested, you may visit: [here for more information](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001xbFWp93Qn_N1MScVPceIdsSI2-P2Omu43UeKnnvL55rUGtjNbQlK8G8D6KWrlTIGMRHF3g1Uw0KWJDNBhpyVbdI3kHBMQqOWsn53QcINtLt2w0IBJjeIDpm1udO4-f5q51bRP0sW2BJp6GobxQ9fKkSWZoq7jXviIerMjLWzx78=&c=BJOgLAcR8xWroJbIJ58Kj6K-BUU0Upt38FfTI68rzzERHHivzc-NFg==&ch=_YMzDVmU13xp0i7C4XevRzIdq1NAISVYKeGLqj8h6EaERksFHlpjWQ==), or contact my office at (919) 733-5745. clean_body: You Won't Want to Ignore This! | | | | | | | | Having Trouble Viewing This Email? == | | | | Legal Challenges, Constituent Services, & More | | | ---|--- | FROM MY SENATE DESK While the NC Senate is not currently in session; our month has been loaded with constituent services, legal challenges, recruiting staff for my Raleigh office, and continuing to deal with the Governor's abuse of power. Following are some highlights from this interim, but busy period in Raleigh that I believe will be most interesting to you. To get legislative news closer to the time it's happening, be sure to follow me on == or frequently visit my ==. | | | ---|--- | Chuck Edwards, Senator NC District 48 | | | | Update on Voter ID | | | ---|--- | Much has been asked recently about the status of Voter ID in NC. Let's take a brief look back. In 2016 NC's Voter ID law was ruled unconstitutional by the courts. So in 2018, I was proud to help bring you the option of making Voter ID a constitutional requirement by supporting ==. Of course, I voted YES to add it to the November ballot. Our citizens overwhelming voted YES. So I was proud to help pass the enacting legislation by voting YES to ==, and then I voted YES again to override the Governor's veto. Voter ID remains a high priority. However, we have continued to be met with executive and judicial resistance, preventing voter ID criteria from being actively implemented, and I continue to advocate to defend your choice through the courts. The legislature has engaged in numerous legal challenges to defend the will of the people, currently, there are three voter ID-related cases pending. I would like to update you on them now. Holmes et. al. v. Moore et. al. (State Voter ID) Holmes is the state court challenge to SB 824, the original bill vetoed by the Governor and overridden by the legislature. Plaintiffs allege the voter ID law was enacted with discriminatory intent and therefore, violates the NC Constitution's Equal Protection Clause. We lost at the trial court level in a 2-1 ruling in September 2021. Two democrats agreed with the Plaintiffs. The lone Republican on the panel, Judge Poovey, wrote a 100-page dissent explaining why he believed the law was constitutional. After which, we filed an appeal with the NC Court of Appeals. The case is now pending with the NC Supreme Court due to an appeal by the Plaintiff to bypass the Court of Appeals. Despite no rush, the Democratic-majority Supreme Court granted the petition to circumvent the Court of Appeals. We can only assume this appeal to bypass was done in an effort to rush the standard judicial process before judicial elections in November. This is just another instance of a forming trend of judicial interference to gain partisan outcomes. All parties have filed briefs with the Court and we are waiting on the Court to schedule oral arguments. We expect that will occur sometime in the late spring to early summer. The NC Supreme Court will likely decide the case before November's election. Berger v. NC NAACP (Federal Voter ID) In addition to a state court challenge to SB 824, different plaintiffs groups filed a lawsuit in federal court against the same law. In this case, the General Assembly was not named as a defendant in court and has to ask the trial court for permission to intervene. The lower federal courts have thus far kept us from participating by rejecting our attempts to "intervene" in the case. We have appealed those decisions and taken the issue of intervention all the way to the Supreme Court of the United States. On March 21, 2022, our counsel argued in front of the Supreme Court in DC, explaining to the Court why we are entitled to participate in the case and defend SB 824 - a bill produced and passed in the legislature. Now that oral arguments are finished, we are waiting on the justices to issue their opinion. We expect a decision sometime in June. If our petition succeeds, we will be able to participate in the federal voter ID case, which is currently "stayed" pending the resolution of our US Supreme Court appeal. NAACP v. Moore (Usurper/Constitutional Amendment Case) In this case, plaintiffs have challenged the voter ID constitutional amendment, arguing that, because the legislature put the amendment on the ballot after a federal court declared certain districts to be the product of racial gerrymandering, the General Assembly was a "usurper" body lacking power to place such an amendment on the ballot. This case is fully briefed and was argued in February in front of the NC Supreme Court. We are waiting on a decision, which we expect will come before or at the beginning of summer. As you can tell, the legislature is aggressively fighting to defend voter ID laws. We are hopeful that the conclusion of these legal challenges will pave the way for the implementation of voter ID in North Carolina. Something that should have been done in 2018. Oral arguments in front of the Supreme Court in the case detailing the General Assembly's ability to intervene to defend our Voter ID law took place on Monday, March 21, and audio recordings of the arguments ==. | | | | NC Values Coalition A+ Rating | | | ---|--- | I'm honored to be recognized with an A+ rating as a 2022 "Champion of the Family" by the NC Values Coalition, a non-partisan, non-profit organization that supports and advocates for the life, liberty, and families of NC citizens. This award comes as a result of my steadfast actions to support the rights of WNC citizens. A few of the accomplishments that led me to this recognition during the 2021 Session include: Sponsorship of S105, North Carolina's most recent budget which continues to prioritize working-class families and the financial security of NC communities. Sponsorship of S326, which would have helped to preserve the integrity of our elections by requiring mail-in ballots be received by the Board of Elections by the closing time of county polls before Governor Cooper proved his lack of support for securing state elections by vetoing the bill. Sponsorship of S693, requiring faster permanency placements for children in foster care. Vehement opposition to the injection of CRT in public schools Opposition to legalizing sports betting in North Carolina Opposition to discriminatively ending the life of an unborn child in North Carolina based on race or projected disorders. | | | | NC Anti-CRT Bill Deemed National Standard | | | ---|--- | In September of 2021, in an effort to eliminate critical race theory from penetrating the public school curriculum, I supported HB 324, Ensuring Dignity & Nondiscrimination/Schools. I have steadfastly fought against CRT to reduce ideological adoptions from forcibly permeating our students' history classes, and I was confident that HB 324 struck a balance between continued education and the protection of our state's youth necessary to preserve history classes void of indoctrination. My views on this bill were only solidified when policy analysts across the nation began to praise North Carolina's HB 324 as being the national standard to combat CRT. The American Enterprise Institute stated that our policy, "strikes the best balance between addressing parents' concerns about indoctrination without posing any risk of substantive curriculum imposition", going on to state that HB 324 was "worthy of emulation in other states". It was also noted that HB 324 uniquely and narrowly avoids the politicization of public school classrooms while preserving honest instruction. Our language has become the poster child for CRT bans, with numerous states duplicating our bill. But despite support from across the nation towards our attempt to limit discrimination in the classroom, Governor Cooper vetoed HB 324 almost as quickly as it was passed. Although this veto serves as a setback to putting an end to CRT in NC, it has in no way prevented me from continuing to adamantly oppose CRT. We continue to work towards a solution that preserves our children's education while dispelling discrimination, and I am proud that the General Assembly's previous efforts have successfully protected students in other states across the nation from indoctrination. | | | | First in Constituent Services | | | ---|--- | Regardless of whether we are in session or not, our top priority is constituent services. Often, I'm able to use the position you have entrusted me with to help our citizens solve problems. Often these problems are with state departments. Issues that don't require in-person remedy are typically resolved through my office staff, who diligently communicate with representatives of state departments to remedy our constituent's issues.
