They didn't strike the law down though, instead, they tried to rewrite the law by allowing all felons not currently serving an active sentence to register to vote. This would have allowed nearly 56,000 convicted felons who are actively still serving their sentence the ability to vote with elections approaching, if not for our appeal to the NC Court of Appeals, where a "stay" was issued blocking felons from registering to vote until appeals in the case are resolved. The State Supreme Court has the opportunity to hear the case next if they so choose; however, the bottom line is simple: North Carolina's felon enfranchisement laws are not discriminative against a specific population, nor do they unconstitutionally prevent law-abiding citizens from exercising their right to vote. NC's judicial system needs to stop trying to legislate from the bench. | | | | Raleigh Office Seeking Summer Intern | | | ---|--- | Are you a college student interested in gaining knowledge and experience of the legislative process? Are you an ambitious, go-getter with a knack for hard work and problem-solving? Are you creative and innovative? Are you seeking an internship for the Summer of 2022? We want to hear from you! My Raleigh office is seeking a paid intern for the Summer of 2022. The Summer term begins May 1st and ends August 30th. Interns may select to work full-time or part-time at the onset of their employment term. Actual start and end dates may vary based on the quality of the applicant and availability. An internship with my Raleigh office is an immersive opportunity to experience the inner workings of government on an intimate level. Interns may be tasked with answering emails or phone calls to get to know and support the needs of constituents; utilizing problem-solving techniques while communicating with state departments to address constituent concerns; researching important policy topics for use in developing new State legislation; attending daily sessions and committee meetings; assisting with the production and distribution of written documents, including but not limited to: newsletters, social media posts, and press releases; among more. No two days are the same. At the end of the program, interns can expect to have a strong understanding of the North Carolina State Government in action, and what full-time public service affords and demands. The internship is located in Raleigh, North Carolina. North Carolina residents or out-of-state students attending a North Carolina school who are 18-years of age or older are eligible to apply. Please contact my office at (919) 733-5745 or email me at chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov if you are interested in applying. | | | | Page Program Now LIVE | | | ---|--- | Calling all high school juniors and seniors interested in government and the legislative process! Applications for the North Carolina Senate Page Program are now live and you should apply! The Senate Page program offers young men and women an opportunity to learn about and participate firsthand in the legislative process of North Carolina. Senate Pages assist members and staff of the Senate during the legislative session. They are provided the unique opportunity of working alongside North Carolina's legislative leaders on the Senate Chamber floor in the midst of legislative action. Do I have your attention? If so, I'm sure you're curious about what a Senate Page might do during their time in my office. Pages may be tasked with an array of duties including, but not limited to delivering messages and materials within the legislative complex, participating in daily sessions and committee meetings, answering constituent phone calls, collaborating with my office staff, and passing out documents or running errands in the Senate Chamber during daily sessions. I'm excited to have the opportunity to once again sponsor new Pages this legislative session. If you or someone you know might be interested, you may visit: ==, or contact my office at (919) 733-5745. Requests for an application may be sent via email to chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov. | | | | | | | | Follow me on Facebook & Twitter and visit my == for the most current legislative updates | == == == == | | | Sen. Chuck Edwards, District 48 | 300 N. Salisbury St. #628 , Raleigh, NC 27603 | | Sent by mailto:chuck.edwards@ncleg.gov powered by

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: Who Is Jackson Lahmeyer?
body:
In Oklahoma, people are seeing "Lahmeyer For Senate" signs, billboards, ads and etc... scattered throughout all 77 counties. All of these signs cause
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5747.1.51f6e95ec8593f08a421b6ba1b30e2b0)
---
In Oklahoma, people are seeing **"Lahmeyer For Senate"** signs, billboards, ads and etc... scattered throughout all 77 counties. All of these signs cause _curiosity_ : **"Who Is Jackson Lahmeyer?"** If you read the _Washington Post_ you will get the impression that I'm a threat to democracy; if you read the _[Oklahoma City Sentine](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5748.1.c9f354bc804c2fce63dd000c1043f678)l_ you will get the impression that I'm a Patriot supported by National Leaders such as **General Michael Flynn** , **Roger Stone** , **Mike Lindell** and others. I figured that I should write to you and let you know who I really am and what my background is. I'm **definitely not** a _Career Politician_ or _Washinton Insider_. I'm a 4th generation Oklahoman from the Claremore area. I started my first of many businesses at the age of 15. That first business I started was a simple Lawn Care that still operates today. I attended **Oral Roberts University** (ORU) and received a B.A. & M.A. in Theological & Historical Studies graduating Magna Cum Laude. While at ORU, I served as a Youth Pastor at a few different local churches that gave me the opportunity to get my start in ministry. Upon graduation from ORU, I stepped in as the Crusade Director for **Christ for All Nations** , the ministry of **Reinhard Bonnke** that has helped lead 74,000,000 people to Christ since 1974. While serving as the Crusade Director, I also became the Oklahoma State Coordinator for the **Billy Graham Evangelistic Association** (a position I held for 5 years). In 2017, my wife, Kendra, and I were honored to become the Lead Pastors of the historic **Sheridan Christian Center** in Tulsa, OK – now known as [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5749.1.ae209910bfaaab7368559669d5c7fa9d). [Sheridan](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5750.1.cb62635e25122656cc28951f695fdb0c)was founded in 1951 and has been one of the most influential churches in the state of Oklahoma with 30 other churches and ministries being planted out of it. Some of those churches and ministries include: **Victory.Church** in Tulsa, **Rhema Bible Training Center** in Broken Arrow, **Eastland Assembly of God** in Tulsa, **Trinity Bible College** and so many more. While pastoring [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5751.1.5baaf70fddf058d4a19ff2ef0e5bf48d), I've also been an Instructor of Theology at **Victory College** from 2017 to 2021 and in 2019, I served as the interim Dean of Theology at **Victory College** while they transitioned in leadership. The Lord has been very good to me professionally with the opportunites He has given me but the Lord has been even better to me with the family He has given me. My wife, Kendra, and I are very grateful for the _basketball team_ of 5 kids we get to raise and train up.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5752.1.d54faef6b96454ab6568aea5f801392d)
---
We currently live in Owasso, OK right outside Tulsa.
It was a little more than a year ago that **Kendra** and **General Michael Flynn** nudged me to run for the US Senate in Oklahoma to challenge and replace [James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5753.1.5fd330a00c43a1bb69715e9e6348e9ba).
I get asked quite often, "_Why are you running_?"
**I am running to finish President Trump's border wall.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5754.1.6ef482e3419f9d6ac938f789484794d5) mocked President Trump's border wall.
**I am running against Joe Biden's socialist agenda.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5755.1.df9b3fdd674c22fdadcf6b8f398de6f0) votes with the Biden Administration over 51% of the time.
**I am running to defend the Second Amendment.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5756.1.44579c912af3e5831694adb353f20899) has an "F rating" from Gun Owners of America.
**I am running against the radical Left's cancel culture.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5757.1.6cc7a7b5b0ad65c8f9e17268fb0e6fd1) caved to the radical Left and proposed renaming our military bases.
**I am running to investigate the 2020 election.**
[James Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5758.1.f8770fe618d2435881d9178c99238217) voted to certify the 2020 election.
**I am running to put AMERICA FIRST!**
When I arrive in DC on **Day 1** , I will have 3 goals:
1\. Sponsor legislation in the Senate to cutoff ALL federal funding to any school district in America that teaches **Critical Race Theory** or **Woke Sexuality**.
2\. Sponsor legislation in the Senate that BANS Chinese Nationalists or any other foreign entity from purchasing **American farmland**.
3\. Join forces with Rand Paul in the Senate to bring justice to **Anothony Fauci**.
A recent poll was released from Just Oklahoma Data that surveyed 867 _likely_ Oklahoma Republican primary voters: [Lankford](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5759.1.6200c4aef12482d7b5546aeae181d89f) received 46.83%, [Lahmeyer](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5760.1.0333754d9325af2d6f55796571b7f5e3) 35.87% and 17.3% were undecided. We have gained so much ground in such a short amount of time.
I believe in this final stretch leading up to Election Day on June 28th we will close the gap.
**The Best Is Yet To Come!**
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on TruthSocial, GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5761.1.3fff446a3241f0fe7ce2391e6bb8b1a8), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5762.1.00bd66032fb1c82c38cd77d14df1a559), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5763.1.8c5f96f070ae939d2245711140e4ab8b), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5764.1.b03fb0fea71065b3c61463216f439710), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5765.1.0a0dac6f6d696f2ebcf9b872e7d46db5)).
| | [ Help Support Jackson Lahmeyer ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5766.1.1660a10b4b16f27097a713775b1427d3)
---
---
## The Laptop From Hell Is Coming To Oklahoma!
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5767.1.c5e7d184481b56a4df2cfca718b11cef) Hunter Biden & John Paul Isaac
---
**John Paul Isaac** (the man who discovered Hunter Biden’s _Laptop from Hell_) shared with me today about the contents of what he discovered...
**Ukraine. Ukraine. Ukraine.**
He will be joining me in Oklahoma to _expose_ the **Biden Crime Family** on Saturday, May 21 and YOU need to be there.
We will be giving out flash drives with much of the contents of the **Laptop from Hell**.
Come hear inside information about the corruption of the **Biden Crime Family**.
Saturday, May 21
**OKC** \- 2pm
**Tulsa** \- 6pm
In less than 2 days we are already over 50% full so RSVP today!
RSVP to OKC here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/690854](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5768.1.88b9067fee0b4acb64fa1875415fabb0)
RSVP to Tulsa here: [https://www.tickettailor.com/events/lahmeyerforsenateinc/690853](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5769.1.a39c424c9c784dece3d4addb675e1833)
More speakers TBA...
---
---
---
©2022 Lahmeyer For Senate INC. | 3939 S Harvard Ave #140 Tulsa, OK 74135
---
| [Web Version](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5770.1.d78f714f9a9e582538d4e7eda4ef964b&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjc2OTU2MTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOGRjOWRmN2M2OTBhNzlhNzdhZGNhYjg0NjhkOWI0NGUyMTUzODRiZSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiODUxNjY1MCJ9 "Web Version") [Preferences](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5771.1.ce052b7d5f779f346a1d3fb92411be01&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjc2OTU2MTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOGRjOWRmN2M2OTBhNzlhNzdhZGNhYjg0NjhkOWI0NGUyMTUzODRiZSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiODUxNjY1MCJ9 "Preferences") [Forward](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=8516650.5772.1.487861253675ee736df0c8a62ecc2496&p=eyJ7e21pbWktc2lnbmF0dXJlfX0iOiIxNjc2OTU2MTctMTM1ODM1OTMyMTAtOGRjOWRmN2M2OTBhNzlhNzdhZGNhYjg0NjhkOWI0NGUyMTUzODRiZSIsInt7ZW1haWxJZH19IjoiODUxNjY1MCJ9 "Forward") [Unsubscribe](https://gem.godaddy.com/opt_out?pact=8516650-167695617-13583593210-8dc9df7c690a79a77adcab8468d9b44e215384be "Unsubscribe")

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Help me keep my ad on the air
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
We're launching our first TV ad of the Election Year!
| | |
---
I've got some exciting news, team:

**We're launching our first TV ad of the election year!**
With far-right outside interest groups spending millions on attack ads against me, this is a critical step in fighting back against GOP misinformation and sharing my message across New Hampshire.

This race is a must-win to protect our slim Senate majority, meaning everything we do between now and Election Day matters. Every fundraising goal we set, every ad buy we place, is a key part of building a winning campaign.
**But here's the problem, folks: Because much of New Hampshire is in the expensive Boston media market, we have among the highest ad rates in the country**. Without your grassroots support, we won't be able to keep our ads on the air, missing the chance to reach crucial swing voters.

**In a race that was last won by 1,017 votes and with Senate control on the line, that's not a risk I'm willing to take.** That's why my team set an emergency fundraising goal of $15,000 to keep our new ad on the air and fight back against GOP attacks.

clean_body: We're launching our first TV ad of the Election Year! | | | I've got some exciting news, team: We're launching our first TV ad of the election year! With far-right outside interest groups spending millions on attack ads against me, this is a critical step in fighting back against GOP misinformation and sharing my message across New Hampshire. This race is a must-win to protect our slim Senate majority, meaning everything we do between now and Election Day matters. Every fundraising goal we set, every ad buy we place, is a key part of building a winning campaign. But here's the problem, folks: Because much of New Hampshire is in the expensive Boston media market, we have among the highest ad rates in the country. Without your grassroots support, we won't be able to keep our ads on the air, missing the chance to reach crucial swing voters. In a race that was last won by 1,017 votes and with Senate control on the line, that's not a risk I'm willing to take. That's why my team set an emergency fundraising goal of $15,000 to keep our new ad on the air and fight back against GOP attacks. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | Amount&refcode=mh-jtk1018-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjI4MGJiZi0xY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1vco931SvvQBgq5qbFO6yZ6wjz11zkiRttIwg-QxOe0= This is an all-hands-on-deck moment, so thank you in advance for stepping up. name: NextGen Pennsylvania
subject: It’s the last day to register to vote!
body:
This is your sign to register to vote!

| | Friend, **Today is the last day to register to vote for the Pennsylvania primary election! ** If you were looking for a sign to register to vote, this is it! In order to have your voice heard in this election and vote, you must **register to vote!** Be sure to check up on your voter registration, especially if you changed addresses or parties. **[With only hours left, now is your chance to register to vote!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44819769/343250598/-111983798?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjcxMDEzZC0yMGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMotAZSVi4PGscfDt5RPPTLgk81recbf-XnSd-bIJ2k=&emci=c5870972-dec7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5671013d-20ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** With many important Senate, governor, lieutenant governor, and other races in PA this year, the election in May will decide the nominees for the general election. We have power in numbers: Over **70 million Americans ages 18–35 are now eligible to vote** , more than any other age group. It’s up to us to elect officials who value us as a community. Today is your last chance to register to vote. **We decide our future and our future starts now.** **[Last call: Register to vote before time runs out!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44819791/343250631/-1442796904?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjcxMDEzZC0yMGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMotAZSVi4PGscfDt5RPPTLgk81recbf-XnSd-bIJ2k=&emci=c5870972-dec7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5671013d-20ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172)** | [Register to vote](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44819794/343250668/-918552852?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NjcxMDEzZC0yMGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pMotAZSVi4PGscfDt5RPPTLgk81recbf-XnSd-bIJ2k=&emci=c5870972-dec7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=5671013d-20ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6787172 "CTA Button")

clean_body: This is your sign to register to vote! | | Friend, Today is the last day to register to vote for the Pennsylvania primary election! If you were looking for a sign to register to vote, this is it! In order to have your voice heard in this election and vote, you must register to vote! Be sure to check up on your voter registration, especially if you changed addresses or parties. With many important Senate, governor, lieutenant governor, and other races in PA this year, the election in May will decide the nominees for the general election. We have power in numbers: Over 70 million Americans ages 18–35 are now eligible to vote , more than any other age group. It’s up to us to elect officials who value us as a community. Today is your last chance to register to vote. We decide our future and our future starts now. | "CTA Button" In solidarity, NextGen Pennsylvania | NextGen America 268 Bush St. #2919 San Francisco CA 94104-3503 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | =

| | Peter, With early voting in full swing, and Primary Election Day two weeks away, we’re having final conversations with folks in every corner of the district before they cast their ballots. And thanks to your help, we reached our April fundraising goal – making our final voter outreach push possible. We just hosted our Friends and Family weekend where we visited early voting locations, knocked on doors, and made phone calls to voters across NC-11. And our first-ever TV ad has been making a positive impact all over WNC. We’ve been showing voters that there is a path forward for Western NC, one that doesn’t involve extremist Madison Cawthorn and his toxic brand of politics. It’s clear that people are ready for change, and the support for our campaign grows by the minute. [**In this final stretch, we need to keep our voter outreach going, our TV ads on the airwaves, and our momentum strong. clean_body: | = | | Peter, With early voting in full swing, and Primary Election Day two weeks away, we’re having final conversations with folks in every corner of the district before they cast their ballots. And thanks to your help, we reached our April fundraising goal – making our final voter outreach push possible. We just hosted our Friends and Family weekend where we visited early voting locations, knocked on doors, and made phone calls to voters across NC-11. And our first-ever TV ad has been making a positive impact all over WNC. We’ve been showing voters that there is a path forward for Western NC, one that doesn’t involve extremist Madison Cawthorn and his toxic brand of politics. It’s clear that people are ready for change, and the support for our campaign grows by the minute. = | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = I’m so thankful to be running this campaign alongside you. name: Kevin Kocina
subject: Standing Up for Our Veterans
body:
As the only veteran in this race, I understand how to help our heroes.
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196VBSYIk5CUJNdvMbsCVYEePZ5CIYjsrqoTLE_IYj_VhWg_e_6v4BPe2OSLQBOfdsVcI7M0WDrWZiyDeo2TCCgepHUQDJ6oBim_zZW_XtkKkz4MRDoaetrYcWV2ZzmuuhNvZ6l8mdaNG8SouJsfLjc2Mbhy37H-B6EsKLcwLkASYHAATuzTxDg_Si4LWwmnJ3xg0Y_GYXIKQAA3MqfjtcnsWcyvJNyN75ZcR7dO21X_oVKFAi9oGlnFTT3jYzNYI3Pn7gtgFcVO_9jPDup_SYQrg3YYNO8V8fDDpecElwJJnrAU4luRQFQ9HkatcWOhtYRoY7jq-g2X0qP8RWhxaLLdXgHJRnxHBLNB6HTplf_Y=&c=YdIuq-v4uocAZGYsDZp2XMExtuMy6LEWCh7qqOGkGu4L5rxF-6yF8w==&ch=RPkabNgyTWUwzt_f_zpFV20zdlh4egK1XPeT8NC7sUbBU6Aw9bmX3A==)
---
---
Hey Peter,
As the only veteran running for Congress in the First District, I understand what it's like to return to home and not know what's next for me.
Thankfully, when I got out of the Marine Corps., I was blessed with the option to join a veterans' program that trained me to become a skilled tradesman.
Because of that program, I've had the opportunity to work as a welder for the last decade.
Unfortunately, politicians in Washington nowadays don't seem to understand how critical it is that we provide opportunities to our heroes when they return home.
In Congress, I'll be a fierce advocate for our veterans.
I'll fight to ensure that we continue to fund programs that help veterans transition back to normal life and expand access to education and job training.
I'll get to work on ending veteran homelessness. No one who selflessly serves our country should ever have to live without a roof over their heads.
And I'll work to eliminate government bureaucracy in veteran healthcare.
If you want a representative who understands the needs of returning veterans first-hand, then I need your support.
[JOIN ME IN STANDING UP FOR OUR VETERANS](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00196VBSYIk5CUJNdvMbsCVYEePZ5CIYjsrqoTLE_IYj_VhWg_e_6v4BPe2OSLQBOfd4AyA9kk29xUW8JdD0HXB3p3AaGKxLTOz-nFwy6QnlmeZ9b85uIXDgAHQ4Fo4ywYT6z7NCAnnFKcM0xDZY3wlCpAEshbcObN8Zh7SVI6wm2O7LSTOdjaQTnSabr1CuAKeGSjBNq_Lu4qe0bf04j1-_eKgZRTFdxgcjgd6v11jTocDofyiSD2FiD9oFX_raAr19x48s0PN0Lqre1-xWINczGElgrM20auGsyP0JmmQ_RCa4iEbI3Pqm8pyX2AEfWevN2RYCYiWlkq7V_pCsZ5iXoa6TRSUoMG0_YtSeOwQI6U=&c=YdIuq-v4uocAZGYsDZp2XMExtuMy6LEWCh7qqOGkGu4L5rxF-6yF8w==&ch=RPkabNgyTWUwzt_f_zpFV20zdlh4egK1XPeT8NC7sUbBU6Aw9bmX3A==)

clean_body: As the only veteran in this race, I understand how to help our heroes. | | | | == Hey Peter, As the only veteran running for Congress in the First District, I understand what it's like to return to home and not know what's next for me. Thankfully, when I got out of the Marine Corps., I was blessed with the option to join a veterans' program that trained me to become a skilled tradesman. Because of that program, I've had the opportunity to work as a welder for the last decade. Unfortunately, politicians in Washington nowadays don't seem to understand how critical it is that we provide opportunities to our heroes when they return home. In Congress, I'll be a fierce advocate for our veterans. I'll fight to ensure that we continue to fund programs that help veterans transition back to normal life and expand access to education and job training. I'll get to work on ending veteran homelessness. No one who selflessly serves our country should ever have to live without a roof over their heads. And I'll work to eliminate government bureaucracy in veteran healthcare. If you want a representative who understands the needs of returning veterans first-hand, then I need your support. == | == | == | == | == | == Thank you, == Kevin Kocina Conservative for Congress Minnesota's First District == == If you would like to donate by mail, please send your contribution to: Kocina For Congress P.O. clean_body: I’ve been traveling the district and let me be the first to tell you – our movement is ready to win. | = Derek – You’ve probably heard that Chris doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs. That’s because he’s committed to fighting for the interests of the hardworking people of PA-17 in Congress – not the corporations that have been gouging all of us. Chris doesn’t pocket checks from corporations. When he gets to Washington, he’ll only answer to you and fight for the things that matter to Western Pennsylvanians – quality healthcare for all, stronger protections for workers and unions, taking on unchecked corporate power, protecting our right to vote, and more. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = But here’s the thing, Derek: Our Republican opponents and the radical right are trying to buy this seat. They’ve already dumped almost $600,000 of their own money into this race last quarter, and we know that’s just the beginning. That’s their playbook – not ours. = Thank you for being on our team, Team Deluzio | Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022. = | = | Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress Chris Deluzio for Congress PO Box 16210 Pittsburgh, PA 15242 United States Chris Deluzio is a United States Veteran. subject: Fwd: Message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots - you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn't a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291369:JH4ZjhoN_:m:1:3317145305:9DCD41C53AE118F8C274CE2B0C7F903E:r)**

---
I cannot stress this enough - electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left's liberal takeover. Look at what's happening in blue states - businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I'm asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms - in _ANY_ state - to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291369:JH4ZjhoN_:m:1:3317145305:9DCD41C53AE118F8C274CE2B0C7F903E:r "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY
state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291369:JH4ZjhoN_:m:1:3317145305:9DCD41C53AE118F8C274CE2B0C7F903E:r "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won't lie to you, it's not going to be easy.

We're fighting against the entire liberal machine - the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Peter.

This isn't a fair fight - they've got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left's tyrannical agenda, and we've never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can't do it without your help. All I'm asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291369:JH4ZjhoN_:m:1:3317145305:9DCD41C53AE118F8C274CE2B0C7F903E:r "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to
defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great
country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left's policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291369:JH4ZjhoN_:m:1:3317145305:9DCD41C53AE118F8C274CE2B0C7F903E:r "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---
| |
* * *
**We 're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:****62 of 99 state legislative chambers****26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats****27 of 50 secretary of state offices****11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials****Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**
---

Washington, DC 20004

This expenditure was not made with the cooperation or prior consent of, or in consultation with, or at the request or suggestion of, any candidate, or person or committee acting on behalf of the candidate.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)? The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825174/343270709/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=)
| Fellow activist,

**_Voter registration is the heart of our plan to expand the electorate and get every single Black, brown, and young voter out to vote._** We are now just hours away from the voter registration deadline, with so much work left to be done.

**[Fellow activist, can you make a contribution of $25 to help us mobilize voters? With just hours left to expand the electorate for the May primary, every dollar and every minute counts.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825179/343270714/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825184/343270720/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=) Voting in Pennsylvania is **_no joke_**. The Republican majority party in Pennsylvania continues to attack voting rights here in the Commonwealth by proposing legislation that would make it harder for Pennsylvanians to vote, including eliminating vote by mail and removing ballot drop boxes. The purpose of these attacks is to continue to suppress voters, especially within communities of color, immigrant communities, and the youth, who have been often ignored and neglected from the democratic process.

**_We believe in engaging and empowering these communities because we know that our voice is our power. If we can expand the electorate in Pennsylvania to reflect our demographically changing population, our elected officials will truly represent all Pennsylvanians._**

**[As the voter registration deadline rapidly comes to a close, can you donate $25 to help us register voters before that window closes? Your contribution goes directly to helping show disenfranchised voters the power of their vote and getting them out to do it.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825205/343270732/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_L2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=)**
[DONATE NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825221/343270740/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_B2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=)
Until the change is real,

Team NPP [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44825226/343270742/-1015736156?refcode=EM_FR_220502VR2_VR_TEAM_90DO_5_NG_N_G1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjlkN2FmYzUyLTI5Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zCNm1GfCcKFgfVxQ9VB7_r2W3ikXn3LKgFekOW7B0jA=) | _The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. name: (1) Missed Message
subject: This isn’t a fair fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
|
---
| | | Patriot,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots - you were one of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn't a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291642:JezMNhoNJ:m:1:3299561967:2D3E16CF8C8AAF1C4BE52DDD5B0867A9:r "dpwillis67@gmail.com")**

---
I cannot stress this enough - electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left's liberal takeover. Look at what's happening in blue states - businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I'm asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms - in _ANY_ state - to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291642:JezMNhoNJ:m:1:3299561967:2D3E16CF8C8AAF1C4BE52DDD5B0867A9:r "I’m asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms – in ANY
state – to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.")**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291642:JezMNhoNJ:m:1:3299561967:2D3E16CF8C8AAF1C4BE52DDD5B0867A9:r "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
I won't lie to you, it's not going to be easy.

We're fighting against the entire liberal machine - the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Patriot.

This isn't a fair fight - they've got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left's tyrannical agenda, and we've never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can't do it without your help. All I'm asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291642:JezMNhoNJ:m:1:3299561967:2D3E16CF8C8AAF1C4BE52DDD5B0867A9:r "Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to
defend our rights, but we can’t do it without your help. All I’m asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great
country.")**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left's policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291642:JezMNhoNJ:m:1:3299561967:2D3E16CF8C8AAF1C4BE52DDD5B0867A9:r "Restore State GOP Majorities")
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---
| |
* * *
**We 're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:******62 of 99 state legislative chambers**********26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats**************27 of 50 secretary of state offices****************11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials****************Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.********

body:

Peter,
Today is the first day to vote early in the Georgia Democratic Primary!
While the November election will decide whether Marjorie Taylor Greene remains in Congress, the Primary will decide her opponent. So that means if we want to replace her, I need to win on May 24 th .
I’m the most qualified candidate on the ticket. I’m the only Democrat that has defeated a Republican in an election – and I have the support of northwest Georgians. What I need now are votes. So please, if you haven’t already, make a plan to vote. Remind your friends, and remind your family. The only way we are going to pull this off is if we all participate, and there is just too much at stake to sit on the sidelines. Early Vote NOW!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/2fr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wdfcemail?refcode=5/2fr]
Thank you,

Wendy Davis

subject: Expanding Medicaid to 40,000 people who need it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
If we win this historic campaign this November, not only are we expanding life-saving health care to over 40,000 South Dakotans, but this measure would also save our state $1.3 billion over the next five years alone. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44829254/343277014/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU1MGM2NC0yY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBVmxMLe_nS4f55mJn0NACdpIE4FUgJTQu-00tgYsHE=&emci=c0ffd9a8-23c7-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7d550c64-2cca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=561582) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44829255/343277015/-34384362?refcode=E15312-20220430-CampaignManagerSurrogate-graphic-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU1MGM2NC0yY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBVmxMLe_nS4f55mJn0NACdpIE4FUgJTQu-00tgYsHE=) Hi there, Allow me to introduce myself — I’m Zach, the campaign manager for South Dakotans Decide Healthcare. Today I wanted to talk to you about how the Fairness Project is helping us fight for expanded Medicaid coverage this November — a measure that if successful, would do _so much_ for thousands of South Dakotans. [**But before we get into it, will you make a donation to the Fairness Project today so that they can continue to fuel campaigns like ours and win even more progress at the ballot box this November?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44829256/343277016/-34384362?refcode=E15312-20220430-CampaignManagerSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU1MGM2NC0yY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBVmxMLe_nS4f55mJn0NACdpIE4FUgJTQu-00tgYsHE=) If we win this historic campaign this November, not only are we expanding life-saving health care to over 40,000 South Dakotans, but this measure would also save our state _$1.3 billion_ over the next five years alone. _Friend, South Dakotans want this._ Just about two-thirds of voters in our state have shown support for this measure. When our state officials failed to act during session earlier this year, they made it clear:**If we as voters want the progress we need, we’re going to have to take matters into our own hands. And friend,_we did._** **Thanks in large part to the Fairness Project, we’ve secured our spot on the ballot this November.** _But the job is only half-done_ — now, I am working alongside organizers and advocates here in SD to _pass_ this ballot measure, and deliver on our promise to expand health care. [**So I’m asking: Will you give anything you can to the Fairness Project today to help them fuel campaigns like ours and win even more life-changing policies directly at the ballot box this November?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44829257/343277017/-34384362?refcode=E15312-20220430-CampaignManagerSurrogate-SL-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU1MGM2NC0yY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBVmxMLe_nS4f55mJn0NACdpIE4FUgJTQu-00tgYsHE=) [EXPAND MEDICAID](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44829258/343277018/-34384362?refcode=E15312-20220430-CampaignManagerSurrogate-SB-SurrogateLocal-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDU1MGM2NC0yY2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wBVmxMLe_nS4f55mJn0NACdpIE4FUgJTQu-00tgYsHE=) Thanks, friends! Zach Marcus
Campaign Manager
South Dakotans Decide Healthcare

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Left Targets Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
---
|
---
Peter: It's time to get into the fight. This time it's personal.
Georgia Democrats are trying to block Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for re-election. They are trying to strip her name off the congressional ballot in her district.
**To punish Greene for exposing the Left's election law abuses, the Left is _abusing election laws!_**
This is not a prosecution - it's persecution. And we have to stop it!
**[Please help defend Marjorie with an urgent contribution.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292052:JRCxQhoDN:m:1:3317145305:25658E458B10A0F403CD1F79F569E5F9:r)**
You can donate directly to her campaign through the House Freedom Fund, and we will pay all processing fees so she can use 100% of your contribution to fight back.
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been fighting harder than anyone to expose the Left's lies and protect America from their woke, socialist conspiracy. She has answered the bell on all of the big issues:
✓ Democrat election abuses
✓ Critical race theory in our schools
✓ Big Tech censorship
✓ Trans extremism
✓ Joe Biden's border crisis
✓ The Wuhan lab coverup
The media, corporate elites, and Republican insiders want Marjorie Taylor Greene gone. Why? **Because she's effective. **
**[It's time to help Marjorie fight back.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292052:JRCxQhoDN:m:1:3317145305:25658E458B10A0F403CD1F79F569E5F9:r)**
Have you ever noticed that the Left never tries to defeat squishy, weak-kneed corporate Republicans? **They're as good as Democrats.** It's always the toughest, grittiest, most principled fighters that Washington really fears.
And that's what this is: fear. Not hate. Not outrage. **Fear**. Liberals are afraid of leaders like Marjorie Taylor Greene - like Donald Trump and Jim Jordan. They're scared of true conservatives who defend American culture and the rule of law.
Marjorie has never stopped fighting since she first took the oath of office. She fights Democrats and Republicans. She fights Big Tech, public health tyrants, and the media. She isn't backing down now.
But the woke Left and corporate right are trying to cancel her from Congress. It's the same old game. They can't beat her, so they're trying to destroy her.
_**We need to fight fire with fire.**_
Marjorie Taylor Greene needs your help now.
**[Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more to Marjorie Taylor Greene's campaign today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292052:JRCxQhoDN:m:1:3317145305:25658E458B10A0F403CD1F79F569E5F9:r)**
_House Freedom Fund will pass along 100% of your contribution to her re-election campaign. _
Together, we can help her defeat this bogus corruption, get back on the ballot, and get back to kicking liberals where the sun doesn't shine. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund

clean_body: | | | | Peter: It's time to get into the fight. This time it's personal. Georgia Democrats are trying to block Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for re-election. They are trying to strip her name off the congressional ballot in her district. To punish Greene for exposing the Left's election law abuses, the Left is abusing election laws! This is not a prosecution - it's persecution. And we have to stop it! You can donate directly to her campaign through the House Freedom Fund, and we will pay all processing fees so she can use 100% of your contribution to fight back. Marjorie Taylor Greene has been fighting harder than anyone to expose the Left's lies and protect America from their woke, socialist conspiracy. She has answered the bell on all of the big issues: ✓ Democrat election abuses ✓ Critical race theory in our schools ✓ Big Tech censorship ✓ Trans extremism ✓ Joe Biden's border crisis ✓ The Wuhan lab coverup The media, corporate elites, and Republican insiders want Marjorie Taylor Greene gone. Why? Because she's effective. Have you ever noticed that the Left never tries to defeat squishy, weak-kneed corporate Republicans? They're as good as Democrats. It's always the toughest, grittiest, most principled fighters that Washington really fears. And that's what this is: fear. Not hate. Not outrage. Fear. Liberals are afraid of leaders like Marjorie Taylor Greene - like Donald Trump and Jim Jordan. They're scared of true conservatives who defend American culture and the rule of law. Marjorie has never stopped fighting since she first took the oath of office. She fights Democrats and Republicans. She fights Big Tech, public health tyrants, and the media. She isn't backing down now. But the woke Left and corporate right are trying to cancel her from Congress. It's the same old game. They can't beat her, so they're trying to destroy her. We need to fight fire with fire. Marjorie Taylor Greene needs your help now. House Freedom Fund will pass along 100% of your contribution to her re-election campaign. # [Sign your name: Demand gun control laws now! ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5bb2967a-e4eb-4511-8ead-f4f6fdff130e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | A shocking new study revealed that guns were the leading cause of death for children and teens in the US in 2020. As we witness tragedy after tragedy, we’ve seen no meaningful action from Congress to put an end to gun violence. Our children deserve better – we must make this country a safer place for them to grow up in. But the NRA has many of our representatives in a chokehold, spending millions of dollars to continue putting innocent lives at risk. We’re fed up with Congress’ inaction. We need universal background checks, an assault weapons ban, and federal gun safety legislation immediately. No more “thoughts and prayers.” Too many lives have been lost to senseless gun violence. [Sign your name: Demand gun control laws now! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tca561342-bdfa-468b-a073-cf4c810cec88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Great America Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6844%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FVSf54pwzqhG1dPgzwzDcQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61587%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FHTNrfuyUoV9L%2fP9esICRw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61588%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M8%2f0b8aRWXyqGQH0GRLHrA&sysid=1) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61589%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=28p4VhojnPPAcyS6cMqymA&sysid=1)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6844%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=FVSf54pwzqhG1dPgzwzDcQ&sysid=1)

name: American Leadership Survey
subject: Who do YOU trust
body:
Peter,
Republicans and Democrats are both vying for control of Congress in 2022.

_There’s no doubt that Republicans and Democrats will take America down VERY different paths. _

_Democrats will choose the path of censorship, socialism, and “woke” politics._

**But Republicans will lead us to AMERICA FIRST prosperity. **

We want to see who YOU trust more to lead America, so we put together a survey for every patriot to give their input.

[**Let us know today if YOU trust Democrats or Republicans more to lead America. **](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1cbb283ad2e04ff4984b19b6a58e16fa&_e=3GQiGf6DyO6rXbodAvtlOCuxWv1BITofoAaDO0ZT_qIHuBb2fEAt4g9jbdgVsEdKjuryFfNCcTHK-YKAS18Btd7bpjA5-37AkYaSXbY7nVT-9YrcJU69IsDNKPE5xK1AXCeCid9iJMpsOmZ0Q66QigwE-PzuOqhs3TIY5OGN_OBh-vGi0O-XDe2AJ5WkfK95wQOzoXPLZDxW0aQ9aCMeEyV69C5aZXab-ZH15gXiuAciqShqmDiZd-LubciPNe7aQWyPloo_8f6ABJt6oGSTPeWMRv8-A3RCkf4LZM5y5NeXuXefWfKPB1zlTlqQCvgLo-eAMaZjy4y-XLdQrFrpj0nSQSZlyA6UinTKzs6w-DxceC4OocYkPWizwnMmBe1OzJPCHZgb_fAeTUs-57EUg8ey7xxtI8QDYFd8s7e8TcE%3D) **Who do you trust more to lead America?** [**REPUBLICANS**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1cbb283ad2e04ff4984b19b6a58e16fa&_e=3GQiGf6DyO6rXbodAvtlOCuxWv1BITofoAaDO0ZT_qIHuBb2fEAt4g9jbdgVsEdKjuryFfNCcTHK-YKAS18Btd7bpjA5-37AkYaSXbY7nVT-9YrcJU69IsDNKPE5xK1AXCeCid9iJMpsOmZ0Q66QigwE-PzuOqhs3TIY5OGN_OBh-vGi0O-XDe2AJ5WkfK95wQOzoXPLZDxW0aQ9aCMeE8nMoCVB0EH9RccT6kvOm6oMR2NOHyPLINcmgqM4NBUwzZbyDeT2Fmr6cjO2viJS6mtKsxrlEL16-smLvNhPHisJMzr3tbNfKYHoO4b20S70e6vZypR0FIrYxfrgclXjj8q9dVuzNUj96Eh8a6t7iufVC-OLL3jpWYA8hRH92q-HC28iTuRINWiKp_hBd9HUUVbXKxEIn3qXXj2ji-By5Bc%3D) [**DEMOCRATS**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=1cbb283ad2e04ff4984b19b6a58e16fa&_e=3GQiGf6DyO6rXbodAvtlOCuxWv1BITofoAaDO0ZT_qIHuBb2fEAt4g9jbdgVsEdKjuryFfNCcTHK-YKAS18Btd7bpjA5-37AkYaSXbY7nVT-9YrcJU69IsDNKPE5xK1AXCeCid9iJMpsOmZ0Q66QigwE-PzuOqhs3TIY5OGN_OBh-vGi0O-XDe2AJ5WkfK95wQOzoXPLZDxW0aQ9aCMeE5KWMZeonBx3eZDFzWdVohcv_2_AhD5ETTqTHloUHJKfLRvbrvNG8SaNsI_gzaTRI4eJeZGoM4cDdbXTZXDo9QcEJW103BEAozUgwted0EHCXDy7jQEMTC9bpvYPI0DkQcaV4mtOBuckwTmLDLSq4ht0gfkZludX1e9hLVTh9GZKougdcbcqXcZqNhHIuc5Y4BzUP7j2XKUUWwiKGjZ_bXQ%3D) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: United Rural Dems HQ
subject: Peter, let me introduce myself…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
I'm excited to serve as your interim URD President

| |
---
It's nice to meet you, Peter. My name is Nat, and I will be serving as your Interim President of URD for the next few months. Here's a little bit about me: I'm a lover of vinyl records, can always be seen with a cup of coffee in my hands, and will talk about Ohio politics to anyone who will listen. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44833174/343289083/311099802?refcode2=41e8f83f-33ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220502_nf_intro_i1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZThmODNmLTMzY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qbJm17A0Vav0l7MZuwq_lcYefrxlu6dnNAuqJUi46M8=)** Rural America is my home. I'm a lifelong Ohioan and a resident of Appalachian Southeast Ohio. I know how rural Americans feel when they are neglected by politicians at the state and federal levels because I’ve lived it. I’ve seen firsthand what it looks like when your community is left behind by both Democrats and Republicans. My hometown in Ohio voted for President Obama in overwhelming majority twice before flipping and voting for Trump twice. Our communities are being forgotten as America moves forward. [**Can you help me fight for my communities by chipping in any amount you can?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44833175/343289084/311099802?refcode2=41e8f83f-33ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220502_nf_intro_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZThmODNmLTMzY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qbJm17A0Vav0l7MZuwq_lcYefrxlu6dnNAuqJUi46M8=) I got into field organizing because there's nothing more important to me than knocking on the doors of my neighbors, talking directly about the issues that matter most to them as Americans living in rural areas. There’s no better way to grab the walleye by its gills than direct voter contact! When more rural residents can get out and make their voices heard at the ballot, that's a win for rural communities and all Americans. But more than anything, I'm in this fight because it's personal to me. Republicans across state legislatures in the Midwest continue their attacks on young trans women, like me, just for being who we are. **I'm proud to be trans, but I unapologetically reject being used as a pawn by Republicans to implement policies that will hurt queer, specifically transgender, folks.** That's why I'll keep fighting back against Republican legislators who continue to hurt both my rural and transgender communities. Being in leadership at United Rural Democrats allows me to fight back by supporting candidates who support our values and understand the needs of both of these communities. As we're approaching the midterms, our team needs all the resources we can get to continue speaking directly with voters and Democrats who care. [**Peter, will you help me fight for the issues that matter most to us by sending a contribution to United Rural Democrats?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44833176/343289085/311099802?refcode2=41e8f83f-33ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=220502_nf_intro_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkzMDg1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxZThmODNmLTMzY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qbJm17A0Vav0l7MZuwq_lcYefrxlu6dnNAuqJUi46M8=) clean_body: I'm excited to serve as your interim URD President | | It's nice to meet you, Peter. My name is Nat, and I will be serving as your Interim President of URD for the next few months. Here's a little bit about me: I'm a lover of vinyl records, can always be seen with a cup of coffee in my hands, and will talk about Ohio politics to anyone who will listen. = Rural America is my home. I'm a lifelong Ohioan and a resident of Appalachian Southeast Ohio. I know how rural Americans feel when they are neglected by politicians at the state and federal levels because I’ve lived it. I’ve seen firsthand what it looks like when your community is left behind by both Democrats and Republicans. My hometown in Ohio voted for President Obama in overwhelming majority twice before flipping and voting for Trump twice. Our communities are being forgotten as America moves forward. = I got into field organizing because there's nothing more important to me than knocking on the doors of my neighbors, talking directly about the issues that matter most to them as Americans living in rural areas. There’s no better way to grab the walleye by its gills than direct voter contact! When more rural residents can get out and make their voices heard at the ballot, that's a win for rural communities and all Americans. But more than anything, I'm in this fight because it's personal to me. Republicans across state legislatures in the Midwest continue their attacks on young trans women, like me, just for being who we are. I'm proud to be trans, but I unapologetically reject being used as a pawn by Republicans to implement policies that will hurt queer, specifically transgender, folks. That's why I'll keep fighting back against Republican legislators who continue to hurt both my rural and transgender communities. Being in leadership at United Rural Democrats allows me to fight back by supporting candidates who support our values and understand the needs of both of these communities. As we're approaching the midterms, our team needs all the resources we can get to continue speaking directly with voters and Democrats who care. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = = In Solidarity, Natalie Flanagan , Interim President, United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . subject: New Coalition: Law Enforcement Families for McSwain
body:
Bill McSwain announced a new coalition of law enforcement families who have pledged to support his run for Governor. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/billmcswain/new-coalition-law-enforcement-families-for-mcswain?e=b1ec95759b)
---
| |
---
| **PRESS RELEASE
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
---
**May 2, 2022
CONTACT: Rachel Tripp
202.738.9089**
---
| |
# Law Enforcement Families for McSwain
_A new coalition in support of Bill McSwain for Governor_ **West Chester, Pa.** **\-- **Bill McSwain today introduced Law Enforcement Families for McSwain, a coalition of retired and active law enforcement officers and their families who have pledged to support Bill's candidacy for Governor.

The group is led by Maureen Faulkner and Terri O'Connor, whose deceased husbands, Officers Daniel Faulkner and James O'Connor, were both victims of violent anti-police attacks in Philadelphia.

Both Faulkner and O'Connor have become outspoken advocates for policies that will support law enforcement and uphold law and order. Both women have also pledged to support McSwain and his [Plan to Restore Law and Order](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=ce41adb4da&e=b1ec95759b), which will return safety and security to Pennsylvania neighborhoods and implement the death penalty for anyone convicted of killing a police officer.

Maureen Faulkner had this to say in support of McSwain:
---
|
> _**"When it comes to law and order and justice, many of our public officials in Pennsylvania have lost their moral compass. Criminals are portrayed as victims, and the true victims of violent crimes are left unaided and forgotten. The one exception is Bill McSwain, who has been an incomparable ally as I've fought to keep my husband's guilty killer in prison. He is not afraid to fight for justice and expose those who seek to destroy our legal system. This is the kind of leadership our Commonwealth needs. **_ **_I am honored to support Bill McSwain as he runs for Governor of Pennsylvania, and extend my full endorsement. I encourage all citizens, especially law enforcement families, to vote for the candidate who will restore law and order and protect our police. Vote for Bill McSwain for Governor."_ **
---
|
---
| Terri O'Connor, who spoke at McSwain's campaign announcement event in September, added her own words of support:
---
| **_“Bill McSwain was there for me and my family in the days after our loss of my husband Jimmy, and assured us that he would prosecute the thugs who took him from us. Jimmy would have loved Bill and everything he stands for. Bill McSwain kept his promise to my family and will be a strong fighter for all law enforcement families like mine."_**
---
| O'Connor also appeared in an ad on behalf of McSwain, currently being promoted digitally:
---
| [ ](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=8f5776d18d&e=b1ec95759b)
---
|
---
| Another member of the coalition is Detective/Lieutenant William Cahill, who retired from the Westtown-Goshen Regional Police Department after 34 years. Cahill encouraged voters to support McSwain, who will partner with police officers to prioritize public safety:
---
|
> **_"As U.S. Attorney, Bill McSwain never waivered in his defense of law-abiding citizens and was a constant advocate for law enforcement officers and our families. As Governor, I know that Bill will put an end to the pro-criminal mentality that has infected our cities, and will partner with police officers to prioritize public safety and clean up our streets. Police officers have a friend in Bill McSwain, and I am proud to support Bill McSwain for Governor."_**
---
| Another coalition member is Officer Eric D. Ruggeri of Chester County, who said that a vote for McSwain will mean safer streets and empowered law enforcement:
---
|
> **_"Over the past several years, there has been a surge of anti-police sentiment encouraged by progressive leaders who put law-abiding citizens last. It's time to elect a Governor who will view police officers as partners, and who will prioritize an agenda that is rooted in public safety and a return to law and order. That Governor is Bill McSwain. Bill has proven that he will empower police officers and enact policies to keep violent criminals off the streets. Anyone who values safe streets, secure neighborhoods, and support for law enforcement should vote Bill McSwain for Governor."_**
---
|
---
| Learn more about Bill McSwain's Plan to Restore Law and Order [here](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=93486bdb30&e=b1ec95759b).
---
| **BACKGROUND: **
Appointed by President Trump, McSwain's record as U.S. Attorney demonstrates his fierce defense of constitutional rights, dedication to upholding law and order, and history of putting criminals and corrupt politicians in jail. Prior to becoming a prosecutor, Bill served as a scout/sniper platoon commander in the U.S. Marine Corps. He was born in Philadelphia and raised in Chester County, where he lives today with his wife, Stephanie, and their four children. More information on McSwain's background and platform is available [here.](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=9d1a2204e2&e=b1ec95759b)
###
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=0e9b8faedf&e=b1ec95759b)
---
| | [](billmcswain.com)
---
|
---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=c19c58ce3e) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://freedompapac.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=b9af0aef3fa3167622552aedb&id=de4180c8e2&e=b1ec95759b&c=c19c58ce3e).
---

Fellow Conservative,

>From inflation to the border crisis, you don’t have to look far to see the mess liberals in Washington have gotten us in.

Just visit your local gas station - that is, if you haven’t already run out.

Recently, I proudly gave my endorsement to Theresa Gavarone, a successful conservative state legislator running for US Congress in Ohio’s 9th district—a district that neighbors my own. She has a proven track record of standing up for life and the working men and women of her district.

Theresa is running for Congress to secure our elections and ensure we never find ourselves in this mess again.

http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=2d88b2b0de0187cec7ee8b35d8f9607390e1935993b09190e3c3fc43b79300137ba14959c2b64b38a608db4d955833f513d8fdcf7c0ea831
>">Donate to Theresa’s campaign now and help us restore integrity to our elections. >>

That’s why Theresa recently introduced legislation to require photo ID for voting in Ohio.

Help us win this fight, Fellow Conservative. As the next congresswoman from Ohio, Theresa will join me in standing up to the radical Biden agenda, protect the unborn, and preserve our nation’s democracy!

We can’t afford another four years of liberal control. Donate to Theresa’s campaign today and help end the Democrats’ war on our country.

http://click.info.houseconservativestrust.com/?qs=2d88b2b0de0187cec7ee8b35d8f9607390e1935993b09190e3c3fc43b79300137ba14959c2b64b38a608db4d955833f513d8fdcf7c0ea831

For America,

Jim Banks

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291650:J3iAkho7N:m:1:3317145305:2E66525B05FA9C27B334423E8D5B3E18:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291651:J3iAkho7N:m:1:3317145305:2E66525B05FA9C27B334423E8D5B3E18:r "RonJon Announcement")
---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291651:J3iAkho7N:m:1:3317145305:2E66525B05FA9C27B334423E8D5B3E18:r "Please click here to donate now")**
---
| | | [DONATE TODAY](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60291651:J3iAkho7N:m:1:3317145305:2E66525B05FA9C27B334423E8D5B3E18:r "SAVE THE SENATE")
---
| Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc.
---

Oshkosh, WI 54903-1159

Deja Alvarez is running to become the first openly trans Latina member of the Pennsylvania House of Representatives. | | | | [ ](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=2ac01eea11&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

---
| I'm thrilled to be endorsed by Latino Victory Fund, the organization dedicated to building political power in the Latinx community so our voices and values are reflected at every level of government and in the policies that drive our country forward.

Latinx people represent 18% of our country but only 1% of our elected officials. This endorsement is particularly poignant to me as, when elected, I will be the first trans Latina legislator in the nation.

Representation matters.

[**Can you help get this grassroots campaign across the finish line to make history?**](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=0e492a7ff9&e=3f8e2ea1e3)

With more than two decades of community advocacy and professional experience in the nonprofit and public health field, Deja is committed to building on progressive values, economic recovery, and historic LGBTQ representation in Harrisburg. In May of 2022, we have an opportunity to continue to grow representation in our legislative body in Harrisburg that closely reflects the needs, interests, and diversity of the 182nd District.
Join us as we get the work done. [www.dejaforpa.com](https://dejaforpa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b6353e8c7ba78b936853cab9&id=2b3f769f3f&e=3f8e2ea1e3)_

name: Jane Timken
subject: Election Day is TOMORROW!
body:
| | | [](https://)
---
| | Dear Peter, Tomorrow is Election Day! It is extremely important that if you haven’t already voted, you make a plan to go and vote tomorrow. Every county has multiple polling locations and finding your own is very easy to do. All you have to do is go to the following link and follow the prompts to find your specific polling location: [https://www.ohiosos.gov/elections/voters/toolkit/polling-location/](http://links.janetimkenforohio.com/u/click?_t=d33702f99bd24ab29d9d703faac4f8a3&_m=da0124b173cb45a6bf717e39db78b466&_e=a5vIJOu9hOPWcpVNPFay62Gg53Psj8KFUQPV3_sYpG-2ltIabpTU5vbC9v3mfedHTIf8octmFB1HxONihjwvssIYQGYJbUHPjlDpow6CQZYycJ6MGqmhQEbbMBCkIFGoOZnbzMQe1dxbnTgTDjEQbwUdvLoxhksXDi_fPqVjj0KjeZuhno2yCVzO9_kEXlPc42WTwIvrG17oRkev42HL4XmN4G52w29A0lwx9Y3zaX9gGJPiS4zLurvnRzr1jCn3yYyPhF9F8lvw5Yf2vWc_FC30pI6W7TTatHt0HbAdnUPr01A3qKfNWPLitgCxMHVG) We all know that turnout is going to be very low for this primary so every vote counts! Make sure you and all your family and friends go out and vote for me! Every extra person you bring to the polls or encourage to vote for me makes a HUGE difference. Polls will be open across the state from 6:00am to 7:30pm. Please help put our country back on the right track by electing me as your next United States Senator TOMORROW. Thank you, Jane Timken
---

Friends,

First off, I want to say Thank You. Thank you for all you've done recently to support me with your kind words and generous donations. Now, here’s the hard truth.

My campaign and I missed our End-of-Month fundraising goal, and now my Socialist opposition is foaming at the mouth, gearing up to use all of those Hollywood Left elites' deep pockets to bombard our campaign with attack ads left and right.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Thank you in advance for your $25 donation towards our $1 million drive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834639/343296044/1927938479?refcode=220502_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY3Y2FhOS0zOWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IddHJcrP0R79un79CeSQx1421LTYyFagaHGXO6f-z4I=)
Team — [**I’m writing to ask you to make a contribution — $25 or whatever you can afford split between my campaign and Seth Moulton — to help counter the $1,000,000 NRSC attack ad that is on the air now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834641/343296046/1927938479?refcode=220502_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY3Y2FhOS0zOWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IddHJcrP0R79un79CeSQx1421LTYyFagaHGXO6f-z4I=) Here’s the truth: This is the biggest attack on our campaign so far. The NRSC put $1,000,000 behind this ad in one week alone, and they won’t stop there. But we’ve seen tough times before. And thanks to you, we’ve always come out the other side stronger. So, we need a BIG response to show them that it’s going to take a lot more than a few attack ads to stop this team and our momentum. **And friend, it’s critical that we have everyone with us if we’re going to hit our $1,000,000 goal by midnight and set the record straight. Even splitting $25 can make a difference if everyone is pitching in.** We’ve had a good start so far, and while our opponents may have super PACs and outside groups spending millions of dollars in attack ads against us, we have each other. And that’s how we’ll win. Which is why I’m humbly asking: [**Can you please split a donation of $25 or more today between my campaign and Seth Moulton to help us hit our $1,000,000 goal and counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? I would not ask were it not so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834643/343296048/1927938479?refcode=220502_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY3Y2FhOS0zOWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IddHJcrP0R79un79CeSQx1421LTYyFagaHGXO6f-z4I=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834645/343296050/-1534947712?refcode=220502_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY3Y2FhOS0zOWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IddHJcrP0R79un79CeSQx1421LTYyFagaHGXO6f-z4I=)
We are in a great position to win this race. The polls are close and our organization is strong. But the attacks we have yet to face will be unprecedented — and we have to be ready. And if you chip in to help, I know we will be. Thank you, Mark Kelly
[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834648/343296052/-1534947712?refcode=220502_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDY3Y2FhOS0zOWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IddHJcrP0R79un79CeSQx1421LTYyFagaHGXO6f-z4I=)
