name: Nina Turner for Us
subject: Don’t want to worry we could’ve done more
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina Turner for Us
body:
Wednesday morning — just a few days from now — we will wake up likely knowing the results of this race.
#

Hello Somebody!
Wednesday morning — just a few days from now — we will wake up likely knowing the results of this race.
We’ll know whether we did enough to elect Nina and send a progressive champion to Congress, or if the millions of dollars in corporate money and Super PAC-funded attack ads were enough to drown us out.
What we don’t want to do is worry that we could’ve done more. Would one more phone call or conversation with a voter or another $27 contribution have made the difference?
Instead of worrying, let’s leave nothing to chance. Let’s make sure we reached every last voter possible. That’s why we’re asking for your support again today:
**[Can you please make a $27 donation to our campaign today to finish this race strong? Every dollar will be immediately used to reach voters and turn out our supporters in the final push before Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44834740/343296655/-1302338115?refcode2=ad317810-3aca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220502-1-t1&utm_source=em220502&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDMxNzgxMC0zYWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=72GatRrnfvAxJuw4ml9gsl5EwRoeWRbZ9A5oUlHmsmQ=)**
This race has not been easy, and the next few days will require us to work harder than ever. We need everyone to do everything they can to bring this thing home.
They may have big money, but we have the people. And tomorrow, we have a chance to show the entire country that our people-powered movement can take on Big Money and WIN.
With these hands,
Team Nina Turner

name: Sarah Longwell
subject: Who’s the bigger threat: J.D. Vance or Josh Mandel?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc
body:
|
---
> _We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at the new Republican Accountability PAC._
Friend,

On last week’s Threat to Democracy of the Week, we featured Trump-endorsed congressional candidate Max Miller and told you all about why he’s too extreme to govern. Since Ohio’s GOP Senate primary is tomorrow, we wanted to do something a little different this week and feature two names on this Threat to Democracy of the Week: J.D. Vance and Josh Mandel. These two are the most likely to become the GOP Senate nominee tomorrow, and you should know exactly what they stand for.
---
---
After receiving Trump’s endorsement, Vance has surged into first place in the polls and is most likely to win. The _Hillbilly Elegy_ author and former Never-Trump-turned-Forever-Trump candidate has made no secrets about what he plans to do in the Senate. Vance recently gave an interview where he [stated](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FPk5nKv5V3Zsc37CgF0RN96HsmdhMzWDW5Pm7nx3bJr6MW8FTM9h4-HztvW7rkVTY2r4mQ6W72rtsp15Qb9hVsSk4M6QXZ9BW6XQLlV4W-f7DVZv_RQ6SKcPJW2nswwP8YX-q-W4jyWJJ5Mw3XzW2DHr4L6F5STMW6BXh382SYxSyVQML7R3z2kKHW1sdcTs1-lglPW3qbW4K31KgSsW6D0ytT13Bf60W8M5qPZ7XJQN4VcrpTz1PFKjhW5Scldr39r3l3W34MyDz2jnXxWW4VXxs61tnhgmW7g9qTK8nJrdQW4sT4Qg3CQ5d2W4Km-DX81fXDRN56T36m-WV3wW3k4j1l7b6BQZW1bgWF82Jm5Z_VpgDhY4R7KqSVbNBjX34SlyLW5mK1GH7BGv1bW7Wq5cf7B5w6pW2r0d7j3P0f6L31gd1) that Republicans should defy rulings by the courts to push the MAGA agenda, saying, “We need like a de-Baathification program, a de-woke-ification program.” On top of that, he’s also been [endorsed by](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FRp3q90_V1-WJV7CgRl9W3Z4GDf50WG9sW6Rc5dd1-06-PN988FS6QxyLRN1m1yt79WWWNW4YCr2g5gh17pW7658sq2MjLcDW4bmJGV3NtKm7W7JnHJ77N56TPN97rdpdrP8zwW1q-1Mk1rNvCCW1b9m8l3JB7ZGW1ttDTc31p2y-W6qBjHJ2bnSH3W89GWz87Gl0HsN847KRBPMxdDW9b2v7K5BcYFWW5F6KLz7NB12wVSbl1D27sHbXN22R3J_YQNf1W4_9HDg4SVJHSW3JVN5h8MHtmRW6Mp3R16rYvgYW24FywB9fPvKxW8QxlBf2ZzXK-W3VVJHH7SpLJCW17RC-76xxg1xW1wfR1S50K5_vW5DGKjQ5RvWBcW6brchV6qycQQW37-7Rl97cl_K34181) Marjorie Taylor Greene and says that “she's a friend of mine. She's a patriot." And if that wasn’t enough, he regularly makes it [clear](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FRp3q90_V1-WJV7CgY5bW86p4bH4PsrMdW7BQft_2b9pD_W4Xhghv90jXvMW3FZczP8qzYN0W2ymTTG9hxgRCW7Yv-Sj3drL0rW7JtScF8HX4l5W8pCkrJ1nQ6nRW64H2Sf5qDjwzW5jY4y04-2QxjW8pS_KC48M3fLW3kWcJV70WlQRN1njPszZXD8NW97L24514hLx-W6dRTvD5GLxmGW72l2FY12KBPhN4PpSbHzQCVBW2Km-h55Zh21KW38lqcf3YWsCCVV94xh314wZVVP63k-45GXDbW4TyQg07zrQ7wW68GXl27l1mfWW2_sLjL5nhbVpW3lTlbb1C0HCNW5M85dQ5br6SRW1z6gLP2mznh8W4bN1b36rGBdPW6s6YKK3Pvf8vN6x98VyZ_YTG36w51) that he thinks the United States shouldn’t be doing anything to help Ukraine in its war against Russia.
---
---
Now running for Senate for the third time, Josh Mandel has decided he also needs to go full MAGA in the hope that it launches him to victory. From [burning masks](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FR53q90JV1-WJV7CgQs-W1jF4h55mw_t5W6qm-4P5QcN-QW8n08J-3DcN8GW899cZs8MqtzwN2lxYm8bkzVtW3hq7gq5ZbsM1MyhpQ4t82xKW5MbCQt571h6WW64nrjz1XFZMvW3jZwg71S0hslW25cGYf7vQYS7W91FTXC2YbdHQVh4RQF6P4Q_7VkBHrl1ZNH6CW3RtLx744XR9GVHfyQC95w-RwW5H9qqR4HCgh7W8MsBkP8rs_v3W9m2DhB5sQHqYW64scZ363YQY6W2-0Dtl3HXpN8W1x7bMq6T_CGXW8c2sV_6MnxDWW7rMdNl4Mdn53W6jWzZt7kNLShW8g32NK40xvZ0W1bC8Kk6sRN_QW5qVr_21YNk_b37N41) to saying NIH Director Anthony Fauci should be [arrested](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FPX5nKvJV3Zsc37CgPSxW1z_XW06-gvmjN5gDpQTTf0N1W7VTsm46ws3HMW5QBBlv4L3NLTW3cr0jM1yQDfbW2dfbxb6G7cDnW2vq3492hWc71W3xsvYR7NQ5mfMlfgr8H9c-qW44m_9z59PwH1W6SwzK-2rsv9_W2SYf_x4qDDFgW2HXN3_505syxW8sPSV88Dl28tW2hV5tH32FC6LW4VTvdh67S8TWW80K4pJ4wBlq6W8qh2vJ7Hr0kZW6lNgC83wnbJbW4jjVrj5l4l69W8c5kn38jPGH1W6QDfR86dFVw9VVSS5_6xn26HW740Mzb48W9F_W4KBsLX5V4d_5W7Ry-pq8VpDVCVMwv7d3wmtb6W4L3fP581Qc89W3FKYQh3HGg6YN6zFyfBfBmw7W5mwvQF7F26l8W8xx3GQ80vWZTN97_nX9dq7ScW6SVwLg2FnrTZW4F4XC_6ZNvnFW4FJd2T4jXBZQ33d21), there are few conspiracy theories that Mandel won’t embrace. The one he makes sure to work into every stump speech—and repeats verbatim—is that he believes that “the 2020 election was stolen from Donald J. Trump” and that we need to “abolish the Jan. 6 Commission and replace it with a Nov. 3 Commission.” [He’s paraded out that talking point so often that it’s become a MAGA crowd favorite:](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FRp3q90_V1-WJV7CgBY3VbGbRk4x0nNRW3GdX7b2xnV5wW4HbnzV7-mftWW57sYHC35WJfrW7GYvdy5cpzbxW5vZXBg1kZnThW12x7W97BpKyTN4PyWLXv91f1W16gz1L2qJ6lDW7NfvXZ5Z_FVKW7t5Qg25dQg4cW8dCQm33sV5MSW3tPSMy6BSxNrW5vtz4k4zsvm_W1BBQXj4LCFkKW8HMQ_X5nbkXLVYZpyG5-P9-qW3WwKSz1-pd0lW89rhw84pljmWVL_-bT2jQ_-zW8kfqN_5SKgXLW3NK94S2gx6bHVb8wLc4p7r6cW9gR37r5TXWj4W8zcg9f4_dPhWN4F376crdMzwW5h5dhv6LZ1MVW7zgJB43pLnjkN8q23M6mwD6HW2zb8lz699Jb83mCX1)
---
[ ](https://cQ0qs04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/2L+113/cQ0qs04/VXdpTj6QWCtpW6CbH3y7Dfy9wW3wqskQ4JBBZsN5j5FRp3q90_V1-WJV7CgDsPW4bTRzF8__BC7W6C1SKp90gV1SW20q1Vv54tXm1W42d1K_7grRCzVXnNmv7TZxXtW6xQqjJ77kksgN4BbRvnBZLxMVhDtsj5kNYSdW2mBxvD5JZx27W8qrV-76srs3qW8cR28-4FnVHbVJS4_z2PS01CV2KdTH1bDr4TW2tnjVn9fw5r0W8gRxcF72tg_rW5pW4Gf9lCDhQN1F1t282CW77N1yKsnlLb579W1y7XTr386HflW32Xp787dylSKW4Sh7jV6g43w_W1N_kcn7qWpN4W2Pp9Tj5ckXpNVF5k4h3ptBk-W853Qjf7M3S94VPZGvz1fz070N4dGcrD6V0RzW143d7Y1SJlt0W35y1d51z3dSrW4K0clG4GHRcx3fV91)
---
Whether it’s J.D. Vance threatening to use the government to punish his political opponents or Josh Mandel arguing that the 2020 election was "stolen," it’s clear both of them would be threats to our democracy if elected. The rest of the race isn’t much better. From Mike Gibbons to Jane Timken, almost every other candidate has decided to run as a mini-Trump. The one candidate who isn’t full-on MAGA—State Sen. Matt Dolan—has enjoyed a late surge in his poll numbers, but he’s still likely to finish behind Vance and Mandel.
##
Stay tuned for more of what we plan to do as we get closer to November!
##
Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC

clean_body: | We thought you might want to see this special message from our friends at the new Republican Accountability PAC. Friend, On last week’s Threat to Democracy of the Week, we featured Trump-endorsed congressional candidate Max Miller and told you all about why he’s too extreme to govern. Since Ohio’s GOP Senate primary is tomorrow, we wanted to do something a little different this week and feature two names on this Threat to Democracy of the Week: J.D. Vance and Josh Mandel. These two are the most likely to become the GOP Senate nominee tomorrow, and you should know exactly what they stand for. After receiving Trump’s endorsement, Vance has surged into first place in the polls and is most likely to win. The Hillbilly Elegy author and former Never-Trump-turned-Forever-Trump candidate has made no secrets about what he plans to do in the Senate. Vance recently gave an interview where he that Republicans should defy rulings by the courts to push the MAGA agenda, saying, “We need like a de-Baathification program, a de-woke-ification program.” On top of that, he’s also been Marjorie Taylor Greene and says that “she's a friend of mine. She's a patriot." And if that wasn’t enough, he regularly makes it that he thinks the United States shouldn’t be doing anything to help Ukraine in its war against Russia. Now running for Senate for the third time, Josh Mandel has decided he also needs to go full MAGA in the hope that it launches him to victory. From to saying NIH Director Anthony Fauci should be , there are few conspiracy theories that Mandel won’t embrace. The one he makes sure to work into every stump speech—and repeats verbatim—is that he believes that “the 2020 election was stolen from Donald J. Trump” and that we need to “abolish the Jan. 6 Commission and replace it with a Nov. 3 Commission.” Whether it’s J.D. Vance threatening to use the government to punish his political opponents or Josh Mandel arguing that the 2020 election was "stolen," it’s clear both of them would be threats to our democracy if elected. The rest of the race isn’t much better. From Mike Gibbons to Jane Timken, almost every other candidate has decided to run as a mini-Trump. The one candidate who isn’t full-on MAGA—State Sen. Matt Dolan—has enjoyed a late surge in his poll numbers, but he’s still likely to finish behind Vance and Mandel. Stay tuned for more of what we plan to do as we get closer to November! Sarah Longwell Treasurer, Republican Accountability PAC | | | | | | | | Republican Accountability Project, 925 15th Street NW, Washington, DC 20005 Paid for by the Republican Accountability PAC Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: A.G. Holder Update
subject: SCOTUS is putting its legitimacy at risk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee
body:
---

---
_The Washington Post_
“Democrats’ redistricting gains hit a roadblock:
**The Supreme Court”** Frankly, friend, it's been several years since we could depend on SCOTUS to uphold fair redistricting and voting rights. But with the addition of Amy Coney Barrett to create a six-justice conservative majority, the court seems to have thrown all reason out the window. Their decisions are inconsistent and ignore precedent. **As A.G. Holder has said, SCOTUS is putting its very legitimacy at risk.**

And yet, supporters of fair maps must continue to fight in and out of the courts in states across the country to achieve the redistricting the American people deserve.

So how do we move forward, knowing that the nation's highest court isn't on the side of democracy and equality? The same way we've always done – by putting our noses to the grindstone and executing our multi-pronged strategy. **The fact is, our work has never relied on any one court.** And with you on our side, we've been able to overcome any number of challenges.

So friend – **will you dig deep today and help us keep the fight going?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The Washington Post “Democrats’ redistricting gains hit a roadblock: The Supreme Court” Frankly, friend, it's been several years since we could depend on SCOTUS to uphold fair redistricting and voting rights. But with the addition of Amy Coney Barrett to create a six-justice conservative majority, the court seems to have thrown all reason out the window. Their decisions are inconsistent and ignore precedent. As A.G. Holder has said, SCOTUS is putting its very legitimacy at risk. And yet, supporters of fair maps must continue to fight in and out of the courts in states across the country to achieve the redistricting the American people deserve. So how do we move forward, knowing that the nation's highest court isn't on the side of democracy and equality? The same way we've always done – by putting our noses to the grindstone and executing our multi-pronged strategy. The fact is, our work has never relied on any one court. And with you on our side, we've been able to overcome any number of challenges. So friend – will you dig deep today and help us keep the fight going? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Team NDRC = **= Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. body:
It’s Herschel Walker, and I’m reaching out to you with an urgent message.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4vv0fkb2eanp4fatkbvn43cemt8k0vtimqjq4v0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o72chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdlmprr6cjheer38dbmcpqeasrh66precb5e3g69c73cjij1d3265hnas5ic3jjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33d5jcgo7co366pgb6o77m2qmash5u)

| | | Friend,

It's Herschel Walker, and I'm reaching out to you with an urgent message. Our Senate race in Georgia is one of the toughest races in the country, so I'm asking if you can help.

Early voting begins today for the Republican Primary, so we are ramping up our efforts to contact voters. _**[Senator Raphael Warnock (D) has outraised every candidate in the country- including our campaign, so we're doing everything we can to close the fundraising gap.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgbb1o6btn1fs8h8ii40solme0ofcs4288bg1jvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o72chh2bs)**_

---

In the first three months of this year, my Democrat opponent raised a record-breaking $13.6 MILLION! That's $151,000 PER DAY or $105 PER MINUTE - both day and night!

_**[I know it may seem like a lot, but we can close the gap if enough PATRIOTS will stand with us. I'm humbly asking you to give a donation of $3 or more today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgmu1uoh6dcgo65hqn55nmjm8n8r06o5jfrtureg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o72chh2bs)**_

Democrats know we have the chance to flip this Senate seat in Georgia from BLUE to RED. They see that we're virtually TIED in the polls, so they are FREAKING OUT. They know that Republicans will fight tooth and nail to keep Georgia from going BLUE AGAIN, so they are pouring resources into the state like crazy.

**In fact, Chuck Schumer 's Super PAC just announced they are going to spend $23 million in attack ads against me! That proves how scared they are!**

If we're going to win the critical Senate race in Georgia, we need your help.

In the 60 seconds it has taken you to read this short email, my Democrat opponent has raised another $105! Can you believe that? _**[Would you be one of 5 people to give $21 this very minute (for a combined $105) and help us close the fundraising gap?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zq8am9jfj75fhuv2ecilfk3q4n67mnher0rprfsg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o72chh2bs)**_

When you donate, you'll be helping us win in Georgia, take back the Republican majority in the U.S. Senate, stop the Biden-Harris agenda, and get America back on track!

To victory,

Herschel Walker

name: Danny Tarkanian
subject: Where are the courageous conservatives??
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tarkanian for Nevada |
body:
The liberal Left and DC elites ruin our country with their tax-and-spend ways and their woke agenda.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm923lfg902rlu1bs179n7uert4pplcioot4bc5g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9chlm9rrct5nm4qb6c9jeoqb9d7462rr6thic9gr1c30m1incpr1corm1c9n63jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0e8omccdkmdg6fdr3coob1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgbqofuaep1fnriu5hrrv6d8h0j5sq0tu20j8cgo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
Friend, The liberal Left and DC elites ruin our country with their tax-and-spend ways and their woke agenda. We see their failures along the southern border, as illegal immigrants flock to the United States en masse, with no end in sight. We see it with inflation at a 40-year high, as Americans struggle to pay for groceries and fill up their gas tanks. And we see it as crime continues to skyrocket throughout the nation.
---
[**FIGHT THE LEFT**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hjnhjcu7cjfhesbmd614cjnm7efgo7lgst5pmg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
**We need to get back to the America First principles that made our country so great: limited government, lower taxes, a secure border, and a booming economy.** **[We need courageous conservative Republicans to stand up and fight for the policies we know make our country successful.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z223r8nlmca0ssccrceognj64ub2n4ojik9vdhvg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)** But friend, there’s a problem. **Over the last 11 years, “conservative” Congressman Mark Amodei has voted more with congressional Democrats than with the conservative constituents he’s supposed to represent in Nevada’s 2nd Congressional District.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq75mduggd3pd0l0pcca7ja95trqnuei84jemvp0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
Mark Amodei doesn’t represent the conservatives in our district. In fact, he’s the exact opposite of what we _want_ and _need_ in Washington. That’s why I’m reaching out to you, friend.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf87lrknhkfo8scvu17kvldgri95jlc1qeq5584g_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
**My name is Danny Tarkanian. I’m currently a Douglas County Commissioner, and I’m challenging Establishment hack Mark Amodei to represent conservatives in Nevada’s 2nd Congressional District.** I’ve lived in Nevada with my family for close to 50 years. My wife, Amy, is the former Nevada Republican Party Chairwoman. Together, we have four beautiful children that we’ve raised right here in Gardnerville. We want to provide our young children with a better atmosphere to grow and develop in their formative years. I want my children to have the same childhood experience I had growing up in a small, close-knit community with traditional Nevada culture and values.
---
[**STAND WITH DANNY TARKANIAN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgq3sqtjvlc2b3575icub3bl0gcvdaa6047r204o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
The values that make Nevada so great are the same values my grandmother, Rose, instilled in us. She escaped the Armenian Genocide and came to America for a better life for her family. She persevered through the early death of her husband and the Great Depression. Her son, Jerry, became the greatest basketball coach in NCAA history. My mother, Lois, founded the first private school for the deaf in California and currently serves on the Nevada Board of Regents. **My family’s story is proof the American Dream is achievable for anyone and everyone.** And a smaller government means every American has the freedom to achieve their dreams, whatever they may be.
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv97mdabv6u8et6bqdlu5bjik9nd816uqo04ipug_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
Friend, I carry my grandmother Rose’s story close to my heart because _I’ve seen first-hand how truly amazing America is._ I’ve seen first-hand the opportunities our nation has. **And because of those opportunities, I, too, have achieved my own version of the American Dream.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvs33a0kul6431unstdpbr1iocp1s2e301rs1pbo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
[**MAKE AMERICA PROSPEROUS AGAIN**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3n3jt1eu2dl14lh5j2pgg61haevsaeg85jtamv8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
In fact, I successfully developed the Tarkanian Professional Center, a 100,000-square foot commercial real estate center that has thrived even through our state’s real estate downturn. And I founded a successful non-profit youth basketball organization. We teach young children the life lessons they learn through playing sports, like hard work, commitment, and sportsmanship. Since the start of the program, thousands of kids have participated and it’s something I’m incredibly proud of.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztqo5186upsg90kucsqhmslg7l20biuh7ev5rmko_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
I don’t believe our nation is living up to our greatest potential, friend. The American Dream is harder for so many to achieve because of Big Government, the liberal Left and the DC Establishment. _**I’m running for Congress because I want to get back to the America First policies that make our country – and our citizens – prosperous.**_ **[Can I count on you to join my team? >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6507rvjnd496125gbmcgnf0tn85ih59ct6tgloo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)**
---
[**DONATE $100**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg0pj7t27o90k2nnsse9v0bkjci6lhtgpuocmido_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $75**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7oaqc5uudtbot54segoapkje8fblgc3bd493s5o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1cvhh1ljr80ktiaom7q5qrtddto9dlc7l0p1k00_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE $25**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrehrmakvmapm6vj7tl8vqtbigj4fl6anol62oq8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
[**DONATE ANY AMOUNT
**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2hug31f2j0c1qannt1m2dub42d2pjp75m8o58n8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
Thank you for fighting alongside me,
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4q24a82je4slakn0gq7v1jl6efjstgf0at4gbno_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli60o76chh2bs)
---
Danny TarkanianCandidate, NV-02

Does Trump even know who he's endorsed?
| Team, At a rally yesterday, former president Donald Trump didn't seem to know who he endorsed in Ohio's Republican Senate Primary.

| | Folks, I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for your generous support during April – thanks to you, we surpassed our monthly fundraising goal! Even though the National Journal ranked VA-02 as the district “most likely to flip,” and Republicans are diverting an incredible amount of resources to do just that, your support never wavers. That means the world to me. Your grassroots support is how I know we’ll continue standing up to my Republican opponents and the GOP special interest groups. With our people-powered team, we’ll defy the odds again. Just like we did back in 2018. Thanks for being part of my team,
Elaine [P.S. – if you didn’t get the chance to donate in April, you can help us start May on the right foot by chipping in [**here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44835308/343299178/1679455200?refcode=EM_BS_LUR_220502_FR_Thankyou_B1_copy_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2JhODJiMy0zYmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uM_uQXddUkstRsph5_Wg7mPENO2Cf-mXgzoX4pZP_jQ=)]

name: =?utf-8?q?PA_GOV_ALERTS_=F0=9F=9A=A8?=
subject: Barletta endorsed by Senator Lisa Baker
body:
| | | | Baker backs Barletta over two Senate colleagues
---
---
**Barletta endorsed by Senator Lisa Baker** _Baker backs Barletta over two Senate colleagues_
---
Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, the leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of State Senator Lisa Baker. Citing Barletta's leadership and experience, Baker endorsed Barletta over two of her Senate colleagues, signaling coalescing support behind Barletta's grassroots campaign.
“Lou Barletta has been a friend and colleague for nearly twenty-five years," said **Senator Lisa Baker**. "He has always tackled the tough issues with relentless resolve. In choosing our next governor, we need to look for someone who has executive experience and a track record for supporting community projects that are key to progress for families and communities. When I worked with Lou Barletta in his positions as mayor of Hazleton and U.S. Congressman, he demonstrated the ability to deliver the cooperation and leadership required to run the large and complex enterprise of state government. Pennsylvania needs a chief executive who can grapple with the vital issues of jobs, health care, education, transportation, energy, environment, and public safety. Based on his track record, Lou is well-prepared to begin fixing problems, creating opportunity, and instituting reform, from day one. Northeastern Pennsylvania has not been treated well by state government over the past eight years. Having someone coming from our region in the governor’s office would be a decided advantage in our efforts. For these reasons, I am endorsing Lou Barletta as the Republican candidate for governor.”
"I am grateful to have Senator Lisa Baker's endorsement," said **Barletta**. "Politicians have ignored Northeastern Pennsylvania for far too long and people are ready for a conservative fighter who will stand up for our values and not bow down to the Radical Left's agenda that is destroying our Commonwealth. As governor, I will unleash our God-given natural resources so Pennsylvania can power the world. I will remove us from the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative (RGGI) that will dismantle our energy industry and make America more reliant on countries that hate us for energy. I will put parents back in charge of their children's education. And when I'm governor, boys will play boys sports and girls will play girls sports. This will be the great Pennsylvania comeback." ###
---

clean_body: | | | | Baker backs Barletta over two Senate colleagues Barletta endorsed by Senator Lisa Baker Baker backs Barletta over two Senate colleagues Former mayor and congressman Lou Barletta, the leading Republican candidate for governor of Pennsylvania, today announced the formal endorsement of State Senator Lisa Baker. Citing Barletta's leadership and experience, Baker endorsed Barletta over two of her Senate colleagues, signaling coalescing support behind Barletta's grassroots campaign. “Lou Barletta has been a friend and colleague for nearly twenty-five years," said Senator Lisa Baker. "He has always tackled the tough issues with relentless resolve. In choosing our next governor, we need to look for someone who has executive experience and a track record for supporting community projects that are key to progress for families and communities. When I worked with Lou Barletta in his positions as mayor of Hazleton and U.S. Congressman, he demonstrated the ability to deliver the cooperation and leadership required to run the large and complex enterprise of state government. Pennsylvania needs a chief executive who can grapple with the vital issues of jobs, health care, education, transportation, energy, environment, and public safety. Based on his track record, Lou is well-prepared to begin fixing problems, creating opportunity, and instituting reform, from day one. Northeastern Pennsylvania has not been treated well by state government over the past eight years. Having someone coming from our region in the governor’s office would be a decided advantage in our efforts. For these reasons, I am endorsing Lou Barletta as the Republican candidate for governor.” "I am grateful to have Senator Lisa Baker's endorsement," said Barletta. "Politicians have ignored Northeastern Pennsylvania for far too long and people are ready for a conservative fighter who will stand up for our values and not bow down to the Radical Left's agenda that is destroying our Commonwealth. As governor, I will unleash our God-given natural resources so Pennsylvania can power the world. I will remove us from the Regional Greenhouse Gas Initiative (RGGI) that will dismantle our energy industry and make America more reliant on countries that hate us for energy. I will put parents back in charge of their children's education. And when I'm governor, boys will play boys sports and girls will play girls sports. This will be the great Pennsylvania comeback." ### | | | | =

name: Laurie Teper
subject: Durham Schools Board Elections
body:
A message from Joetta MacMiller, candidate for Durham County School Board

The Better Board, Better Schools slate of School Board Candidates in Durham is a once in a lifetime opportunity to vote for five outstanding candidates who share a platform of fixing Durham's badly lagging schools, empowering parents to become more involved in their children's education, and keeping every student safe at every campus. If you think it is finally time for a real change in Durham's schools, now is the time to vote for that change.

# Curtis Hrischuk, Ph. D- District 1
Chris Burns - District 2

Gayathri Rajaraman- District 3
Valarie Jarvis - District 4
Joetta MacMiller - Consolidated B

Find out more at Betterboardbetterschools.com

Thanks!

Joetta

Laurie Teper
Volunteer Coordinator
Courtney Geels for Congress NC04
Email: [volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com](mailto:volunteers@courtneygeelsforcongress.com)
Cell: (847)212-5651
[courtneygeelsforcongress.com](http://courtneygeelsforcongress.com)

name: Freedom Caucus
subject: Left Targets Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Freedom Fund
body:
| | |
---
---
|
---
Peter: It's time to get into the fight. This time it's personal.
Georgia Democrats are trying to block Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene from running for re-election. They are trying to strip her name off the congressional ballot in her district.
**To punish Greene for exposing the Left's election law abuses, the Left is _abusing election laws!_**
This is not a prosecution - it's persecution. And we have to stop it!
**[Please help defend Majorie with an urgent contribution.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292099:JV3IphoNH:m:1:3253819041:56AD35EA70A6E3D3AA427BADD5777BEA:r)**
You can donate directly to her campaign through the House Freedom Fund, and we will pay all processing fees so she can use 100% of your contribution to fight back.
Marjorie Taylor Greene has been fighting harder than anyone to expose the Left's lies and protect America from their woke, socialist conspiracy. She has answered the bell on all of the big issues:
✓ Democrat election abuses
✓ Critical race theory in our schools
✓ Big Tech censorship
✓ Trans extremism
✓ Joe Biden's border crisis
✓ The Wuhan lab coverup
The media, corporate elites, and Republican insiders want Marjorie Taylor Greene gone. Why? **Because she's effective. **
**[It's time to help Majorie fight back.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292099:JV3IphoNH:m:1:3253819041:56AD35EA70A6E3D3AA427BADD5777BEA:r)**
Have you ever noticed that the Left never tries to defeat squishy, weak-kneed corporate Republicans? **They're as good as Democrats.** It's always the toughest, grittiest, most principled fighters that Washington really fears.
And that's what this is: fear. Not hate. Not outrage. **Fear**. Liberals are afraid of leaders like Marjorie Taylor Greene - like Donald Trump and Jim Jordan. They're scared of true conservatives who defend American culture and the rule of law.
Marjorie has never stopped fighting since she first took the oath of office. She fights Democrats and Republicans. She fights Big Tech, public health tyrants, and the media. She isn't backing down now.
But the woke Left and corporate right are trying to cancel her from Congress. It's the same old game. They can't beat her, so they're trying to destroy her.
_**We need to fight fire with fire.**_
Marjorie Taylor Greene needs your help now.
**[Please donate $25, $50, $100, or more to Marjorie Taylor Greene's campaign today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60292099:JV3IphoNH:m:1:3253819041:56AD35EA70A6E3D3AA427BADD5777BEA:r)**
_House Freedom Fund will pass along 100% of your contribution to her re-election campaign. _
Together, we can help her defeat this bogus corruption, get back on the ballot, and get back to kicking liberals where the sun doesn't shine. Sincerely,
---
---
Ray Yonkura Executive Director House Freedom Fund
---
|
---

Friend, Indiana’s primary election is tomorrow, so I wanted to reach out personally while I had a free moment and ask: **Have you made your plan to vote? ** Tomorrow from **6 AM to 6 PM** voters across Indiana have a chance to cast their ballots in the primary for one of the most important midterm elections of our lifetime. **Make sure your voice is heard and your vote is counted.** If you need to find your polling place you can head to [**indianavoters.com**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44836202/343302298/-790032278?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTQ3OWJiZC0zZWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ipxvBAXuS9nSaCK6UrxXpW37fu7h3-8lAY1b-v8ZNNk=&emci=9dff18b1-35ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=2a479bbd-3eca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4925535). **And, don’t forget:** a photo ID is required for all voters casting a ballot in person. Acceptable forms of ID include a driver's license, passport, military ID, or picture ID from the Bureau of Motor Vehicles. If you have any questions or concerns about voting, please call **317-261-3820 (INDEMS Voter Protection Hotline)**. See you at the polls! Mike Schmuhl

name: Ashley Ward
subject: Weekly Update: At the Polls
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
body:
https://ashleywardforcongress.com/ [https://ashleywardforcongress.com/]
Weekly Updates
A MESSAGE FROM ASHLEY
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-05-02%20at%2012.57.57%20PM.png] Monday morning I was a guest on 3-D News from WHUP in Hillsborough. What a lovely conversation with Bob that covered my motivation for running for office, my vision for how to represent the district, the challenges that face us with respect to getting things done in a heavily divided Congress, and the difficulty of being a first-time candidate. Take a listen! And circulate to your friends who might also be interested!
LISTEN [https://whupfm.org/episode/3-d-news-5-2-22-permanent-archive/]
EARLY VOTING BEGINS THIS WEEK!
We need volunteers to work polling sites during Early Voting and on Primary Day!
Having volunteers at voting sites to pass out literature to voters is a critical part of voter outreach. We are currently asking anyone who has time to consider helping us out at the polling sites across our district.
Saturday May 7th: We currently don't have anyone signed up for this date. Polls are open from 8am to 4pm on this day.
Sunday, May 8th: This is the last Sunday of Early Voting, so an important day for turnout. Only Durham is open on this day from Noon-4pm.
Saturday, May 14th: This is the last day of Early Voting! We currently have no volunteers for this day. Polls are open from 8am - 3pm.
If weekends are hard for you, Fridays are also a good day to hit the polling sites. Otherwise, weekdays from 8am-10am or 4pm-7:30 are good times to catch people before and after work.
PRIMARY DAY: We have 143 polling sites across our 5 counties. Polling sites are open from 6:30am to 7:30pm on Tuesday, May 17th. We need all hands on deck!
Click the links below (the buttons) to indicate when you are available.
EARLY VOTING [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Early%20Voting%20Volunteer&body=Sign%20me%20up%21%20I%20can%20help%20on%20the%20following%20days%20and%20times%3A] PRIMARY DAY [ashley@ashleywardforcongress.com?subject=Primary%20Day%20Volunteer&body=Sign%20me%20up%21%20I%20can%20work%20the%20following%20times%20on%20Primary%20Day%3A]
Early Voting Information
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/VotingDates.png]
Looking for where to Early Vote in your county? See the links below:
Alamance County [https://www.alamance-nc.com/elections/one-stop-early-voting-locations/]
Durham County [https://www.dcovotes.com/home/showpublisheddocument/36244/637807804159370000]
Orange County [https://www.orangecountync.gov/1116/Early-Voting]
Person County [https://www.personcountync.gov/departments-services/departments-a-h/elections/one-stop-early-voting-hours]
Note: Granville County currently has no voting sites listed on their website. Reach out to the Granville County Board of Elections to learn more.
OUT AND ABOUT
EARLY VOTING: AT THE POLLS
It has been a wonderful first days at the polls for Early Voting. Talking with voters is my favorite part of the campaign trail. I had one voter show up, see that I was there at the polls, and ask if I would wait while she returned home to get her husband so they could both talk with me. Of course I waited! When they returned we had a great conversation. He is a retired teacher and she a retired public health official. Climate change is what raised their interest in my campaign, but they wanted to know where is stand on other issues. There is simply no better way to understand the district than to talk to as many residents as possible.
One of my favorite things to see is a first-time voter. The excitement is contagious, and I love the applause we give whenever we have a first-time voter. Over the last few years, politics have become so toxic and divisive that sometimes it feels impossible to find the joy in civic engagement.
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV11.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV2.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV8.jpg]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV1.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV10.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV7.jpg]
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV12.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV13.jpg] [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93808/images/EV9.jpg]
I've also enjoyed getting to know the other candidates and their campaign workers. While we all have our candidates that we support, we are also going through a similar process and are sharing this experience. I feel as if I've made some wonderful friendships during this process.
Come on out and join us! Even if you can only give a couple of hours, you will feel hopeful and energized at being part of the process.
SUPPORT ASHLEY'S CAMPAIGN
As early voting approaches, now is the time for the campaign to purchase outreach materials! Nearly 90% of my campaign budget goes to outreach. This means that your donation goes directly toward gaining votes. In order to reach voters in all FIVE counties of the district, we must have a robust outreach strategy.
Any donation you can give helps us reach that goal! Please consider donating today to help our campaign purchase the materials we need to reach voters!
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/friends-of-ashley-ward-1]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Paid for by Friends of Ashley Ward
Friends of Ashley Ward
P.O. Box 1092
Mebane, NC 27302
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/txhCM6MkeUykIW8tnotI5g2?unsubscribedata=qkhS7REhCoIfzjBVSP2zUMSLiMWronHi7dGHhb6MaDEsMGqniA5EXDfc%2BZ5MSEUB45%2BQ9hv5826CuaIm5Wkr8GnDhPKyd%2BGeVFtlyc0xsBRzhvQYtkdr6lxp24diDGxauCk%2B%2BT8BoaVdt49XlqwvawMEqxXSAcMlABdvOHmlfbzh973JzJQsWFXt%2BrA2NDp9tpdNVl5oCD6DpLvw37zJCVtAG0H13OrExkiZ9c67QlDyrJGRD7xDG2JFaUeCiXMs%2BbRPu6mthYTSj%2B%2FyV%2B3lymY9y1QGiX5Wyhe63Qvqtli9x6ZDVWssPDxar5dsOBR3I1MKmnAye9P4hZFqHR8k1zTLE0ALhz4yJ0x67DbTjZnBK6mTssqJowiz1omlnIPVnGm942ggsqHI62HNya4JkgwnvW%2F%2BhVAVVfUKCY9x89k%3D .

name: (1) Missed Message
subject: Fwd: Message from Ron DeSantis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:
Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots – you were of them. Did you get his message?
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk5i984emio3gje0shec0n6gkcch36pb78b1mam0_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tbhchpnfc75clpm3cthm8rbedjhc2oecorgehqm6pjl68ojct1i63jm2sdjc9oefkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1p32phhmipm4pti6hj32s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)

|
---
| | | Friend,

Gov. DeSantis reached out to top state Patriots - you were of them.

Did you get his message?

\--------Forwarded Message---------
Subject: This isn't a fair fight
From: Gov. Ron DeSantis
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zg9aud3cf2rn0s629a3n2i2ra3kjjp09ol1pjhoo_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth2bs)**

---
I cannot stress this enough - electing strong GOP leaders is crucial to defending our states from the Left's liberal takeover. Look at what's happening in blue states - businesses are shuttering, rights are being revoked, and Americans are fleeing to states like freedom-loving Florida.

**[I'm asking every single supporter who wants to maintain their freedoms - in _ANY_ state - to chip in just $14 in the next 24 HOURS.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9jcbk2n9okar1c7pcmuec1a12drma9i7aqsmf60_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth2bs)**
---
| | | [>> RESTORE GOP STATE MAJORITIES <<](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z94t5ps633o89nrmmjouo1f89gjg51olju5ss8u8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth2bs)
---
I won't lie to you, it's not going to be easy.

We're fighting against the entire liberal machine - the White House, the biased corporate media, and big tech tyrants are all coming after us, Friend.

This isn't a fair fight - they've got more power, more money, and a liberal army of activists ready to revoke our rights. State GOP are the last line of defense against the Left's tyrannical agenda, and we've never waivered. **[Republican state leaders like me are leading the charge to defend our rights, but we can't do it without your help. All I'm asking for is just $14 to restore GOP leadership in our great country.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc5p8qba3js302of4tokikkc0kn6qbh2t76sj33o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth2bs)**

If you can, please chip in today to fuel our fight before the Left's policies destroy any more states.
---
| | | [>> RUSH $14 NOW <<](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zbhu6t7cvs3qml20q8lfngs912pjibe6kba1n0pg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob1cth2bs)
---
Thank you for stepping up,

Ron DeSantis
---
| |
* * *
**We 're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. State Republicans currently hold:** **62 of 99 state legislative chambers** **26 of 45 lieutenant governor seats** **27 of 50 secretary of state offices** **11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials** **Thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.**

Washington, DC 20004

We’re the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 61 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials — thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you.

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our n
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze8pseeanhl5ihgc7t70nr67tbjdon1osi3gsp6o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob0shh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srlc6rj7d3j6pqr6d3nchh6cd3kmko7atti6qqm9cbkctir2p3mm1h30tdncmoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj33d5jcgo7cp366ljjac77m2qmash5u)
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Friend,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zo6lt5qs6drhvba46vmrjhsth8uffo5u3cr7qmtg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob0shh2bs)
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8td0aq9rr3rk6mmgcgnuim26d088ujkjl5qjkjg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob0shh2bs)
---
| Friend, It’s Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs6c8liifb4ndr9m2nh0k4bf83834bgoi6525n20_rp22sh2s8i66pb4cli62ob0shh2bs)**

clean_body: I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our n I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. | | | | Friend, I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future. Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014. As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort. By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration. During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future. Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart. As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations. President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win. I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear. In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail. Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win. So I will humbly ask, Friend, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA. | | | Thank you, Ron Johnson | | | | | Friend, It’s Ron Johnson. I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate. I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster. This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to SAVE AMERICA from the Democrats. ** | | | | | Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc. body:

Thank you in advance!

Eric

name: Alexis Nielson, Team Nan
subject: fundraising update: still short
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
This campaign is funded by grassroots supporters from all 88 Ohio counties who agree: Ohio deserves better.

Team,
The primary is TOMORROW, and we’re still a little short on our pre-primary fundraising goal.
Nan isn’t a millionaire, so we can’t rely on self-funding to keep us in this race. This campaign is funded by grassroots supporters from all 88 Ohio counties who agree: Ohio deserves better.
**[I’m getting ready to meet with Nan in a few hours to discuss our plans for tomorrow and what comes next. Can you rush in $5 to our pre-primary goal before then?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44837951/343310207/1538300060?refcode=nw_em_220502_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE2NmJhZC00NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-jyMDS0hdF2BZbHP8LK7DpWi8FrRDRSWSRGf4p_AOo=)**
It won’t be easy taking down Mike DeWine and ending the era of corruption in Ohio’s government. National Republican groups are flooding millions into Ohio already — because they know that Nan Whaley can win, and they’ll do anything to stop her.
**[Tomorrow is our biggest test yet. We’re one step closer to electing Ohio’s first woman governor, but we need to be ready to hit the ground running. I’m pulling our latest fundraising numbers soon, so it’s not too late to pitch in $5.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44837952/343310208/1538300060?refcode=nw_em_220502_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGE2NmJhZC00NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O-jyMDS0hdF2BZbHP8LK7DpWi8FrRDRSWSRGf4p_AOo=)**
Thank you,

name: Team Gary
subject: Early voting has started!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c222a27e7ef718c0/ccfabefadc870a10c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
# **Friend — The polls are open in Georgia! Early voting is officially underway.**

---
You don’t have to wait until May 24th to get out and vote for Gary Black for the U.S. Senate. You can do it today — and recruit 22 of your friends, too! [**We’ve put together a Voter Resources Page that has everything you need to know about finding your polling location and making a plan to vote. You can find it here >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c222a27e7ef718c0/26e56b1ee4ee3c01c3d6b838967d376c/37793) Everything we’ve worked toward comes down to the next three weeks. This race will decide who controls the U.S. Senate, and Gary Black is the only Republican who can win in November and restore Georgia leadership. **We’re counting on YOU to get out and vote, and we’re asking you to share this message with 22 of your friends. ** Thank you for standing with us! -Team Gary
---
[**VOTER RESOURCES PAGE »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c222a27e7ef718c0/59382a520ad47942c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
| | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c222a27e7ef718c0/0098f21adfbc6214c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
_**Keep Reading For A Quick Message From Gary:**_ I couldn’t be prouder to have you on our team, and your support is absolutely crucial to our efforts. Here’s why.
Raphael Warnock has already stockpiled $25.6 million to keep this seat, and with it the U.S. Senate, in Democrat hands. Democrats know, as we know, that this seat will decide who controls the majority, and I’m the only Republican who can win. But in order to do so, we have to start now. And these emails are a vital part of our efforts.
With one conservative vote, we can restore Republican leadership to the U.S. Senate and help take America back. I’m ready — and if you are too, I hope you’ll donate below.
---
[**DONATE NOW »**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694/37793/c222a27e7ef718c0/2dbb88949d62a3c9c3d6b838967d376c/37793)
---
We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, [click here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go.cfm?a=1&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c222a27e7ef718c0&d=44588c5eae2940e3c3d6b838967d376c&u=http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=0e82897e342bb71a041ad8cde91a9694&c=37793&jid=c222a27e7ef718c0).
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com** by:Gary Black for SenateP.O. Box 6501
Athens, GA 30604
---
PAID FOR BY GARY BLACK FOR SENATE, INC.
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Keith=20Swank?=
subject: Nancy Pelosi is visiting here on Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Keith Swank (R)
body:
Pelosi is coming here to support my opponent, Marilyn Strickland. Help me fight back and kick Pelosi out of her position as Speaker. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/6e71791fc801/re-thank-you-15684392?e=d32193ab14)
---
| | | [ ](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=5132a70eb1&e=d32193ab14 "https://keithswank.com/index.html")
---
---
---
| | | **Nancy Pelosi Visiting Our District on Wednesday to Help Marilyn Strickland -- Come to My Event Instead**
#
_Democrats know they're in trouble. So just days after Biden flew here from The Swamp they're sending out Nancy Pelosi to help save Marilyn Strickland. _

Pelosi is joining Strickland at swanky high-dollar donor events to try and save her floundering campaign. Maybe Strickland can also show Pelosi her favorite homeless encampment, or one of the many potholes she never had filled as Mayor of Tacoma.

_But seriously. It's time to send the career politicians like Pelosi and Strickland into retirement. They've done enough damage to our country._

[Click here to donate and help me send Pelosi and Strickland to retirement.](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=20472f7231&e=d32193ab14 "https://secure.anedot.com/86e94ee4-0baa-49d8-ad75-884bafc225b1/donate")

Strickland's new ad campaign hit the airwaves last week using YOUR TAX MONEY from the congressional budget -- no-doubt with Pelosi's blessing. Dems know they're under water right now so they're willing to bend the rules and put ads on the radio to save Strickland's seat.

_We gotta stop 'em. It's time to step up. _

In Freedom,

Keith R. Swank
Candidate for U.S. Congress | Police Captain | U.S. Army Infantry Veteran

PS: Join me for dinner at Topside Grill in Steilacoom this Wednesday. [Please click on this link to view your invitation and RSVP.](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=1e09d7491e&e=d32193ab14 "https://www.greenvelope.com/card/.public-fcfacf2be92541079c7a94c2a4e10dc834323136383530")
# [](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=2f83140e5f&e=d32193ab14)
#

---
| [DONATE WITH ANEDOT](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=e288250d8d&e=d32193ab14 "Anedot Donate Link")
---
| [DONATE WITH WINRED](https://keithswank.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f7d993252d065453f0295f0cc&id=75ff20f75e&e=d32193ab14 "Winred Donate Link")
---
| | **ABOUT: Keith Swank is a U.S. Army veteran and Seattle Police Captain sought after for his expertise as an instructor in crisis intervention and de-escalation. He served as Night Duty Commander and Commander of the Metro Special Response Section (S.W.A.T. Team, Harbor Patrol, Canine Unit and Arson/Bomb Squad). In the U.S. Army he served in a long range reconnaissance unit and graduated from Ranger School, Airborne School, High Altitude Low Opening (HALO) and Infantry Training. Swank is a graduate of the University of Washington where he attained a degree in psychology. He is endorsed by the Pierce County and Thurston County Republican Party.**

name: Geoff Diehl
subject: We were the first to announce and first to submit signatures, thanks to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606
body:
Now let's go win this race with a first-place finish
| | | |
---
| Dear Friends,
I am exceptionally proud to report that our campaign has submitted more than the required number of certified signatures from voters to qualify for the September primary ballot.
Best of all -- our campaign was the first statewide campaign from either party to submit enough signatures to the Secretary of State.
As I told the press earlier today:

* I was the first candidate to announce last year;
* Our campaign is the first to submit signatures; and,
* We are looking forward to a first-place finish in this race!

---
|
---
| | [Please Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiUy_PYRnqMW5s2fCAciF-8Jb5WCjFCtBLLw4Fm_OE-JMBZxS3jhjkfjE0f_yPg9n5q92sTIJbM34ysVp-03K7-RILqxTuk7lt8W10-WJ3xmLTnh_d9t3M9TO-LLhdyPDPsBIyi2rVBQ8nuukeRdvjzFWni-wnr1TdvHEVzs24gEU-DfRr88rQ==&c=n1yrCv377ADcxvbGcdxrZdWM_ftn0DQCvgGJdJq8xa_PFltfBACSBA==&ch=VqQav13J7OR4Fpxmy5fKITNnyyun6dMCU7AqhIpFUJL5vJ3LxKej9g==)
---
|
---
| As we make this announcement today, I am deeply grateful to you. You helped make this happen. Unlike most other statewide campaigns, our campaign collected signatures entirely by way of volunteers \-- hundreds of people like you who spread out across our state for weeks. Thank you for your efforts. In particular, I'd like to thank Desiree Awiszio, my campaign Treasurer, who further advised our campaign and supervised the signature collection effort.
---
---
| Our campaign has strong momentum heading into the MassGOP nominating convention on May 21. We are gaining more followers each and every day as we reach out to voters across the state. Our campaign is strong because we have a winning ticket and a winning message.
And yet, it is crucial that we keep up the pace. We are not taking anything in this contest for granted, and we know the Democrats will campaign aggressively this fall. We are ready to win, but in order to succeed, Leah Allen and I need your help.
---
| | [Please Donate Now](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kiUy_PYRnqMW5s2fCAciF-8Jb5WCjFCtBLLw4Fm_OE-JMBZxS3jhjkfjE0f_yPg9n5q92sTIJbM34ysVp-03K7-RILqxTuk7lt8W10-WJ3xmLTnh_d9t3M9TO-LLhdyPDPsBIyi2rVBQ8nuukeRdvjzFWni-wnr1TdvHEVzs24gEU-DfRr88rQ==&c=n1yrCv377ADcxvbGcdxrZdWM_ftn0DQCvgGJdJq8xa_PFltfBACSBA==&ch=VqQav13J7OR4Fpxmy5fKITNnyyun6dMCU7AqhIpFUJL5vJ3LxKej9g==)
---
|
---
| The stakes are high. The Legislature is spending hundreds of millions of your tax dollars on pet projects, without passing any tax breaks for you and your family. Now they're trying to give driver's licenses to illegal immigrants.
As I told reporters at a press conference earlier today, this is just one more example of how progressives in our state are passing policies that are bad for you and your family. And, have no doubt -- with Maura Healey as Governor, policies like this would just be the start. We can't let that happen.
---
Leah and I won't let progressives like Maura Healey win. We are in this race to win it, and we're intent on making a better Massachusetts every day.
Can we count on you to stand with us?
Thank you for your support!

---
---
|
---
| |
---

clean_body: Now let's go win this race with a first-place finish | | | | | Dear Friends, I am exceptionally proud to report that our campaign has submitted more than the required number of certified signatures from voters to qualify for the September primary ballot. Best of all -- our campaign was the first statewide campaign from either party to submit enough signatures to the Secretary of State. As I told the press earlier today: I was the first candidate to announce last year; Our campaign is the first to submit signatures; and, * We are looking forward to a first-place finish in this race! | | | == | | As we make this announcement today, I am deeply grateful to you. You helped make this happen. Unlike most other statewide campaigns, our campaign collected signatures entirely by way of volunteers \-- hundreds of people like you who spread out across our state for weeks. Thank you for your efforts. In particular, I'd like to thank Desiree Awiszio, my campaign Treasurer, who further advised our campaign and supervised the signature collection effort. | Our campaign has strong momentum heading into the MassGOP nominating convention on May 21. We are gaining more followers each and every day as we reach out to voters across the state. Our campaign is strong because we have a winning ticket and a winning message. And yet, it is crucial that we keep up the pace. We are not taking anything in this contest for granted, and we know the Democrats will campaign aggressively this fall. We are ready to win, but in order to succeed, Leah Allen and I need your help. | | == | | The stakes are high. The Legislature is spending hundreds of millions of your tax dollars on pet projects, without passing any tax breaks for you and your family. Now they're trying to give driver's licenses to illegal immigrants. As I told reporters at a press conference earlier today, this is just one more example of how progressives in our state are passing policies that are bad for you and your family. And, have no doubt -- with Maura Healey as Governor, policies like this would just be the start. We can't let that happen. Leah and I won't let progressives like Maura Healey win. We are in this race to win it, and we're intent on making a better Massachusetts every day. Can we count on you to stand with us? Thank you for your support! | | | | Paid for by Diehl for Massachusetts PO Box 60362 Worcester, MA 01606 | == == == Our Company | Contact Us | FAQs | Privacy Policy | | | | | | | Diehl for Massachusetts | PO Box 60362, Worcester, MA 01606 | | Sent by mailto:info@geoffdiehl.com in collaboration with

name: News Alert
subject: re: Trump’s return to Twitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING via _USA TODAY_ : "All signs point" to Trump being allowed back on Twitter**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)
**Should Trump stay banned from Twitter?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)
---

This could be dangerous, team.

After the insurrection at the U.S. Capitol, Donald Trump was **PERMANENTLY suspended** from Twitter to prevent **“further incitement of violence”** by the former president.

But now that Twitter itself is reportedly changing hands, Trump could be allowed back on to spread dangerous lies to _millions of users_.

**With the midterm elections right around the corner, it’s never been more important to stop Trump’s misinformation, so we’re launching a live poll to see where this team stands:

Please, let us know by midnight:**

**Should Trump stay banned from Twitter?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/7604?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH)
---

[Photo](https://go.dscc.org/go/1270?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH) by Gage Skidmore. [CC BY-SA 2.0](https://go.dscc.org/go/1271?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220502-NewsAlert-TrumpTwitterReturn-Pros-sl1&akid=4040%2E9716520%2EXdGPDH).

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Our April fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC

We'll be honest, even with your increased support, we fell short of our April end-of-month fundraising goal. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44838335/343311875/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZWU3Yzk3LTQ3Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aC6yuDh6OSm4L3m_AoXMw-hDTCQbVSHILs_r6iFYHw=&emci=93e26ad4-39ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=37ee7c97-47ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

We have six months left to defeat the Treason Caucus on November 8 and let the world know that accountability is alive and well in the United States.

We'll be honest, even with your increased support, we fell short of our April end-of-month fundraising goal. We are dedicated to fighting for our country and keeping the momentum going in our movement to protect our democracy, but **we need to stay on track if we want to reach our goals for the midterm elections.**

But we do have some good news. While we're starting off the month of May behind on fundraising, we believe in this team, and we believe in our mission.

Never Again PAC is based on one core principle: Members of Congress who destabilize American democracy need to be voted out from positions of power. As we continue our efforts to make this a reality, we hope you'll be along for the ride.

[**We've always been able to count on your support, and we hope you're still on our side. We crunched the numbers, and if everyone reading this email donates $5, we'll be set to start May on the right foot and get on track to unseat the members of the Treason Caucus.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44838336/343311876/2045043821?refcode=em22_220502_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220502_EOMTY_fnd_gq_act___NAPAC_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM3ZWU3Yzk3LTQ3Y2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=_aC6yuDh6OSm4L3m_AoXMw-hDTCQbVSHILs_r6iFYHw=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jahmal=20Cole?=
subject: So Many Reasons!
body:
Running for Congress is challenging, but I know we're on the right path. | | |
#### MAY NEWSLETTER
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5062a2adec6d/so-many-reasons?e=339f142c50)
---
| |
---
| |
---
|
### A Note from Jahmal:
Left the house in time for church today but literally one block away from Trinity United Church of Christ a train had stopped and blocked traffic. After 5 minutes traffic had built up for a few blocks and people were noticeably upset. The honking of horns began and after about ten minutes people starting making U turns however they could.

Right away I got out and took a photo because I could tell there would be a lesson in all this. Maybe the lesson God wanted us to focus on today would be patience. As my fiancé and I sat in the car waiting I imagined Pastor Moss speaking inside, just one block away about patience. My PTSD had been kicked in too because anytime a train blocks me in and traffic builds, up I start feeling unsafe and claustrophobic. I don’t like being boxed in.

We walked in right as Pastor Moss was beginning and I swear the choir today was fantastic. There was an older gentleman leading the choir today that spoke in a raspy voice. He had one of those great raspy church voices. And he sang from a place of sympathy almost. He kept shouting “so many reasons, so many reasons, so many reasons to rejoice.” I could tell he’d seen a lot. This was a gospel song but he sang it like it was the blues. It was a beautiful song and uplifted me right away.

Pastor Moss went in today. I could tell he loved this particular Bible story. You know how you love certain chapters in the Bible, like I love Job and how he remained faithful amidst so many storms. Pastor Moss spoke today about the “Doubting Thomas” that didn’t believe Jesus was alive until he touched his hand. Thomas had doubts Jesus was alive after he’d been crucified. Even though everyone kept telling him Jesus was alive, Thomas said he needed to see him to believe it. Paraphrasing the great Pastor Moss is difficult but basically what he was saying was that we’re all like Thomas a little bit and having “Doubt” is normal. In fact he said, Doubt is not the opposite of faith. The opposite of faith is certainty. (Pastor Moss was dropping jewels today). He says Doubt is not the opposite of faith. Doubt is an element of faith. Faith is noticing the discomfort until the light comes back.

Ay, running for congress will bring all types of doubts in your mind. It’s hard to understand why God gives you a vision but I’m so driven to believe without seeing. But I love how Pastor Moss explained that having Doubt doesn’t mean you don’t believe. Doubt is present and there shouldn’t be any questions that’s too big for us to bring to God.

[Read the full story here](https://cole2022.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7401cdbeeb0470d9b36be09ed&id=e8923760b1&e=339f142c50).

Yours in service,

Jahmal Cole
