clean_body: Running for Congress is challenging, but I know we're on the right path. | | | MAY NEWSLETTER | | | | | A Note from Jahmal: Left the house in time for church today but literally one block away from Trinity United Church of Christ a train had stopped and blocked traffic. After 5 minutes traffic had built up for a few blocks and people were noticeably upset. The honking of horns began and after about ten minutes people starting making U turns however they could. Right away I got out and took a photo because I could tell there would be a lesson in all this. Maybe the lesson God wanted us to focus on today would be patience. As my fiancé and I sat in the car waiting I imagined Pastor Moss speaking inside, just one block away about patience. My PTSD had been kicked in too because anytime a train blocks me in and traffic builds, up I start feeling unsafe and claustrophobic. I don’t like being boxed in. We walked in right as Pastor Moss was beginning and I swear the choir today was fantastic. There was an older gentleman leading the choir today that spoke in a raspy voice. He had one of those great raspy church voices. And he sang from a place of sympathy almost. He kept shouting “so many reasons, so many reasons, so many reasons to rejoice.” I could tell he’d seen a lot. This was a gospel song but he sang it like it was the blues. It was a beautiful song and uplifted me right away. Pastor Moss went in today. I could tell he loved this particular Bible story. You know how you love certain chapters in the Bible, like I love Job and how he remained faithful amidst so many storms. Pastor Moss spoke today about the “Doubting Thomas” that didn’t believe Jesus was alive until he touched his hand. Thomas had doubts Jesus was alive after he’d been crucified. Even though everyone kept telling him Jesus was alive, Thomas said he needed to see him to believe it. Paraphrasing the great Pastor Moss is difficult but basically what he was saying was that we’re all like Thomas a little bit and having “Doubt” is normal. In fact he said, Doubt is not the opposite of faith. The opposite of faith is certainty. (Pastor Moss was dropping jewels today). He says Doubt is not the opposite of faith. Doubt is an element of faith. Faith is noticing the discomfort until the light comes back. Ay, running for congress will bring all types of doubts in your mind. It’s hard to understand why God gives you a vision but I’m so driven to believe without seeing. But I love how Pastor Moss explained that having Doubt doesn’t mean you don’t believe. Doubt is present and there shouldn’t be any questions that’s too big for us to bring to God. . Yours in service, Jahmal Cole | "DONATE TODAY" | | | JOIN ME | | Join us for a meet and greet at the Woodlawn Tap in Hyde Park this Thursday, May 5th! is free! | We're coming to Lincoln Park! May 18th for our textbank & fundraiser. We'll have drinks & tacos, and so many ways to ACTIVATE! Come support! I'll be participating in the Candidate Forum hosted by community partners on May 10th, and I would love to have you there! . | | | GET INVOLVED | to text with us! Join our weekly textbank on Wednesday from 6:00-8:00pm. ! Every Saturday and Sunday we will be canvassing IL-01. | | IN THE NEWS | | Check out my interview with . Dear Peter,
I just wanted to make sure you have a chance to take my official Team Franchot 2022 Issues Survey. I’m building a people-powered movement to create a people-centered government, and voters like you will have my ear at every step of the process. Click here to take the survey. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2]
https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2]
Our challenges are sweeping. So too must be our solutions. From combating climate change, to tackling the student debt crisis, to lowering the cost of healthcare, and much more, I will deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve.
Please take my Issues Survey to let me know what issues are most important to you. The survey will only take a minute, but will provide my team with important information that will help me better serve Marylanders under my gubernatorial administration. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/BC_KijWRCUa7vG4y46E1mA2]
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]

Friend,

**CBS, CNN, and MSNBC and many of our other major news outlets all said that Hunter Biden’s laptop was Russian disinformation. Yet it turned out to be TRUE. So, the question that I have is, what’s the real threat to the American people? Russian disinformation or American disinformation from the Left?**

While we know that Russian disinformation is real, I think the more prominent threat is disinformation from our Left-loving media. **[Do you agree with me?](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=39dfe0959a544c5e96bce480736d3628&_e=FSjyijxLUvaV9XXYv2Ky7qix9Ml29SaNfT3d9d6Y7t4M1gvFGwo_lTyYNfJ6NaeRe8atx5pDZJp-Q8mwToYyYi9T8ywy0ADJytqKbvnNcZTb319xRXlu_I62WUxhtYtLaomZ5_ZpRiKIPIT_bc9RPKXWm6acrOoP1Yzw8J4CIRCXzMWRBcWyIAc955kxG8aKgeDfFKLZTQkSVMtOt5qeDHNDstnjfh3-ddNNau3pgx5aaXBYDOQ9uMGmrPC3xHrf8jYQy1I5PSssl23v0YZdp5YeQKgX7YhKk7-HmEQsSgbT4PPeVUvKQDvLV4nYaOPjKStYTVTb-vwGC3Bt_dJz3ODVbxkLawGtk7DzwDWcNJms7kJ9KgHgEzw3EfUbGDSBjyA4pXXCWYFOUIWLGk8oZ2nJAPLJ3R8o3B9WS_btCwLqOJjwTZf2VVpn8xEKGRUFhifJknjvNQ2KFnKgjmon1YW9ciq_mmT4oh3WyUjbmHzVk4Y0vBbllpjyjEINCSf_lISAe5RC_8Oc4Wm_7jX7moakudJff7D2wHJjXWVTwtWK104I_DBjSNjUTYLfm6cylNvAub3NcMLC5FtpgVSA_pTkJO11Ja37nUhMIvuYjs0XnqmzuE4K6ZYyyItLzGH-)**

[**YES, I AGREE >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=39dfe0959a544c5e96bce480736d3628&_e=FSjyijxLUvaV9XXYv2Ky7qix9Ml29SaNfT3d9d6Y7t4M1gvFGwo_lTyYNfJ6NaeRe8atx5pDZJp-Q8mwToYyYi9T8ywy0ADJytqKbvnNcZTb319xRXlu_I62WUxhtYtLaomZ5_ZpRiKIPIT_bc9RPKXWm6acrOoP1Yzw8J4CIRCXzMWRBcWyIAc955kxG8aKgeDfFKLZTQkSVMtOt5qeDHNDstnjfh3-ddNNau3pgx5aaXBYDOQ9uMGmrPC3xHrf8jYQy1I5PSssl23v0YZdp5YeQKgX7YhKk7-HmEQsSgbT4PPeVUvKQDvLV4nYaOPjKStYTVTb-vwGC3Bt_dJz3ODVbxkLawGtk7DzwDWcNJms7kJ9KgHgEzw3EfUbGDSBjyA4pXXCWYFOUIWLGk8oZ2nJAPLJ3R8o3B9WS_btCwI7iF5WkNUISgApxuV0LNEGHd-UqjmhNpBZLkjAw34ymHt43EzeZ4LV59phRWAYG4lBESsUZ260dttsb57FL0bwdOoSSJrbzd5irbx9-pRhzCZBWq8katAEb2dZL6jMwfHTd50KC6WMvh4ppy7Mq3-e8ecCSz9Zc3xECEsYEFX2aHB8gVfw9R1gRH9x26fjPpYJOx35K3aWMRQoyciPwDFo)
[**NO, I DON'T AGREE >> **](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=39dfe0959a544c5e96bce480736d3628&_e=FSjyijxLUvaV9XXYv2Ky7qix9Ml29SaNfT3d9d6Y7t4M1gvFGwo_lTyYNfJ6NaeRe8atx5pDZJp-Q8mwToYyYi9T8ywy0ADJytqKbvnNcZTb319xRXlu_I62WUxhtYtLaomZ5_ZpRiKIPIT_bc9RPKXWm6acrOoP1Yzw8J4CIRCXzMWRBcWyIAc955kxG8aKgeDfFKLZTQkSVMtOt5qeDHNDstnjfh3-ddNNau3pgx5aaXBYDOQ9uMGmrPC3xHrf8jYQy1I5PSssl23v0YZdp5YeQKgX7YhKk7-HmEQsSgbT4PPeVUvKQDvLV4nYaOPjKStYTVTb-vwGC3Bt_dJz3ODVbxkLawGtk7DzwDWcNJms7kJ9KgHgEzw3EfUbGDSBjyA4pXXCWYFOUIWLGk8oZ2nJAPLJ3R8o3B9WS_btCwLKcZdK71vxgrNtDdnFklV27JNYoAKFonzW7J_cT4jRSOis4i-Dh9_hJo1JnOORilxHJvmQtEieAHOhjlKTIp0v9tK2GFo5Ozh9MrE7Z4OOtJh4Vdx6QyR54DXw8XMgJlKobvAW8E6Bts5ZhYWa-Yd_lMC0s7iCgKg3rt8SXEDhEhJSnbI3muTgCG03dQfbeOYNwH5rGIjK-3NoLIg6WWpX)
As a nation, it’s important that we’re able to give ourselves an honest self-assessment. What do I mean by this? America is the greatest country in the world and because of this, we’re under a constant threat from one part of the world or another. We can’t allow ourselves to be one of those threats.

If we’re spreading our own disinformation, it makes our enemy’s job easy. Whether it’s coming from state sponsored media or privately owned firms, our media outlets need to do a better job at making sure that their stories are founded in FACT.

And Friend, with so many Americans relying on these media outlets to provide factual information, they not only need to do a better job, they have a responsibility to the American people to do a better job.

**[Please, let me know right now if you agree with me. Disinformation from our own media outlets is something that I’ve been noticing for a while and it’s something that I’d like to address should I be elected to Congress!](http://links.electroddorilas.com/u/click?_t=c152dcdd0bb643e58e4146847738634b&_m=39dfe0959a544c5e96bce480736d3628&_e=FSjyijxLUvaV9XXYv2Ky7qix9Ml29SaNfT3d9d6Y7t4M1gvFGwo_lTyYNfJ6NaeRe8atx5pDZJp-Q8mwToYyYi9T8ywy0ADJytqKbvnNcZTb319xRXlu_I62WUxhtYtLaomZ5_ZpRiKIPIT_bc9RPKXWm6acrOoP1Yzw8J4CIRCXzMWRBcWyIAc955kxG8aKgeDfFKLZTQkSVMtOt5qeDHNDstnjfh3-ddNNau3pgx5aaXBYDOQ9uMGmrPC3xHrf8jYQy1I5PSssl23v0YZdp5YeQKgX7YhKk7-HmEQsSgbT4PPeVUvKQDvLV4nYaOPjKStYTVTb-vwGC3Bt_dJz3ODVbxkLawGtk7DzwDWcNJms7kJ9KgHgEzw3EfUbGDSBjyA4pXXCWYFOUIWLGk8oZ2nJAPLJ3R8o3B9WS_btCwLOCn_WsmbUuujXXTMSn7E0xErE2icyCUCjvrPDEZY-OY6PABmm1A0jV6tik-IsySYmbXOzL5lS3M9_dzIywlUNYnejNB-KrVxeNrgJ6QXz0CtjI5QwVuISc9REgBf84xUyDPL1LTnaQ9Nfi4BmUz-rIbUZ5AoRHrS6lQYLRvwMXZmopwbQfz0VDq0nktffQfPLzZLGBAAOPLaNbPoCZEfA)**

Thank you,
Rod Dorilás

| _**ABOUT ROD**_

Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service.

At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer.

Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China.

Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. Rod is running for Congress in South Florida to continue Trump's America First Agenda and defend our country from the Radical Left.

Yet it turned out to be T | No longer want to receive emails from Rod? You may . Friend, CBS, CNN, and MSNBC and many of our other major news outlets all said that Hunter Biden’s laptop was Russian disinformation. Yet it turned out to be TRUE. So, the question that I have is, what’s the real threat to the American people? Russian disinformation or American disinformation from the Left? While we know that Russian disinformation is real, I think the more prominent threat is disinformation from our Left-loving media. - As a nation, it’s important that we’re able to give ourselves an honest self-assessment. What do I mean by this? America is the greatest country in the world and because of this, we’re under a constant threat from one part of the world or another. We can’t allow ourselves to be one of those threats. If we’re spreading our own disinformation, it makes our enemy’s job easy. Whether it’s coming from state sponsored media or privately owned firms, our media outlets need to do a better job at making sure that their stories are founded in FACT. And Friend, with so many Americans relying on these media outlets to provide factual information, they not only need to do a better job, they have a responsibility to the American people to do a better job. Thank you, Rod Dorilás | ABOUT ROD Rod Dorilás is the first-generation son of two immigrants from Haiti. His father immigrated to Florida to pick crops, and eventually his parents went on to own a small business. From a young age, his parents instilled in him the importance of hard work, integrity, and service. At age 17, Rod enlisted in the United States Navy, serving for six years as a Petty Officer Second Class and Assistant Engagement Control Officer onboard the USS The Sullivans, stationed in Jacksonville. There, he was responsible for planning and executing the deployment of Tomahawk Land Attack Missiles on the Ballistic Missile Defense destroyer. Upon completion of his military service, Rod attended law school at Syracuse University with the help of the G.I. Bill. After graduating, he served in President Trump's Administration in the U.S. Department of Commerce. While serving our great nation, Rod fought tirelessly to ensure that American families and businesses weren't taken advantage of by China. Rod is a true public servant and is dedicated to serving his country and community. He wants to ensure that every American, through hard work and perseverance, can achieve the American Dream. name: =?utf-8?Q?Benda=20for=20Congress?=
subject: Hunting, habitat preservation and clean water
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENDA FOR CONGRESS](https://bendaforcongress
body:
| | | |
---
| | | Dear Peter, I grew up on a farm in southern Minnesota where hunting was part of our fabric. My father always left rows of corn unharvested for pheasant habitat and hunting, and we regularly welcomed hunters to our farm, Old Acres. Later in life, my two brothers-in-law allowed me to tag along and I grew to appreciate the experience of an early morning hunt.

As an attorney for 25 years in Albert Lea, I have had the honor of working with individuals who purchase land for habitat restoration and hunting use. I also work intimately with many farmers, the original conservationists, in establishing habitat through _voluntary_ buffer strips and other strategic set-aside programs.

One of my proudest professional experiences was my work with our local watershed district in establishing the Juglans Woods AMA, a 257-acre parcel that preserved and provided public access for hunting, fishing, hiking, and nature enjoyment. I was involved from the ground level in obtaining the funding for this project, identifying, negotiating, and closing on the land purchases with landowners, and coordinating with the Minnesota Department of Natural Resources.

In addition, I was twice named as a statewide attorney of the year for my work in helping my local Albert Lea community first stabilize the upstream runoff and then clean up and restore Fountain Lake. This process involved multiple years of work to first obtain funding and then taking on the Department of Natural Resources to obtain the permit for lake dredging and restoration. These hard-fought battles are now showing real dividends in habitat and clean water restoration.

My commitment to hunting and habitat preservation will not waiver when I go to Congress. Some candidates talk about this issue, I’m proud of my record of real accomplishment.

As a conservative, homegrown and hardworking candidate, I would be honored to earn your vote in the Special Primary Election on May 24. [Early voting](https://bendaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ace2cfdb811af9316dec053d7&id=5e9af95a7e&e=58a207e9d5) is now open.

We’re incredibly grateful for your support.

Hi Team,

With _your_ help, we hit our April fundraising goal. Thanks for having our back.

When I think about who we’re up against – a Trump-backed January 6 insurrectionist with very deep pockets – I shudder to think about him winning. We all know what’s on the line this November, and thanks to you, we have a fighting chance at beating our opponent.

I have truly witnessed the power we have when we stand together, and beating our April fundraising goal is proof that we’re all fighting to win this.

Look, we want to hear about your priorities because the campaign is about all of us, not just getting me to Washington. **[If you haven’t chimed in yet, would you fill out this brief survey about what’s important to you for this election?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44839318/343316607/-1774189801?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.05.02_b1_EOMTY-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&amount=5&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.05.02_b1_eomty-brad_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.05.02_b1_EOMTY-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDlhMjExYi00YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaSEPrW-B49EbkcFSOWOOFVAZ4ozFROgbncTQ2dHYA=&emci=d17a89a0-23ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=cd9a211b-4bca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)** | [Let us know your thoughts](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44839319/343316608/-1774189801?refcode=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.05.02_b1_EOMTY-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_campaign=abd_em_surv_2022.05.02_b1_eomty-brad_x_f1_s1_c1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&ms=ABD_EM_SURV_2022.05.02_b1_EOMTY-brad_X_F1_S1_C1__ac&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDlhMjExYi00YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FqaSEPrW-B49EbkcFSOWOOFVAZ4ozFROgbncTQ2dHYA=&emci=d17a89a0-23ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=cd9a211b-4bca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=3200050)

name: Chairman Rick Scott
subject: I’m saving your spot on the Chairman’s Executive Board
body:
Your never ending support for our Party is being recognized [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6956%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Mvqpe5TpuNdcvlnOAP0fbQ&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61592%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9vKdbMJ8oaqj4EItyKscdA&sysid=1)

Friend,

I have great news to share with you.

__The National Republican Senatorial Committee__ _is officially launching one of our most exclusive programs ever, our**Official Chairman’s Executive Board,**_ and I am personally inviting you to be a **founding member. **

This group is unlike any other we have, and you are one of the **15 American patriots** from YOUR area to qualify for this _prestigious honor._

******************************************************[**ACCEPT INVITATION >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61593%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2QAYLuR3QwJtM1ot4ElMFg&sysid=1)******************************************************

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61594%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=P4saNtv8p0eAlNJlEvDXZg&sysid=1)

As an official member of the __**Chairman’s Executive Board,**__ you will have access to confidential election-year strategy memos, help craft our Election Year strategy to restore Trump’s Majority, exclusive NRSC Trump merchandise, and so much more.

As of today, it looks like you are one of the very last patriots who hasn’t accepted your formal invitation to join the **Executive Board** from YOUR area. Are you going to accept, or should we move on?

**[Please contribute $25 or more to secure your spot on the Official Chairman’s Executive Board and cement your status as a true Patriot. >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61505%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZMAYmdn4o5CXjMOAOn%2f80w&sysid=1)**

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61506%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nj%2bSKNLxS3v4SNojCPpR2g&sysid=1)

I asked my team to print out the _**official roster**_ for the **Chairman’s Executive Board** tonight - and I’ll be looking for your name at the very top. Hopefully, you don’t let me down.

**[Donate $25 or MORE AS SOON AS POSSIBLE to finalize your spot on the official roster.](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61507%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=K6WZt%2bzHn8CbZphzo4mEQA&sysid=1)**

Thank you,

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61508%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=CjXYhJ3%2fxG0Ii4cDi%2fZlIA&sysid=1)
Rick Scott
Chairman, National Republican Senatorial Committee

****************************************************[**CONTRIBUTE NOW >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c61509%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nStUmen%2f4czyXZTs35AoGA&sysid=1)****************************************************
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6956%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Mvqpe5TpuNdcvlnOAP0fbQ&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6956%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=Mvqpe5TpuNdcvlnOAP0fbQ&sysid=1)

🔵 Passed a historic infrastructure investment bill

🔵 And so much more!

name: Vernon Jones for Congress
subject: Vernon Jones is Victorious in Press Club GA-10 Debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jones for Georgia JonesforGeorgia
body:
---
| | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Vernon Jones Clear Winner in GA-10 Debate, Calls for Investigation into Mike Collins Campaign Illegally Using PPP Loan Money
---
| |
---
|
---
| Watkinsville, Georgia (May 2, 2022) Yesterday morning, Vernon Jones walked away victorious following the 10th Congressional District Republican Primary Debate hosted by the Atlanta Press Club.
During the debate, however, failed perennial candidate Mike Collins nearly collapsed when asked about his alleged misuse of nearly a million dollars of taxpayer dollars to fund his political ambitions, after loaning his campaign almost half a million dollars after receiving a $900,000 PPP loan.
"Instead of using these dollars for what they were intended, it appears that Mike Collins once again chose to put himself first. While Mike Collins may have scammed the federal government, he will not scam the people of Georgia. That is why I'm calling for an immediate federal investigation into this matter. While Mike Collins refuses to answers questions about this matter, maybe he'd be more inclined to answer questions from the FBI" said Rep. Vernon Jones, Trump-endorsed candidate for Congress.
For more information on Mike Collins' purported misuse of PPP dollars, visit the Georgia Star for its reporting on the matter (Mike Collins refused to comment):
[CLICK HERE TO READ THE GEORGIA STAR'S REPORT ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ACo98Ojubx2l3XCX-dR2LChCcSMzzdQykqd3MUV4NXPEYpJI2cOA0gFDOQR3bewy1-P_6U2obkn3IyZzw6SKZ3opPWmKQP0NsnJknjhBmS2PSpLF0igjVo8neeNUAZNv8K_DSmFeNEB0g-lRKjKGcBIMCh6za2w0vuech-Oje-xqi-e9gdqWVx79ymF1cLtQF4bemnWL_ABEsMxg862qVDS4Kj__c8OoutFTKP3plCEMG6GaJPQRqUplbR8QfuItlFZfLiEW9Xd72RTwiOQvm85fUV5xQwTG9P3lnbGT4-Y=&c=X-ne4dJTuEi5N3bQyg0ePqIAkRiXfH130fKOtQdnd6gBsCxfZP92NQ==&ch=cB3APvEOFXUxweEP6_quJME4ykj0F9LSbvSeGHJv3ssWNlkObPp6Jg==)

About Vernon Jones
---
| |
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

With far-right outside interest groups spending millions on attack ads against me, this is a critical step in fighting back against GOP misinformation and sharing my message across New Hampshire.

This race is a must-win to protect our slim Senate majority, meaning everything we do between now and Election Day matters. Every fundraising goal we set, every ad buy we place, is a key part of building a winning campaign.
**But here's the problem, folks: Because much of New Hampshire is in the expensive Boston media market, we have among the highest ad rates in the country**. Without your grassroots support, we won't be able to keep our ads on the air, missing the chance to reach crucial swing voters.

name: Kina Collins
subject: We can’t be satisfied just treating the symptoms of gun violence
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KINA COLLINS FOR CONGRESS** ](https://click
body:
It’s time to heal our communities | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yOQozAy4249GfohatM8XLCP7Gyf6bzrkjN8sXh_JjXvDm21fvmGLhqUe-quR3_x0a4ZLzkfrFqdtVKuNIuwQsn0c91jgEdSA5OANsq926BffC7faAQGaBY74u73WFJVk79RxjDas65kMRGxBy2amRO43CuN3tW8DV-TPwiaspIAjJrb_HGIEW0kSQFhvYfyEoXPpTDRncTxDjZpvJIjLPbe7uy6KiLVt9z22vnepRVEKc9-aSEPvEb-f17zoI1nJshrT2jl-qs6oKp4f_0HyLt3N637O2kqglUtvRmZEQCIeVz94FNwrHoiI1KVdN2XcIOjEuesT9oObS_3HtTTIvtua9XCK0f716VeKtYD-xMHBMfptxQt4yUR3D9JI2EPS0/3lp/sZvTtsPDT8GNnlkboD9HIg/h0/Jx9Son25MIZl80DlYXHWMIkB239TilYf-EjxXL7_iJ0) Dear Team, As a survivor of gun violence, the public safety crisis we are facing in Chicago is deeply personal. I have devoted my life to gun violence prevention, and as a violence interrupter, policy advisor and executive director, I have learned important lessons on how to tackle the deep trauma being inflicted on my district every day. This is an epidemic that begins long before a gun is in anyone's hands. School closures, lack of federal funding for education, out of control housing costs, and a broken healthcare and mental healthcare system are all root causes of gun violence. **I’m running for Congress because I’m tired of watching my community suffer without an advocate. We need a leader ready to push for transformative change on the federal level. Anything less and we will be trapped in this never ending cycle forever.** **** [**If you’re ready to fuel transformative change, then please donate $15 to our campaign. clean_body: It’s time to heal our communities | | | Dear Team, As a survivor of gun violence, the public safety crisis we are facing in Chicago is deeply personal. I have devoted my life to gun violence prevention, and as a violence interrupter, policy advisor and executive director, I have learned important lessons on how to tackle the deep trauma being inflicted on my district every day. This is an epidemic that begins long before a gun is in anyone's hands. School closures, lack of federal funding for education, out of control housing costs, and a broken healthcare and mental healthcare system are all root causes of gun violence. I’m running for Congress because I’m tired of watching my community suffer without an advocate. We need a leader ready to push for transformative change on the federal level. Anything less and we will be trapped in this never ending cycle forever. ** We desperately need common sense gun control measures like universal background checks on all gun sales and red flag laws that prevent those who are a danger to themselves or others from accessing guns. In addition we need to hold gun manufacturers accountable, raise the legal age to purchase a gun to 21, and ban assault rifles and high-capacity magazines. But all of this has to be the floor, not the ceiling. We must invest in community-based violence prevention strategies that have been shown to reduce gun violence. We need to pass Medicare for All so that every person has easy access to mental and physical healthcare. We need paid family leave and universal childcare so that parents don’t have to choose between working and taking care of their families. We urgently need transformative change, and a new generation of leadership.** In solidarity, Kina Collins | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

name: Ben Samuels
subject: The end of April
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEN SAMUELS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friend,
I have to say, I am amazed each month as our movement continues to grow and gain momentum. I am running for office because I believe in the spirit and grit of St. Louis, and I want to fight for the things Missourians deserve in Congress. I believe in democracy and the will of the people, but to see it and feel it in action is another thing entirely. Thanks to you, friend, that is precisely what is going to happen.
I know that it can often feel overwhelming to take on corruption and extremism, so I want you to know that I see the effort you are putting in, and I am standing right there, standing with you in Solidarity, fighting for our future.
Will you take one more step to grow our movement and elect a grassroots leader?
Follow me on social:
Twitter [https://twitter.com/SamuelsForMO] Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/SamuelsforCongress/] Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/samuelsforcongress/]Your support means the world,
Ben Samuels
Ben Samuels is a businessperson, an economic policy expert, and a bipartisan problem-solver running for Congress in Missouri’s 2nd Congressional District to bring jobs and opportunities back to the St. Louis area.
Support Ben's campaign for Congress by making a donation today.

subject: The face of censorship: Biden’s dominatrix of disinformation
body:
We need to stand together now more than ever to fight back against the radical Democrats’ plans for this country.
To view this email as a web page, go [here.](https://view.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=14e0a2ea74c8c2f8fcc8edf6ca686c9ceecbe8026dc1cefc9f147f3f3023e41aef75207f1186474ee65ea9de67f70220eeb183ffa134ef186b342aad8121d9454e555a875fba8692b177235a67cab08f)

---
Peter,

Joe Biden is so out to lunch that he is allowing his Department of Homeland Security to create a "disinformation" bureau which will serve to suppress the speech of those who dissent from The Regime.

The new face of censorship is Nina Jankowicz, who has peddled false narratives and conspiracy theories such as Russia collusion, the authenticity of the Hunter Biden laptop, and support for COVID lockdowns.
---
| [ ](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=255facb61531c42c41a4547441ecc206fca9ab3af644e008009546077773ab2345437bddd6cd25b794e4ac8991cebc8f459bfd54a4cbb90a)
---
She is nothing more than a Regime apparatchik whose mission will be to enforce ruling class orthodoxy and suppress the truth.

The failures of the Biden administration have pushed them into a corner where they have two options: do better or silence your critics. To no one's surprise, they have chosen the latter. And this Orwellian "Ministry of Truth" figure is exactly what the radical left is fighting for: **complete control over you. **

We need to stand together to fight back against the radical Democrats' plan for this country. **[Join me in the fight against the Biden administration's assault on our free speech and help me continue protecting freedom right here in Florida - Rush in a donation now >>>](https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=255facb61531c42c7d11d579dab05c6c9280b2448623d5096b03e7ea2434c115bb19fbd5831a2faa135e79a0255f643771fa85d46b0fd701 "Join me in the fight against the Biden administration’s assault on our free speech and to continue protecting freedom right here in Florida – Rush in a donation now >>> ")**

Sincerely,

Ron DeSantis

disclaimer_text: Paid for by A Safer Virginia PAC |
body:
We’re celebrating a major milestone this week –– here’s what we’ve accomplished so far together| | | Friend, We’re celebrating a major milestone as we wrap up the first**100 days of the Great Virginia Comeback!** Thanks to the tireless support of patriotic Virginians like you, Attorney General Jason Miyares is leading –– _and WINNING_ –– the fight to restore and protect:
* **Common sense** in our classrooms
* **Freedom** in our commonwealth
* **Law and order** in our streets

---
[](http://links.safervirginiapac.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=4830d94260234f888a73cad51e4c2a69&_e=jC8Q1AUwhXorP4cSKmlvsx1snkKSrfw5EVkumAIOBLiPya0GDjgUI8RYXwclWMewWNBTNS-UE5jm_U3oun1s44rmhUEjRwZH2ITYDduvFauyF6gzQQfQlLlCOlwYZ88K8qp6NWKOHyUSdcwWXT3W_c_f3pPhgGwOhGWkbXF-o7Plw3G39x5huLlVaIDv3UEhTI9jd5WBXJDqa7nWd4kROY3XPin4weuF2KkER33pmCusW8XMsEOFNYqaAoX2U16tzx-oLNMTEX2b1cU-CT6YITKU7coAidOciyDHRhS1fU-zZuSP14TvbOcY1VW--XatgWWZyIRs31x0bps6X4ifPdhyTEvNf0nypEEwLwqyqA1biDsgLxk6PZte7W3ek0UV1gouTIsHnrJQZfWgr4j6U4C00F4YvXGRfnT3VKifyU-t-oAMpDYZ89o0Nu8QTZUlCITIQ-1rV4bDs54ze3JcskbKR_hFFpnphT237fJZcelvVo2ebDCDVigMDhGslBtA)

_**And right now, I 'm looking at a signed copy for you, Peter. But it looks like you haven't claimed it yet, so I am unable to send it out. **_

# **The King's Chronicle:
****_May 2, 2022_**
---
| | Hi Team, Welcome to a new month and another edition of the King's Chronicle Newsletter! It's hard to believe it's already May and that the election is now LESS THAN THREE MONTHS away — time flies when you're having fun building a movement for real positive change! As always, we are so grateful for your continued support for John, Michelle, and our campaign for Maryland. Thanks to your support, April was an incredible month for us — from launching two TV ads and celebrating our 1-year campaign anniversary, to receiving a huge shipment of new yard signs and crushing our end-of-month fundraising goal — and we can't wait to really dig in with you as we push towards our July 19 finish line.
Speaking of digging... April was also a big month of Team King community service projects, including planting trees at Bowie State and helping with a community cleanup in West Baltimore. Make sure to keep scrolling for pics and event recaps, and to read more about everything else John and Michelle have been up to over the last few weeks!
Thank you again for your continued support — we can't wait to elect John King and Michelle Siri as Maryland's next Democratic ticket with you by our side.
Here's to the next 78 days, Team King P.S. We are so proud of everything we accomplished in April, but doing all of that and more in the coming months will take serious resources. If you can, [_**please consider donating today to help power our voter outreach efforts!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44839909/343319088/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220502-b1_new_full-TK_S1_C1&refcode=email-ngp-20220502-b1_new_full-TK_S1_C1&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ngp&utm_campaign=20220502&utm_content=b1_new_full&utm_term=TK_S1_C1&amount=25&refcode2=c8fb192a-4fca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGZiMTkyYS00ZmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuwLTKvf1PWkYPBkOtCRA4Ed1OetgYQ86LiDLCdQfKg=)

# **Team King Updates**
---
| | **_STANDING UP TO HATE_ :** This past weekend at a Western Maryland Gubernatorial forum, our Trump endorsed opponent stood onstage next to John and tried to erase his family history with far right lies about “cultural Marxism” being taught in public schools. John saw right through Delegate Dan Cox's dog whistle politics, and rose up to speak out against it. Take a moment to watch John's response below and help us share this message on social media by reposting via the links below!

clean_body: On this edition of the King's Chronicle, find out what John & Michelle have been up to, read about upcoming events, and more! | | | = | | | | | | = | mailto:info@johnkingforgovernor.com "info@johnkingforgovernor.com" | | | The King's Chronicle: May 2, 2022 | | Hi Team, Welcome to a new month and another edition of the King's Chronicle Newsletter! It's hard to believe it's already May and that the election is now LESS THAN THREE MONTHS away — time flies when you're having fun building a movement for real positive change! As always, we are so grateful for your continued support for John, Michelle, and our campaign for Maryland. Thanks to your support, April was an incredible month for us — from launching two TV ads and celebrating our 1-year campaign anniversary, to receiving a huge shipment of new yard signs and crushing our end-of-month fundraising goal — and we can't wait to really dig in with you as we push towards our July 19 finish line. Speaking of digging... April was also a big month of Team King community service projects, including planting trees at Bowie State and helping with a community cleanup in West Baltimore. Make sure to keep scrolling for pics and event recaps, and to read more about everything else John and Michelle have been up to over the last few weeks! Thank you again for your continued support — we can't wait to elect John King and Michelle Siri as Maryland's next Democratic ticket with you by our side. Here's to the next 78 days, Team King P.S. We are so proud of everything we accomplished in April, but doing all of that and more in the coming months will take serious resources. If you can, = | | | Team King Updates | | STANDING UP TO HATE : This past weekend at a Western Maryland Gubernatorial forum, our Trump endorsed opponent stood onstage next to John and tried to erase his family history with far right lies about “cultural Marxism” being taught in public schools. John saw right through Delegate Dan Cox's dog whistle politics, and rose up to speak out against it. Take a moment to watch John's response below and help us share this message on social media by reposting via the links below! = MEETING AND GREETING : This Saturday, May 7th we have TWO exciting meet and greets with John and Michelle in Silver Spring at 11:30am and in Baltimore City at 4pm. Click below to RSVP or to read more about the events — we hope to see you there! MERCH FOR YOU AND YOURS : We just got a new shipment of campaign merchandise: everything from yard signs to shirts is back in stock and ready for you to order! Plus, text MERCH to 48178 to get 15% OFF your purchase >> | | | John in the News | | THE GRIO: John B. King calls on Joe Biden to be ‘bold’ and cancel student loan debt “‘Both my wife and I had debt that carried with us,” King tells theGrio. “But it was a good investment. In the end, the opportunities I’ve had are tied to the education that I’ve had.’ King’s education paved the way for him to take over the task of leading the nation’s schools, and now, to run for governor of Maryland.” THE WASHINGTON INFORMER: Maryland Gubernatorial Candidates Release Campaign Ads “Maryland governor hopeful John King Jr. released two statewide television ads last week to highlight two major attributes about himself: education and family history.” SHORE ISSUES PODCAST: Education Reform & PPP Discussion! w/ John King MD Gubernatorial Candidate John joined the Shore Issues Podcast to share his vision for a brighter, more just, more equitable future for Maryland. | | | John on the Road On Thursday, April 21 John and his team joined students at Bowie State University to plant trees on campus. = On Wednesday, April 20 John participated in the Real News Network’s Baltimore transit forum. | | = On Thursday, April 28 John, Melissa, and Michelle attended the Planned Parenthood of Maryland annual gala and met Fluffy at the American Visionary Arts Museum. = | | | Upcoming Events | | Virtual Howard County Community Forum Tuesday, May 3rd @ 7pm Virtual Gubernatorial Candidate Meet & Greet Wednesday, May 4th @ 6pm African American Coalition of Howard County Gubernatorial Forum Saturday, May 7th @ 10am In-person at St. John’s Baptist Church,Columbia, MD \[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%7D\]%7D&utmsource=email&utmcampaign=newsletter&utmmedium=ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGZiMTkyYS00ZmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HuwLTKvf1PWkYPBkOtCRA4Ed1OetgYQ86LiDLCdQfKg=&emci=a79a1aaa-1bca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c8fb192a-4fca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=24635484 Silver Spring Meet & Greet with John King and Michelle Siri Saturday, May 7th @ 11:30am Location provided upon signup Charm City Kick Back with John and Michelle Saturday, May 7th @ 4pm Legendary Lifestyle Cafe, Baltimore, MD | Clean Water Discussion with John King Wednesday, May 11th @ 11am Zoom provided upon sign-up Western Maryland Democratic Summit Saturday, May 14th Rocky Gap Resort Email ben@johnkingforgovernor.com for a FREE ticket DC Cocktail Fundraiser Monday, May 16th @ 6pm Location provided upon signup Baltimore Fundraiser Monday, May 23rd Location provided upon signup Email hspengler@johnkingforgovernor.com to RSVP Interested in future events? name: MarkKelly.com
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today.
#

$1.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. A lot of people chipped in towards our $1 million goal, it’s true. But those attack ads are still running. We thought they might stay up, and we’re sorry to say we were right. This is where things start to get tough, and Mark really needs YOU to help keep up our momentum this month.
So yes. $1.
$1 to help us reach 1 million donations to our re-election campaign.
$1 to help fight back against the millions National Republicans are spending on attack ads.
$1 — most importantly — because it all adds up when so many people who care are chipping in.
By the time you’ve read this message, a bunch of people will have already donated their $1. Now they’re hoping you’ll join them and keep it going.
[**So, please: Will you use this link to contribute just $1 to Mark Kelly’s re-election campaign and help us counter the flood of outside spending pouring into this race? It’s a tall task, but one we can accomplish together if we all pitch in.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220502-1-7&t=1&refcode2=2740_6688874_VkM3nR&akid=2740%2E6688874%2EVkM3nR)
**[CONTRIBUTE $1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-may22?refcode=em220502-1-7&t=2&refcode2=2740_6688874_VkM3nR&akid=2740%2E6688874%2EVkM3nR)**
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=2740%2E6688874%2EVkM3nR).

body:
|
| | | This is the last message we will be sending you. Despite our numerous attempts to get a response... you **STILL** have not let us know if you would join Trump's social media site.

We are humbly asking for the very last time:

**Do you plan to join Trump 's social media site? **

Sherry, Survey Coordinator (via ROL)

name: =?UTF-8?B?SGlsbHNkYWxlIENvbGxlZ2UgdmlhIOKYhkNJ?=
subject: Counter false history and anti-American teaching
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsQRn-RHN0

There is a powerful movement in our culture to teach young
Americans that our nation's history is oppressive and shameful.
Sometimes, this effort...
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osQRn-RHN0

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Fellow
American,

There is
a powerful movement in our culture to teach young Americans that
our nation's history is oppressive and shameful.

Sometimes, this effort goes under the name "critical race
theory." Other times, activists advance these ideas through works
like The New York Times' "1619 Project."

This
radical movement pushes a narrative that slavery, not freedom, is
the defining characteristic of American history. They teach our
children that we should replace equal individual rights with the
idea of unequal rights based on group identity.

Hillsdale
College is committed to countering this destructive ideology.
That's why we have produced a new, free online course titled
"Civil Rights in American History." And right now, it is
available in a special, limited DVD box set.

When you
take this course, you'll learn about:

How
our Founding Founders understood equality, natural rights, and
civil rights.
The
quest for justice in America through the Civil War, during
Reconstruction, and in the 20th century.
The
danger posed to freedom and civil rights today by identity
politics.

You can
help promote "Civil Rights in American History" and receive your
very own DVD box set of this timely and important new course by
giving a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today.

As we do
all of our work, we produce free online courses while refusing to
accept any government funding. We don't even receive indirect
funding in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

At
Hillsdale, we rely entirely on the support of private citizens
like you who agree with our mission on behalf of liberty.

Please
help promote Hillsdale's free online courses and other
educational outreach efforts during this critical time by making
your best gift today. And don't forget. When you give $100 or
more, you'll receive your very own DVD box set of "Civil Rights
in American History."

You can
make your tax-deductible donation using the secure link below:

https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-civil-rights-in-american-history-dvd

But
please don't wait. There are only a limited number of "Civil
Rights in American History" DVD box sets available, so reserve
your copy before they're gone.

Thank you
for partnering with Hillsdale in its educational mission on
behalf of liberty.

Best
regards,

Kyle
Murnen, '09
Director
of Online Learning
Hillsdale
College

_BUT THEN:_ Senator Jon Ossoff stepped up and submitted a BRAND NEW piece of legislation: [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10439?t=7&akid=2033%2E878179%2E0h1ryN) **SO NOW:** We're doubling down on our efforts to PASS Jon Ossoff's Right to Vote Act to GUARANTEE the right to vote for ALL Americans. **_YES!!!_** [We need 46,000 Democrats to chip in right now to pass the Right to Vote Act - BEFORE Republicans kill this bill! disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/e9d57815fab376d6/f7bdc2389ecb44b6c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Hoosier Republican, Today we announced that **Kelly Craft** , the 30th U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations, will keynote our annual spring dinner to be held at the JW Marriott in Indianapolis, Ind., on June 9, 2022! "We’re thrilled to have **Ambassador Kelly Craft** as the keynote speaker for our annual spring dinner,” stated **Indiana Republican Party Chairman Kyle Hupfer**. “Hearing from **Ambassador Craft** about her experiences in international affairs and promoting American strength and ideals abroad, especially given the global challenges we face today, will certainly be something you won’t want to miss.” Hoosier Republican, seats will go fast — so don't wait!
---
[**RSVP Now**](mailto:msanderson@indiana.gop?subject=RSVP%20for%20Spring%20Dinner&body=)
---

**_NOW,_** top Democratic strategists like James Carville are calling this "a race to watch" and declaring that our "momentum is building."
Val Demings is rapidly closing the polling gap between herself and Marco Rubio, but the GOP and outside groups are determined to buy this seat and the Senate at any cost. With Republicans already running vicious ads to defeat her – even attacking her law enforcement career – Val Demings needs more resources to maintain her SURGING momentum and compete with Rubio.

Donald J. Trump May 1st, 2022
The New York Times said today, in a major article, “Segments featuring Fox’s own reporters consistently drew lower ratings, especially if they were covering stories the audience deemed unfavorable to Mr. Trump.”

The primary thing they don’t want to talk about is the 2020 Rigged Presidential Election. It’s all about that from the Laptop from Hell, to the ballot harvesting scandal, to the Zuckerberg Facebook Unlocked boxes, to cancellation by Big Tech. It’s all having to do with the Election, the most important thing they have ever done, because that’s the one subject they just don’t want to talk about. It was too corrupt, it’s now been proven, and they just want to skate by—they just want this subject to end.

Mitch McConnell and his RINO friends would rather see a Democrat like Biden be president than a Republican like me. It works better for him and his agenda, but it doesn’t work better for our Country. He should have done something about it, and he still should. When a thief robs a jewelry store and gets caught, they have to give back the jewelry. Think of it: The election was rigged and stolen, we found out how, and Republican leadership doesn’t want to do anything about it. They say, “Sir, you’re winning in a landslide, both against Republicans and Democrats. Think to the future, sir. Think to the future.” To which I say, “You can never think to the future until we solve the past, because it will just happen again.”

Everybody go out and study True the Vote and all of the information about illegal ballot harvesting, millions of votes, that’s coming out next week. Also, check out the Dinesh D’Souza documentary, “2000 Mules,” about this scam. You will come away a different person, and say to yourself that our Country’s elections are run worse than those of a third world nation.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: FILED! Breaking up the Big Tech Mafia!
body:
This is the legal "dream team" to take on two of America's most powerful corporations - and make no mistake, we will win.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/13b6o763bLvsHqEYD3YugMmA/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/13b6o763bLvsHqEYD3YugMmA/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw)This morning, after 18 months of work, I filed a $10 billion lawsuit against Facebook (Meta), Twitter, Mark Zuckerberg and Jack Dorsey under the Racketeer Influenced and Corrupt Organizations Act (RICO).

The case was filed in the Northern District of California by my attorneys who are former Congressman Bob Barr, and Constitutional attorney John Pierce.

Former Congressman Barr led the Senate impeachment trial against Bill Clinton and was appointed by President Reagan to serve as the U.S. Attorney for the Northern District of Georgia.

John Pierce is a graduate of Harvard Law School and was one of only a handful of conservative editors in the history of the _Harvard Law Review_. Mr. Pierce has represented Carter Page, George Papadopoulus, and Kyle Rittenhouse among many others. He also currently represents more January 6th defendants than any other attorney in America.

This is the legal "dream team" to take on two of America's most powerful corporations - and make no mistake, **we will win**.

But to do so, I'll need your continued support as we will be buried in litigation as Facebook and Twitter attempt to defend themselves. [Will you support this lawsuit today with a generous donation?](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/13b6o763bLvsHqEYD3YugMmA/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw)

My RICO case pulls back the veil of Social Media Bias that targets conservatives and discloses what this is TRULY about . . . advertising dollars . . . and specifically money from the world's largest advertiser.

If you look around your house, it's likely filled with products from this company, and I bet you use them daily . . . **because it 's Proctor & Gamble, the world's largest consumer product goods company**.

The depth of P&G's influence over the Big Tech Mafia, and Big Tech's conspiracy to suppress speech of conservatives will all come out in discovery and depositions . . . [but it will cost a fortune.](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/13b6o763bLvsHqEYD3YugMmA/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw)

The "wins" of this case will be incremental. And they've already started. By exposing P&G, we're already making an impact.

But, we have to keep going, and that will take your support. So please, [back my RICO case today](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/13b6o763bLvsHqEYD3YugMmA/wEbSDqvbwuew7p9Se5HnOw), and stay tuned for more.

**It 's time to break up the Big Tech Mafia!**

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: Lauren Boebert
subject: Fox News Clip: We need to have these tough conversations
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
What is this world coming to? Five years ago if you said children would be encouraged to take puberty-blocking hormones and undergo sex re-assignment surgeries, you would have been called crazy. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9917%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=%2b8qG5PiNXESFVhP2G9VXNw&sysid=1)
| | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DaN2Y5H1%2f1IdF2wxMUIIuA&sysid=1)
---

| [ WATCH: The Left's sick agenda >>](https://secure.winred.com/lauren-boebert-for-congress/pa22-support-lauren/?utm_tc=AU-20220502 " WATCH: The Left's sick agenda >>")
---
| | | Hi Friend,

**What is this world coming to?**

Five years ago if you said children would be encouraged to take puberty-blocking hormones and undergo sex re-assignment surgeries, you would have been called crazy.

Now it’s the stated policy of the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS), run by Xavier Becerra - a man who prefers the term “birthing person” to mother.

[I joined Laura Ingraham on Fox News to talk about this madness - watch the quick segment here >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20137%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0mDEsh4V%2faC6YVxHSUwJWQ&sysid=1)

**This isn’t pleasant, but we need to have these conversations.** We need to know if our tax dollars are paying to remove the breasts of a teenage girl or the genitals of young boys.

Secretary Becerra has said that such “medical procedures” are protecting children. Jen Psaki, speaking on behalf of the White House, said they were “best practices” that often save lives.

**Ummmm, no. IT’S CHILD ABUSE!**
---
| [ Stop the Woke Madness. Protect Our Kids. >>](https://secure.winred.com/lauren-boebert-for-congress/pa22-support-lauren/?utm_tc=AU-20220502 " Stop the Woke Madness. Protect Our Kids. >>")
---
| This is outrageous and appalling that I even need to say this. The woke agenda has completely overtaken the Democratic Party.

**That’s why I am calling for the official removal of Xavier Becerra and for conservatives to not let up on this issue. **

I will always stand up for our kids -[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20138%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Lg2jBSO5OBSI8juRui%2fbsw&sysid=1)[help me fight the woke agenda in Washington with a quick online donation of $50, $25 or $10.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20139%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rB9R0V5CgAleOAByshyo%2fg&sysid=1)

As a mom of four school children it's clear as day to me: the government needs to leave our kids alone and stop pushing this perverted crap in our schools!

For Freedom,
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c20136%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DaN2Y5H1%2f1IdF2wxMUIIuA&sysid=1)
Lauren Boebert
U.S. Congresswoman, 3rd District of Colorado
---

**But now, with my campaign’s one-year anniversary just _two days away_ , it’s essential we raise the necessary funds to compete with Ron DeSantis.**

If we can’t defeat DeSantis, we won’t be able to make it easier to vote, protect a woman’s right to choose, respect the rights of the LGBTQ+ community, or treat climate change like the existential threat that it is.

And that’s _unacceptable_ to me.

clean_body: but make no mistake, our toughest stretch is ahead | | | | = Can you believe it’s been almost a year, friend? On May 4, 2021, we launched this grassroots campaign to defeat Gov. DeSantis and build a Florida for All, and I couldn't be more grateful for the folks I’ve met, the stories I’ve heard, and the support I’ve received. But now, with my campaign’s one-year anniversary just two days away , it’s essential we raise the necessary funds to compete with Ron DeSantis. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Make no mistake: We’re about to enter this campaign’s toughest stretch yet , and I’ll need each and every one of you at my side to counter this entrenched, far-right governor and his billionaire backers. If we can’t defeat DeSantis, we won’t be able to make it easier to vote, protect a woman’s right to choose, respect the rights of the LGBTQ+ community, or treat climate change like the existential threat that it is. And that’s unacceptable to me. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks and God bless, Charlie Crist = | Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor Charlie Crist for Governor P.O. Box 1547 St. Petersburg, FL 33731 United States

clean_body: Dates and deadlines to remember | | Peter, With our primary election just two weeks from tomorrow, everyone who is eligible must make their plan to VOTE! Today, May 2ndis the last day to register to vote in the May 17th primary! If you are not a registered Republican in Pennsylvania, to be eligible to vote for me in the upcoming primary! May 10this the last day to request a mail-in or absentee ballot. If you want to vote early or will not be able to vote on election day, request your ballot today! May 17this the Primary Election Day! You can vote at your local polling place from 7am - 7pm. If you are a registered Republican in Pennsylvania, we need you to make your plan to VOTE GUY CIARROCCHI FOR CONGRESS. Please reply to this email if you have any questions! | We have a lot at stake in this election. Inflation is rampant, crime is rising, and our individual liberties are at risk. Together, we’re going to flip this seat RED! Thank you, Guy | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY OUR GUY FOR CONGRESS Our Guy For Congress, P.O. Box 515, Glenmoore, PA

name: Team Latham
subject: It's Time To Vote!
body:
Vote Latham Saddler for U.S. Senate!
| | | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Early voting begins today!
It has been an honor to meet so many patriots over the past year. I have made the commitment that I will fight for our country in the U.S. Senate and answer only to the people of this great state. Now I need your continued support on this final stretch. Please make sure to head to the polls and vote between now and May 24th, and please remind your friends, family, and colleagues to head to the polls as well. It is critical that we get out the vote. You can find your polling location [here.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w-DG9U9PfX9CuEsL1Uvr66FO4aIYx_lw8IVu5ckGIwsoK_AVC4YBT9IFAm4dDenka3he01Ca1NgNv7vM9gclefFt2Yl25BvmvE4p0CF1BJU6PwOOXxZLhruPa9JKC7R7ezAhFLTHBOLe5hWIhz4tHqRnqGMxMXU7LpnTTdY_KCjGshCDZE276RDYUHM8POsu&c=6m4mKiO62k8Md9WwsYZPeRhxxQGhQDl0VyA36rqJ84jFb5LN0HyZJw==&ch=afprpXKy12AhThf-VgKlobWgSkrzRbTEMAG6OQFwmpsRCIiMLsBqKQ==)
[Watch my message below and share it with 20 people](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w-DG9U9PfX9CuEsL1Uvr66FO4aIYx_lw8IVu5ckGIwsoK_AVC4YBT-gKl-EAgWj9rvhtjPMqwuV39DM7I-gYql4aeXB5BqhEx7uW7egp81sVwQZoczF0c1Ysp6kOUv1ctkYA35tPLXc152SHiPRBe56j9_xwp5tGVrdIKJClAYuNoMBHLUh0zPISy1dD7iHJarX6Aoi83fcesqBW_A64dKHvLjIKTx0E8XuB74KbpBmS2_sbbIJXpQ==&c=6m4mKiO62k8Md9WwsYZPeRhxxQGhQDl0VyA36rqJ84jFb5LN0HyZJw==&ch=afprpXKy12AhThf-VgKlobWgSkrzRbTEMAG6OQFwmpsRCIiMLsBqKQ==)
---
| [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001w-DG9U9PfX9CuEsL1Uvr66FO4aIYx_lw8IVu5ckGIwsoK_AVC4YBT-gKl-EAgWj9rvhtjPMqwuV39DM7I-gYql4aeXB5BqhEx7uW7egp81sVwQZoczF0c1Ysp6kOUv1ctkYA35tPLXc152SHiPRBe56j9_xwp5tGVrdIKJClAYuNoMBHLUh0zPISy1dD7iHJarX6Aoi83fcesqBW_A64dKHvLjIKTx0E8XuB74KbpBmS2_sbbIJXpQ==&c=6m4mKiO62k8Md9WwsYZPeRhxxQGhQDl0VyA36rqJ84jFb5LN0HyZJw==&ch=afprpXKy12AhThf-VgKlobWgSkrzRbTEMAG6OQFwmpsRCIiMLsBqKQ==)

|
---
| Tomorrow night is the Atlanta Press Club debate and the final televised debate of the primary election. Make sure you tune in to hear my message and make the case for why experienced leadership matters if we want to take back our country. I'm ready to prove that I will always show up to fight for my fellow Georgians and for this country.
Make sure you tune in tomorrow night, May 3rd from 7:00-8:00 PM EST. You can watch on Georgia Public Broadcasting and online at https://www.gpb.org
It also will stream live on the Atlanta Press Club's Facebook page.

| Thank you so much for your support to get out the vote. Let's go win this country back!
Gratefully, Latham

clean_body: Vote Latham Saddler for U.S. Senate! | | | | | | | Fellow Patriot, Early voting begins today! It has been an honor to meet so many patriots over the past year. I have made the commitment that I will fight for our country in the U.S. Senate and answer only to the people of this great state. Now I need your continued support on this final stretch. Please make sure to head to the polls and vote between now and May 24th, and please remind your friends, family, and colleagues to head to the polls as well. It is critical that we get out the vote. You can find your polling location == == | == | | Tomorrow night is the Atlanta Press Club debate and the final televised debate of the primary election. Make sure you tune in to hear my message and make the case for why experienced leadership matters if we want to take back our country. I'm ready to prove that I will always show up to fight for my fellow Georgians and for this country. Make sure you tune in tomorrow night, May 3rd from 7:00-8:00 PM EST. You can watch on Georgia Public Broadcasting and online at It also will stream live on the Atlanta Press Club's Facebook page. | | | | | | Thank you so much for your support to get out the vote. Let's go win this country back! Gratefully, Latham | == == == == | | | | | | | Team Latham | 4062 Peachtree Rd. NE, Suite A #288, Atlanta, GA 39319 | | Sent by mailto:info@lathamsaddler.com

Friend -- This is Kasey, Crystal’s Field Director. _Before reading further, I invite you to pause and take 3 deep breaths..._ I’m reaching out to share that over the weekend, as Crystal led an annual rally for Missing and Murdered Indigenous Women, she received death threats online through Facebook. Crystal is not in fear. She is not deterred and she is in no way backing down in her stance to protect marginalized people, as well as the planet. Crystal’s willingness to put herself out front for US is just one of the many reasons why I am so committed to throwing down for HER. As Crystal’s supporters, now is the time to show our strength in numbers and step up.
## Can you canvass with us in Alamance County this Saturday, 5/7?
Every single shift so far has translated into votes and new supporters. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Reaching out to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAGAZINER FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44841752/343330519/-1862136002?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjkyMmNlOC01YWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LAaLwxfmTod8OnRiZMBZcpDtzUbkt0DTNiGQzWyIflw=&emci=43e20d74-48ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=c2922ce8-5aca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=15384964)

Peter,

Over the weekend, we faced our end-of-month deadline and we set an ambitious online fundraising goal to help us start May off on the right foot. Thanks to the support of this grassroots team, I'm excited to share that **we reached our end-of-month goal!**

I can't thank you enough for your support, Peter. With national Republicans already attacking my campaign directly, reaching this goal puts us in a better position to fight back and keep RI-02 blue.

There are just over six months until Election Day and I know the toughest challenges lie ahead. But I am encouraged that people across Rhode Island are committed to keeping this district and the House majority blue this November, and I know that if we continue working together, we can win and continue the fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, make pre-K universal and childcare more affordable, and invest in the clean energy infrastructure that will create good jobs while tackling the climate crisis.

Thank you,

Seth

name: Herschel Walker
subject: “A white insult to Black people”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. |
---
_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Peter,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."_
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2febcfb13e794930858431e511e96f63&_e=Jg_ZRhq8_Za4qE87Pz-I9u78_oCqupGdQWhFILIuE2aGkPaw5wWUy00TJRWGhr85pjZs-USTtU8HQuMbV0iiRHv3-3h0A0brQw4xkR31NlttfszeuPBBLz5bFlopkr8L5-hMzbY__CiVD3dN2lhtP6aU9ppZwTka4DHWOqtRFZgqsWxra9b1PhJMDzautAE1126zS83QZADzYf-gZVLNx9YAVTzCDBglNWOxOaeAnzkL_DO9ISI77449tkVYI7lPAZbb95_RfqVE3QAHB-f6W29Qu4rzzu2JwCFI5jNNKndu2JeZkI-uFV4_IFzduKCwT60pxk6QyLXelEWPwKUqdmOOO8KATRqkW2Hm3kUSNeGCiC-hERJOuHsL_Uovju95vAwVBlbGd0evbusOdu8sfkicdoBdnNj5ST2kRBpl8iICObZH7dhgvC_a8C2kAf_gg_lMed-dq9589b6Fw7swXfC7vus-ESrfwkNtJD6odlY%3D)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=2febcfb13e794930858431e511e96f63&_e=Jg_ZRhq8_Za4qE87Pz-I9u78_oCqupGdQWhFILIuE2aGkPaw5wWUy00TJRWGhr85pjZs-USTtU8HQuMbV0iiRHv3-3h0A0brQw4xkR31NlttfszeuPBBLz5bFlopkr8L5-hMzbY__CiVD3dN2lhtP6aU9ppZwTka4DHWOqtRFZgqsWxra9b1PhJMDzautAE1126zS83QZADzYf-gZVLNx9YAVTzCDBglNWOxOaeAnzkL_DO9ISI77449tkVYI7lPAZbb95_RfqVE3QAHB-f6W2fMfusOps2pjwviNqxXe0uRBAlfyVoWmQifwQJjj9fxErYD5llYRldUXvoqMce8GpLY2LjEh3H1AdPObqFoDUL0z4_k2S-iX9H30QpOvWrcjkhi8eAheCGwbGWjQVgaTesTgHY1KwGiIKEcE2F33oNbi2L4MM8N2vBnFNuGNoT2q4uEbH1FnUg6ZK3VHJULq_WW74Jo06wQQww3Famvm98%3D)**

clean_body: MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. | "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." --Eli Mystal, MSNBC Peter, I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in The Nation. The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line: "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." That's racist, disgusting, and sad. I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far. You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment. We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air. I won't be quiet about this. This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

name: Team Greitens
subject: Dental Records and Email Transcripts Show Abuse Accusations Against Eric Greitens are Fabricated
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| BOMBSHELL: Dental Records and Email Transcripts Show Abuse Accusations Against Eric Greitens are Fabricated
---
|
---
| Read from [Big League Politics...](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EtL1Di6y4QLv3xs4Y3wExFD_cy65WtTaZ9S-1anXlDbB41hFo-6XpYSf3GWqFJgpHjmodKoxEmiFGozpibC0IIPWfLitTj2emDd2agK4PXL4Yc0aQSWvZon9FWNnqrKxXgyCMuZOQ4KU2aAmXFONP0CCJfKQSf1QOtYKidmZAO5uEKm_THaGM07PTTIIOQAeEjfbIBCbC6KGdvPKfAf5d9SySTDYUjvsrfZNnvpWqpIduJlGvfFlPsUIgr0dlCUtiw==&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==)
Big League Politics has obtained dental records and emails written by Sheena Greitens proving that child abuse allegations against Missouri U.S. Senate candidate Eric Greitens are politically motivated.
Sheena Greitens has accused her ex-husband of child abuse at a time in which Eric Greitens is being exonerated from a previous railroading initiated by his Democrat opponents, who have been [sanctioned and convicted of mishandling evidence](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EtL1Di6y4QLvy9RGCpmee6E16zJZ_VtI3k1D0fHkVjDCjYFt1Cz-vy67Pmp5yS48OMy-EuVB5w4g14zr43szZCL3H5EWfaP8dRBR-yYECOujYH2dJ56hB2vopKv7Xu2Igw2_5IF6Hq4yZR9BNTIGsagDJ_a1yE6YnKGiGyV0gesr&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) to set up Greitens and drive him out as Missouri Governor in 2018. These documents show that another conspiracy is afoot in an attempt to thwart Greitens' political comeback.
Documents from the Columbia Dentistry For Children in May 2020 show that Greitens' child Joshua aggravated his upper lip while playing, which resulted in a bump above his tooth that looked like a canker sore. After the bump became infected began draining, Joshua was prescribed an antibiotic and the tooth was extracted a week later without any complications. Sheena reported no abuse throughout the routine process.
In an email addressed from Sheena to Eric Greitens on June 2020, Sheena complained about her son's ear infection and nagged Eric for taking his son swimming in a lake. She described Joshua getting the tooth infection from "roughhousing," not from any abuse from his father. Pictures provided to Big League Politics additionally show that damage to Joshua's tooth and gums was incredibly minor and barely visible.
In another email addressed to Eric, Sheena noted that both of their children, Joshua and Jacob, attested that Jacob was hit by a teenager in a park which resulted in a bruise to the face. Sheena expressed her concerns that the children "may need to be supervised more closely to ensure their safety" because "it seems like the boys are playing too rough." This was Sheena's story before she was allegedly approached by Karl Rove and other RINO political operatives.
Additionally, Sheena filed an affidavit in 2020 during her divorce proceedings with Eric swearing that "no material fact" about the welfare of her children went unreported. She did not include any information about her husband committing any abuse against herself or their children. Since meeting with Rove's operatives, she has signed an affidavit attesting the exact opposite of what she stated in 2020. This contradiction shows that Sheena may be committing perjury as part of a plot to undermine her ex-husband's political career and destroy his reputation.
Sheena has also claimed that she made the abuse allegations to her counselor, her attorney and a court-appointed mediator. All of these individuals are mandated under their licenses to report child abuse to law enforcement in Missouri and to do otherwise is a felony. According to Sheena, these individuals committed criminal acts by refusing to report suspicion of a felony by withholding the information from authorities.
Another tell-tale sign of Sheena's alleged dishonesty is changing the language in her affidavit in an attempt to cover her tracks. Her initial draft of the affidavit claimed that she never worked with any political operatives in order to come up with her testimony. In a second draft, she only claimed that Karl Rove did not directly contribute to the testimony in her affidavit. Sheena is justified in her trepidation regarding her dubious affidavits, as Eric Greitens' [lawsuit to subpoena her phone records](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EtL1Di6y4QLvnEsqNe1GGUmFKWJo-r2zo95TepYRFrWh4YWwa1lYIbajmiSSfQnEtYhNzsjLE9DQ2QocyntXsmtdV-7JNrRUJVSlIsG5Y5hVUaLOeiGUzVPRWeoB_3-TDrArv8NYTbL6YOzGR5-9rp-MwM851v5fpkaP9piGXCG4AKulAbULrqRmZHgWldE4_w==&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) is moving rapidly through the courts.
Greitens' attorneys are requesting access to 57 days of call logs and text messages from Verizon and AT&T for phones that are owned by Sheena Greitens, her sister Catherine Linkul, former Greitens campaign manager Austin Chambers, and another number from an individual who has yet to be publicly identified. Sheena's attorney, Helen Wade, has admitted that Sheens is in close contact with Linkul and Chambers, who is described as a close friend.
"This is a fishing expedition with a specific collateral purpose," Wade said. "It is overboard and it is for the purpose of harassment. It is for intimidation."
However, Greitens' attorneys are more than happy with the appointment of a special master who can sift through the records to determine if the conspiracy had in fact taken place. This would protect the privacy rights of the various parties involved while getting to the bottom of the matter.
"I am interested in knowing who was talking to who at or near the time of the leak in an effort to confirm a sad suspicion," Eric Greitens' attorney Gary Stamper said. "I hope I am wrong."
Additionally, it [has been revealed](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2ErC70svMLeRbSSLl5UvOANxXuFJvqj__mY3sm3TnHvFmD-I-xzMtFQXlG_QNQyYpi50S9vwn6wL5npthy16n1KE24sHqjzV01Ld-cAvTgZWjVChcr-AmDM-HK7gSFKPaBZsm1aP0qqRMW9yLhmxtvg1___YK8tOD3t3XJwmhc9bS4HzshGhWctg99ppC-tdK8Kvx2qBpoFeX3bo9SwS3H6RFx0hdLQ65zntYGDNZfU7g2PA-s9gBxFuJaUAg7e_-Zl8QMfjnzzpLu_N_Os34i46wYnSvcTxiCA2qUuhpx9JWZlTmyDjBgII=&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) that Sheena's sister, Linkul, is deeply tied to the Republican Party establishment that is working to undermine Greitens' rise. Linkul works as the vice president of strategy for P2 Pathway Public Affairs. This firm is run by Phil Cox, a veteran GOP establishment operative who worked as Executive Director of the Republican Governors Association from 2011-14. He has deep ties to Senate Minority Leader Mitch McConnell, serving as a board member for his Super PAC, the Senate Leadership Fund.
The #metoo era has certainly resulted in several high-profile predators being brought to justice, but it has also allowed seedy consultants and operatives to weaponize abuse claims in order to impugn their enemies, further lowering our political and social discourse. What the RINO establishment is attempting to do to Greitens with these false accusations is one of the lowest examples of these malicious attacks to date.
---
| | | | FOLLOW US
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EoeRahRn2shoasaOZvnTiVPPVfxXOvLO9RSE5e-jxGVeo1wm26_HzD8xbPtc3vO-BHgGt9x5GLhmHYfeJj2jorjGF6ifrwwQ27kXgUx6hJWo&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EoeRahRn2sho6XENNjJVD-Qg5W6Va6_ae4DsCPXgAUj9qkVTRuTh43JHfglr7p5bkRJI_KnNEGxKB3GUGnh5pM8RjChcI9ptORk6josuCkvM&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EoeRahRn2shoVGFWDUS6Z6J4D9yONNGmVfy6394fZfOB9_JYMmQbhmjbIEgj1KPgJ8DlRNR90w5WCWIz4BKnNvA8mnJrf2D9MaRJwx8W86Qvm8jWQh_P6Hg=&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==) [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Kkb0s8B-Nf6PkCqYCE_OKWaN39oywGrEOFBGQh2wIOOgg-XSIqW2EprH9LixynGyabYUvn-E9cCU41d2qM0vYFzVnybVLfG7H0rU725OWaA-uE1gifeWkCY6NgRDudKD5NKJQ_-rn-ElKqicGp_Cc6P8g_LgTLQcmq0Dn8HltoBRPkTHQkaiMSZ5vpwnm_b9&c=dEVuLUksQgXYA2fHFTJOo8upv2_MOec4g5k6ULoT0g49plTnWggoug==&ch=uPFx7Ch8kL6rPELEc1d3aUYf8aZtwPB0Vw1J8m9nMaNR8AXGl6j2Uw==)

My friend Mike Gibbons is facing the greatest challenge of his life.
Mike Gibbons is running against establishment candidates. The primary is tomorrow and I'm doing everything in my power to elect him to the U.S. Senate.
I'm asking YOU to make an urgent donation to Mike Gibbons's campaign. My goal is to raise $5,000 to reach last-minute voters with online ads.

Electing Mike Gibbons to the U.S. Senate would effectively prevent Joe Biden from passing anything into law during the second half of his term in office.
