body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3549%2E3611125%2ESsR9Ua ][IMG]

$3.

That’s all I’m asking you to donate before tomorrow’s primary election.

$3 might not seem like a lot compared to the $80 million Republicans are
spending, but let me tell you why it makes a difference.

I spent all weekend traveling across Ohio meeting with voters and hearing
their stories. It’s clear folks are fired up like never before to flip
this seat blue.

Expanding the Democratic Senate majority means we can finally make
progress on the issues that matter. And political experts say our race is
the best chance to do just that.

Look, I don’t know what’s gonna happen tomorrow night. But I do know that
no matter who the GOP nominates, we have the team and grassroots energy to
win this race.

Sure, my opponent will have the full backing of Mitch McConnell and
billionaire-funded, right-wing super PACs. But I’ll have an entire army of
grassroots supporters willing to do whatever it takes to flip Ohio blue
and elect the most pro-worker delegation the Senate has ever seen.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11872?t=1009&amount=3&akid=3549%2E3611125%2ESsR9Ua ]So, what do you say? $3 makes a huge difference, and I’m counting on
yours. Will you chip in to show these GOP extremists and their far-right
mega donors we have the strength to win?

name: Tobias Read
subject: Latest ad before primary day
body:
Last week I released my latest TV ad of the primary campaign. The homelessness crisis has reached the point where there’s an average of one homeless child in every classroom in Oregon.
---
| | Dear Peter, Last week I released my latest TV ad of the primary campaign. The homelessness crisis has reached the point where there’s an average of one homeless child in every classroom in Oregon. **Thousands of children are sleeping on the streets, in cars, and in homeless shelters across our state.** We can’t afford to wait ten years for my opponent to consider taking action. **[Give it a watch and please, if you agree that Oregon needs immediate action on this crisis, consider a $20 contribution to keep this ad on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44842374/343333247/-124723907?refcode=em050222&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGEwNjMyOC01ZWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dbgXk9uk9esbMH68NNhbez4h1PnGBelQ91IWashyuY=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44842375/343333248/-124723907?refcode=em050222&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGEwNjMyOC01ZWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dbgXk9uk9esbMH68NNhbez4h1PnGBelQ91IWashyuY=) As your Governor, I won’t rest until every Oregonian has a safe place to sleep. **We can never accept unsafe camps, open to the elements and with no safety systems in place, as an acceptable place for anyone to live.** Anyone who’s ever seen the camps knows how urgent this is. Our communities deserve better. Our homeless neighbors and their children deserve better. **The people living in camps in communities around the state can’t afford to wait ten years while we create more workgroups and committees for something to be done.** **[There are just 15 days until election day, and we need to keep up the momentum. That’s why I’m asking you to check out our latest ad and to chip in $20 to keep it on the air.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44842376/343333249/-124723907?refcode=em050222&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGEwNjMyOC01ZWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2dbgXk9uk9esbMH68NNhbez4h1PnGBelQ91IWashyuY=)** Thanks,

---

Peter –

I know you’ve heard from me and my team a whole bunch last week, so I just have one more thing I want you to hear loud and clear: THANK YOU.

Our team has generated A LOT of critical momentum, and I can’t thank you enough for your support. Your involvement in this race is instrumental to our shared success.

[But the work is never over, Peter. With the GOP pledging to pour millions into our district, this race is going to be hard-fought. But that’s never discouraged me from doing the right thing for Florida. name: Major Update
subject: re: MSNBC's Rachel Maddow Show
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc

| | | **BREAKING:** New rankings show that The Rachel Maddow Show is the MOST watched cable news program among Democrats -- _but we still have**NO RECORD** of whether you tune in!_

body:
Polls open tomorrow, and Jennifer-Ruth needs every Hoosier to get their votes in before they close! Read more >> | | | | [ ](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=1cdab5f49d&e=683c601116)

| | | [**🚨**** _Vote TOMORROW! Find your polling location_** **🚨**](https://sagemedia.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cd489bad315c61b3e08030170&id=2914dc8c1e&e=683c601116)
Peter,

There is so much at stake in this election cycle, and Jennifer-Ruth needs your help to secure the Republican nomination in the primary tomorrow, so we can focus on defeating Frank Mrvan in November!

With so much on the line for Indiana and all of America, it’s critical that we flip this seat RED and get one step closer to taking back the House from the radical left.

**Take a moment right now to make your plan to VOTE FOR JENNIFER-RUTH GREEN.** Then, please forward this message to at least five family members and friends!

The polls will be open from 6:00 a.m. until 6:00 p.m.
---

Jennifer-Ruth is so proud of the campaign we’ve run, and grateful for all your support along the way.

Help us score a big win tomorrow. We can’t afford to fall short.

Please make sure to get out to vote tomorrow, and share the word by forwarding on this reminder email!

Thanks so much,
Team Green

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michael=20LaPierre?=
subject: LaPierre Winning Battle of Ideas
body:
LaPierre Winning Battle of Ideas | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b3cce78dbfbc/happy-new-year-6075513?e=6582090d83)
---
|
---
**TO: SOUTH CAROLINA REPUBLICANS** Dear Supporters,**Candidate LaPierre Winning the Battle of Ideas** While the establishment Republican, William Timmons, spends tens of thousands of dollars running TV ads and other campaign related advertisements, it is challenger Mike LAPIERRE who is winning the battle of ideas and the battle of popular public opinion by a long shot.

Both critical variables (ideas and public opinion) point to the need for a spiritual and a moral realignment in the United States of America. LaPierre has written hundreds of articles, offers 6 FREE BOOKS on his website, has written 30 political solutions, with other academic whitepapers that all point to his complete understanding of the political, moral, and spiritual issues that face America.When is the last time you heard the incumbent, Congressman Timmons, speak of spiritual matters? Timmons legislates from a **SECULAR HUMANIST** perspective with very little **DEMONSTRATED** understanding of the spiritual and moral imperatives that face our great country.

Timmons believes that the forerunner to our religious freedoms, is a "nonproductive issue", his words. That forerunner is a proper definition of Church and State and the corresponding functional roles. I was shocked when Timmons said that it was a “nonproductive issue!”

We must elect a congressman who understands the great moral and spiritual needs of our day and then puts an action plan together to write legislation, use the bully pulpit, and EDUCATE the great citizens of District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg Counties. District 4 citizens need to know what is happening and how they can mobilize to fight back!

America is a Christian nation and we need RECLAIM AMERICA with a Christian Leadership Worldview. A legislative approach that we have NOT seen from Timmons!

VOTE Mike LaPierre for Congress
SC District 4 - Greenville and Spartanburg Counties

I LIKE MIKE
God bless the beautiful state of SOUTH CAROLINA!
|
---
|
---
| | | _Copyright (C) 2022 LaPierre for House. All rights reserved._ Thank you for your continued interest in LaPierre for House. we appreciate volunteers, friends, or family members who have opted in at our social media outlets. LaPierre for House1436 Hwy 414Suite 177Travelers Rest, SC 29690
[Add us to your address book](https://lapierreforhouse.us13.list-manage.com/vcard?u=835cbcded606775ee123908e4&id=1dda905b0f) [Update Preferences](https://lapierreforhouse.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=835cbcded606775ee123908e4&id=1dda905b0f&e=6582090d83&c=50f1204448) | [Unsubscribe](https://lapierreforhouse.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=835cbcded606775ee123908e4&id=1dda905b0f&e=6582090d83&c=50f1204448) [](http://www.mailchimp.com/email-referral/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=referral_marketing&aid=835cbcded606775ee123908e4&afl=1)

name: Team Slotkin
subject: The DeVos Family just gave 50k
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220502&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220502&amount=28]
Friend,
Team Slotkin pulled off something amazing in the first three months of 2022. 89% of contributions to this campaign were $100 or less – and we were still able to raise $1.3 million.
Even more impressive? Not a dime of that money came from a corporate PAC – and certainly none came from former Trump cabinet members.
Elissa’s opponent unfortunately can’t say the same thing. Almost $50,000 (!) of the money he raised in the last 3 months came from contributions from members of the DeVos family, including a maximum donation from Betsy DeVos herself.
That’s over 10% of his total money raised in 2022 – and that’s just the money he has to report. Members of the DeVos family help fund dark money groups in support of conservative candidates all over Michigan and will likely be investing heavily in this race in particular.
We’ve shown the power of grassroots supporters chipping in what they can, when they can. But in order to compete in one of the most competitive House races in the country and combat huge spending from the DeVos family, we’ll need to continue our momentum through Election Day. We’d be most appreciative if you chipped in today. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220502&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220502&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

name: American Action News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj3ecvuc26psbul0m6cqopmastb0n2r4j8eech1o_rp22sh2s8i66pb4clh6eo36c5h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfddr6carjad36e2pn0ob0ssp7cp9lcsoneo72coprcptgs3ijeobic6omdcrke3jt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coor9cr46upbephkcapm4ptgmlin49fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zttelnbt5ncijgr330cosmk8e4mbjgvolko73tr8_rp22sh2s8i66pb4clh6eo36c5h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8j1ac511m7eatkksfj094cjivibsnbogrbf52lg_rp22sh2s8i66pb4clh6eo36c5h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0e3ocjfo3vp9enp1dio258vjj23a124p65t57do_rp22sh2s8i66pb4clh6eo36c5h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jake Bequette
subject: Thank you & what to expect in the next 3 weeks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS
body:
I’m grateful for your help. Read more >>
| | | Friend, I just wanted to take a quick moment to thank you for your support last month. **We’ve always been the underdog in this race. But thanks to the help of patriots like you, our campaign has caught fire in the past four weeks, and we’re closing in on RINO career politician John Boozman.** As we enter the final three weeks of this Republican Primary race, I’m counting on your continued support more than ever. Every dollar you give will help us reach a few more voters with our message. Thanks again for your incredible support. I’m looking forward to fighting by your side in the critical closing days of this campaign!
-Jake Bequette **P.S. Will you please consider chipping in a generous donation to help us get EVERY Team Bequette supporter to the polls?[CONTRIBUTE NOW >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8fef6bc01533e51d9c32df07ccef91c9/38553/969073e3cd049611/fbd3806aed85ead1c3d6b838967d376c/38553) Thanks again! **

clean_body: I’m grateful for your help. Read more >> | | | Friend, I just wanted to take a quick moment to thank you for your support last month. We’ve always been the underdog in this race. But thanks to the help of patriots like you, our campaign has caught fire in the past four weeks, and we’re closing in on RINO career politician John Boozman. As we enter the final three weeks of this Republican Primary race, I’m counting on your continued support more than ever. Every dollar you give will help us reach a few more voters with our message. Thanks again for your incredible support. I’m looking forward to fighting by your side in the critical closing days of this campaign! -Jake Bequette P.S. Will you please consider chipping in a generous donation to help us get EVERY Team Bequette supporter to the polls? Thanks again! id:2022-04-29-20:35:18:872t | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY BEQUETTE FOR ARKANSAS | |

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I’m being attacked again by a racist
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. |
---
_**"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."**
--Eli Mystal, MSNBC_

Peter,

I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in _The Nation_.

The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line:

_"Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people."_
Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings.

He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said:

_"I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers."_
**That's racist, disgusting, and sad.**

I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far.

**You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment.**

We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. **[Can I count on you to help me today?](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=a58f7f2fac7d48d0871559b5a2a757fb&_e=MvpYRXVIeeHbC6s9mXd9Iq_cRLB0MTjU9nwIxi5Xe1NR6mQ8xfPljdaXq7sOQCD0xhTUnAdFaEuNVLljE3amZjnmf6Dr0ilFoD2Ak91Fb9DiCW5eydkLVES54F4DFUZDBQqoxNtXeLmArKGYvK7XR0hthzIo5f9JzG61XwLzof1Ei_-w4dpcdmXZuDIPlbhqzpWFVgerMcX_aR-WywUFlbVa3GC6onBx2n2uoGEcH4K6XduAP0dftaGZ2kYfgxjzeBgLjqctP8i6SBSAvzX69gTg5SqjLOP6rsCcrYoi2TRVFe2v3BS_pZ7mrX9wLJJQvwCiKKGSKWs_83COSN7Wysi_a5444Di3wGejEHxHw5lUA_-6VQrZ9Ui3ej9ezOi7-9ewxjAxb8HbN9rQSHTxntLNXmxd0putllpUQLqQZvw_K0fOaUxTq0OngmR1TrG1H8h7_4jz34mDToumhBosRAgkCku1zhwssjzDWQ61dz9BBMjA6MQJQ9YtCp9mNSEp)**

_Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air._

**I won't be quiet about this.** This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong.

**[We hope you'll take a moment today to support our Senate campaign and show the people who want us to fail just how much support there is for Black conservatives in this country.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=a58f7f2fac7d48d0871559b5a2a757fb&_e=MvpYRXVIeeHbC6s9mXd9Iq_cRLB0MTjU9nwIxi5Xe1NR6mQ8xfPljdaXq7sOQCD0xhTUnAdFaEuNVLljE3amZjnmf6Dr0ilFoD2Ak91Fb9DiCW5eydkLVES54F4DFUZDBQqoxNtXeLmArKGYvK7XR0hthzIo5f9JzG61XwLzof1Ei_-w4dpcdmXZuDIPlbhqzpWFVgerMcX_aR-WywUFlbVa3GC6onBx2n2uoGEcH4K6XduAP0dftaGZ2kYfgxjzeBgLjqctP8i6SBSAvzX69gTg5SqjLOP6rsCcrYoi2TTa8kCrSz14GsUNSV73r0kqp6YkjmB_GzRQxvs8ryx_J_yLJmnN5AzN8MVhYAK_ZDvamYenK0PIdQJ22p_vzyLPlfS3TZ8j0QPhrOR298o-qEO48SzVZ4LnXA0C4b4HJGzRYHd40IQZWzyw-VJJmEcs5xNjL-ZBjXsgvP0nsI01d0IMSwQt3ackPDQ2Wiq8REmSD4PUxSmQwUk0Zc0ky0QG)**

Thanks,

clean_body: MSNBC invited this man to appear on their network and spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. | "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [Herschel Walker and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." --Eli Mystal, MSNBC Peter, I recently wrote to you about a racist article attacking me in The Nation. The author had some pretty heinous things to say because I'm a Black conservative. You may recall this line: "Herschel Walker's candidacy is a white insult to Black people." Well, Peter, he's back at it again. MSNBC featured this man on their network this week so he could spew even more anti-Black, anti-conservative vitriol in the name of mediocre TV ratings. He doubled down in his attacks on me. This time he attacked Republican Senator Tim Scott (SC) too. Here's part of what he said: "I make a hard distinction between Black conservatives and these tokens [referring to me and Senator Tim Scott], who are out here right now, shucking and jiving for their white handlers." That's racist, disgusting, and sad. I never wanted the color of my skin to be a focal point of this Senate campaign, but these attacks on my character and my skin color have gone too far. You can help me prove them wrong by standing with me at this critical moment. We'd like to show them a groundswell of grassroots support from across Georgia and around the country. Just imagine if these comments were made by a conservative about a Black Democrat. They'd be fired immediately after going off air. I won't be quiet about this. This columnist is saying horrible things about fellow human beings based on the color of their skin. That's simply wrong. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

WE ARE 8 DAYS OUT from the May 10th primary and the Lindstrom SURGE continues! Take a look at some of our campaign highlights from the last week on the campaign trail:

Brett started off Wednesday at a coffee shop in Madison County then went to Weiland Doors, a great Nebraska company and an economic driver, followed by a forum on Nebraska's infrastructure in Norfolk, before ending the day with supporters in Tekamah.
---
| |
---
|
---
Brett met with the Omaha Police Officers Association President Tony Conner on Thursday to listen to the needs of Nebraska’s police and what he can do as Governor to #BackTheBlue. After that it was off to a packed house in Omaha for a rally with his supporters.
---
---
On Friday Brett had lunch with supporters in Sarpy County and had a great discussion on tax cuts, on social security, and military retirement pay.
---
| |
---
|
---
|
---
Nebraska City’s Arbor Day Parade was on Saturday and despite the rain #TeamLindstrom showed up in force. After a packed post-parade meet and greet in Nebraska City Brett ended the day at another overflow crowd in Brownsville.
---
| |
---
|
---
|

clean_body: | | | | Sprinting to the Finish! Friends, WE ARE 8 DAYS OUT from the May 10th primary and the Lindstrom SURGE continues! Take a look at some of our campaign highlights from the last week on the campaign trail: | | | | On Monday Brett had events with fired up #TEAMLINDSTROM voters in Seward, York, Aurora, and Kearney before | | | Tuesday was another day meeting with enthusiastic groups around the state. Brett started the day in Imperial then went to Ogallala and wrapped up the day in Columbus. I was particularly touched by a supporter named Rebecca. | | | | Brett started off Wednesday at a coffee shop in Madison County then went to Weiland Doors, a great Nebraska company and an economic driver, followed by a forum on Nebraska's infrastructure in Norfolk, before ending the day with supporters in Tekamah. | | | Brett met with the Omaha Police Officers Association President Tony Conner on Thursday to listen to the needs of Nebraska’s police and what he can do as Governor to #BackTheBlue. After that it was off to a packed house in Omaha for a rally with his supporters. On Friday Brett had lunch with supporters in Sarpy County and had a great discussion on tax cuts, on social security, and military retirement pay. | | | | Nebraska City’s Arbor Day Parade was on Saturday and despite the rain #TeamLindstrom showed up in force. After a packed post-parade meet and greet in Nebraska City Brett ended the day at another overflow crowd in Brownsville. | | | | In the last week of the primary it is all hands on deck. We need your help! From making calls, to knocking doors and delivering yard signs, there are so many different ways you can help get Brett over the finish line. If you would like to volunteer -- please click the button below, and I will be in touch shortly. | We are thankful for your support and truly can't do this without you. Have a great rest of the week! 8 Days! All the Best, Tori Midkiff Political Director Lindstrom For Governor | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2433 S. 130th Circle, Omaha, NE, 68144

name: PragerU
subject: Our work is in jeopardy
body:
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41UfY1fwzk3AvSJWf8eoPG2ZAR_OM1pSyC5g1arwjWr4VsjyI_hscB09SFav6JoxHjQnKTM408LgCVYoYZRGXvNYEWTSAgjoozhLUnZ9Sc1_fB9DgFHNpaXPdLvtYTUqbCj8TgMhOx3I1S1_i839_o-4FjkutLkFKq13vHAqG9nUSpYYRBihx0VqPBithH6sbz_w5dEuVuvkOW1hgWdL7UBjvw%3D%3D) Dear Friend, Everyone at PragerU hopes this email finds you and your families doing well, considering this crazy world we are living in! From inflation to wars, the tragedy, chaos, and economic pain have been hard on everyone—including PragerU’s fight to save America.

Are you familiar with PragerU? You may have watched a PragerU video online. One third of Americans have watched one of our pro-America videos. These short videos reach millions of young people every day. They quickly explain the founding principles and traditional values that have made America so strong, prosperous, and free—and help young people to be proud and grateful to be Americans! During this difficult time for our nation, the PragerU team is more committed and working harder than ever—educating young people about American exceptionalism. Those values have sustained us through hard times, and have made us stronger as a nation. They will do so again. To be completely honest with you, we’ve been getting troubling calls from some of our most generous supporters. Because of this downturn, some are saying that they will not be able to help with a significant gift this year. **We are already tracking behind our budgeted goal. We fear the important work we are doing together may be in real jeopardy.** **[Can we count on your tax-deductible support today to help us continue being your pro-America voice and fighting for everything you care about?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41Uftglha4LHIX_82zLm_zWIxBPbb3p0K99vPD_o-dDJk_3B4O5SfBiWiYPG1cKoGMQgQ6JjojuvQjoSwGsU8S8VjMT4HXUF8vkgq1T_p2wO8r0EZrHtkq-ZLKVfzf2qPAEzC0w5S96LLPdqRjaVjE0vf_8cfp4fjpK9HY_-NWIltF97PTuK-7UuXYtzSVi1NBQpdiFOcKVHkQQhmqccOS4f1w%3D%3D)** [**Donate Now to PragerU**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41UfUHp0UnszbwGePccK1I7t9zM4ExM8tjHVVp9VeOXESOlfXCa5ZoqVFzgYZhOJnFREVMAB4n14V65FrVlN35-I_2ZVogFPvRRk8BM-Lch7VtaInf59N-3sEVg2rFd2vNVYCE6plq56RR686sO7nn2U2j5fsm8uvMGpA_D66oniuib3tlP5PwN7r0bJp4gd1S3pBjLXlEJSrqHguTGNlrm7aQ%3D%3D) In the midst of this terrible uncertainty lies an opportunity to educate Americans, who are spending more time online than ever before, about our shared ideas and values. The better-funded left will use this opportunity to diminish our voice. They are working together right now to find the money to bury our ideas—simply by rapidly making and marketing more video content than we do. [**Please give today. Consider a gift of $25, $50, $100, or $250!**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41UfedlHTSDAMuHHr2Np6-Bv7RlWQlWSWdHGW4y3GN7JTFwtudfHYCelpYBVDA23zhttkHbx0UI-BVZIOoz7zKxsNhK8-j-EZ6wZm6W2TMVMg_8p6Z1x06oYLK831T6sAoji7klLEabcjVeCLh3SCK3XRjATegbwy40IHE17rsowkD5tw6969_UCRUWuia6TD-k_PLQyG0T-WGdlon7eD9lEfg%3D%3D) The question is: Which side will harness this opportunity to influence hundreds of millions of young people? We need to be sure it’s us—not the side taking advantage of every single crisis as a chance to grab ever more government control. **
** **You can help in many different ways as we weather these storms:**
1. [Give a generous gift](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41UfdB7WO8_G-9nFNdwOMPlJJc2xw8N7Ls1_hykKuI8dcIvc7E1AKYhzdVblyvwPbTYfw6lDJnAdhwtgnAQCGSoGDGL62KbNy9ke3kLVV2uP56quraPow7IdZoQDhODipwaz7v-OXRwVW5bUm3eH7Xh9AepQLNCpD8IXD9Asa-YKKIiTMGEI6YXlkTTTVSK4G1Jz7eCNYTwRx7SJqXZtTEqv-g%3D%3D) if you are able to do so. Help us make up the gap for those who can no longer afford to give this year. If you were planning to give at the end of the year, please consider giving now.
Please consider an automatic monthly recurring gift to help us ride out the bumps in the financial road!
2. Ask your friends to match your gift if you cannot give as generously as you did last year (it’s important to act now to grow our grassroots support; there is strength in numbers).
3. [Add PragerU to your estate plan](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUtYQq0NzQ482Vqrkw2UqupNfONsFWc4hpefXH4RoCh7vIgFtYDkt7yRolq1-6Fn9uA3MHGradGYEkEAl_l-UegeSO4t6B0-PNeF_je_ArFyXxlPRh7rzHWU1mbCmtkjMDoO-XE2QHAPfM8HgC4sfWDfb5KV0rSohzXr6m5_e1YIRf7beaRB3unxRNZPebg_DBA2XF_AHr6lxP-EW0qxsHKwGvSBURPF6Z9kwIZ0WacrdH7Ke5tNbGhgO4T8knl3FBg%3D%3D). This is a great time to think about the future and what you want your legacy to be. Please email [Legacy@PragerU.com](mailto:Legacy@PragerU.com) for more information.
4. And always keep PragerU in your thoughts and prayers: Please continue to pray for our success every week. Your encouragement will help our staff stay focused and strong during the months ahead.

Our faith and resolve are being tested. Together we can succeed. We know that your heart is committed to our work. Thank you in advance for anything you can do. God bless you and your families. With gratitude,

Marissa Streit, CEO Dennis Prager, Founder [**Donate Now**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff0fdc18c5f44864adb8ed4012d2bc39&_e=Msa0b3-rYUEGUduz1P6VUiPEP5n7uv1VFIH_bffVw3y4KNercqs4l9wF-jf-ZaGU0okjEnKiNBC10vU-SwipLf99HJPC5Om-zDQTHDdSr8JMclF_Pured9vNeNOO41UfyIjUKp2IeLjT_mWY-ZJSANF9d9TSpkFAh_NIG3yUHevKXLnGCSbNoUmN-QDg4GySb8-NmQgLp6TTk3yfMCH3pSxxnKjtGQHg39hWB-kZTSh-LvgA2B5rGmCu0qBM-xJ2cVL6b3jx-g2X_M_a2XWFxsmcLHO0lDufi334EW14twvzautFo2kbtEWmFkKeuwBZ8A-Q19aSwdOZW-PzBgHemQ%3D%3D) | |
---

name: Urgent from President Biden [via unitedemocrats.org]
subject: Sounding the alarm

name: Jerry Finkenauer
subject: sharing a few photos
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, Peter. I'm Jerry Finkenauer, and my daughter Abby is running to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R) and serve as Iowa's next U.S. senator. **These are some photos from one of my proudest moments as a dad: the day I got to watch my little girl take the oath of office to serve in Congress. **I just need a couple of minutes of your time to talk about why this moment meant so much to me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843409/343338622/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=)
I can't put into words what it feels like to cast a ballot for your daughter, to see her fight for her home in the halls of Congress and to watch her take on someone like Sen. Grassley, who's left Iowa behind after spending 47 years in Washington. **I'm so, so proud of Abby – especially because I know exactly how hard she had to work to get here. **
You see, we raised Abby in a town called Sherrill. It's a town that has more cows than people, and it's where her mom and I continue to live today. While Abby was growing up, my wife worked in the public school system, and I was a union pipefitter-welder.

For decades, Washington has been structured to keep people like Abby and our family out of the rooms where decisions are made. **When Abby was elected, she actually became the first family member from my union to ever be elected to Congress.[If you want to send the daughter of a union pipefitter-welder to the U.S. Senate, defeat Republican Sen. Chuck Grassley and expand Democrats' majority, would you please make a donation of $5 or more now to help Abby win?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843410/343338623/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=)**
We aren't the typical, well-to-do family that a lot of members of Congress come from.Abby wasn't born with a trust fund; she didn't get to college without the help of loans; and she didn't make her way to Congress with family friends or deep-pocketed connections bankrolling her campaign. Instead, my wife and I gave her something far more important: her Iowa values.
**We taught Abby the importance of working hard, treating people with respect, staying humble and stepping up when there is work to be done or a problem to solve.**
Throughout Abby's entire time in elected office – from the Iowa House to Capitol Hill – she has never once forgotten those lessons. She's never once forgotten where she came from or whom she is fighting for. That's what public service is all about, and it's why I know she is going to be such an incredible advocate for Iowa in the Senate.
The problem is, those political elites with deep pockets are still doing everything they can to stop people like Abby and keep people like their buddy Chuck Grassley in power. **They're lining up to attack her campaign as you read this, and the GOP has $44 million in the bank to defeat candidates just like her.** Abby can win, but she needs you to stand with her. **[So please, if you believe that we need more people like Abby in the Senate, will you make a donation of $5 – or whatever you can spare tonight – to help elect Abby, defeat Sen. Grassley and win the leadership that Iowa deserves?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843411/343338624/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843412/343338625/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=)
---
Thanks for taking the time to read this email and for having Abby's back. It really means so much to our family.

Jerry (Abby's dad)
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843413/343338626/428800054?refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=&emci=eb1be239-41c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7c5cfefb-63ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334) This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843414/343338627/496662621?refcode=jtk760-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YzVjZmVmYi02M2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wLgnyhouIk-rJMw7TRlzOMq1cFEp704Xr7v6KQnLVR4=&emci=eb1be239-41c0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=7c5cfefb-63ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334#!).
To unsubscribe from this email list, please click [here](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/pk-e07AH4kCJxaMTlYxs8g2?unsubscribedata=1Yktx6P3UGQuWnB0c28zLr07BRezh5d7cbIJsOhbpPUtgQkMOr0e87x4mUDXVUVnpqWzg0ss%2B5GcLRg9jFMMHRp4sm4epevRn4hRcyzVC96kL3Hbjs4f3BHjUGqciR95YMTl925q9A6ihYSRBdj59N8yPv1GaOzbo189mYx3RNMxJulJaLrBrLzDsS2nVARoT%2FzjXlG0A5ho535IZNaD1PX00TGYkw3uQI%2BxeIJ6InA2lwh3%2FUqWnMNykzaOoA%2FSu99RxWoKW85oz46w0zcRQzZajH4WX%2FtWUcXOC%2BLFcBvOpcRF6p%2B8QziAlGU4%2BZpaIAzO4M4xIShZZc2TqJqR3tVgkadwIN9JRdrt3pe37H7fLq%2FWV9pEfnuZd8RUmU%2FHrmPaUxJaN9x9r4EpQVjOYF795dffhCErJRtJMXCPCB2Ys6AmmKYWp6pHi38Wg%2BxG). subject: We can’t afford to sit back and relax
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
November’s elections are right around the corner. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843504/343339032/823540626?refcode=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTE0NTg1OC02NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2hMJWwUiuMwl3YllUDrUlSrrbu8MSrO_zA7XMmfYNM=&emci=dd3a4b51-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=1049176)
Peter, I need to say thank you. As always, your support for our fundraising efforts made last month a success. We owe it to you that we’re going into May in a strong position to assist Democratic candidates after their primary elections. **As we head into the summer, November may still feel like it’s a long way away. But we’re running out of time to make the general elections successful for North Carolina Democrats — and the stakes are too high to sit back and relax.** Should Republicans gain a supermajority in the legislature, they will be able to enact a radical agenda that simply isn’t what most of us want for our state. They’re willing to go to any lengths — including passing anti-voter legislation designed to make it harder for some of us to cast a ballot — to hold onto their power. _Peter, in November, it’s up to us to defend our democracy._ We need your support right now, and all the way through November’s elections, to counter GOP gerrymandering and make this year a success for Democrats. **[Please, consider a monthly donation of $5, $10, or any amount that is right for you to power our work electing North Carolina Democrats up and down the ballot. We can't do this without your continued support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843505/343339033/435245919?recurring=true&refcode=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTE0NTg1OC02NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2hMJWwUiuMwl3YllUDrUlSrrbu8MSrO_zA7XMmfYNM=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843506/343339034/435245919?amount=5&express_lane=true&recurring=true&refcode=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.55145858-64ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NTE0NTg1OC02NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E2hMJWwUiuMwl3YllUDrUlSrrbu8MSrO_zA7XMmfYNM=)

# This Week's Events
May 02 - May 06
Early voting for the North Carolina 2022 primary will continue through this week. During the early voting period, voters may cast a ballot at any one-stop site in their county. Eligible individuals may register and vote at the same time. Find details about early voting at [Vote Early in Person.](https://courtneygeelsforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0ca724a68d4210b231de53e89&id=df2dbbaaf8&e=20ac8f046f)
---
|
---
| | | | If you are planning on early voting this week, come meet Courtney at one of the early voting locations below.

**Monday 5/2** Graham Recreation Center 11am - 4:30pm

**Tuesday 5/3** Oxford Public Works 8:30am - 4pm

**Wednesday 5/4** Kernodle Senior Center Burlington 8am - 2pm

**Thursday 5/5** Person County Board of Elections- 331 S. Morgan Street, Roxboro 8am - 4:30pm

**Friday 5/6** East Regional Library -211 Lick Creek Lane, Durham 10am - 4pm.
---
| |
---

name: Team Bass
subject: BREAKING: Los Angeles Times endorses Karen Bass!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Mayor 2022 (ID # 1441328)
body:
Another endorsement under Karen's belt.

Team —

The _Los Angeles Times_ has officially made their endorsement for L.A. mayor, and they're saying it loud and clear: "Karen Bass for Los Angeles mayor."

**"...voters are fortunate to have an extraordinarily qualified, battle-tested, mission-driven leader on the ballot. The _Times_ recommends Karen Bass for L.A.’s next mayor."**
The _Times_ endorsement is coming on the heels of big moments for Karen's historic campaign. Last week, Magic Johnson endorsed Karen for mayor. And yesterday, Karen went up against her billionaire opponent in the latest mayoral debate and won.

It's clear Karen is **THE** leader who will move L.A. forward and create a pathway to progress for every Angeleno. Peter,

The NRCC — the National Republican Campaign Committee — just released ANOTHER attack on our campaign.

They seem to be upset that I have student loans — but let me tell you, I’m not too happy about it either.

**I’m not a wealthy insider. I was raised right here in NE-02 by a single mom reliant on social programs, and even though I worked multiple jobs throughout college — including at the Kellogg Plant and as a rideshare driver — I still had to take out significant student loans to become the first of my siblings to graduate from college.**

With our primary election just days away, Republicans are trying everything to slow our movement’s momentum. clean_body: With our primary election just days away, Republicans are trying everything to slow our movement’s momentum. | = | | | NATIONAL REPUBLICANS ATTACKING ALISHA AHEAD OF CRUCIAL PRIMARY ELECTION | = Peter, The NRCC — the National Republican Campaign Committee — just released ANOTHER attack on our campaign. They seem to be upset that I have student loans — but let me tell you, I’m not too happy about it either. I’m not a wealthy insider. I was raised right here in NE-02 by a single mom reliant on social programs, and even though I worked multiple jobs throughout college — including at the Kellogg Plant and as a rideshare driver — I still had to take out significant student loans to become the first of my siblings to graduate from college. With our primary election just days away, Republicans are trying everything to slow our movement’s momentum. = | | | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thank you for having my back, Alisha * | | = PAID FOR BY SHELTON FOR CONGRESS Alisha Shelton for Congress PO Box 641026 Omaha, NE 68164 United States | | | ---|---|--- = = If you'd like to stop receiving these emails, please

Friend,
I want to thank you for the support you've shown to me and this incredible team we've built together. Because of your support, I’m grateful to share that we hit our fundraising target for the month of April.
In order to hold the House and compete against whatever the GOP throws at us this year, we’re going to have to continue to hit every fundraising goal we set. **Because while money is their weapon _, grassroots efforts are ours._**
Every contribution you’re able to pitch in truly does add up to fight back against the GOP’s special interest and lobbyist cash. And I have so much faith that our grassroots movement for working people is stronger than their desire for power.
I’m in this fight for you all the way.
Thank you for making this all possible,
Kirsten

name: Derek Schmidt
subject: Doing everything we can to fix the border crisis
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
A lot happened last week in terms of our efforts to mitigate the damage of President Biden’s border crisis and its effect on our Kansas communities. I Friend, A lot happened last week in terms of our efforts to mitigate the damage of President Biden’s border crisis and its effect on our Kansas communities. I wanted to send you a quick recap. **The biggest news is we secured a court order forcing the Biden administration to keep Title 42 public health restrictions in place at the southern border.** Title 42 is what has kept the Biden border fiasco limited to a crisis rather than a full-blown disaster. Biden’s own DHS admitted that lifting the restrictions at the border would lead to an estimated 12,000-18,000 new apprehensions per day. Keeping Title 42 in place is an essential public safety measure and I’m glad we were able to secure that victory in the courts, at least for now. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b7972dabfd2f4bfea3c17b7dcdecfe49&_e=eg_Hxxw3R0b30-04S-rM75ChCbBu6xOdq6DA05L6XhmTpN7WUUgexiRfkM75CprYEKsmeOC_HWrvA9HFU1yx1dlXR-Rmpq1A73ZslqAx2pusoCz1VriPPNfk0AZSL4cY4-qO5yzsZ04rUCNkqhT-WDzMsVswgeGAPMyM1DCA-ERLI1K_GBriUGGJwwTMq6Eb-ODz-_pXxMteIaPjSLt742Eeqm576krVHAPbJb8yMYwHlVEBGOngPRdPb1vcPWEliZZgqAOX_3ycyHcYk1oVscr4EhKkc2uV2tEtS8rfmMaPwFRDwBP2bJf2oexWss5wjklY1YXsnRbkW8TBIpv6fCEghoW-7ilvEiRxq5nkhuwxNrHfL42iAu_DXK6Jfp_vWmjWWetYMZ7lN955iyzCOHfZW4Acvz41HvsE2rDSm5_20_TOCZ3VkR-eQsGzOg4CF8tlJ2xQ8-rKvIeYE8RpWkIAMwXQqhKTyj13DzCmvycPOsxaC4NJ1Y6_5gxE4Eam) Also last week, the U.S. Supreme Court heard arguments about the Biden administration’s attempt to unilaterally reverse the Trump administration’s policy that requires asylum seekers from third-world countries to remain in Mexico pending formal asylum proceedings. Last year, we won a court order that made Biden keep the Trump-era policy in place, but they’ve appealed. We are confident the Supreme Court is going to side with us - and with the rule of law. These “Remain in Mexico” Migrant Protection Protocols, as they’re known, are extremely important in stemming the tide of illegal immigration at the border. And they’re common sense - if you are claiming asylum you should wait in Mexico while your case is pending, not be released into the United States to become undetectable and allowed to never show up when a hearing date arrives. I also sued President Biden last week over his administration’s plan to grant asylum without any immigration judge ever being involved. As you can see, there’s a LOT at play right now in the fight to restore our national security and end the disastrous situation at our southern border. [**JOIN TEAM SCHMIDT**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b7972dabfd2f4bfea3c17b7dcdecfe49&_e=eg_Hxxw3R0b30-04S-rM75ChCbBu6xOdq6DA05L6XhmTpN7WUUgexiRfkM75CprYEKsmeOC_HWrvA9HFU1yx1dlXR-Rmpq1A73ZslqAx2pusoCz1VriPPNfk0AZSL4cY4-qO5yzsZ04rUCNkqhT-WDzMsVswgeGAPMyM1DCA-ERLI1K_GBriUGGJwwTMq6Eb-ODz-_pXxMteIaPjSLt742Eeqm576krVHAPbJb8yMYwHlVEBGOngPRdPb1vcPWEliZZgqAOX_3ycyHcYk1oVscr4EhKkc2uV2tEtS8rfmMZ1oBpqhwYpqv8TE0ZTA1gyz6oKOVBkfnaLEugjKyY-twr7gtu8gLOL4RQXreNLj3KZosms5obJ-3PuyAf13LchxVFszPecQmUfxpulzi6GYu852AYrSPFt2V74JK8IzdaYLOo5q7NmsnIEWVcqc-Fl_lKXUHDudcAihCusAy6p6JCaV0K6_Hg2S3I5_wc9UePg5_UczQDaEOkpm80MMVFK) Finally, we challenged President Biden on his decision to rescind the so-called “public charge” rule in federal law that gives preference to prospective immigrants who will be self-sufficient and will not pose a burden to U.S. taxpayers. Again, it’s basic common sense. [**If you agree that we should stand strong for border security,****support our fight to hold President Biden accountable by joining Team Schmidt today.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b7972dabfd2f4bfea3c17b7dcdecfe49&_e=eg_Hxxw3R0b30-04S-rM75ChCbBu6xOdq6DA05L6XhmTpN7WUUgexiRfkM75CprYEKsmeOC_HWrvA9HFU1yx1dlXR-Rmpq1A73ZslqAx2pusoCz1VriPPNfk0AZSL4cY4-qO5yzsZ04rUCNkqhT-WDzMsVswgeGAPMyM1DCA-ERLI1K_GBriUGGJwwTMq6Eb-ODz-_pXxMteIaPjSLt742Eeqm576krVHAPbJb8yMYwHlVEBGOngPRdPb1vcPWEliZZgqAOX_3ycyHcYk1oVscr4EhKkc2uV2tEtS8rfmMZqLRAGE6UD_LCikLfQJ8LWCzTPfLkl14SBSVFtVHV3MWDcmt4eobE50GROMEpYMXp9Vw9_Groz1yETwjnNihofSBbRMkUVSVuxWzxgWmWm3fa88Qbg54oNk6EutDuUI6oEJnRLTQMM8k3L05TxpkA8lriJigHb2zRQQaA0_j0qt7J3Z13HjZh7flOLQlM26iTkgiyC7Z0cEDqtJZrU5iDN) These are all policies that most Kansans support and that we know help control the southern border. Trying to block, remove, or rescind them is a surefire way to exacerbate the current public safety crisis that is pouring over our border and into our communities in the form of violent crime and drug trafficking. But right now, I'm fighting these fights for Kansas alone - Governor Kelly is nowhere to be found. As your next governor, I promise to continue standing up to the Biden administration when it comes to public safety. **[Join Team Schmidt Today to Support Our Fight for Border Security →](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b7972dabfd2f4bfea3c17b7dcdecfe49&_e=eg_Hxxw3R0b30-04S-rM75ChCbBu6xOdq6DA05L6XhmTpN7WUUgexiRfkM75CprYEKsmeOC_HWrvA9HFU1yx1dlXR-Rmpq1A73ZslqAx2pusoCz1VriPPNfk0AZSL4cY4-qO5yzsZ04rUCNkqhT-WDzMsVswgeGAPMyM1DCA-ERLI1K_GBriUGGJwwTMq6Eb-ODz-_pXxMteIaPjSLt742Eeqm576krVHAPbJb8yMYwHlVEBGOngPRdPb1vcPWEliZZgqAOX_3ycyHcYk1oVscr4EhKkc2uV2tEtS8rfmMZhD1ZjWv6pzE4MSg4DfEvrqDs599_PfuTyyN03f5BWwMTqP2uOlaphVHe_sRrPTs7mHcOp8ZPJedjVJMI8Ipbx0U-xVTX2KnU-zdUwYjKUcpjR6PhK0iF38cUOQOzRQm3lGhHJ4CHf3Slay0pgr-dSu8qlFv-ZtyzhVANRwc9q3O7rucivg3GcayAx5cf4MHIsRySsirSV9xw0HGiVtxO9) ** I really appreciate your support for our efforts, friend. Thanks to our team, we’re leading the charge to address the crisis that President Biden’s failed policies have created and that Laura Kelly has done nothing to alleviate. It means a lot to have you with me in this fight to secure a safer future for Kansas and our entire country. Thanks, Derek Schmidt | |
---

KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

name: Wendy Nevarez for Congress
subject: Reminder: VOTE TODAY through May 14th (8am-7pm)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy for WNC the committee to elect Wendy Nevarez
body:
Reminder to Vote 4/29/2022
| | | |
---
# EARLY VOTING
# April 28th to May 14th
---
### Greetings!

Please make a plan and go vote! Your voice will be what determines our tomorrow.
Early voting has started and because it is a non-Presidental primary almost half of the votes are cast in comparison to Presidential primaries.
We cannot let less than 10% of the electorate decide whom we are represented by. Democracy is about citizens being engaged in the process.
"The ballot is stronger than the bullet." Abraham Lincoln, Former U.S. President
I humbly ask for your vote!
---
|
---

# (Surface Warfare/Aviation Warfare)

#

#

Madison Cawthorn has not represented you or Western North Carolina!

I will represent ALL of WNC regardless of party affiliation.

Unaffiliated voters can pull a Republican ballot during early voting and vote for me so that we make Madison Cawthorn a one-term congressman.

My experience started in the NAVY. I spent 11 Years in the service and traveled the world. We are blessed here at home with so many opportunities. I went on to get my Bachelor Degree in Political Science from UNCA and my Masters Degree in Public Affairs from WCU. I have worked in government and in private industry. I have four children and a loving husband. I love having a Girl Scout Troop of 37 girls, substitute teaching, and volunteering in my community.

I am invested in you and our community!

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Imagine Senator Cheri Beasley...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Imagine the perspective Senator Beasley will bring.
#

Take a moment and imagine U.S. Senator Cheri Beasley.
Imagine Cheri fighting for our families on the Senate floor — casting a deciding vote to finally pass legislation on voting rights, climate action, and lower health care costs and prescription drug prices.
Imagine the perspective Senator Beasley will bring as a public defender, judge and the first Black woman to serve as North Carolina’s Chief Justice. The impact she can have from years of experience acting independently to uphold the law and protect our rights.
Imagine her going toe-to-toe with Mitch McConnell, Ted Cruz and Josh Hawley. Think about how Cheri would fearlessly speak truth to power to these Republicans and their special interests allies.
That all sounds pretty great, right? What’s it worth to make that a reality?
[**If you’re ready for Senator Cheri Beasley, please make a contribution right now to help us flip North Carolina. Cheri will fight for all of us and secure the real change Washington has failed to deliver.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-may22?refcode=em220502-1-t1&refcode2=815.357359.ZHz4gi&t=1&akid=815%2E357359%2EZHz4gi)

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Reminder!! Come on out to Atlanta Motorsports Park for Mexican food and meet Jake Evans for Congress, this Thursday, May 5, 2022, at 6:00PM
body:
Come on out to the Track!
| | | |
---
| | | For immediate release May 2, 2022
Atlanta Motorsports Park's Jeremy Porter - Dawsonville, GA, welcome you to a Mexican Fiesta honoring Jake Evans for Congress this Thursday, May 5th, starting at 6:00pm at the Clubhouse (2nd Floor). Located at 20 Duck Thurmond Road.
Jake is our next generation of hardworking, bold and unafraid leaders that puts you and America First, and he wants [to](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aUPU2VEDOdx8ppURLt3AqmlucdkzUMNhi7bK_FNhSp-VQgN7sgHhyN2_S6ST0qglAcnu8bY3mEgzT16YdeJkdDYjVsGqrU6S0L5YRufrtiJdSgFNOknI2IJnS6-HbikWNy3-yuMaDjkb-94rzOz6WEDMUjWCyUi3sn3oJFhGw4EE2WDD84bxoHIg7VVdb76dq9bBKhsZW6A=&c=fS2_q5yQXjbSQ69oBXtRA8OQDgaXiNPvis8iU5M38Y_AQ6dGl0eSLw==&ch=0yl-qP4KBKlCJJnut8DvtqyJYfZEFpIwtF7sQVj5bVrvkmJgHbYBjg==) hear from you. Friend, Once again, this amazing team of grassroots supporters came through and helped us reach our fundraising goal before the month of April ended this weekend. I can’t thank you enough! Each and every one of those donations are making a difference in our race to replace far-right Republican Yvette Herrell and flip NM-02 — a “toss-up” seat and DCCC Red-to-Blue target. But first comes the primary election, _which is just over one month away._ **Over these next few weeks, we’re going to be pulling out all the stops to ensure that our campaign is victorious on June 7 and that we go head-to-head with Herrell in the general.** That means more events, more door-knocking, more volunteers, more yard signs — you get the idea. And all of it costs more money. **[I know we just closed out the month of April, but if you can, please consider signing up to make a recurring donation. Giving $5 or $10 each month will help us have the sustained resources to not only win the primary, but flip NM-02 in November too.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843786/343340290/-1530593628?refcode=fl_em_fr_20220502ty_gv_90da_xx_l1&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MTA1YWMxYS02N2NhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SNaf2y2-eAgFf7iqmLqr2pZDOKmjeK50T-KaNAMqIU4=)** Thank you again! — Gabe | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

name: Team Reeves
subject: Governor Bob McDonnell Endorses Bryce Reeves
disclaimer_text: Paid For by Reeves for Congress
body:
Governor Bob McDonnell Endorses Bryce Reeves
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/01000180860bcb51-1dbd4393-4f0e-47bf-a71e-78911b5c5fb6-000000/GpHNWzq0vouXNCtKYPuxFXazxEc=268)
---
|
---
| Governor Bob McDonnell Endorses Bryce Reeves
---
|
---
| Big news for our campaign this week! Governor Bob McDonnell is joining our team, and has endorsed our campaign for Congress in the 7th Congressional District! When I was first elected in 2011, winning in a Democrat district and flipping control of the Senate, Bob McDonnell was our Governor and it was a pleasure to work with him. One of my first major pieces of legislation, one that has never been more relevant than it is today, was signed into law by Governor McDonnell in 2013. This was SB908 which enshrined into law [“that parents have a fundamental right to direct the upbringing, education, and care of their children.”](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F131%2Bsum%2BSB908S/1/01000180860bcb51-1dbd4393-4f0e-47bf-a71e-78911b5c5fb6-000000/lJsORzwHDtK9pf-UzO6MYdKCtzc=268) This has provided the legal basis for so much of what the new administration in Richmond has been doing to fight for parent's rights.
---
| | |
---
| Governor McDonnell is joining our team because he knows that we can win elections in tough districts without compromising our principles. I'm ready to be a Day One leader in Congress. Our team is growing every day. [Can we count on you joining as well?](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.brycereeves.com%2Fvolunteer%2F/1/01000180860bcb51-1dbd4393-4f0e-47bf-a71e-78911b5c5fb6-000000/tec4b8aHorEOCnRDC0xhPTMbMu8=268) Sincerely,Bryce Reeves
---

name: Michelle Lujan Grisham
subject: re: My reporting deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by New Mexicans for Michelle, John Wertheim, Treasurer
body:
I'm still $14,328 short of my goal
| | | Peter,

I'm bumping my team's last message because there are just hours left before my next reporting deadline, and I'm still **$14,328** short of my goal.
---
When I reach my deadline at midnight, I'll be required to make my fundraising numbers public. That's why it's so important that I hit my goal and show the GOP that our movement is stronger than ever.
**I've worked tirelessly to protect our state from GOP extremism, but I can't do it alone. ****[Please, Peter, will you donate now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843886/343340796/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1247-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFhYjAyOS02OGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EPLTXc5kXA9X1VmnTdXlXRbXzg1csEOXE6TOgbybHg=)**
Thank you,

Michelle Lujan Grisham
\---- Forwarded message ----
From: **Team MLG**
Date: Mon, May 2, 2022
Subject: [Action requested] Show the GOP that NM is NOT up for grabs

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44843887/343340797/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1247-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NjFhYjAyOS02OGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4EPLTXc5kXA9X1VmnTdXlXRbXzg1csEOXE6TOgbybHg=)

body:
Don’t wait – VOTE NOW and urge your family and friends to vote too!
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/d1862dc958f91fc1/fcd51e8c72b53f24c3d6b838967d376c/37283)

Hey Friends,

I’ll keep this email brief. As one of my top supporters, you know what’s on the line.
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/48cc7c9e03161852041ad8cde91a9694/37283/d1862dc958f91fc1/d68e0c40d72b9089c3d6b838967d376c/37283)

---
I’m running to stop the Left’s policies, that have destroyed Portland, from becoming the “new normal” in our country – I'm running to defend our economic freedom, our liberty, and our way of life, support our police, secure our border, and protect our elections.
_Just like you, I am FED UP with these woke radicals and their insanity!_

The primary election is underway. We have less than 3 weeks to go from now until May 17th.

**If you haven’t done so already, please complete and mail back or drop off your ballot.**

And please take a minute or two now to urge your Republican family members and friends to do the same and vote for NATE SANDVIG for U.S. Representative.
I’m counting on your vote and your help to come out on top and move on to November.

Together, I know we can put this seat in the Republican column and lead the charge to **TAKE BACK THE HOUSE** and **STOP THE BIDEN-DEMOCRAT AGENDA!**

Thanks for the continued support,

\- Nate

body:
Thanks to your generous contributions, we have exceeded our April fundraising goal! I am humbled by the support of everyone who believes in our values of uplifting working families and delivering a true public servant to Congress.
| Thanks to your generous contributions, we have exceeded our April fundraising goal! I am humbled by the support of everyone who believes in our values of uplifting working families and delivering a true public servant to Congress.

As you may have heard, congressional maps are in the process of being redrawn. While this may change the layout of our district, it does not change our dedication and mission of defeating Elise Stefanik, which is why I am doubly grateful for your support.

We have a lot of work ahead of us in order to win in November but together, we can create positive change for our communities. name: Freedom First Project
subject: Explore the depths of his writings
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Dear Friend, Hillsdale has a new video we'd like to share with you today. It's the trailer for our newest free online course,**["C.S. Lewis on Christianity,"](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._nM1fi_ZXoD2kuu9ft6Q)** which we're releasing next month. I'd like you to be one of the first people to see this video preview. **You can watch your video and pre-register for the new course below:** ** _[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/cs-lewis-christianity-preregister/](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._q6RqPXzUvxWyg)_**
---
| | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith-making him perhaps the most important apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we are producing this new course, "C.S. Lewis on Christianity." The goal is to share his profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

But how do you explore the depths of Lewis's writings on these fundamental topics in a seven-lecture course? This is also why we're thrilled to have Dr. Michael Ward-one of the leading scholars of C.S. Lewis-as the instructor for the new course. Dr. Ward is a distinguished teaching fellow at Hillsdale College and a professor of theology at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis's_ The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! **After watching the trailer, I hope you'll want to join us and learn from C.S. Lewis by[pre-registering for this free online course](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-btLI2Xue6iDlqFkk3yg). You can easily do so on the same page as the video****.** This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of the Christian faith. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis-enjoy your sneak peek! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online LearningHillsdale College **P.S.** There's one more thing: Will you also consider giving a special tax-deductible gift to help promote "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" to millions of Americans nationwide? Your generous gift will help us reach our $500,000 funding goal by May 16 to promote this course and our other educational efforts, like _Imprimis_ and our classical K-12 education programs. As you may know, Hillsdale College refuses EVERY PENNY of government funding-even indirectly in the form __ of federal or state student loans and grants. That means that these courses, along with everything else we do here, are only possible because of friends like YOU.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMTIyLWZkZmZjNWI3MDQ5MDQ5NDg5Y2MzODYxY2ZhODY1YTNkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/T9wtYONyjJyKPIX3j7PE1Q) to unsubscribe.
---

Friend, did you hear?
**_We’re having a party to celebrate one year on the campaign trail, and you’re invited!_**
It's been one year since this team hit the ground running in our campaign to defeat Ron DeSantis and restore common sense leadership back to Florida.

We’ve come a long way, and I want to celebrate the past year with you! On Wednesday, May 4th at 6pm ET, I’m hosting a LIVE celebration with a few special guests. **[_Can I count on seeing you there?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44844588/343343283/-1785061281?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWNkZTRhYy02YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6w2OUlz6JsTt7EyVRFd5GuwBI_EZiTxGkG4C50qT0AQ=&emci=84fdcdbc-58ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b1cde4ac-6bca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)**

You won’t want to miss out on this opportunity to celebrate with the rest of Team Crist and all we’ve accomplished over the past 365 days — especially because from here on out, we’ll be firing on all cylinders until we WIN in November.

_**[Click here to RSVP for this celebration today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44844592/343343287/-1915907938?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWNkZTRhYy02YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6w2OUlz6JsTt7EyVRFd5GuwBI_EZiTxGkG4C50qT0AQ=&emci=84fdcdbc-58ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b1cde4ac-6bca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8807089)**_

Charlie

name: Maggie Toulouse Oliver
subject: All cards on the table
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Maggie_
body:
This is where we stand.

Hi,

If we’ve done our job right, you know that midnight is a major fundraising deadline for us. I promise we wouldn’t be bugging you about it if it weren’t so important. The fact is, once our numbers are out there, all our cards are on the table. Everyone will be able to see just how strong we are going into the primary election and beyond.

**This is our moment to show that New Mexico is still a bastion for voting rights even when Big Lie believers are attacking elections all over the country.**
[**_We are $2,333 away from hitting our $6,000 goal before midnight. If you, like hundreds of other donors over the past week, believe that our elections should stay transparent and accessible, become a Grassroots Donor for Democracy now.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mto-email _**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44844675/343343382/-532505380?refcode=EM_FR_220502LastChance_EOM_MTO_90DO180DD_4_NG_N_L1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNkZTRhYy02YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NT9_TcXhbvQbfHqJnRlZzkYGHnV90L3lVk3tvtZ159s=)
When I’m not working to keep our elections running smoothly, I’m out in the field with my team talking to voters. I see first-hand how much the people of this state value the sanctity of their vote. I am honored every day I get to spend maintaining the sanctity of those votes.
Thank you always,

Maggie Toulouse Oliver

_Maggie Toulouse Oliver serves the state of New Mexico as Secretary of State, where she is dedicated to fighting for clean and fair elections devoid of dark money and outside influence.

She's up for re-election in 2022, and we need to start building our grassroots movement to keep her seat safe. **Help Maggie protect our elections system and create a stronger democracy! Make a contribution today >>**_ _**______[DONATE $25 MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44844676/343343383/-532505380?refcode=220502LastChance_EOM_MTO_90DO180DD_4_NG_N_BIO&amount=25&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNWNkZTRhYy02YmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NT9_TcXhbvQbfHqJnRlZzkYGHnV90L3lVk3tvtZ159s=)**_

Make a contribution today >> _____= Friends of Maggie PO Box 473 Albuquerque, NM 87103 United States | Paid for by Friends of Maggie Contributions or gifts to Friends of Maggie are not tax deductible. _

name: Morganizing Team
subject: We’re turning out the vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
The primary on May 3rd is TOMORROW and the Morganizing team is working around the clock to get out the vote
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20220502-1030-footer-ak&t=2&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)
Hi,
With the primary TOMORROW the team is traveling across Ohio to get out the vote and make sure we #Morganize supporters. But recently many of us were together in one place, so we took a picture:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33059?t=3&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)
Rain or shine, day or night, we are fighting for new leadership for Ohio and for progressive change in the Senate. **We have come so far since the campaign launched — all because of the incredible amount of grassroots support that we have gotten. We need your help to keep up momentum.[ Can you chip in $25 or any amount to help expand our budget? ](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33059?t=4&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33065?refcode=em20220502-1030&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)**
Unfortunately, we currently have a fundraising gap between how much we have in the bank and the cost to do all of the organizing and boosting our digital ads that we want to do before the polls close on Tuesday. And while Morgan is traveling across the state to talk with voters and rally supporters, she can’t spend any time fundraising!
That’s why we are so lucky to have the support of an incredible grassroots movement to help us send Morgan Harper to the US Senate. **[If we can raise another $1,780 today, it will make a huge difference. We only need 100 people to donate $17.80 to get there, will you be one of them and donate now?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/33059?t=24&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)**
Thank you,
Morgan Harper HQ
**P.S. There is still time to volunteer too!** Our organizers and volunteers are working dawn to dusk to engage communities and get out the vote. If you live in Ohio, or even if you don’t, we would love your help! **[Click here to sign up to volunteer.](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/mh-website-volunteer/?t=25&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)**

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220502-1030-footer&t=26&refcode2=1030_90090_y0ykOI&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.morganharper.org/sign/personal_info/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.morganharper.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1030%2E90090%2Ey0ykOI)

Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio

You may contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year to House Majority PAC's Contribution Account. You may contribute an unlimited amount to House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. By donating through this email, you agree that the first $5,000 of your contribution will be deposited in House Majority PAC's Contribution Account and the remainder in House Majority PAC's Non-Contribution Account. | _**EARLY VOTING**_

Early voting has begun in Georgia! David and Bonnie cast their ballots this morning. Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=1734b16928&e=89fb4d5220) to find your early voting location.

Get out and vote for David Perdue for Governor of Georgia to eliminate the state income tax, secure our elections, crush crime, and stop the indoctrination of our kids.

---
| _**TONIGHT: PRESIDENT TRUMP'S TELE-RALLY**_ Join President Trump and David Perdue for a special Georgia tele-rally tonight, Monday, May 2. Simply dial 404-487-0954 at 6:30 PM to join the call.

_**CAMPAIGN STOPS**_

David will be making stops across Georgia this week to encourage folks to get out and vote. Click [HERE](https://davidperduega.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1eaf1761f5031bae92fd4e677&id=463d556d95&e=89fb4d5220) to find a full list of meet and greets.

name: General Mick McGuire
subject: From the cockpit to Washington
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MCGUIRE FOR ARIZONA
body:
We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. | [](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=31012b1681334e128dc76131e01b25a7&_e=U_HrfIPg6KQOTxNXa9I0N84qeVWvagSKt-gTO_-pmFyu4yU9jC_se2oVYYhyWyevPzQmpxbDCFJ4f-GeDecoXRNloU23qDCxSEQxaClxzZckx1UJQa_-bsXpy6xKgpR1uWf7DJn2KAaC3WrMYywgeHXTj-gpI7U3vAMyFD_kCRmTBbWgzFUweYYGyz0mOb2n8FuaDZCaQvIJqc_Nh7XFZuLjbsX1OqX8NFYUyyBjBB4eX8Fy213ZFgBzUiSA0q1HDA--r3hOg-Z9c0QgVCzHivoFKZ3zh-k3NUhCRXrRC7zUu1bLoQDlrhm2HdmHBIcB2TbOH3BOjutEQIytsOEa9XYQw08lCWnbGRV4S3PKIF4SXxqfhaX1aCp4DUwRzbv8dTqrL8JTiHaaoXPNPEEmIw%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Fellow Conservative, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

body:
Peter —

We have HUGE news.

Over the weekend, the Young Democrats of Florida held their straw poll for the 2022 Governor’s race.

And Nikki WON BY A LANDSLIDE!

Nikki was the overwhelming favorite, with 41% of the vote . Meanwhile, Charlie Crist only got 3%. Click here to stand with Young Democrats of Florida and make a contribution to our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=502strawpoll]

The Young Democrats of Florida represent the future of our state. And they know that we won’t get the future we want unless we run candidates who are ready to try something new.

Nikki has a real plan to move our state forward. She has the compassion, determination, and know-how to affect change after years of one-party-rule. And there’s a reason that her message is resonating across age, race, and party lines.

Floridians are ready for something new, and Nikki can make that happen. If you’re with her, click here to chip in $20 and support our campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-may-2022?refcode=502strawpoll]

name: Peter Welch
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
We had big goals in April, and I’m proud of everything this team accomplished.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=334%2E61531%2Er732jF)
Hello,
We had big goals in April, and thanks to the work of this team, we were able to meet them.
This is a big deal, and I want to tell you why. National Republicans like Mitch McConnell are planning a huge spending blitz (to the tune of $141 million) to try to buy the Senate. Hitting our goals ensures we have what it takes to keep this seat, and the Senate, in Democratic hands.
I got in this race to serve Vermonters the Vermont Way: by listening, rolling up my sleeves, and getting the work done. That’s what Vermonters deserve in their representatives, and it’s what I’ll do if elected to the Senate.
This race is one of the most consequential in the country, and it’s an honor to be in the fight alongside you.
Thanks again for being on this team.
Peter

---
