name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: [Sign on] Pass the PRO Act, Raise the Wage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Congress can’t wait another day. This should be front and center right now.
#
Peter,
Yesterday was May Day, and I have two big policies on my mind: The PRO Act and raising the minimum wage to at least $15.
Now is the time for Congress to pass legislation that empowers workers to form unions and guarantees that our minimum wage workers are getting a desperately needed raise. Are you with me? [**Add your name now to call on Congress to immediately vote on and pass the PRO Act and a minimum wage of at least $15.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pro-act-min-wage-2022/?source=em20220502-1230&t=1&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pro-act-min-wage-2022/?source=em20220502-1230&t=2&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)**
**As a longtime organizer for working people who helped make Seattle the first major city in America to pass a $15 minimum wage, I know that we can do more to stand with workers.**
I was proud to lead the House in passing the PRO (Protecting the Right to Organize) Act last year, which will undo decades of anti-worker policies, put power back into workers’ hands, and secure the right to organize for better wages, fair benefits, and a voice on the job.
At a time when workers are launching successful union drives at some of America’s biggest corporations — like Amazon and Starbucks — even though workers are up against a slew of union-busting tactics, we must stand with them. And as unionized workers — like teachers and auto workers — are fighting for fair pay and treatment, we must be there to bolster their fight. **The Senate must act and empower workers immediately.**
[**Can you add your name to urge Congress to send the PRO Act and raising the wage to at least $15 to President Biden?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pro-act-min-wage-2022/?source=em20220502-1230&t=3&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)
**Congress hasn’t raised the federal minimum wage in over a decade.** It has taken a tremendous amount of organizing to get to where we are today on raising the minimum wage — I will be the first one to tell you that.
_But victory is possible._ I’ve organized for years in the Fight for $15. In 2014, I was part of the movement that helped make Seattle the first major city in the country to pass a $15 minimum wage. Since then, cities and states across this country have followed our lead. Twenty states raised their minimum wage going into 2021. Voters in Florida successfully voted to raise the minimum wage in 2020, even as Donald Trump won the state. **Regular folks across the political spectrum want to give workers a raise.**
We have an opportunity to raise the minimum wage to at least $15 across America, which would increase pay for 32 million workers while lifting one million out of poverty. At a time when full-time, minimum-wage workers can no longer afford a two-bedroom rental anywhere in the entire country, _our action is necessary — and I’m dedicated to making it happen._
We have a lot of work to do, both in the House and the Senate, to send President Biden legislation that will empower workers and help folks pay the bills.
[**Can you add your name in support of our call to immediately pass the PRO Act and raise the minimum wage to at least $15? We can and must get this done together.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pro-act-min-wage-2022/?source=em20220502-1230&t=4&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)
**[Add your name](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/pro-act-min-wage-2022/?source=em20220502-1230&t=5&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)**
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20220502-1230-footer&t=6&refcode2=1230_420207_UIhAys&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=7&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=1230%2E420207%2EUIhAys)

name: Lindsey Scholten
subject: FWD: Add your name today - petition to hold politicians accountable
body:
Hey Peter,
Have you signed the petition to hold politicians accountable yet? The measure will ensure that any state legislator who has ten unexcused absences won’t be able to run for re-election.
There are just three easy steps to sign the petition:
1. Go to **https://www.holdpoliticiansaccountableor.org/sign-the-petition** and click ‘Download and Sign the Petition.’
2. Print out the form, fill it out, and sign it.
3. Mail the form to **Hold Politicians Accountable P.O. Box 8338 Portland, OR 97207**.

There are only a few days until the deadline on May 10th, so don't wait: send in your petition signature today, and let's hold lawmakers accountable for the doing the job we elected them to do.
Thank you,

Lindsey Scholten
Deputy Director, OLCV
**\---- FWD: Original Message ----** | | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44845488/343346368/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYWI0OWQ4LTZmY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KWuSu6ZQNRK5hexDX6Bn5g8AEJg4a2vwBddE9A5bJTo=&emci=dc9f9403-63ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1bab49d8-6fca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) |
---|---
| | Hi Peter, We all remember when Republican lawmakers walked out to kill climate action in Oregon–how frustrating it was to see politicians walking out on their jobs, even leaving the state, and not being held to the same standards as the rest of us. By refusing to show up for work, Republican lawmakers denied quorum and prevented groundbreaking climate legislation from passing–in 2019 and 2020. They brought the legislative session to a standstill, and refused to do the jobs they were elected to do, killing incredibly important bills like the Clean Energy Jobs bill, and bills to provide wildfire relief, prevent gun violence, fund public schools, and more. It’s time to make a change and hold our lawmakers accountable. It’s time to ensure our democracy is not held hostage every time Republican lawmakers don’t get their way. OLCV is supporting a petition that will help get this issue on the ballot this fall–[**will you sign it?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44845489/343346369/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYWI0OWQ4LTZmY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KWuSu6ZQNRK5hexDX6Bn5g8AEJg4a2vwBddE9A5bJTo=&emci=dc9f9403-63ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1bab49d8-6fca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) The measure will ensure that any politician who has ten unexcused absences from the job they were elected to do won’t be able to run for re-election. Ten strikes, and you’re out! There are just three easy steps to sign the **Hold Politicians Accountable** petition:
1. Go to **https://www.holdpoliticiansaccountableor.org/sign-the-petition** and click ‘Download and Sign the Petition.’
2. Print out the form, fill it out, and sign it.
3. Mail the form to **Hold Politicians Accountable P.O. Box 8338 Portland, OR 97207**.

Please [**sign the petition today**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/44845490/343346370/-725262505?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjFiYWI0OWQ4LTZmY2EtZWMxMS05OTdlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=KWuSu6ZQNRK5hexDX6Bn5g8AEJg4a2vwBddE9A5bJTo=&emci=dc9f9403-63ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1bab49d8-6fca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=2107230) so we can get this on the ballot this fall! It’s past time that we hold our lawmakers accountable for showing up to work. The deadline to send in your signature is May 10th, so please don’t wait too long. We can’t do this without you! Thank you,

Lindsey Scholten
Deputy Director, OLCV |

clean_body: Hey Peter, Have you signed the petition to hold politicians accountable yet? The measure will ensure that any state legislator who has ten unexcused absences won’t be able to run for re-election. There are just three easy steps to sign the petition: 1. Go to and click ‘Download and Sign the Petition.’ 2. Print out the form, fill it out, and sign it. 3. Mail the form to Hold Politicians Accountable P.O. Box 8338 Portland, OR 97207. There are only a few days until the deadline on May 10th, so don't wait: send in your petition signature today, and let's hold lawmakers accountable for the doing the job we elected them to do. Thank you, Lindsey Scholten Deputy Director, OLCV \---- FWD: Original Message ---- | | | | ---|--- | | Hi Peter, We all remember when Republican lawmakers walked out to kill climate action in Oregon–how frustrating it was to see politicians walking out on their jobs, even leaving the state, and not being held to the same standards as the rest of us. By refusing to show up for work, Republican lawmakers denied quorum and prevented groundbreaking climate legislation from passing–in 2019 and 2020. They brought the legislative session to a standstill, and refused to do the jobs they were elected to do, killing incredibly important bills like the Clean Energy Jobs bill, and bills to provide wildfire relief, prevent gun violence, fund public schools, and more. It’s time to make a change and hold our lawmakers accountable. It’s time to ensure our democracy is not held hostage every time Republican lawmakers don’t get their way. OLCV is supporting a petition that will help get this issue on the ballot this fall– The measure will ensure that any politician who has ten unexcused absences from the job they were elected to do won’t be able to run for re-election. Ten strikes, and you’re out! There are just three easy steps to sign the Hold Politicians Accountable petition: 1. Go to and click ‘Download and Sign the Petition.’ 2. Print out the form, fill it out, and sign it. 3. Mail the form to Hold Politicians Accountable P.O. Box 8338 Portland, OR 97207. Please so we can get this on the ballot this fall! It’s past time that we hold our lawmakers accountable for showing up to work. The deadline to send in your signature is May 10th, so please don’t wait too long. We can’t do this without you! Thank you, Lindsey Scholten Deputy Director, OLCV | ---|--- | | Connect With Us: | | Contact Info: Oregon League of Conservation Voters 321 SW 4th Ave Ste 600 Portland, OR 97204 United States | ---|--- | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. | ---|---

I’m reaching out because Democrats are ramping up their attacks on these four top-targeted Republican members of Congress, and I need your help to protect them and their seats.

We helped these Republicans flip their seats in 2020 after defeating Blue Wave Democrats. But now, Democrats have each of them in their sights and **they’re raising and spending millions of dollars against us.**

body:
Frankly, I’m embarrassed.

| **Text UNITE to 25002 to receive special text message updates from our campaign!**
Message & data rates may apply.
---
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845532/343346451/145944154?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTMvMS85MDUzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YTE3NDlkZS02ZmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HL5QijhAL8dmyTI5OBN3jYSHeF8qZN9DtA862tgdIBk=)

name: Abbey Bonin
subject: Brandon Michon Campaign volunteer opportunities
body:
Hi Peter,

My name is Abbey from the Brandon Michon campaign. We noticed that you had signed up on the website, so I was just reaching out to see if you are interested in volunteering with us.

If you are ever interested in volunteering, the opportunities are as follows:

-Helping out at events
-Door knocking
-Poll watching
-etc.

It can even be as simple as referring friends. It’s essentially based upon whatever you’re interested in and can do. If any of these suggestions interest you or you have an idea of how you would like to get involved with the campaign you can let me know anytime and I’d be happy to get you on board. Thank you for your support and have a great rest of your day!

Best,

Abbey Bonin
Head of Volunteer Recruitment
Brandon Michon Campaign
Mobile: 703-629-0815
Email:[boninabbey17@gmail.com](mailto:boninabbey17@gmail.com)

name: Jim Renacci for Governor
subject: This Primary is about the Future for our Children and Grandchildren
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
body:
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUEFugzAQfI25BZEFTDhwSJtElar00FN7sgxrgiPbEGNU8fsuKanUStbanlmPdwYrXpfII11BApDkCWzLtEx4nKksB7lL6jZXyJGzLLHxVVuvnGwaHTe9jbpKpUVaA8qy5RxUiYi7rSxyCdiWGc-2kam6EIaRpXsGJ1p_FRYsPU3BCqtQT5alB2WlNgz4Ao795BtFoGuMkHYwup1XqqGr1BdH5GPwTej0KAavrfSzoKOs-ymI0CnRTmHytPVekKRoOm2QxhDSobh4qg_kod67oFz4-XlzrtP25Qbt2wfRwhmNRPwDO41k8vBqb9P1-Bn5CocvbYweeUHJXRZT98hWFxUrnhjA_RXAPR3I5v35vcvnId-QzEY6e1w4eKYa5kH9Nq4a8RoVsOLwDQoUlCg)
---
Friend, Tomorrow, Ohioans get to make a choice. That choice will affect the direction of our state for the next decade. It is not about “us” anymore. It’s about what we leave to our children. 40 years ago, Ohio was a land of opportunity that people from Pennsylvania, West Virginia and Kentuncky came to, to live the American dream. Sadly, Ohio has lost its edge. Career politicians have run Ohio into the bottom ten or fifteen in every category from business climate to taxes to people leaving our state. The DeWine administration has compounded that by raising our taxes, infringing on our freedoms and spending like a liberal democrat. There is hope for Ohio - The Renacci-Knopp ticket will ensure that hope.
| [ LEARN MORE ABOUT OUR VISION FOR OHIO ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdUMFuhCAU_Bq8aVxU1IOHbXf30uxlL01PBAH1bQQsYhv79X27dZu0CXkPZmAeM6phba1YBA1NKU2LlO7qrE5Zkuu8oKJK267QiilG8tQkVzBeWyElJNKZaGho2-pKd7XIq6rNpap2pRZZke-6MlcyY9HYDCFMM8n2hJ5w_VVAYBK9nrGHQccfMIOzced87AZwJDstwXCjFSyGZAdtBIyEshs4u8VLjaCVIxdmGqFbN0riUUBvkXx4isMAM588GOFXjlvRuiVwnMm7JSwem_McJbkcYFT4Qy6s4r3H-kAe6s4GbcPP5Lg4fX1ezrWaX5HmdgSFxD9wAIX-Dy_mfbke3yLfqOkTxhFmVmKo_c3UPc3NRUPKJ0Lp_RWl9-Bovu7Pl6FYpyJGmVhYc7xx9BlrWCf9e3HTSLaoKCkP39gSnsE)
---
|
---
| We will: ● Overhaul our education system, removing CRT and Common core. We will give parents the CHOICE of who educates their kids and state funding will follow the child to the school of their choice ● Defund Sanctuary Cities in Ohio and cut off the mechanism that spreads drugs into our state. Any plane that Joe Biden sends here, will land, fuel up and take back off. ● Ensure Ohio’s election integrity with mandatory voter ID and forensic audits to make sure no election is ever stolen in Ohio ● Enact a plan to reduce our tax burden to citizens and businesses, eliminating most taxes and get Ohio to consumption tax and Seniors over 65 who own their primary residence will no longer pay property taxes to enjoy their golden years in Ohio. ● Protect the Freedoms of Ohioans. From our Second Amendment to Medical freedoms, Ohioans will not deal with a governor who wants to strip our rights. ● Ensure that Ohio is a safe haven for the unborn, where human life is prioritized and protected. ● Ohio is a state we can all call home—where the next generation believes they can live, work and raise a family with endless opportunities. We will have an Ohio that serves as a destination for family vacations and business travel and where Ohioans can truly enjoy our beautiful assets, attractions and state parks. ● Have an Ohio where anyone can achieve and live the American Dream
---
| | I ask you as you head to the polls - What type of Ohio do you want to leave to the next generation? We see what leadership from status quo politicians like DeWine nets us. Elect the team from the business world who has a plan and vision to Make Ohio Great and has the experience and expertise to see it through. Please vote Renacci-Knopp tomorrow for a better Ohio. Sincerely, Jim Renacci
---
| | Paid for by Renacci for Ohio
---

**TONIGHT** at midnight is the end of this campaign finance cycle - can you pitch in and help us finish strong?

Our campaign depends on people like YOU to keep the momentum going. This election is too important - the fate of our commonwealth depends on it in November. **We cannot afford to send a candidate that will lose against Josh Shapiro.

| | , We are proud to announce an exciting new endorsement — **Tejano Music Star Little Joe has endorsed Joe Jaworski for Texas Attorney General!** [](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=028c0eeddf&e=5d8d80652b)
_[**Watch Little Joe's endorsement video**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=ce9c11aa81&e=5d8d80652b)_[ _._](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=3c8d338d63&e=5d8d80652b) Texans all over are stepping up to say they are with Joe — because **Joe has the experience, compassion, and plan to be effective on day one.** [**Can you chip in $10 or more to join Team Joe and help us win this Primary Runoff on May 24?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8cfdfdf3f4&e=5d8d80652b)

This is such a meaningful endorsement from the Tejano music icon for so many reasons — perhaps most notably because of his legendary work with the **United Farm Workers Movement** with **Cesar Chavez**. Little Joe endorsed this campaign because he knows that as your next Texas Attorney General, Joe Jaworski will do what he's always done — stand up for those who need help and fight for what is right.

**The runoff election is less than one month away.** [**Contribute today and vote early May 16-20 and on Election Day May 24.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=6a4b58247c&e=5d8d80652b)

Onward!

Diana Arévalo
Campaign Manager, Jaworski for Texas

subject: Vote Jonah Schulz Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schulz for Ohio
body:
Get out to the polls! | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/schulzforohio/vote-jonah-schulz-tomorrow?e=cecfea7090)
---
| | |
---
| | |
# _Vote Jonah Schulz TOMORROW!_

Tomorrow is the day that We The People finally take a stand, reject the political ruling class and elect a true Constitutional-Conservative outsider. I launched this campaign 15 months ago for a single purpose - to restore and defend our God-given rights. Thanks to countless volunteers and a relentless effort, our America-First campaign has created a grassroots movement around Northeast Ohio.

As I have said from the beginning, this primary election will dictate the future of our nation. If we continue to elect squishy establishment RINOs, we will find ourselves in a country run by AOC and the socialist squad. It is time to go boldly into the future with working class patriots who will defend our Constitution at all costs. That is why I am running and that is why I humbly ask for your vote for Congress tomorrow, May 3rd.
---

name: Wade Herring HQ
subject: Wade's Whereabouts!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0502 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0502]
Peter –
Early voting in Georgia begins today and we are just three weeks away from the Primary Election! Before we share what Wade was up to last week – can you take a moment and pitch in to our campaign to expand our digital advertising and mail programs? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0502] Every dollar counts in these critical next few weeks.
Pitch in today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0502]
Last weekend, Wade attended the soft opening of the Culturalist Union, a coffeehouse and artisan marketplace centered around the artistic and social empowerment of Black creators in Savannah. Small businesses are the backbone of our economy, and you can count on Wade to advocate for them in Congress. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0502edit.jpg]
Wade also ventured out to the Savannah State/Parent University’s 5K Run, and he had a great time cheering for the athletes in the beautiful Georgia weather. Parent University empowers families by encouraging parent involvement and participation in the education of our community’s youth, and Wade was proud to support its mission and root for all the runners. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0502edit_3.jpg]
On Tuesday, Wade participated in the Democratic debate hosted by The Current and Savannah State University and he proved why he is the best candidate to take down Buddy Carter in November. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0502edit_1.jpg]
To follow up a busy and successful week, Wade stopped by SLAM – the Savannah Local Artist Market! Our campaign is proud to support the arts community and Wade pledges to work on increasing funding for our arts & community projects when in Congress. [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0502edit_4.jpg]
On Sunday, Wade attended St. James AME, visited a new local restaurant downtown called Java Burrito, and then phone banked at The Sentient Bean in preparation for early voting! [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP30/1/91050/images/0502edit_2.jpg]
We’re only 22 days away from the May 24th Primary Election! Our team is hard at work but we need help reaching more voters throughout the First District. If you’d like to volunteer for the campaign virtually or in-person, let us know via this quick form! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VGN6z1lOhkW2EkSFTGs0mw2]
Thanks for your support,
The Wade Brigade
Support Wade [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/herringtv?refcode=whem0502]
https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1 [https://www.facebook.com/wadeherringga1] https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1 [https://twitter.com/wadeherringga1] https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/wadeherringforcongress/]
www.WadeHerringForCongress.com [http://www.WadeHerringForCongress.com] | Info@WadeHerringForCongress.com
Emails are an important way for us to keep in touch with our supporters but if you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/djT_NiHeFEmCYg9ukZP3Bg2?unsubscribedata=BS7qOVY6i%2BJQUQZ0RM1wlLwDkTWQKcZwKdyQKnNl3qcT0wM4wlFjTTKICWiCuXdTlMFzIC3aKfkVtzFF3hC%2Bjp95GXl23FT67OQs%2FXIfkVOWSsvKzWfrjkdawbRoPq2DJ%2BUrBAc%2B1T%2BNoWYKOamXrzFyhOZBX5YYPfxiBNMTCHHahRN13xV%2BLzr1KlNK%2FgkU6amDsyI1ulbfbsljMJjUdJw4RBb17ku%2Bxos7S%2F08dvynlk8p8v3vxpYV7uW7cUbzn0zHykDJeiKpWRRVwnXgAqBZB%2B84v40ndLQqnBDfJEQ7WZfWnfjNKyXcM36iUENfo17K%2BGT8IOG1Nm%2BP%2FMJyEuDqpYYAeONTHT%2BRiAj%2F2V0kwQr26Xw7ZhhAQufJgdzV9RwtNp4XQ9U%2BLhZPXRjEeJ2QlAfnN9rPiC5ayn%2B9JbyVVx%2Bmx0is2mKerMqSCWE5 .

name: Patriot Values Defense
subject: Learn from Victor Davis Hanson
body:
| | | [](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyNUMtuwyAQ_Br7hoU3fsQHHyKluVSucmqPFoElRrIBAY5_v-s07bkSWomZ2dnRqP4GXXUrb7npgQPwmkPZ1WV1KJq6qlB3jQQugOsyq7iYMaTCixSMSw8xrxgVarQRC-mWfOo7reuuJLtWHJuuwvLYHrHRStTQatHK_GsYB2FmY-8fYsHeP9QY4mjFOJl5ZttmDAuoA8ZprBkwgBHyuZ9S8jE7nDK40Iso14Cq2FeiokwFqpXwv_-uWb13IbE0ISO9s4ptLsw0RSCny5qWMbo1SMwOZx9c9CgTpcqg2akFlVkXonChtC9QisULc7cE_1g-HZ-GL4GzCW0i_npi188z-22U-CgJHt4b4G9DmYde-Y3imti01Ot9v_KsMP2rkm8225Kd)
---|---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyNUMtuwyAQ_Br7hoU3fsQHHyKluVSucmqPFoElRrIBAY5_v-s07bkSWomZ2dnRqP4GXXUrb7npgQPwmkPZ1WV1KJq6qlB3jQQugOsyq7iYMaTCixSMSw8xrxgVarQRC-mWfOo7reuuJLtWHJuuwvLYHrHRStTQatHK_GsYB2FmY-8fYsHeP9QY4mjFOJl5ZttmDAuoA8ZprBkwgBHyuZ9S8jE7nDK40Iso14Cq2FeiokwFqpXwv_-uWb13IbE0ISO9s4ptLsw0RSCny5qWMbo1SMwOZx9c9CgTpcqg2akFlVkXonChtC9QisULc7cE_1g-HZ-GL4GzCW0i_npi188z-22U-CgJHt4b4G9DmYde-Y3imti01Ot9v_KsMP2rkm8225Kd)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyNUMtuwyAQ_Br7hoU3fsQHHyKluVSucmqPFoElRrIBAY5_v-s07bkSWomZ2dnRqP4GXXUrb7npgQPwmkPZ1WV1KJq6qlB3jQQugOsyq7iYMaTCixSMSw8xrxgVarQRC-mWfOo7reuuJLtWHJuuwvLYHrHRStTQatHK_GsYB2FmY-8fYsHeP9QY4mjFOJl5ZttmDAuoA8ZprBkwgBHyuZ9S8jE7nDK40Iso14Cq2FeiokwFqpXwv_-uWb13IbE0ISO9s4ptLsw0RSCny5qWMbo1SMwOZx9c9CgTpcqg2akFlVkXonChtC9QisULc7cE_1g-HZ-GL4GzCW0i_npi188z-22U-CgJHt4b4G9DmYde-Y3imti01Ot9v_KsMP2rkm8225Kd) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyNUMtuwyAQ_Br7hoU3fsQHHyKluVSucmqPFoElRrIBAY5_v-s07bkSWomZ2dnRqP4GXXUrb7npgQPwmkPZ1WV1KJq6qlB3jQQugOsyq7iYMaTCixSMSw8xrxgVarQRC-mWfOo7reuuJLtWHJuuwvLYHrHRStTQatHK_GsYB2FmY-8fYsHeP9QY4mjFOJl5ZttmDAuoA8ZprBkwgBHyuZ9S8jE7nDK40Iso14Cq2FeiokwFqpXwv_-uWb13IbE0ISO9s4ptLsw0RSCny5qWMbo1SMwOZx9c9CgTpcqg2akFlVkXonChtC9QisULc7cE_1g-HZ-GL4GzCW0i_npi188z-22U-CgJHt4b4G9DmYde-Y3imti01Ot9v_KsMP2rkm8225Kd)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://email.alert.patriotvaluesdefense.com/c/eJyNUMtuwyAQ_Br7hoU3fsQHHyKluVSucmqPFoElRrIBAY5_v-s07bkSWomZ2dnRqP4GXXUrb7npgQPwmkPZ1WV1KJq6qlB3jQQugOsyq7iYMaTCixSMSw8xrxgVarQRC-mWfOo7reuuJLtWHJuuwvLYHrHRStTQatHK_GsYB2FmY-8fYsHeP9QY4mjFOJl5ZttmDAuoA8ZprBkwgBHyuZ9S8jE7nDK40Iso14Cq2FeiokwFqpXwv_-uWb13IbE0ISO9s4ptLsw0RSCny5qWMbo1SMwOZx9c9CgTpcqg2akFlVkXonChtC9QisULc7cE_1g-HZ-GL4GzCW0i_npi188z-22U-CgJHt4b4G9DmYde-Y3imti01Ot9v_KsMP2rkm8225Kd)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

clean_body: | | | ---|--- | | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war. | | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian Victor Davis Hanson of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. | | | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of “The Second World Wars” on DVD today: Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College This message was originally sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com Sent to Patriot Values Defense subscribers. PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Canceling student debt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
This would have been the week when tens of millions of Americans had to start making student loan payments again, for the first time since the federal pause began at the start of the pandemic. | | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845711/343347452/-1964596891?ms=em-header&refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)
---
Sometimes, it’s good to notice when something bad doesn’t happen. **This would have been the week when tens of millions of Americans had to start making student loan payments again, for the first time since the federal pause began at the start of the pandemic.** But President Biden extended the pause another time, from May 1 through August 31. And last week, he confirmed that he’s considering an even bigger step — a step we’ve been supporting for years: canceling student debt. [_**It’s time for everyone to raise their voices to make this happen**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845712/343347453/693822900?refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&ms=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)[ _****_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845713/343347454/693822900?refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&ms=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)[_**. Add your name if you agree: Now is the moment for President Biden to use his executive authority to cancel $50,000 of student debt for tens of millions of Americans.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845715/343347456/693822900?refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&ms=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) This is a concrete way President Biden can deliver on a major campaign promise, without needing Congress to act — and he can show the American people what it looks like to have a government on their side. Right now, millions of Americans are wondering how they’re going to handle student loan payments starting up again later this year. Many families just flat out won’t be able to make ends meet. And for a long time now, student debt has been growing and growing — and it’s held our country back like an anchor. Holding people back from buying their first homes. From buying cars. From launching new businesses. From starting families. Student debt is an issue of economic justice, and it’s also about racial justice. After generations of systemic discrimination and a widening racial wealth gap, Black and Brown students have to borrow more money to go to school, and they have a harder time paying off their loans after they graduate. Twenty years out of school, the typical white borrower still owes about 5 percent. The typical Black borrower? _About 95 percent._ **Canceling $50,000 of student debt is the single most effective step President Biden could take to start closing the racial wealth gap among borrowers.** And it’s a broadly popular policy. Democrats support it. Independents support it. Younger Americans support it. Older Americans support it. People with student debt support it. People who’ve already paid off their loans — or never took out any — support it. A survey even found that more swing-state voters would cast ballots for Democrats this November if student debt had been canceled. Not to mention, it’s just the right thing to do. As a country, we tell people that they’ll need some education after high school to get a ticket to the middle class. I was only able to become a public school teacher because I got a second chance at college for $50 a semester. But after decades of disinvestment and hollowing out higher education, we’ve now got a system that buries people in debt — unless they come from a family that can write a big check. **We need to put technical schools, community colleges, and public universities within reach for everyone. We need to hold for-profit institutions accountable for ripping off students. And we need to start righting a generational wrong by canceling debt — debt that students never should have been forced to take out in the first place.** [_**President Biden has already used this power before, and it’s time for him to use it again. Add your name if you agree: The president must cancel student debt for tens of millions of Americans.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845716/343347457/693822900?refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&ms=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | **[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44845717/343347458/693822900?refcode=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&ms=EMZ4V_STU_E_20220502_V1S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDgvMS84NzkzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTg3YjNjNy03MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-1hPg8viA6a6a2gCuL7wgxxmfyZwgSILocYXuKXfBzA=&emci=d3b8b1c1-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=6a87b3c7-72ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9027908)**

clean_body: This would have been the week when tens of millions of Americans had to start making student loan payments again, for the first time since the federal pause began at the start of the pandemic. | | | Sometimes, it’s good to notice when something bad doesn’t happen. This would have been the week when tens of millions of Americans had to start making student loan payments again, for the first time since the federal pause began at the start of the pandemic. But President Biden extended the pause another time, from May 1 through August 31. And last week, he confirmed that he’s considering an even bigger step — a step we’ve been supporting for years: canceling student debt. This is a concrete way President Biden can deliver on a major campaign promise, without needing Congress to act — and he can show the American people what it looks like to have a government on their side. Right now, millions of Americans are wondering how they’re going to handle student loan payments starting up again later this year. Many families just flat out won’t be able to make ends meet. And for a long time now, student debt has been growing and growing — and it’s held our country back like an anchor. Holding people back from buying their first homes. From buying cars. From launching new businesses. From starting families. Student debt is an issue of economic justice, and it’s also about racial justice. After generations of systemic discrimination and a widening racial wealth gap, Black and Brown students have to borrow more money to go to school, and they have a harder time paying off their loans after they graduate. Twenty years out of school, the typical white borrower still owes about 5 percent. The typical Black borrower? About 95 percent. Canceling $50,000 of student debt is the single most effective step President Biden could take to start closing the racial wealth gap among borrowers. And it’s a broadly popular policy. Democrats support it. Independents support it. Younger Americans support it. Older Americans support it. People with student debt support it. People who’ve already paid off their loans — or never took out any — support it. A survey even found that more swing-state voters would cast ballots for Democrats this November if student debt had been canceled. Not to mention, it’s just the right thing to do. As a country, we tell people that they’ll need some education after high school to get a ticket to the middle class. I was only able to become a public school teacher because I got a second chance at college for $50 a semester. But after decades of disinvestment and hollowing out higher education, we’ve now got a system that buries people in debt — unless they come from a family that can write a big check. We need to put technical schools, community colleges, and public universities within reach for everyone. We need to hold for-profit institutions accountable for ripping off students. And we need to start righting a generational wrong by canceling debt — debt that students never should have been forced to take out in the first place. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren Democrats All content © 2022 Warren Democrats, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

body:
I’m ready to take on that task. The false attacks against me are picking up. That’s what political elites do when they’re losing and fear that real change is coming. The most recent attack ad against me by Rebecca Dow is downright laughable. As you remember, I ran on the 2020 Republican ticket with President Trump. The Democrats filled the TV airwaves with ads attacking me for supporting President Trump. **And I never backed down. ** Now, Rebecca Dow comes along and tries to take a joke out of context while I was working at KRQE to question my conservative credentials. Well, my daughters helped me set the record straight in our new TV ad: [](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f86cb9aa89d6434d93bff922c6ecf7c9&_e=QfML8ac7vsAsES-rENUGZTiJuor4QsYMnyh1jdx8d320b8TUytVIZPrOP4OLSk-dpdj1J_qy_-s2OaI-2E9RMriXutVl-26q8c8NNZAEza0Wm9J3mPSxM5Yu4Y-bU4vUfN1CIzOA1tIonG64yffDh-bjYJEy1FskuP4w7t6YX94YJP7lorMSm_DMTyIJq_8enLGSTQXJBKGn5nusOTBNYCWDjRNzLYYZjEYWXbt6p3Rh0XuQipsxKm7RJxaZabkBZ236brYsfc215ajEokwQJK1rKzI6O22vm5_QeXW0M1OIKiNwfydzWQLI9dYOTuYYBIelvSZJRGRiOuecFmeU2fZvtpQNd4loSzt3S25TeGCU83jZajaYBylrYv02Y0EOw3mVO5Yj7_0wzqHiWSRHD4O_DrddqswWvSQKdEvOaW0-X35UQm1WjDkOqYocqBT_QJVqc1lk83Q2jnkvN6UqMWD6QCZF7RSmS0FyEI9tGpIdlwkl6rgrFaN7U8nJKutGqhv61CD6NwGXz1DLB44jkw%3D%3D) The political elites will never stop attacking with lies and distortions. That’s ok. I know New Mexicans are too smart to be fooled by cheap attacks. **And I won’t let them distract us from building the movement we need to defeat MLG and take back our state. ** I will continue to champion our conservative message:
* Secure our border and put an end to fentanyl and human trafficking

* Make our state safe again by ending catch and release, backing the blue, and appointing conservative, tough on crime judges

* Empower our oil and gas industry to increase production to help combat inflation

In New Mexico, we don’t need more career politicians with resumes full of government experience, wagging their fingers in our faces, and telling all of us how smart they are. **That’s the Joe Biden and MLG elitist approach**. We need the opposite - **_we need strong conservative leadership with integrity and character that will take on the elites and fight for everyday New Mexicans._ ** I’m running to be your next governor because I know I can offer the kind of leadership that New Mexico needs. **[But, it won’t be easy. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in whatever amount you can right now to help me share my conservative vision for the state.](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f86cb9aa89d6434d93bff922c6ecf7c9&_e=QfML8ac7vsAsES-rENUGZTiJuor4QsYMnyh1jdx8d320b8TUytVIZPrOP4OLSk-dpdj1J_qy_-s2OaI-2E9RMriXutVl-26q8c8NNZAEza0Wm9J3mPSxM5Yu4Y-bU4vUfN1CIzOA1tIonG64yffDh-bjYJEy1FskuP4w7t6YX94YJP7lorMSm_DMTyIJq_8enLGSTQXJBKGn5nusOTBNYCWDjRNzLYYZjEYWXbt6p3Rh0XuQipsxKm7RJxaZabkBZ236brYsfc215ajEokwQJK1rKzI6O22vm5_QeXW0M1OIKiNwfydzWQLI9dYOTuYY3uUfBYCZz0eSenfLw1jgh1135LDCQ9bUWlJb5F6i6LpV5DUvl_ZFa0f6IPtt4t8w05pUGj05HzB41gEIyYMgtYjXjd5cqM88BRe-PEI8mFWX59iUmxU0mcLmgHvRRM95jErFgFBI8e6scIM7faO2nedaQngpWCjkKxzcobDQjW-kh8ZjXsLIIqZ-nh2idW_pxUwsD1sjoST3dpwoloG43Q%3D%3D) ** **For my family, your family, and all of New Mexico, I will never back down!** **[This is a fight for all of us. I need your help and hope you will consider contributing to our efforts today.](http://links.markronchetti.com/u/click?_t=b07bd752cdb64edc94e23391776d0f53&_m=f86cb9aa89d6434d93bff922c6ecf7c9&_e=QfML8ac7vsAsES-rENUGZTiJuor4QsYMnyh1jdx8d320b8TUytVIZPrOP4OLSk-dpdj1J_qy_-s2OaI-2E9RMriXutVl-26q8c8NNZAEza0Wm9J3mPSxM5Yu4Y-bU4vUfN1CIzOA1tIonG64yffDh-bjYJEy1FskuP4w7t6YX94YJP7lorMSm_DMTyIJq_8enLGSTQXJBKGn5nusOTBNYCWDjRNzLYYZjEYWXbt6p3Rh0XuQipsxKm7RJxaZabkBZ236brYsfc215ajEokwQJK1rKzI6O22vm5_QeXW0M1OIKiNwfydzWQLI9dYOTuYYWv7PFtdSRDiv6Up76dv_6gyAaAwQ5Gapi1c5lQBtpuHhIWZllG3-T1N6b-oesNr_eujQqHBGocbsmUoXUFPGaEaCLhEt6jeGyE5o0FWysXmzONA_5TxdsevLKhlDPcwRZwXjP3sOs0bmIqDHlI5W47o9xTkkS9aepea45YSUN2MVabUaFw0YziyIypgP4-OQ8Mswxeweeney1znPPFqbVQ%3D%3D)** With sincerity, Mark Ronchetti PS: I know many of you continue to give what you can in this fight. clean_body: I’m ready to take on that task. The false attacks against me are picking up. That’s what political elites do when they’re losing and fear that real change is coming. The most recent attack ad against me by Rebecca Dow is downright laughable. As you remember, I ran on the 2020 Republican ticket with President Trump. The Democrats filled the TV airwaves with ads attacking me for supporting President Trump. And I never backed down. Now, Rebecca Dow comes along and tries to take a joke out of context while I was working at KRQE to question my conservative credentials. Well, my daughters helped me set the record straight in our new TV ad: The political elites will never stop attacking with lies and distortions. That’s ok. I know New Mexicans are too smart to be fooled by cheap attacks. And I won’t let them distract us from building the movement we need to defeat MLG and take back our state. I will continue to champion our conservative message: Secure our border and put an end to fentanyl and human trafficking Make our state safe again by ending catch and release, backing the blue, and appointing conservative, tough on crime judges Empower our oil and gas industry to increase production to help combat inflation In New Mexico, we don’t need more career politicians with resumes full of government experience, wagging their fingers in our faces, and telling all of us how smart they are. That’s the Joe Biden and MLG elitist approach. We need the opposite - we need strong conservative leadership with integrity and character that will take on the elites and fight for everyday New Mexicans. I’m running to be your next governor because I know I can offer the kind of leadership that New Mexico needs. For my family, your family, and all of New Mexico, I will never back down! With sincerity, Mark Ronchetti PS: I know many of you continue to give what you can in this fight. We’d also love to have your help in other ways. Check out the many opportunities to volunteer on this historic campaign by ** Paid for and authorized by Mark Ronchetti for Governor, Anne Perez Treasurer. Please send checks to Mark Ronchetti for Governor. 8100 Wyoming Blvd. NE Ste - M4, Box 225 Albuquerque, NM 87113 Click to unsubscribe.

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Extremely unlikely
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

2 months to pass a bill to fight catastrophic climate change with
Democrats in the majority...but it’s looking extremely unlikely.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105585?refcode=em20220502-23147&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]Tweet from Washington Post reporter Jeff Stein reads: Hello, it’s May
2. Many lawmakers believe Dems have an approximately 2 month period -
until the July 4 recess - in which they have a shot at passing a bill to
fight catastrophic climate change. As of today, at least, it looks
extremely unlikely

As long as the Democratic Party accepts massive donations from the fossil
fuel lobby and Wall Street firms that profit from oil and gas, we’re not
going to see the big changes we need to address the climate crisis.

If we stop settling for just any corporate Democrat and start electing
more Justice Democrats, we can pass anything from Biden’s climate agenda
to a full Green New Deal.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105585?refcode=em20220502-23147&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]Peter, the
only way we can transform the Democratic Party and elect more members of
the Squad is with your support. Can you chip in $3 right
now to fuel our work to elect bold progressive fighters like Summer Lee on
May 17 and Jessica Cisneros on May 24?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105585?refcode=em20220502-23147&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]Contribute $3

The choice is clear when you look at our primary races.

Summer Lee has organized to protect the environment and battle polluters
in western Pennsylvania. Her opponent made money at a financial firm
getting rich by steering investments to oil and gas companies. Now, Big
Oil is funding her opponent’s campaign.

Jessica Cisneros is an outspoken supporter of a Green New Deal, while her
opponent, Henry Cuellar, rakes in huge donations from the fossil fuel
industry and consistently opposes climate change legislation.

If we elect our full slate of candidates, including Summer and Jessica, we
will continue to change the political terrain in Congress, just like it
changed when we elected AOC in 2018 and the Squad started getting to work
on Capitol Hill.

We rely exclusively on grassroots donations to elect Justice Democrats and
fight for real steps to avert climate catastrophe. So, we need your help
today to ensure we have a Democratic Party responsive to the people, not
their corporate donors.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/105585?refcode=em20220502-23147&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]Contribute $3 today to fuel our work to push for bold
climate change legislation and send more lawmakers to Congress who will
fight unabashedly for the people and the planet.

Thank you for being in this fight with us.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20220502-23147-footer&t=1026&refcode2=23147_1203867_vx_NYw&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=23147%2E1203867%2Evx_NYw

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Did you vote for Republicans in 2020? We DESPERATELY need your help

body:
I wanted to write to encourage you to support Congressman Steve Chabot this November. It has never been more critical that we take back our Republican [_**2022 MAJORITY PLEDGE**_](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=a1a312a6d85b4dbfbdd7db5143844a79&_e=i2UqOThmnSlW68taGGNXJW0gFprYu7eOmwHTEYjt7qDStRwjwNZlCjsI3GBBERK0VIKq-qMA09ukzEEt98LYAz8GIM6YYOPfdDy3GQfTtgqujLms_oUa3KXk9LyMrc_6oAJbA36aSbK_z0o3OOMmjuqu9Lkc2jB1lXHTcP2Y6FbU29zkzatL193pFPDfRcJZOYIXgD0BHCrDWpR4IC6Dt7J8z7YxOFfCTw1qSFpFgqA_YkCB3EyoMadwpMqRV1D0K61AhFGbgxxvcc5rho-2SSsC2zJATx_LK4DX2wIiIzSp89Tbu7zok2WFaanU7Bs5d84UY-AWZGLkibLUteHY467WK9xLtY4y3qlndDlvH214n5lX17fW-jFYyHlUWVMpAiq3HPvFax95cJqTXrGQQZThoBTCOatmYGydf7_SOaHKdRpaWMqnNSj7c5myi6Fv7-2fFQrzULzrqttuf0qPTDCmhXSH_sQn_szw4OwuRoAuB4H2L5qlE8xR8AGI9x360BhS5qOMRFbXa1c4fyJCBg%3D%3D) [_**JOIN TEAM CHABOT**_](http://links.stevechabot.com/u/click?_t=8ab30ce69995407e81866ad352e10bc1&_m=a1a312a6d85b4dbfbdd7db5143844a79&_e=i2UqOThmnSlW68taGGNXJW0gFprYu7eOmwHTEYjt7qDStRwjwNZlCjsI3GBBERK0VIKq-qMA09ukzEEt98LYAz8GIM6YYOPfdDy3GQfTtgqujLms_oUa3KXk9LyMrc_6oAJbA36aSbK_z0o3OOMmjuqu9Lkc2jB1lXHTcP2Y6FbU29zkzatL193pFPDfRcJZOYIXgD0BHCrDWpR4IC6Dt7J8z7YxOFfCTw1qSFpFgqA_YkCB3EyoMadwpMqRV1D0K61AhFGbgxxvcc5rho-2SSsC2zJATx_LK4DX2wIiIzSp89Tbu7zok2WFaanU7Bs54PON3UtVTn2YM72r8rc2QDFW03LNzgWg08Aac5Gks9_MYxdsPecgomzQgc6AaXFgbAucWHKua3GizOGF7IDKHuyvxuZuNFt5NNFkOQH4Agl6LiwEEFgdsNAGhnXmwnXo3Y7Q3_zlLRJCjKw3_yc9vWoBzb9fkCat02ybuKpw2q7tCZeshuWLAZyqWUgb-BwlqmhyFiwoDkev8PVA3rLjBA%3D%3D) Friend, I wanted to write to encourage you to support Congressman Steve Chabot this November. It has never been more critical that we take back our Republican majority in the House. The destruction and chaos unleashed by Nancy Pelosi and the Biden Administration have torn our country apart, and we must do everything to WIN this November. I won't lie to you. This will not be an easy task. Democrats have their target set on Ohio’s first district, but Steve is working hard to defeat Pelosi’s hand-picked candidate and fight for common sense conservative results. With dedicated American patriots like you standing with our party, I KNOW we will win in Ohio’s first district and restore a GOP majority to save our country. It’s important we have YOUR support. Friends,
Alexandria just endorsed Nina Turner in the race for Ohio’s 11th district. Can you make a donation to Nina’s campaign to help her get out the vote before her election tomorrow?
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846004/343352474/-1302338115?refcode2=1275f750-75ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220502-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc1Zjc1MC03NWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RN5OxxCQLAWoFywwT_mWj4dPaTRR6rTScgeNRwrFzRU=)**
Nina is _exactly_ the kind of progressive leader we need more of in Congress. She has spent her entire career advocating for working people — on the Cleveland City Council, in the Ohio State Senate, and on Senator Bernie Sanders’ 2016 and 2020 presidential campaigns, serving as National Co-Chair in 2020.
She will be a powerful voice for policies that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of working people across this country — like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and a Green New Deal. We need her alongside Alexandria in Congress in the fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice.
Like us, Nina’s campaign is powered by the people. But she’s up against millions of dollars in Super PAC spending. And that means the only way Nina Turner is going to win is if we get involved.
**[Our movement needs to show up for Nina today. Will you make a contribution to Nina Turner for Congress? 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign so her team can Get Out the Vote for tomorrow’s election.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846005/343352508/-1302338115?refcode2=1275f750-75ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&refcode=em220502-2-t1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjc1Zjc1MC03NWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RN5OxxCQLAWoFywwT_mWj4dPaTRR6rTScgeNRwrFzRU=)**
Your contribution will help Nina’s campaign get out the vote, and strengthen our fight for systemic change in our country.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC

body:
Read what's new with Tanya's campaign. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ae6e87a03b00/team-tanya-alert-former-senator-jon-kyl-endorses-tanya-wheeless-7112817?e=bd2b55b0e3)
---
| | |
---
| | | **Tanya For Arizona Campaign Round-Up**
This week Team Tanya joined the Arizona YRs at the Young Republican National Federation Conference, caught up with Anna Paulina Luna from bilingual news outlet El American and attended the Tempe Republican Women meeting.

On the campaign trail, Tanya continues to focus on the kitchen table issues she hears about from East Valley residents: inflation, spending, and border security.

If you want Team Tanya to stop by your group next time or you are interested in volunteering, email us at info@tanyaforarizona.com

**Check out Tanya's new op-ed!**

>From Tanya's kitchen table to your inbox, [check out Tanya's latest op-ed](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=9945002a6a&e=bd2b55b0e3) in the Daily Independent where she talks about why she is running for U.S. Congress and her fight to protect the American Dream.

**What people are saying...**
"Wheeless stands out in the field, having secured the endorsements of top House GOP leaders like Elise Stefanik and the backing of the Congressional Leadership Fund, House Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy's super PAC, to help her compete." - [NPR](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=ec67ac696e&e=bd2b55b0e3), 4/25/22
"Tanya Contreras knows that things are changing in Arizona and that the state is returning back to the GOP. For this reason, her challenge is to become a congresswoman to bring proposals that change the reality of citizens and facing the problems that are affecting them, including as border security." - [El American](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=522ed9daf3&e=bd2b55b0e3), 4/28/22 "Our guest for this episode is Tanya Contreras Wheeless, a wife, mother, small business owner, and Republican running to represent the East Valley in Congressional District 4. Listen to Tanya”s story and what inspired her to run for office!" - [Western Tribune](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=d1167f0058&e=bd2b55b0e3), 4/27/22
---
| **Don't Forget!**
* Follow the campaign trail on [Instagram](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=26fa425dea&e=bd2b55b0e3).
* Get news and updates on [Twitter](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=a53597489c&e=bd2b55b0e3) and [Facebook](https://tanyaforarizona.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e27b684e0e86fe5dbc580daeb&id=470f0e0ea5&e=bd2b55b0e3).

Peter, Due to the unfortunate passing of Congressman Jim Hagedorn, a Special Primary Election will be held to fill his seat on Tuesday, May 24. Early voting at your [county elections official](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VV_D404PsV2FW8cbkvl5cV36pW8BHpjy4JCdBlMSn_mL5nKv5V3Zsc37CgPx6W1ZZqLZ24RQMwW2xndKk67WTF5W5ZKsV063JwB5W6pd_nq1p9kfYW2YJHcN5_0t8vW9dQ9q6993_XJW8JwjP94CV00BW53xhnd2W0C6lW83t7Xr6dBcC6W19nqTf6XHc2yW10rS9d3jXd-mW4DQYQN3jDlptW7BTZ-w6y2mT4W14k-4x4Vtpk6W2Pckdv7XfNjpW7wkTSq3BKGKHW6Sn-y73713SHW4Jy3rh2c3KlzW2qvr3C4C2-2lW8WdFMZ2dwSCWW3tG3Rb7HPzKLW1xfrmL5V4xQ_W1hNtdn5M80MKW6yq2ms1Bvw0GW4hgLcm34f8WrW5ZwqfN88Bd_7W1X8wtl79QDtQVN4kdK1LRD03W6B7xxl71ppP5W3MXVyt6pF6T1W1-6S_k1yhxlGW6W5Mr43y61mM2KX1) is open right now. **For 25 years, I have been working hard as an Agricultural Law Attorney to represent southern Minnesota families, farmers, and businesses. I am now ready to translate those skills into fighting for our rural way of life in Washington D.C.** As the outsider candidate in this race, I am proud to have the support of so many common-sense voters who believe in our campaign’s authentic message. Several of my Republican competitors will receive endorsements from powerful special interest groups and lobbyists with no tie to southern Minnesota or the people who live here. In contrast, our campaign will continue to be homegrown and hardworking.I will continue to take my campaign directly to you and look forward to hearing from you on your ideas to put our Country on a course correction. I would be honored to earn your vote in the Special Primary Election on May 24th. [**Vote Benda!**](https://d2p4X504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/OR+113/d2p4X504/VV_D404PsV2FW8cbkvl5cV36pW8BHpjy4JCdBlMSn_pc3q90pV1-WJV7CgX5mVVS1kS6y1x2YV70KXh5-XPqfW5grzpB2GcZq6N1qQnfs74x1BW2249Yc8wywn0W7MmdXr5pKHSyW1jMS7D5K7QKtW2lWz4F7Hf70rW7MSB7_3VyF5rW6yLvpf4q1Vx2W3kPF_h75Vr70W9b15f91dDMm7W1YxL8C2z2SkHW3GftFS28vkz4W6RXMS-2w1LnwW4RRT5q6b-cr5W76ckNK6t2jkXVr_6gv92cKpGW1bK0rB4rcy3fVMsmJk2bjzj5VF4Hs67Ty8QtW1bKHpH8lnvLvW7PrlBc106jH9N5V1554V4S8-W2F-pcL8-PsNdW7tjXzg5_RQtQ3fcs1) Sincerely,
---
---
Matt Benda

Strong fundraising numbers, big endorsements, and more momentum! Read below to get a recap of the week! _**NEW ENDORSEMENT: Missouri Corn Growers Association**_ Vicky scored another key endorsement, this time from the Missouri Corn Growers Association. This endorsement, along with with her endorsements from the Missouri Cattleman's Association, demonstrates why Vicky is the best advocate for Missouri's agricultural community. _**1st Quarter Fundraising Numbers**_ Vicky reported a total cash on hand of $1.5 Million in the most recent fundraising period, ending March 31st, raising over $497,000 in the first three months of 2022, providing her an advantage of $200,000 over her nearest opponent, and leading cash-on-hand of the three serious candidates for U.S. Senate. Meanwhile, Eric Schmitt has spent nearly $1,623,000 on his campaign, more than any other Republican candidate. | |
---
_**NEW RANKING: Most Conservative in Missouri**_
American Conservative Union published rankings naming Vicky Hartzler the most conservative in Missouri of Missouri's Congressional delegation and bestowing the “Award for Conservative Achievement.”

In response to the top ranking, Vicky issued the following statement:
**“Being a conservative champion for our state means more than just talk. Throughout my tenure in Congress, I have fought for Republican principles in Washington and worked alongside President Trump to advance his America First agenda. ****I am honored to receive this award from the American Conservative Union as my campaign to be Missouri’s next Senator continues to build unprecedented momentum.”**
|
---
_**Statement on Coach Joe Kennedy**_
In response to the firing of Coach Joe Kennedy, Vicky issued the following statement:

**"Coach Kennedy is standing up for millions of Americans who want our religious freedoms upheld. Our God-given rights are under attack every day by the Biden Administration, and their efforts to impose woke ideology need to be stopped.**

**We need strong leaders who will put an end to these disastrous policies. That’s why I led an amicus brief filed with the Supreme Court in support of Coach Kennedy.**

**I thank Coach Kennedy for standing up so that we all may be allowed to kneel in prayer."**
|
---
_**HEARTLAND TOUR UPDATE**_
Vicky's Heartland Tour continued this week as Vicky met with Missourians all across the state! Check out some of the best social media posts from the week!

name: Arizona Democrats
subject: Celebrating AAPI Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | Here are the stories of two trailblazers | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDOBJ90b4vBzApGBvwzGa5nBGiavVwQ9HiGvIgANjpK_CRTq6t7ELrRdLQzeTYaJlKOA8BSqJ6cKqnHyO-Aq_HWLI_SgYJhN9gO3uW_aBhdF1vbfISZWnThXUx9cWNV2LVvB7Cx1X9nyvx4ZLuZHI8oO_4C6UmdgUwtTfNgcCjEIWwQxxReFgrsPzmKaINsC8UJPzq9EqUTqMfSHSrIAYLSYyC9K0sRO6lkXhJcODVGL5lN2mSllDPkvo9l1D9QTNEKqpR5pnplK4SHhqthfyCkg4wjm_bAGh18QEUsX8OOBU3VsxytaKG4XqppRLYjRZ05FCtL_UH1PBXejBXjuRTGd0Ce38auRSGx9DuNrbFYS4/3lp/4QR2nzjOSJGPX2RXCvKW2Q/h0/qIIFY7YEnXtECF0ZvyoanG3teKjQqfCPYiMZqW2Ujfo)
---
| Team, May is Asian American and Pacific Islander Heritage Month!

This month, we’re dedicating our time here at the Arizona Democratic Party to learn about, honor, and celebrate the voices, lives, and heritage of Asian Americans and Pacific Islanders. We want to start things off by honoring a couple of the many remarkable AAPI leaders who’ve made history in our beloved state of Arizona.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh_OzWuyr9Xf7I__8G3STU5YbnAlTQ11gO98yYlSU4jwaK18SzYyVJtFkFlpdo658b7vpB8Ib_1NVI6aPPWu3HOL2Uite4TTVh9G_PujSP-XxQaly5H0YZ3ikX2W0BCtGkwdBS2A-1L837SYOvOb-_gdH9HR_T8AHrbXMBnlQmPFjB5vnAehelnG59QGmouIQLx_I52O8sR09dfWbYUHOXUGmT_g5WnkkevWo83Sho86yg/3lp/4QR2nzjOSJGPX2RXCvKW2Q/h1/_00HK3MBvVFX1ua-3gV208IXfiGbiS-hLv95ukAF-PY) [](?link_id=2&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-thank-you-for-your-incredible-support-2&email_referrer=email_1527476&email_subject=celebrating-aapi-heritage-month)
**Thomas Tang** was a United States Circuit Judge of the United States Court of Appeals for the Ninth Circuit and the first American of Chinese descent appointed to the federal judiciary.

Born and raised in Phoenix, Tang always excelled in whatever field he pursued. After serving as a First Lieutenant in the military for 10 years and graduating from law school, Tang served as deputy county attorney of Maricopa County until 1957, when he was promoted to assistant Attorney General of Arizona. In 1960, he was elected to the Phoenix City Council, and in 1963, he was elected as a Judge of the Superior Court of Arizona. Tang was then sworn in to a seat on the United States Court of Appeals for the 9th Circuit in 1977 after a personal nomination from President Jimmy Carter. This would mark the first time ever that an American of Chinese descent was appointed to the federal judiciary. Judge Tang’s decisions during his more than 18 years on the Ninth Circuit reflected his strong commitment to civil rights for all people.

| [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXYE2ISxcYJGTSbjhaSGBTh9icxzB_PEaIldLrpJWa1h-PnMcynnz4UhXSSnu5nLfKyuQXiHPlvYcfDBbj5mQITJ9BgHWJOIrHW6NjIEXIctJykGtIA9JIo_ifrYtpNu6iIcwPaoELEZst40HUAnOa7qLjAOCy_b2V9eGLEqcOc3EsMzobn3x6yhbbclCUAFVh3A7YrCZW3Zb0VckgcEONNPnscMy8vHH5tVPDBVQZqmiyeld66dKWi4ktPKz2yn2_g/3lp/4QR2nzjOSJGPX2RXCvKW2Q/h2/D5jwzI5QBYSC9keesAYcJrVJcI_2GBGC6dB50cADMaw) [](?link_id=4&can_id=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-thank-you-for-your-incredible-support-2&email_referrer=email_1527476&email_subject=celebrating-aapi-heritage-month)
**Wing F. Ong** was the first Chinese-American not born in the United States to be elected to a state House of Representatives and the first Chinese-American to enter the State Legislature.

Upon immigrating to the United States in 1919, Ong worked for his family’s business as a teenager. But, his dream was to become a lawyer. After opening his own business, where he worked and lived with his wife, Ong pursued his dream and enrolled in the University of Arizona in Tucson, studying law. In 1943, after graduating top of his class, he became an immigration attorney where he helped other Chinese immigrants who faced the same difficulties and discrimination that he also had. In 1946, Ong was elected to the State House of Representatives as a Democrat. He was the first Chinese-American in the United States to be elected to a state legislative body. He served two terms from 1946 to 1950, and as state representative, he backed welfare, education and job-security measures. In 1966, Ong ran for the State Senate of Arizona and was elected, becoming the first Chinese-American who entered the State Legislature.

We’re beyond inspired by the work and legacy of these fantastic leaders and proud that our state’s history is full of such diversity and trailblazing.

Sincerely,

Arizona Democrats

---

On top of that, more than _500 new anti-abortion bills_ are in motion across the country. **Democrats cannot stay silent as reproductive rights are hanging by a thread.**

State of the Race Memo
RE: The NE Governors Race - 1 Week Out FROM: Tori Mahoney (Campaign Manager) TO: Campaign Supporters
With just over 1 week to go in this nomination process we have all of the momentum. Brett continues to meet with voters all around Nebraska and do the work of winning every vote.
Just this weekend Brett had dozens of voters tell them they were undecided until this week and are now solidly on Team Lindstrom.
Several polls have come out in the last few weeks and we know we are [_**THE TEAM TO BEAT.**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsBTM4DsVO5dYxx4wQHjUHXH9JmySPBcu9TB68NBIH9PjbU2qIxRSAKqBPvbpAb-2FvaDa5FgKaFj0iPaDwRKJjdZE-3DL5Hv_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6QMVZXHzFXysBhQdOAPMkPOI1zonuBpevBf2AA-2Bxx5kEleUXh5UYFkznurqXOh9pUyHUAEnh125RCH9-2FWm-2FEVmY62Xx4XQDjO1ooXPk9vrxjjgxmvz8-2F3bUkeJA7UFmatpb7OvNFGzfopc8-2FXgbK1RKNHa2T8FntRBfRfSh-2Br21nqitUSydAILM7br6K5Ovrp4DzZzYqbKunwjcnPbBem2OQGQmlw9GTEJ4Aw4cF4iPDfH4flrlgXeLPn-2Bb9xvzvPWnf-2F-2Bw2sy-2Fp2e19u-2FP7ZbeBL-2FQYOh1tlnhypcZDeLTtNpJlcWCA8n-2FZWLYDUU-2BxyGenP9JRg6WZD-2BQ3-2BxypGKCJKlT4VidEgh3Yec8vE-2Fr-2BCRE5i549oneIk-2F-2F5dX79yluVLEGSfLW84HkFYF-2FHH9D3DoxyT0VndmTMiauQWzNSHgGMWIE-2FTkhQS7ClyswFEEg-2BcLjUmeWHKDVmRJCSW65xs16E5TgtUu9TcxT6GS02v5ymM2610rGSa4LQpI2xSReRByfm1eikphlkipKfBetYvp3x7hrSQ73CmjXRcy3CxD5cPOL2ePOQP-2B0e141fCEr8HExOpM5Ex8wAB7iri9eg6eWmsKSbjkyD0LPb1wZPZ6uVYZME-2FCb-2F9ARz5EuMWzpsQAGLAfZX1S-2BudSZCBSQD0TvgARauDuwhEBVEbEaZFGTKZwJZg8ewjLtRcoQku249u1c24zP2krP6DfADjcwpIJW3YrDL7W69SpM5mpkP8XZ1NVH50xvTsfjnWbh8SNfryf4-2FYBeMeFk-2BsviV3MoFz1c-2F2yPiLiZlFXaiTzMawDTy3SiibNnULAaJWQmtYP5oUlRhXYjXrmnszvx36zQ-3D-3D)
Brett has the right message, right momentum, right trajectory, and right supporters to put us over the top. We just need to close strong over the next week to WIN on Election Day!
We are firing on all cylinders and [_**SURGING**_](http://url5297.votelindstrom.com/ls/click?upn=HTMZIboFmIG-2BMNluIWzOsBTM4DsVO5dYxx4wQHjUHXH9JmySPBcu9TB68NBIH9PjbU2qIxRSAKqBPvbpAb-2FvaDa5FgKaFj0iPaDwRKJjdZE-3DG40s_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6QMVZXHzFXysBhQdOAPMkPOI1zonuBpevBf2AA-2Bxx5kEleUXh5UYFkznurqXOh9pUyHUAEnh125RCH9-2FWm-2FEVmY62Xx4XQDjO1ooXPk9vrxjjgxmvz8-2F3bUkeJA7UFmatpb7OvNFGzfopc8-2FXgbK1RKNHa2T8FntRBfRfSh-2Br21nqitUSydAILM7br6K5Ovrp4DzZzYqbKunwjcnPbBem2OQGQmlw9GTEJ4Aw4cF4iPDfH4flrlgXeLPn-2Bb9xvzvPWnf-2F-2Bw2sy-2Fp2e19u-2FP7ZbeBL-2FQYOh1tlnhypcZDeLTtNpJlcWCA8n-2FZWLYDUU-2BxyGenP9JRg6WZD-2BQ3-2BxypGKCJKlT4VidEgh3Yec8vE-2Fr-2BCRE5i549oneIk-2F-2F5dX79yluVLEGSfLW84HkFYF-2FHH9D3DoxyT0VndmTMiauQWzNSHgGMWIE-2FTkhQS7ClyswFEEg-2BcLjUmeWHKDVmRJCSW65xs16E5TgtUu9TcxT6GS02v5ymM2610rGSa4LQpI2xSReRByfm1eikphlkipKfBetYvp3x7hrSQ73CmjXRcy3CxD5cPOL2ePOQP-2B0e141fCEr8HExOpM5Ex8wAB7iri9eg6eWmsKSbjkyD0LPb1wZPZ6uVYZME-2FCb-2F9ARz5EuMWzpsQAGLAfZX1S-2BudSZCBSQD0TvgARauDuwhEBVEbEaZFGTKZwJZg8ewjLtRcoQkuS-2FQZvXvMRMqyfTBKu9HlPGldzerZ9GE0dyIwIotZGl7J5E5GKXDOH8MLGimjBWnew44bqm2IuslPMSNrkyPKfYAIvHRNDsvUS5g-2Bh3Y46varFltX92sTb4GCiQIxbIJAGLFTKpZJXx34Q3wHFtoDkA-3D-3D).

That's where you come in.
We need your help to finish this race strong. We need the resources to turn out our Team Lindstrom supporters and persuade the remaining undecided voters that Brett Lindstrom is the right candidate to bring a New Generation of Leadership to Nebraska.

clean_body: | | | | www.votelindstrom.com State of the Race Memo RE: The NE Governors Race - 1 Week Out FROM: Tori Mahoney (Campaign Manager) TO: Campaign Supporters With just over 1 week to go in this nomination process we have all of the momentum. Brett continues to meet with voters all around Nebraska and do the work of winning every vote. Just this weekend Brett had dozens of voters tell them they were undecided until this week and are now solidly on Team Lindstrom. Several polls have come out in the last few weeks and we know we are Brett has the right message, right momentum, right trajectory, and right supporters to put us over the top. We just need to close strong over the next week to WIN on Election Day! We are firing on all cylinders and . Brett Lindstrom has increased his support in every poll in this race and continues to pick up significantly more undecideds everyday. As undecideds break towards Team Lindstrom in this very close race we will WIN on Election Day! That's where you come in. We need your help to finish this race strong. We need the resources to turn out our Team Lindstrom supporters and persuade the remaining undecided voters that Brett Lindstrom is the right candidate to bring a New Generation of Leadership to Nebraska. Frankly, we are so close and victory is in our sights. YOU can determine who leads Nebraska moving forward. This race is going to come down to who can generate resources to finish the last week of this race. We have done everything needed up to this point. We just need to put the final piece of the puzzle in place. In our campaign's last poll and in all other polls in this race, Brett's favorability was the highest in the race. Brett is in the best position to WIN! Even with over 4 weeks of attack ads against our campaign, Brett has all of the momentum in this race. The feeling at all of our events is electric. We have a BIG WIN in our sights, but we can't do this without you. We are counting on YOU! With adequate resources, Brett wins on May 10th. Tori Mahoney Campaign Manager Lindstrom for Governor | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- Paid for by Friends of Lindstrom Campaign - 2437 S. 130th Cir, Omaha, NE 68144

subject: Why I'm in this fight with Val

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846143/343360396/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjFiYmQxMi03OWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wFE1wQXBixpDRJVXEl7S14oMM_7dEmrUNNc20u5DCU=&emci=eecbe246-6eca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=e61bbd12-79ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=9636579)

| | Peter, as Val's campaign manager I want to take a minute to introduce myself and tell you why I'm so passionate about electing Val to Congress. I've known Val for over a decade. I worked as a legislative aide for a state representative during the years that she served as the House Majority Leader, so I've seen Val deliver for Oregonians on progressive priorities - time and again. I've seen her tenacity, her work ethic, and her values up close. **I've been around a lot of candidates and elected officials during my 15 years working in Oregon politics, and Val is in a class of her own.** A lot of Congressional campaign staff move around the country, jumping from race to race like adrenaline junkies. That's not me. I'm a born and bred Oregonian and I've never been interested in going to DC. I care about this state and who represents us in Congress because I live here and I have no plans on leaving. That's why I'm working on Val's campaign. It's why I uprooted my life on short notice to join Val in this fight. And it's why I'm asking for your support today. **[Chip in now to join me and Val as we take on Alek Skarlatos and his friends on the far right.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846144/343360397/-1599294071?refcode=2022-05-02-logan&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e61bbd12-79ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjFiYmQxMi03OWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wFE1wQXBixpDRJVXEl7S14oMM_7dEmrUNNc20u5DCU=)** Val is the only candidate in this race _in either party_ with legislative and governing experience – who's been in the thick of the fight and knows how to get things done. So, when I say that I know Val will stand up to special interests to deliver for Oregon families, it's because _she already has._ I've seen her do it. **I watched Val help the Democrats retake the majority in the Oregon legislature and then lead that majority to pass major progressive priorities.** Paid sick days for all workers. The largest education budgets in state history. Automatic voter registration. Universal background checks for gun sales. Raising our state's minimum wage. Establishing our Clean Fuels Program. I could go on. I've spent a lot of time around Val (too much time, she might say) and there's no one I would rather be in the trenches with in the battle to hold this seat. And make no mistake - it is a battle. Alek Skarlatos has already raised nearly $2 million this year and he doesn't have a primary. The Republicans at the national level are loaded for bear and they'd like nothing more than to take this seat from us. **[So please, donate $19 now and get on board with the campaign to kick Alek Skarlatos and special interests out of Oregon.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846145/343360398/-1599294071?refcode=2022-05-02-logan&recurring=0&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e61bbd12-79ca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjFiYmQxMi03OWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4wFE1wQXBixpDRJVXEl7S14oMM_7dEmrUNNc20u5DCU=)** _Logan Gilles_
Campaign Manager,

clean_body: | | | Peter, as Val's campaign manager I want to take a minute to introduce myself and tell you why I'm so passionate about electing Val to Congress. I've known Val for over a decade. I worked as a legislative aide for a state representative during the years that she served as the House Majority Leader, so I've seen Val deliver for Oregonians on progressive priorities - time and again. I've seen her tenacity, her work ethic, and her values up close. I've been around a lot of candidates and elected officials during my 15 years working in Oregon politics, and Val is in a class of her own. A lot of Congressional campaign staff move around the country, jumping from race to race like adrenaline junkies. That's not me. I'm a born and bred Oregonian and I've never been interested in going to DC. I care about this state and who represents us in Congress because I live here and I have no plans on leaving. That's why I'm working on Val's campaign. It's why I uprooted my life on short notice to join Val in this fight. And it's why I'm asking for your support today. = Val is the only candidate in this race in either party with legislative and governing experience – who's been in the thick of the fight and knows how to get things done. So, when I say that I know Val will stand up to special interests to deliver for Oregon families, it's because she already has. I've seen her do it. I watched Val help the Democrats retake the majority in the Oregon legislature and then lead that majority to pass major progressive priorities. Paid sick days for all workers. The largest education budgets in state history. Automatic voter registration. Universal background checks for gun sales. Raising our state's minimum wage. Establishing our Clean Fuels Program. I could go on. I've spent a lot of time around Val (too much time, she might say) and there's no one I would rather be in the trenches with in the battle to hold this seat. And make no mistake - it is a battle. Alek Skarlatos has already raised nearly $2 million this year and he doesn't have a primary. The Republicans at the national level are loaded for bear and they'd like nothing more than to take this seat from us. = Logan Gilles Campaign Manager, Val Hoyle for Congress Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress. ---|--- | This email was sent by Val Hoyle for Congress PO Box 657 Springfield, OR 97477 United States Email is an important way for Val Hoyle to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Too much email? . Click here to If you no longer want to hear from Val Hoyle, . Questions or concerns? . |
