Friends,
Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” The team is gearing up for a big weekend at the 2022 Wyoming Republican Convention in Sheridan. If you are attending be sure to stop by our hospitality suite and grab some campaign materials from our booth.
The summer will be busier than ever—with more town halls, rodeos, parades, and festivals in communities across the State. If you would like to volunteer to represent the campaign at a local event in your area, please reach out and we will send handouts for the event! For Wyoming,
Team Hageman
---
**Around Wyoming! **
Harriet attended the Central Wyoming Boys and Girls Club Breakfast in Riverton. It was a hugely successful event with an outpouring of support from the community to provide these wonderful services and opportunities for children and families.
---
---
---
Harriet spoke at the Big Horn County Lincoln Dinner in Greybull. It was a packed house full of Republicans ready to vote for Harriet on August 16th! Harriet enjoyed listening to all of the candidates explain why they are running for office, and to learn from the audience as to what issues are important to them. Accountability and accessibility are key.
---
---
**Views From the Road**
We are thankful for clearer roads in the last week. Spring is close and the Wyoming landscape is greening up beautifully. We could still use more moisture though!
---
---
Interstate 25 South of Buffalo

Buffalo Bill Reservoir

clean_body: | | | | Friends, Welcome back to the “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” The team is gearing up for a big weekend at the 2022 Wyoming Republican Convention in Sheridan. If you are attending be sure to stop by our hospitality suite and grab some campaign materials from our booth. The summer will be busier than ever—with more town halls, rodeos, parades, and festivals in communities across the State. If you would like to volunteer to represent the campaign at a local event in your area, please reach out and we will send handouts for the event! For Wyoming, Team Hageman Around Wyoming! Harriet attended the Central Wyoming Boys and Girls Club Breakfast in Riverton. It was a hugely successful event with an outpouring of support from the community to provide these wonderful services and opportunities for children and families. Harriet spoke at the Big Horn County Lincoln Dinner in Greybull. It was a packed house full of Republicans ready to vote for Harriet on August 16th! Harriet enjoyed listening to all of the candidates explain why they are running for office, and to learn from the audience as to what issues are important to them. Accountability and accessibility are key. Views From the Road We are thankful for clearer roads in the last week. Spring is close and the Wyoming landscape is greening up beautifully. We could still use more moisture though! Interstate 25 South of Buffalo Buffalo Bill Reservoir In the News David Bossie, president of Citizens United and former Deputy Campaign Manager for President Donald J. Trump wrote an opinion piece in The Washington Times providing a great outlook on the state of the race. Upcoming Events! We have numerous planned events throughout this spring and summer, with more being added each week. Please help us spread the word by sharing this information. You can stay informed about our upcoming events by visiting our or our website, Thursday, May 5th-Saturday, May 7th Republican Party of Wyoming--State Convention Sheridan Monday, May 9th 7:00 PM Evanston Town Hall Superintendent Office 1446 Main Street, Evanston, WY 82930 Tuesday, May 10th 6:30 PM Alpine Town Hall Alpine Civic Center 121 US-89, Alpine, WY 83128 Wednesday, May 11th 9:30 AM Riverton Town Hall Chandelle Event Center 3445 Chandelle Blvd., Riverton, WY 82501 Wednesday, May 11th 5:00 PM Carbon County Library 215 W. Buffalo St., Rawlins 82301 Friday, May 13th 6:00 PM Casper Town Hall Fraternal Order of Eagles 306 Durbin St., Casper, WY 82601 Saturday, May 28th 4:00 PM Save America Rally with President Trump Ford Wyoming Center, Casper hagemanforwyoming.com | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

| | | Hi there, I remember when someone from my team spoke with a man on Social Security Disability Insurance. He said he didn’t have money then but would be able to donate once he got his Social Security check. A few days later he gave $2. Moments like these make me incredibly grateful for all the support I receive on this campaign. [**Every dollar counts. Can you match my supporter’s $2 donation here?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846181/343361468/2061262125?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzU4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNWUzZTY3OS03OWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bEHf710WU90I9gucnoGQ3UVa6lnw3AdjIDu0fR-NEmE=) Educators, nurses, engineers, truck drivers, software developers, retail workers, restaurant workers. We’re now just 15 DAYS(!!!) from Election Day, and I want to update you on the state of the race. _
_ Peter,

We’re going to be moving quickly this month seeing as my primary is just a short 17 days from today, but before we lose track of time, I wanted to send you a note to say thanks for being there for me in April.

Once again, we managed to hit our goal for the month in just the nick of time.

This race isn’t going to be won on November 8th, it’s going to be won by acting like each day between now and Election Day (**190 days from today**) is Election Day.

All signs point to Republicans having the wind at our back and gaining more momentum by the day – but that is no reason to celebrate. Taking a win in November for granted is never something my team will do.

I hope you’ll afford me the opportunity to keep in touch with you over the next 190 days.

Thank you very much,

Back to Reaganesque values. **_Two Actions Requested Below For You_** Friend, Tomorrow is important, and I hope you will be tuning in. Governor Larry Hogan will be speaking at the Ronald Reagan Presidential Library in California. This prime-time speech will focus on how we can bring Americans together to turn our country around. [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=96b171ff8fa34eb89314b2433106dae3&_m=b5adf12ae930469e85a0f469b8d46dc2&_e=pDaYOrI7JGQoXSW_eg1eedDqDx_Zt1G9lBQc1ZqtwlgnMYb2bSxIjJ_iYS7l-PPpwRXMD0PbLKKMnj7X0cGqSb6T76K5Ll4uwx3b5xYYMjNchgijlkbAn23YAK9E81JHl_AqmUlZrcxY5iXdIanqdzwrqOaAoP7MwXih_LqzrZV-01vrxe25nM20RotTc9i_eNiOpHU6S8Yvx9_oqwu4ig5SBfy8MCew4t4PxptMIb5c5TwZwnjptN1X_YHDeM7q5scbb_S9-M3M-zkUXKz_po-r4kIrmmsTuH5yYZbPUDPxadp9cmRqO_29vtEFtah0) In Maryland, Governor Hogan has shown how to build a big tent Republican Party and deliver results on the issues that matter most to Americans. Kansas Court Strikes Down Gerrymandered Congressional Map
Friend – A district court just struck down Kansas Republicans’ gerrymandered map for diluting the vote of Black and Hispanic voters in and around Kansas City. This is great news! But the fight for fair maps continues outside of the courts, and with the 2022 elections coming up in just over SIX MONTHS, we’re running out of time.

name: Primary Sinema
subject: Did you hear what Trevor Noah said about Sinema? 👀
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHANGE FOR ARIZONA 2024 PAC**
body:
It’s a good joke. A great joke, even. | | | [](https://an.primarysinema.com/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953ylv71NjtRp9uAvapwZeG5Fwod7vf2Q19deFkSzINQB7pYO7Ed0TOwyvjuedJ39zpHIgPjZTod5LVCLRGJ5EuVnvDHqljinnhSRx27Y-QsvG6M20ZQaQYFyLcafJBZA0q-F5ey7XG0XmQJvKpkxG1I-ohKqV6bUqdx7XaNYCadPyvyiUGppsVne6ye_lLh4ruj-4Q6TibwTMFXqTRhZPHqoPxFcZSIOQmeCwwpI8wvqFLz5jWKfMpGVAdx4NLmrCKT5to7rLrZPapHgdnwiEd5r9v2iyCss2FBEUBf3MB5oa2s6y-HjkKJXuUhb5pNbP1Y0JUgssKr29BSVQowoi2xLg5tHS3c6vJPuKAiy9iGiXg/3lp/MX5Oe2fXQKKAc58Ubms-Rg/h0/OPiTHvFOwGR-fTQ-6ArbWD72xkh6hn7dYQhjMDchFng)
Peter, Did you hear that at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, Trevor Noah joked that Sinema is “a closeted Republican”? Except it’s not really a joke. What else do you call a “Democrat” who...
* Sides with Republicans on the filibuster, earning praise from Mitch McConnell while effectively killing voting rights and dooming the progressive agenda?
* Hosts closed-door events with GOP lobbyists where she mocks President Biden and calls herself “anti-government”?
* Takes donations from not one, but multiple Republican billionaires?

clean_body: It’s a good joke. A great joke, even. | | | Peter, Did you hear that at the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, Trevor Noah joked that Sinema is “a closeted Republican”? Except it’s not really a joke. What else do you call a “Democrat” who... Sides with Republicans on the filibuster, earning praise from Mitch McConnell while effectively killing voting rights and dooming the progressive agenda? Hosts closed-door events with GOP lobbyists where she mocks President Biden and calls herself “anti-government”? Takes donations from not one, but multiple Republican billionaires? Sinema has made it crystal-clear whose side she’s really on, and we don’t have to accept it. We can replace Kyrsten Sinema with a real Democrat — with your help. Not only has Sinema betrayed the Arizona Democrats who elected her, she’s betrayed every single American who’s been harmed by her obstruction of President Biden’s agenda. subject: They talk about it. I've actually done it.
body:
As a small business owner, I'm ready to get our state back on the right track. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fd2b225dd2ff/they-talk-about-it-ive-actually-done-it?e=7e91be8cad)
---
| |
---
| | | | | | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=c6c3a73500&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=24df356daa&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=64591081a5&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | [](https://jessicagomezforgovernor.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=38928f39f4567607835360484&id=b3a1c6227e&e=7e91be8cad)
---
| | Dear Friends,

Every election cycle, we hear the same old promises from Salem politicians that they're going to create new jobs -- seemingly out of thin air! _**And while they like to talk about job creation, I've actually done it.**_ My husband and I built our business from the ground up in 2003 and even survived the Great Recession. But right now, Oregon businesses are _suffering_ after years of one-party Democratic rule and the COVID shutdowns.

Oregon is in desperate need of a reboot, and **what better way to make our state business-friendly once more by electing a CEO to be our next governor?** In Salem, I will advocate for _lower taxes, fewer job-killing regulations, and a stronger economy that allows all Oregonians to thrive._

By now, you should have received your ballot for the May primary election. _If you agree with my positive vision for a business-friendly Oregon that leads the nation in economic growth and development, I hope I can count on your vote, because we need more leaders who have signed both sides of a paycheck._

Can I count on your support today?

Jessica Gomez
Republican for Governor

| | | | | |

| |

| BREAKING ROE V WADE OVERTURNED, BABIES BREATHE A SIGH OF RELIEF
---
|
---
---
| Watkinsville, Georgia (May 2, 2022)
Tonight, Politico broke that the Supreme Court has successfully voted to overturn Roe v. Wade.
"I am proud of the Supreme Court for voting to strike down Roe V Wade. It has been long overdue, as our country has faced an abortion epidemic. On average America murders 1,000,000 babies annually. It's time to keep up the pressure and next defund Planned Parenthood." \- said Vernon Jones, Trump-endorsed candidate for Congress.
"If it hadn't been for President Trump and his conservative leadership, this day would have never been possible. It is because of his historic nominations to our Supreme Court that generations of unborn children have now been saved," he continued.

[jonesforgeorgia.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jzmVCQkgr6z-EQ7HbBWXxiww_EKibZ5-kfo6owJDsAmW1HL_0vWKLlFDDQ7ZyCd5PyE1r2krOBqzfL13Rc5KH870BlpcFh4W57c-BoZJjPsGqlA0Bj4Fwv6BBmJ9yZuMqqlT98JzmHUGIY2p6BPWVzS3RariVwgW&c=jKZhvCHn0WltpcLvOTG2k5brRzS9Ofb1M1qDHCy_WWqqtoaWTY9hmw==&ch=lRmh_dlq31EH5MrzbNo6vTpC5qCiI6c8QAG6ypq-vJlaNA4yN1jRLw==)
---
|
---
About Vernon Jones
---
|
---
Vernon Jones is running for Georgia's 10th Congressional District. He is a former member of the GA House of Representatives (1993-2001, 2017-2021) and former Chief Executive Officer of DeKalb County, GA. A former Democrat, Jones officially switched parties in January 2021 after endorsing Donald J. Trump for President and speaking at the 2020 Republican National Convention. The proud Republican is now running in GA10, as a Pro-Trump candidate who will fight for free and fair elections, and always put Georgia and America First.

name: SarahforWisconsin.com
subject: Asking for your input
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
We want you to know just how important you are to this campaign.

When Sarah thinks about her most important supporters, it’s not about how much someone gives. She thinks about the people who were there when we needed them the most. So far, tens of thousands of grassroots supporters like you have contributed to help us flip Wisconsin’s Senate seat from red to blue.

Your generous contributions have helped us get our message out to voters on TV, online, and on the ground as we work to defeat Ron Johnson, elect Sarah, and expand our Democratic Senate majority. We can’t thank you enough for that support.

This email isn’t asking you for money, we know we ask a lot — Sarah doesn't accept corporate PAC money, which means this campaign is run by grassroots supporters like you. **Today, we’re only asking for your input.**

Every once in a while, we like to send around a brief survey asking folks to share the top three issues they care about most. We know people’s opinions change over time and it’s important for us to know what motivates our supporters. And it’s especially important that we stay up to date because we are making important decisions every day about where to place our resources.

**[Will you take a minute or two to share with Sarah and our team what issues matter most to you right now? We are hoping for a LOT of responses today, and we would love to hear from you!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44842440/343333707/37006170?ms=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&refcode=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&source=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220404_april_esrv_gq_act___sg_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=R2h8eQyXTCcB8VXl/clPCQhzqVphq5+JnilOCBeynYNmse6nTj9gSuf/zczTwGKXLngifiQnTlKfiich02w9rjEG9b3rkAyPwtS3mre1IwMoCLDfvYPTeOJVaQrm7domJcx8hc0sSt7x6dOa/Q8k3ZXXH/4jPwpp4KnTKwEQknU=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjhhMTZmNy01ZWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iXskGY-G5jO7L7yuEvF5Nqhe_iDJNwCpOeZIwaV0YNY=&emci=4383faf0-5eca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b28a16f7-5eca-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=18659593)**

Now more than ever, we need to build a winning campaign to replace Ron Johnson and give Wisconsinites a leader they can trust to do what's right. But the only way we'll win is if we set our priorities and follow through on them together, which is why your feedback is so important.

We care about your opinion, and this is an opportunity for you to tell Sarah exactly where you stand. Thank you in advance for weighing in.

— Team Sarah

name: Senate GOP
subject: Sounding the impeachment alarm
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – but we don’t. |
---
Fellow patriot,

In the history of the United States of America, only one member of the Supreme Court has been impeached by the House of Representatives - **in 1804.**

But if Democrats – **namely AOC** – have their way, Justice Thomas would have already been impeached if this weren’t an election year.

And because it’s an election year, it’s our duty to tell you just how important It is that we flip the Senate Republican. _**Why?**_ Because if House Democrats move to impeach Justice Thomas over his wife’s political activity – **which would be a heinous mistake on their part** – a Republican Senate could block his removal from the Supreme Court.

You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – **but we don’t**. Let’s not learn the hard way that we cannot sleepwalk through a midterm just because we think we’ve got the upper hand.

If you support Justice Thomas and want a Republican Senate in place to protect him from future House impeachment efforts, **[then we’re asking you to donate $1 right now to help us elect as many Republicans to the Senate this November as possible.](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ce8da0f6c0df417ea140c0fe49304fc5&_e=oyTkSTLkBwC3m9iUYMuMNvnlMx97bfgh0w1FO9_ORU8qV5i9ldSdJxYUS-pDPR_WzMKKY3gwblH8UPHikS0pBWuAOdwPW6zP3I-KV118b-dZiJscTQCEMUZT5liwwQqBYXQ6hQeW3kL_aamt-ou1JZDDIp2Jd7L_05Dsrq2MdllA0A3eUcBwvWhe_B0NFMc5Ta5wPRfZDsWyAGq5qsVmt8RdybA9-u0RAzxyF6X13cSMyyrgikcIZA-CIgrtOzooM5NbjZbLp0aIXX074S7qgX0usrJxDnjtxHHk55iddugg9lUmpHQsCMpwgHdNIxn50nIkxe0YxZSeYGaciDi1lhOZ--ItYgE8rC26IjxGE8E5sK6zi6MGGzdFN-6hIA66f-BoxQyR3mXrfh5lBOS1OvN9k-XoZt4M7-pVJ8dRDg-K-i7MN33Mo4eQSQJzhY-7_TyA3Wd4fL6-SSLK1vPqYGrJEvCmGRYN0hNmuaV31Smdq4b1gOrDGg7z0a6cjQaP)**

clean_body: You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – but we don’t. | Fellow patriot, In the history of the United States of America, only one member of the Supreme Court has been impeached by the House of Representatives - in 1804. But if Democrats – namely AOC – have their way, Justice Thomas would have already been impeached if this weren’t an election year. And because it’s an election year, it’s our duty to tell you just how important It is that we flip the Senate Republican. Why? Because if House Democrats move to impeach Justice Thomas over his wife’s political activity – which would be a heinous mistake on their part – a Republican Senate could block his removal from the Supreme Court. You may think that we already have the Senate majority in the bag – but we don’t. Let’s not learn the hard way that we cannot sleepwalk through a midterm just because we think we’ve got the upper hand. If you support Justice Thomas and want a Republican Senate in place to protect him from future House impeachment efforts, Thanks, Senate GOP If you want to help Republicans TAKE BACK THE SENATE, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. Text "STOP" to opt-out. | | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Today is a joyous day for Muslims across NY-03 and the world to feast and celebrate, marking the end of the holy month of Ramadan.
For the past month, many of you have dedicated your time to devotion and reflection, fasting from dusk-to-dawn and keeping all those who suffer from poverty, conflict, hunger, disease, and other struggles in mind.
It is a special time to recommit to ending oppression and working to create a better world, values that are ingrained in our campaign.
For all those celebrating, I hope you have a very happy and blessed Eid al-Fitr. And may we all come together and continue our fight for progress for every member of our community.
Best,
Melanie

Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Henry=20Isemann?=
subject: New Ideas. New Energy. Newsletter. May 2nd, 2020.
body:
Weekend Recap & New Merch! Check out what the team was up to this week as we campaigned in three counties. | |
---
| | |
---
| We had an awesome weekend door knocking in three of our district’s six counties, with dozens of our volunteers coming out with us on Saturday and Sunday

Our team stopped by the Chester Food Truck Festival, Schooley’s Mountain Fire Company Pancake Breakfast, Hackettstown town wide yard sale, Bernie’s Hillside Lounge, local sporting events and more. **We knocked on hundreds of doors in Morris, Warren and Somerset Counties.**

We’ll be door knocking, phone banking, and campaigning at fairs, sporting and local events every day through June 7th. If you haven’t been out with us, n**ow is the time we could use your help!**

**We have just 37 days to make our final push towards victory on June 7th!**
---
| [DONATE](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=ac0f224175&e=0a69e2b984 "DONATE")
---
|
---
[ ](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=3b485ea449&e=0a69e2b984)
| **While the primary is Tuesday, June 7th, mail-in ballots have started to go out. If you plan on voting this way, make sure to request your ballot.**

Any registered Republican or Independent can vote in the primary. [Click here for the mail-in ballot request form](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=292e8380c8&e=0a69e2b984)[.](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=8174f63936&e=0a69e2b984)

Unlike in prior years, voters no longer automatically receive a mail-in ballot. You must actively request one. If you have questions about voting, please feel free to email us at [team@johnisemann.com](mailto:team@johnisemann.com)
---
| **NEW MERCH!** [Check out our Isemann for Congress t-shirts](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=6e6862b2a3&e=0a69e2b984). Our staff and volunteers will be wearing them everywhere, and we hope you’ll join us.

**THIS WEEK ONLY** \- [Order a lawn sign and get one free](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=d0c2be48a7&e=0a69e2b984). Perfect for a friend or family member who wants to show their support. Let’s cover the state in thousands of these things.

If you’re not already following us on social media, visit our Facebook, Instagram, and Twitter profiles below. We’ll be releasing several new videos this week.

**Thank you for your support, and have a great week!**
---
| [DONATE](https://johnisemann.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4fd963055e9fc7d57d7943691&id=5743d0e3cb&e=0a69e2b984 "DONATE")

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Roe v Wade

Hello,
I just left a meeting to respond to this news...
For the first time ever, a draft opinion from the Supreme Court has been leaked. **Five justices on the Supreme Court have decided to strike down Roe v Wade.**
Not a partial rollback or a chipping away at women’s rights, but a full overturning of 49 years of precedent.
**This will go down as one of the most disastrous decisions the Court has ever made, certainly during my lifetime.** Nobody ever tells men what they can and cannot do on health care in this country.
I’m running against Chuck Grassley because as chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, he oversaw blocking Merrick Garland and confirming right-wing justices Gorsuch, Kavanaugh, and Barrett. **And this November, we MUST turn Iowa blue, expand our Democratic Senate majority, and codify Roe as law once and for all.**
[**The future of women’s rights is at stake. Please, will you chip in now to my campaign – whatever you can afford – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic Senate majority so we can finally codify Roe v Wade as law?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846634/343376107/-42398318?refcode=em20220502pm2-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjEyMzI5MC04NGNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y03hJxRqx_WAX7Ke8TiVnsdK-dDP-i4MWagecXpY6y8=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: It's getting wild!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
It's looking more and more like three candidates will get booted from the ballot because of sloppy campaign work. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| Peter:

This has been a wild week on the campaign trail.

Republican officials are saying it's looking more and more like [three candidates will get booted from the ballot](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0a8615566a&e=0636b97700) because of sloppy campaign work.

**That will significantly alter the landscape, and will place me in an even better position to win the nomination and to defeat Gretchen Whitmer in November.**
---
| |
---
As my wife and I enjoyed a nice dinner this week at Schu's Grill and Bar, we reminisced about my first election victory. This is where we celebrated.

_That's one of many things that separates me from the other candidates – I've run for office before and won_. Twice I was elected as a county commissioner.

I understand what it takes.
---
|
---
| When I first announced my intention to run for Governor, I knew it would be a grind, and I wasn't going to take anything for granted. I set about assembling a top-notch political team, and together we have charted a slow and steady course that will lead to victory.

We worked hard and submitted more than enough signatures to qualify for the ballot.

In addition, I've picked up a steady stream of endorsements – most recently State Representative Pauline Wendzel.
---
|
---
| I'm excited about the future. We're in great position to win this. The reception I continue to receive throughout the state confirms this.
---
|
---
---
| I had a fantastic evening with the Montcalm County Republican Party this week. It was great to be back in Belding where I grew up.
---
| |
---
My boat may be called "Messing Around," but _I'm not messing around when it comes to this race_. I'm all in, and I even loaned my boat to my best friend for the summer since I won't have time to use it.

**This is a critical race.

We have an historic opportunity to unseat Gretchen Whitmer.**
---
| If you haven't already, [sign up to be part of our winning team](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d13496933b&e=0636b97700). Volunteer, give your name as an endorsement, and please [make a generous donation](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=4b88f5be51&e=0636b97700) to help out.

**We won't squander our resources like others. Every dime is being spent carefully as we move closer to victory.**

Thanks for reading, and I hope to see you on the campaign trail!

Michael Brown
A common sense conservative for Governor
---
|
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=726529a767&e=0636b97700)
---
|
---
| PS – in case you missed it, we poked some fun at one of the millionaire candidates last week. I'm just a regular working guy, not a poll-tested politician, or out of touch millionaire. I connect with the average voter. That's one of my strengths. Enjoy.
---
| [ ](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=d613576c87&e=0636b97700)
---
|

name: John Fetterman
subject: I’ve never been a hotel ballroom, rubber chicken kind of guy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
15 DAYS.
#
OMG, Derek.
Let me start by saying — Happy Election Month!!!! 😁
In 15 short days, Pennsylvanians will choose their Democratic nominee in the race to flip PA’s open Senate seat.
I’m not gonna lie — it’s about to be a mad dash to the finish line. Take today for example: today’s the last day for people to register to vote in the primary, so our (unbeatable) team of staff + volunteers is working a mile a minute to ensure everyone who wants to register, gets registered.*
Derek, this is it. We don’t get another chance at this. Pennsylvania could decide the Senate majority — and we’re the ONLY campaign that can flip this seat blue.
**[If you want to flip this seat, save our Senate majority, and elect a Democrat who will fight for you + stand with you every time, then I’m asking you to chip in $5 or anything you can today to help us secure the nomination.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?amount=5&refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)**
Don’t worry, I’m not sitting back + putting my feet up while my team does all the work.
I spent this weekend traveling to three counties (Lebanon + Luzerne + Northampton) and giving people a chance to see IRL what our campaign is all about.
In Lebanon, I talked to a voter who said he’s only voting for me because of my wife.
I was like, “Thanks, Dad” 🙄
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)
In Luzerne County, we met more than 200 PA voters. There were cookies + pizza, and we even FaceTimed in the SLoP.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)
Derek, I’ve never been a hotel ballroom, rubber chicken kind of guy. That’s why Weyerbacher Brewery in the Lehigh Valley — one of PA’s *many* incredible breweries — was the perfect place to meet over 100 supporters ❤️
[ [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN) Let me end with this. I know we send you a lot of emails. We don’t expect you to chip in every time. **[But if you’re in a place to do so, now is a BIG moment to kick in your first $5. Every dollar + cent will fund voter outreach + give us a stronger chance of winning the Democratic primary in 16 days.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220502-1?refcode=em20220502-5632&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN) You’re an important part of that, and I seriously can’t thank you enough for your support during a critical moment like this. Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏 – John John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of PA *Are you a PA voter who still needs to register or isn’t sure about the state of their voter registration? Want to help out a family member, friend or neighbor? We’ve got you covered. [**Click here to check your registration and/or register — and remember, today is the LAST day to register before the primary on May 17!**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/47488?t=1&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220502-5632-footer&t=2&refcode2=5632_434096_3Y5OuN&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=3&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5632%2E434096%2E3Y5OuN)

Take today for example: today’s the last day for people to register to vote in the primary, so our (unbeatable) team of staff + volunteers is working a mile a minute to ensure everyone who wants to register, gets registered. Derek, this is it. We don’t get another chance at this. Pennsylvania could decide the Senate majority — and we’re the ONLY campaign that can flip this seat blue. Don’t worry, I’m not sitting back + putting my feet up while my team does all the work. I spent this weekend traveling to three counties (Lebanon + Luzerne + Northampton) and giving people a chance to see IRL what our campaign is all about. In Lebanon, I talked to a voter who said he’s only voting for me because of my wife. I was like, “Thanks, Dad” 🙄 In Luzerne County, we met more than 200 PA voters. There were cookies + pizza, and we even FaceTimed in the SLoP. Derek, I’ve never been a hotel ballroom, rubber chicken kind of guy. That’s why Weyerbacher Brewery in the Lehigh Valley — one of PA’s many incredible breweries — was the perfect place to meet over 100 supporters ❤️ Let me end with this. I know we send you a lot of emails. We don’t expect you to chip in every time. You’re an important part of that, and I seriously can’t thank you enough for your support during a critical moment like this. Thank you, thank you, THANK YOU!!! 🙏 – John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of PA Are you a PA voter who still needs to register or isn’t sure about the state of their voter registration? Want to help out a family member, friend or neighbor? We’ve got you covered. | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211. Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Erica Smith
subject: Together, we will win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ERICA FOR US
body:
I’m so grateful.
#
Hi, it's Erica.
**I’m reaching out today to thank you for being a part of our working-class movement for progress and change.**
There are only 15 days until our primary election on Tuesday, May 17, and the past few months of heart, grit, and hard work have led up to this moment right here!
North Carolina’s 1st Congressional District is wide-open and competitive. I’m up against one of the most conservative Democrats in the state legislature. On top of that, a super PAC that endorsed 100+ Republicans who voted to overturn the 2020 presidential election is flooding this race with dark money to buy this election for our opponent.
I’m the only candidate in this primary election fighting for progressive changes like bold climate action, universal healthcare, protecting access to reproductive care, and strengthening voting rights — without taking a dime of corporate PAC or fossil fuel money.
**Since day one, our movement has been about us, WE THE PEOPLE, and this campaign is only possible because of supporters like you.** I’m so grateful for the faith you’ve put in me and for all of the folks chipping in, making phone calls, and spreading the word about our campaign.
As we enter this final stretch, I want to thank this AMAZING team again from the bottom of my heart.
Now, let’s go win this!
Erica

Team –

I just got the news that the Supreme Court is going to overturn Roe v. Wade. This, frankly, is an outrage.

I know health care -- and I believe reproductive care is an essential right. And just like the rest of your health care decisions, it is something that should be between you and your doctor. No government involved.

Sarah Palin on the other hand is celebrating tonight's news.

If Alaska sends her to Congress, she won't vote to codify Roe v. Wade into law.

I will.

Unlike Sarah Palin, I promise to always stand up for your right to make your own medical decisions — including the right to safe, legal abortion services.

[**So today, I am asking you to split a contribution to the Planned Parenthood Action Fund and my campaign for Congress, because Alaskans deserve access to reproductive health care and they deserve a representative who will fight to protect that access.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44846817/343376779/1751173080?refcode=em22_220502_roe&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTQ4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OTM0MWMyMi04NmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=efW6c5KJCnQfmcOIZhCe5OmCEkdh-NvWllRamdY_CPc=)

According to documents obtained by Politico, the Supreme Court is likely going to overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and return the issue of abortion back to the states. This is a historic day in our country. For nearly 50 years, the immoral practice of abortion was legally protected by the Supreme Court's politicized 1973 ruling... Now, millions of lives are going to be saved each year as more states move to implement lifesaving legislation like my bill SB 612. [America is Pro-Life. Friend,

It's sad but true-
_When Democrats are in power, their soft-on-crime policies weaken police and embolden criminals. The result?**Innocent lives are lost.**_

| | Peter, The draft Supreme Court decision by Justice Alito that leaked tonight is a chilling document. **A decision to strike down the reproductive protections enshrined in law by _Roe v. Wade_ would be wrong, outrageous, and cruel.** To see the Supreme Court stray miles away from its constitutional duty to protect civil rights and human rights against the political whims of extremist politicians is a sad day for this Republic. Make no mistake about it: If this decision becomes final, the rights of millions of women in this country will be taken away by a Supreme Court that has lost its way – a court stacked by Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their right-wing allies. **Congress must protect reproductive freedom – including the right to abortion and birth control. And if I'm elected to Congress, I will not rest until we get it done.** **[Please chip in now to help us build a grassroots campaign to fight back with everything we've | | Friends,

We have had a last minute schedule change and will unfortunately need to reschedule the May 4th quarterly breakfast.

If you have already contributed, you are welcome to count that contribution to the rescheduled breakfast or one of the many events we will have coming up this summer.

My apologies for any inconvenience. Please let me know if you have any questions or concerns. I hope to see you soon,

Landon Porter
Team Banks

---
Look, we can't stop smiling... because the walls are closing in on Donald Trump!

Brave new reporting EXPOSED incriminating text messages between key Trump allies in the days leading up to Jan. 6th, and now a New York Judge has held Trump in contempt of court!

**But Trump is still fighting to flip the House and Senate next year and make sure there aren 't any Democrats left to hold him accountable...**

So we've drafted an open letter to the disgraced former President to tell him that we WILL do all in our power to elect politicians that will investigate, charge, and convict him for his crimes.

[DON'T WAIT - We need 55,000 Democrats to sign on RIGHT NOW:](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10478?t=7&akid=2050%2E878179%2Eyip-aJ) | [DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER AND PLEDGE TO VOTE IN THE MIDTERM ELECTIONS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10478?t=8&akid=2050%2E878179%2Eyip-aJ)

_You are a disgrace to our democracy._

I bet you thought that you and your cronies would be able to get away with trying to overturn Joe Biden's presidential victory in 2020\.

**_But I 'm not going to let that happen._** I will fight to the ends of the earth to make sure that traitors to our democracy like you are held FULLY ACCOUNTABLE for each and every one of your numerous crimes against our country.

[**I 'm BEYOND sick of your lies, your BS, and your attacks on patriots who are doing their job to hold you accountable. That's why I'm donating $5 right now to VPP to SECURE our majorites and ensure we can fully investigate your crimes. Together, we'll FINALLY make you pay! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10478?t=10&akid=2050%2E878179%2Eyip-aJ) | [DONATE $5 TO SIGN THE LETTER! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10478?t=11&akid=2050%2E878179%2Eyip-aJ)

**Donald, though the polls may not show it, there is RECORD enthusiasm from Democratic voters heading into November.**

And you can bet your bottom dollar that we will use that energy to vote for House and Senate candidates that will investigate, prosecute, and convict traitors like you for your heinous crimes.

That's why I'm going to do everything in my power to defend our democracy from seditionists like you! [**And it starts right now with my $5 donation to Voter Protection Project »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/10478?t=12&akid=2050%2E878179%2Eyip-aJ)

name: Our Revolution
subject: Get your May Day Sticker!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
| | Insider News from the Political Revolution!

* * *
**HEADLINES: Nina vs. SuperPACS | New Endorsements! Amy Vilela - Brittany Ramos DeBarros - Summer Lee | Bernie Calls Out Biden | Ro Khanna | NY Health Act | & MORE!**

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=11&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Yesterday, workers around the world celebrated **May Day** — the **International Workers’ Day** established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the **Haymarket Massacre** in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader **August Spies** said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for **the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement**.”

Spies showed **solidarity** with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. **Yesterday, we marked the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.**

[Become a member of Our Revolution, and receive your commemorative MAY DAY STICKER today!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5451?t=12&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=13&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Join us **tomorrow at 8:30p ET** /7:30 CT for a special **Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy** with our partners at **Free Speech for People** and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot.

We’ll speak with courageous **Our Revolution** members - and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like **Marjorie Taylor-Greene**. And, we’re recruiting _progressive patriots_ across the country to get engaged in this fight!

[RSVP HERE](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5409?t=14&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=15&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=16&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS**

Billionaires and oil barons are **lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents** in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “**Mainstream Democrats PAC** ” to try to stop progressives from taking power.

Working-class fighters like **Nina Turner** , **Rep. Andy Levin** , **David Segal** , and **Jessica Cisneros** are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, **we have their back** , and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the **true mainstream positions** of the _people_ in this country.

**The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races.**

Our candidates rely on the power of the movement — campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. **[Join our Phonebank Force](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=17&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money**.

★ ★ ★

[The primaries are heating up, and we have some truly phenomenal candidates on the ballot – organizers, teachers, and diverse working-class fighters – stepping forward to lead _with_ our movement. Become a Movement Builder today to help progressives seize the levers of power from corporate Dems.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/or-newsletter-22&amount=10&refcode=OR_EM_NEWS_1MO_20220502_1_1&recurring=true?t=18&refcode2=2858_5885482_bAG5n5&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=19&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2**
THE HOMESTRETCH

Folks, this is not a drill —
**This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress!**

**Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now!** So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT!

**If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote** before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave.

“**The energy on the ground is palpable!** ” Nina told us. “**Now is the time to maximize our efforts together**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=20&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it.** But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “**All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale!** ”

As **Katrina vanden Heuvel** wrote in [The Washington Post](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5452?t=21&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5), noting **Our Revolution’s** support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the _soul_ of the party.”

“Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with **a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement** that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated.

“**Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it — both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight** ,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree.

NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=22&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1** , and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that.

“The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “**I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All** , and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.”

Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator **Anna-Marta Visky** spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district.

“**This work is paying off big time** ,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a **more engaged voter base** , and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!”

Healthcare justice advocate **Michael Lighty** said, “**Our Revolution walks the walk** and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.”

“**They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing — we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country** ,” Nina said.

This is a new day and a new district — which includes **all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points,** and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=23&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs** , which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote.

So far, **150 Our Revolution volunteers** have made **60k phone calls** and **sent 40k texts** and **330k emails** connecting with voters for Nina.

**Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night!** With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line.

[VOLUNTEER FOR NINA](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4901?t=24&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=25&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

As one of our movement’s **fiercest champions for Medicare for All** , **Our Revolution** is honored to endorse **Amy Vilela for Congress** in Nevada’s 1st District.

Amy served as **Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020** campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat.

“**I am running to represent the working class** ,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “**This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table**.”

**Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate — she knows the struggle firsthand.** Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when **tragedy struck in 2015**.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=26&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

“The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” **Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise — or die trying.**

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=27&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Electing true allies like Amy is how we **change the composition of Congress** and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement.

[VOLUNTEER FOR AMY](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5437?t=28&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=29&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**Our Revolution** and **Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network** are backing **Brittany Ramos DeBarros** for Congress in NY-11!

Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community.

“**I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible** ,” Brittany said on our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=30&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) on Monday.

The **Amazon Labor Union** drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “**These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=31&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story — though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship.

“Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “**Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education**.”

**Medicare for All** and a **Green New Deal** are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said.

In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. **The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters** and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.”

If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. [Click here to get started](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5434?t=32&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)!

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=33&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

“**This race is a huge opportunity** ,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and **we will make history**.”

We hope you’ll help **Our Revolution** ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. **Your calls will make a huge impact in this district!**

[SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5435?t=34&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=35&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**Our Revolution** is thrilled to endorse **Summer Lee** for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District!

Summer worked as a labor organizer with the **Fight for $15** , organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead **voter mobilization** efforts to strengthen our democracy.

In 2018, she made history as the **first Black woman from Western PA** ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of **Our Revolution**.

“**Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office** ,” Summer said on our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=36&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) on Monday.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=37&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

“**As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside — that’s a powerful movement right there** ,” she said.

In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy.

“The number one support for lazy incumbency is **low voter turnout and voter suppression**. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said.

“**We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape**.”

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=38&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Rep. Lee has been endorsed by **Bernie Sanders** and **Our Revolution Pennsylvania**. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=39&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Join thousands of **Our Revolution** volunteers to elect working-class fighters like **Amy Vilela** , **Brittany Ramos DeBarros** , **Summer Lee** , and of course **Nina Turner**! We must replace the enemies of progress in Congress with strong movement partners.

Our Revolution Volunteer **Taylor Pinckney** told us how good it feels when our efforts pay off. While she was phone banking, a voter a voter mentioned that her call and a mailer from Our Revolution helped him switch from a centrist candidate to **Erica Smith** for Congress in NC-1.

“He thanked us for opening his eyes that **Erica** was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor told us. “**It was cool to see the impact — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going**.”

If you have just one hour a week, **you can make a difference, too!** Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you **make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power**!

[JOIN THE FORCE!](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4972?t=40&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

★ ★ ★

**BERNIE ENDORSES NIDA ALLAM**

**Our Revolution** is backing **Nida Allam** for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th district — and, **now it’s official, Bernie is too!**

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=41&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

“**Nida Allam** knows that it takes a true grassroots movement to defeat big money special interests and deliver real change for working people,” Bernie said. “**Together in Congress, we will fight for the working class** by standing up for M4A, GND, and a living wage.”

**Nida was political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign** and currently serves on the Durham County Commission. The **first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in North Carolina** , she voted to raise the minimum wage for county employees to a living wage.

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=42&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**BERNIE STANDS WITH WORKERS,
CALLS ON BIDEN TO ACT!**

This weekend, **Our Revolution** joined **Bernie** and **AOC** as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth.

On Sunday afternoon, Bernie [addressed](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5454?t=44&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) **Amazon Labor Union** ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a [concert](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5455?t=45&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) for **Starbucks Workers United** in Richmond, Va.

On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the [Senate floor](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5456?t=46&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on **President Biden** to issue an **executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting** from getting federal government contracts, [Reuters](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5457?t=47&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) reports.

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=48&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

“**Amazon** is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “**President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise**.”

Rumors of **Bernie 2024** are circulating, but the truth is — **Our Revolution** and the progressive movement are doing the work _today_ to build the worker power we need to forge a better future.

[It takes labor power, organizers like us, and elected allies all lifting together to advance our progressive mission forward. Bernie lit the match and he’s still out here with us. Become a movement builder today to help carry the torch.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=49&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=50&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

Today, workers around the world celebrate **May Day** — the **International Workers’ Day** established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the **Haymarket Massacre** in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day.

Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader **August Spies** said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for **the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement**.”

Spies showed **solidarity** with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. **Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice.**

**LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT**

Our Revolution Board Chair **Larry Cohen** , a lifelong labor leader, joined our [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=53&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing.

“**This is an exciting time —** not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “**This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution**.”

**Why now?** Larry told Aaron White of [Open Democracy](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5458?t=54&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5) that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, **working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them**.”

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=55&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS**

Also on our latest [National Organizing Call](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5453?t=56&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5), Our Revolution Board Chair **Larry Cohen** asked US Rep. **Ro Khanna** about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry.

“**Greta Thunberg** testified and said it would be a **gut punch for Democrats** to have both chambers and the presidency and **not repeal fossil fuel subsidies** ,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.”

To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s **Billionaires Tax** , Ro said: “**There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires** , and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.”

Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “**Folks don’t believe the promises anymore** ,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse — decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. **We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country**.”

Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build **Our Revolution** and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.”

★ ★ ★

[ ](https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5450?t=57&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)

**FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY**

On Tuesday, **Our Revolution** joined **Campaign for NY Health** and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide **universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt**.

Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds **prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election**.

Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator **Jennyfer Almanzar** spoke to attendees at the rally: “**Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line**.”

[Become a member of Our Revolution to help us continue this fight in New York and across the country. Every step towards Medicare for All is a step toward healthcare justice.](http://act.ourrevolution.com/go/4893?t=58&akid=2858%2E5885482%2EbAG5n5)
