And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ OUR REVOLUTION vs. SUPER PACS Billionaires and oil barons are lining up to line the pockets of our candidates’ opponents in the primaries. They’re funneling millions and millions into SuperPACs like DMFI, AIPAC, and now the new, “Mainstream Democrats PAC ” to try to stop progressives from taking power. Working-class fighters like Nina Turner , Rep. Andy Levin , David Segal , and Jessica Cisneros are being targeted with expensive smear campaigns from every direction. But, we have their back , and we know that M4A, a living wage, and climate action are the true mainstream positions of the people in this country. The corporate establishment knows what’s at stake in these races, and so do we. That’s why we mobilized our ground game early and are waging the fight in each of these pivotal races. Our candidates rely on the power of the movement — campaigns funded by small-dollar donations and fueled by our boots on the ground. to connect with voters and help drown out corporate money. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ NINA TURNER FOR CONGRESS - ROUND 2 THE HOMESTRETCH Folks, this is not a drill — This is our chance to elect Nina Turner to Congress! Election Day is Tuesday and in-person early voting is happening right now! So far, turnout is low, so every vote we get for Nina will really COUNT! If you know someone in Greater Cleveland, help them get out to vote before 7:30 pm Tuesday at Cuyahoga County Board of Elections, 2925 Euclid Ave. “The energy on the ground is palpable! ” Nina told us. “Now is the time to maximize our efforts together.” This is one of the most consequential primaries of 2022 — and the billionaires know it. But, our movement is rising up against the BIG money trying to buy this seat. As Nina says, “All that we love is on the line, and Cleveland is not for sale! ” As Katrina vanden Heuvel wrote in , noting Our Revolution’s support for Nina: “The contest has come to represent a battle for the soul of the party.” “Turner’s election to Congress would provide progressives with a skilled, dedicated, and powerful reformer, an inside ally for the progressive movement that is driving the change vital to this nation’s democracy and security,” she stated. “Change will take place only if citizens organize to force it — both with movements that drive the debate and with leaders such as Nina Turner who frame the issues and help lead the fight ,” says Heuvel. We wholeheartedly agree. NINA & THE FIGHT FOR M4A Nina has been in the trenches with Our Revolution for Medicare for All since Day 1 , and on Thursday, we hosted a fundraiser for her centering around just that. “The commodification of healthcare in America is not by accident. It’s inhumane and cruel,” Nina said. “I won’t get any peace until we get Medicare for All , and I won’t let anyone else get any peace either.” Our Revolution National Organizing Coordinator Anna-Marta Visky spoke on the call about our work to grow cosponsors for federal legislation and pass M4A Resolutions in cities in Nina’s district. “This work is paying off big time ,” Anna Marta said. “Lakewood and Cleveland Heights have passed M4A Resolutions. Talking one-on-one with folks results in a more engaged voter base , and we’re excited to see them early vote for Nina!” Healthcare justice advocate Michael Lighty said, “Our Revolution walks the walk and that embodies what Nina and the Medicare for All movement are all about.” “They would not be spending this kind of money if the other side wasn’t losing — we can win, and our win will have a ripple effect for other candidates across the country ,” Nina said. This is a new day and a new district — which includes all of Cleveland, where Nina won by 10 points, and neighborhoods like Lakewood that went for Bernie twice! We can bring this home if we put in the work. Let’s go! Nina isn’t taking a DIME from special interests or corrupt SuperPACs , which means she’s counting on us to power this final push and get out the vote. So far, 150 Our Revolution volunteers have made 60k phone calls and sent 40k texts and 330k emails connecting with voters for Nina. Help us reach even more folks up through the end of voting Tuesday night! With low voter turnout, the calls you make to get progressives to the polls could get Nina over the finish line. ★ ★ ★ As one of our movement’s fiercest champions for Medicare for All , Our Revolution is honored to endorse Amy Vilela for Congress in Nevada’s 1st District. Amy served as Nevada Co-Chair for Bernie Sanders’ 2020 campaign, and now she’s taking on a corporate-backed Democratic incumbent for this pivotal Vegas seat. “I am running to represent the working class ,” Amy told us on our National Organizing Call on Monday. “This is the right race at the right time, and stakeholders on the frontlines want a seat at the table.” Amy’s politics and progressive values are deeply rooted in her lived experience. Raised in poverty, experiencing homelessness, and becoming a first-generation college graduate — she knows the struggle firsthand. Amy and her husband thought they were beating the odds to build their American Dream when tragedy struck in 2015. “The last thing I told Shalynne, as I held her dying body in my arms, was that she will not have died in vain.” Amy said she fully intends to make good on that promise — or die trying. Electing true allies like Amy is how we change the composition of Congress and make democracy work. Now we need your help to win this crucial race for our movement. ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution and Our Revolution-NY Progressive Action Network are backing Brittany Ramos DeBarros for Congress in NY-11! Brittany is an Afro-Latina Staten Islander, community organizer, former Army captain, and anti-war activist running a bold campaign to empower working people in her community. “I feel for our people in my bones, and nothing could stop me from standing up boldly about the truth of that suffering and a vision of a future we know is entirely possible ,” Brittany said on our on Monday. The Amazon Labor Union drives are right in her district, and Brittany said she’s proud to help them organize. “These workers have the kind of grit it’s going to take to have a powerful, organized working class for a real revolution of values in this country.” Brittany grew up in a conservative, military family, believing the American ‘bootstraps’ story — though they struggled and she went to college on an Army scholarship. “Once I deployed to Afghanistan as a platoon leader responsible for 40 lives, I saw corporations were running the show,” she said. “Nobody should have to carry a gun - potentially killing and dying - just to afford an education.” Medicare for All and a Green New Deal are two of her top priorities. “I'm fighting alongside my community for dignity, for housing justice, economic justice, racial justice, and criminal justice reform,” Brittany said. In the primary, she’s up against conservative former Democratic Rep. Max Rose, who lost the seat in 2020 to GOP Nicole Malliotakis. The incumbent supported the Jan. 6th rioters and calls herself the “right-wing answer to The Squad.” If you’re in NY-11, you can apply for your absentee ballot now to vote in the June 28th Democratic Primary. ! “This race is a huge opportunity ,” Brittany said Monday. “We have the people-power on our side. If we put in that groundwork, we will win this and we will make history.” We hope you’ll help Our Revolution ramp up our ground game to give candidates like Brittany a decisive edge. Your calls will make a huge impact in this district! ★ ★ ★ Our Revolution is thrilled to endorse Summer Lee for Congress in Pennsylvania’s 12th District! Summer worked as a labor organizer with the Fight for $15 , organizing to protect worker rights, and went on to lead voter mobilization efforts to strengthen our democracy. In 2018, she made history as the first Black woman from Western PA ever elected to the state legislature. Throughout her time in office, State Rep. Lee has been a voice for working families and an ally of Our Revolution. “Organizing is the center of my work. It’s where I come from and it’s integral to how I serve in office ,” Summer said on our on Monday. “As legislators, we have platforms and some resources, but when we use them to organize people on the outside — that’s a powerful movement right there ,” she said. In Congress, she’ll be a champion for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, voting rights, and taking on corporate power to restore the voice of the people in our democracy. “The number one support for lazy incumbency is low voter turnout and voter suppression. If they can keep working people home, they can stay in their seats serving corporate America forever,” Summer said. “We’re expanding the electorate, connecting people to their own power, and we’re changing the political landscape.” Rep. Lee has been endorsed by Bernie Sanders and Our Revolution Pennsylvania. Help us elect progressive allies like Summer to make democracy work for all of us. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters like Amy Vilela , Brittany Ramos DeBarros , Summer Lee , and of course Nina Turner! We must replace the enemies of progress in Congress with strong movement partners. Our Revolution Volunteer Taylor Pinckney told us how good it feels when our efforts pay off. While she was phone banking, a voter a voter mentioned that her call and a mailer from Our Revolution helped him switch from a centrist candidate to Erica Smith for Congress in NC-1. “He thanked us for opening his eyes that Erica was the most progressive candidate and said that’s what his district needs,” Taylor told us. “It was cool to see the impact — when I make these connections with voters, it motivates me to keep the work going.” If you have just one hour a week, you can make a difference, too! Our crew will be there every step of the way to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ BERNIE ENDORSES NIDA ALLAM Our Revolution is backing Nida Allam for Congress in North Carolina’s 4th district — and, now it’s official, Bernie is too! “Nida Allam knows that it takes a true grassroots movement to defeat big money special interests and deliver real change for working people,” Bernie said. “Together in Congress, we will fight for the working class by standing up for M4A, GND, and a living wage.” Nida was political director for Bernie’s 2016 presidential campaign and currently serves on the Durham County Commission. The first Muslim woman ever elected to public office in North Carolina , she voted to raise the minimum wage for county employees to a living wage. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ BERNIE STANDS WITH WORKERS, CALLS ON BIDEN TO ACT! This weekend, Our Revolution joined Bernie and AOC as they hit the road to rally with workers fighting to unionize against some of the most powerful corporate forces on Earth. On Sunday afternoon, Bernie Amazon Labor Union ahead of their 2nd union election at the LDJ5 facility in Staten Island. By evening, he was speaking to a crowd at a for Starbucks Workers United in Richmond, Va. On Tuesday, Bernie was live on the calling out Amazon’s “illegal anti-union tactics” and calling on President Biden to issue an executive order prohibiting any company that engages in union-busting from getting federal government contracts, reports. “Amazon is the poster child for why this anti-union busting Executive Order is needed,” Bernie said. “President Biden, you promised to prevent union-busters like Amazon from receiving lucrative contracts from the federal government. Keep that promise.” Rumors of Bernie 2024 are circulating, but the truth is — Our Revolution and the progressive movement are doing the work today to build the worker power we need to forge a better future. ★ ★ ★ Today, workers around the world celebrate May Day — the International Workers’ Day established by labor activists in 1889 to commemorate the Haymarket Massacre in Chicago and the struggle for an eight-hour working day. Witnesses testified that none of the eight workers charged threw the bomb in Haymarket Square. Labor leader August Spies said: “I knew from the experience of the past that this butchering of people was done for the express purpose of defeating the eight-hour movement.” Spies showed solidarity with his comrades through the trial, appeals, and at the gallows. Today, we mark the sacrifice and perseverance of workers striving for justice. ★ ★ ★ LARRY COHEN ON THE LABOR FIGHT Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen , a lifelong labor leader, joined our on Monday to dig into the rise of worker organizing. “This is an exciting time — not only at Amazon and Starbucks, but there’s all kinds of organizing at workplaces across the country. The first Apple retail store joined my union CWA,” Larry said. “This is organizing from the bottom up, and that’s what we believe in here at Our Revolution.” Why now? Larry told Aaron White of that “fueled by inflation, the pandemic and a shortage of people to do these jobs, working-class people are much more confident and not willing to just take whatever is thrown at them.” ★ ★ ★ RO KHANNA TALKS POLICY FIGHTS Also on our latest , Our Revolution Board Chair Larry Cohen asked US Rep. Ro Khanna about legislation to end taxpayer subsidies to the fossil fuel industry. “Greta Thunberg testified and said it would be a gut punch for Democrats to have both chambers and the presidency and not repeal fossil fuel subsidies ,” Ro told him. “And, she’s right. This is something we can and must do.” To Larry’s inquiry into Biden’s Billionaires Tax , Ro said: “There are a lot more working class and middle-class folks than billionaires , and they rightly resent the fact that they’re not paying their fair share. Instead, they take loans against their values and never realize the capital gains.” Ro also spoke on the need for Democrats to deliver to strengthen democracy. “Folks don’t believe the promises anymore ,” he said. “They watch presidents and congresses come and go, and their lives are worse — decades of off-shoring jobs, towns shrinking, kids moving away. We need a systemic policy for economic revitalization in this country.” Larry agreed, saying: “Ro helps us build Our Revolution and build this outside political pressure we need. Now, it’s time to get more allies for the Ro Khannas in Congress.” ★ ★ ★ FIGHTING FOR HEALTHCARE IN NY On Tuesday, Our Revolution joined Campaign for NY Health and other groups in Albany for a Day of Action calling on the state to pass the NY Health Act to provide universal healthcare to every New Yorker and end medical debt. Organizers, activists, labor leaders, and legislators all came together to march, rally, and speak in one voice to demand New York electeds prioritize healthcare justice before they go on recess on June 2 to campaign for re-election. Our Revolution NY Organizing Coordinator Jennyfer Almanzar spoke to attendees at the rally: “Every New Yorker — and every person in America — deserves full healthcare and to be free from the burden of medical costs. Our lives are on the line.” ★ ★ ★ 2022 MEMBERSHIP DRIVE KICKOFF! To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. As committed Movement Builders , we know the real reward is taking action to make a better world , but we want to share these fun items as a way of thanks. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ Mark your calendars for May 9th, when we’ll be joined by progressive powerhouse Rashida Tlaib on our next National ‘Organize to Win’ Broadcast — 8:30p ET /5:30p PT. ★ ★ ★ Join thousands of Our Revolution volunteers to elect working-class fighters and replace the corporate-aligned politicians up and down the ballot. If you have an hour or two a week, you can power our movement as a caller with the ! Our crew will be there to help you make calls, earn rewards, and tip the balance of power! ★ ★ ★ The Tar Heel State deserves a great progressive in Congress. State Sen. Erica Smith running in NC-1 fits the bill to a tee. Join Our Revolution’s Campaign Team and help us elect Erica! ★ ★ ★ Help us get Attica Scott to Congress! Join the Our Revolution Phonebank Force and help us make calls to Louisville and the rest of Kentucky’s 3rd congressional district to get another progressive in Congress! ★ ★ ★ On May 3rd, we’re holding a special Our Revolution Town Hall to Defend Democracy with our partners at Free Speech for People and lay out our campaign to bar insurrectionists from the ballot. We’ll speak with courageous Our Revolution members \- and their legal team - taking the fight directly to far-right extremists like Marjorie Taylor-Greene. And, we’re recruiting progressive patriots across the country to get engaged in this fight! ★ ★ ★ Are you a member of Our Revolution? For $5 a month , you’ll be part of choosing our candidate endorsements and crafting our platform and strategy. Plus, we’ll send you our new 2022 Membership Card. To show our gratitude to members joining at higher donation levels, we’re sweetening the deal! For $10 a month , we’ll throw in our sticker 6-pack , and at $15 , you’ll get the stickers and a poster. For $27 , get both and a tote bag , or join at the $50 level to get it all and a T-shirt. ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ ★ | | | | | **Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of power. | ** PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION PO Box 66208 WASHINGTON, DC, 20035 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a 501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for any specific activity.

Folks,

JD Vance’s garbage book, Hillbilly Elegy, costs $7.85.

You can buy a copy to use as a coaster (or a doorstop, or a chew toy for
your dog), OR you can donate $7.85 to our campaign to flip Ohio blue and
expand the Senate majority.

While JD Vance pretends to be your average Ohioan, he couldn’t be more out
of touch. After years of working in Silicon Valley boardrooms, Vance’s
qualifications for the Senate include the backing of a $13.5 million super
PAC from billionaire Trump lackey Peter Thiel, and a record of bashing the
working class and even blaming them for their economic struggles.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/11873?t=1014&amount=7.85&akid=3551%2E3611125%2EL1Qwbp ]Can you donate $7.85 (or more!) to make sure JD Vance never becomes the

clean_body: Tonight’s news of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade is nothing short of an assault on women’s rights. | | = Peter, I’m outside the Supreme Court right now: = Tonight’s news of the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade is nothing short of an assault on women’s rights. Women deserve the right to control their own reproductive freedom—it is an essential element to a woman’s right to self determination. Abortion care is a fundamental human right, and I will fight like hell to protect it in the Senate. Right this very minute, Senate Democrats need to show urgency. We must overturn the filibuster in order to protect the fabric and freedom of all Americans. Outlawing abortion harms women across the country and will tear families apart. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We have to send a clear message to Washington, protecting abortion care is an issue worth fighting for, and I promise Wisconsinites I will do just that. name: Team AOC
subject: Nina Turner in Ohio’s 11th district
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
She has spent her entire career advocating for working people
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20220502-2994-header&t=1&akid=2994%2E2526796%2EeXo8md)
Alexandria just endorsed Nina Turner in the race for Ohio’s 11th district. Can you make a donation to Nina’s campaign to help her get out the vote before her election tomorrow?
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220502?refcode=em20220502-2994-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=2994_2526796_eXo8md&akid=2994%2E2526796%2EeXo8md)**
Nina is _exactly_ the kind of progressive leader we need more of in Congress. She has spent her entire career advocating for working people — on the Cleveland City Council, in the Ohio State Senate, and on Senator Bernie Sanders’ 2016 and 2020 presidential campaigns, serving as National Co-Chair in 2020.
She will be a powerful voice for policies that will make a meaningful difference in the lives of working people across this country — like Medicare for All, a $15 minimum wage, and a Green New Deal. We need her alongside Alexandria in Congress in the fight for racial, economic, social, and environmental justice.
Like us, Nina’s campaign is powered by the people. But she’s up against millions of dollars in Super PAC spending. And that means the only way Nina Turner is going to win is if we get involved.
[Our movement needs to show up for Nina today. Will you make a contribution to Nina Turner for Congress? 100% of your donation will go directly to her campaign so her team can Get Out the Vote for tomorrow’s election.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220502?refcode=em20220502-2994-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2994_2526796_eXo8md&akid=2994%2E2526796%2EeXo8md)
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220502?refcode=em20220502-2994-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2994_2526796_eXo8md&akid=2994%2E2526796%2EeXo8md)
Your contribution will help Nina’s campaign get out the vote, and strengthen our fight for systemic change in our country.
Pa’lante,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20220502?refcode=em20220502-2994-P_FND_ANO_END&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&refcode2=2994_2526796_eXo8md&akid=2994%2E2526796%2EeXo8md)**

subject: Dellicker Volunteers are Everywhere!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kevin Dellicker for Congress](https://dellickerforcongress
body:
Join us and help Keep America Free! | | | | [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=22d371942a&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | |
# **Dellicker Volunteers are Everywhere!**
Dear Friends and Neighbors,

It’s two weeks until Election Day and our volunteers are everywhere! They will be the difference in this race.

Last week, our team reached thousands of voters in all four PA-7 counties. We knocked on doors, made telephone calls, put out signs, and hosted meet-and-greets. I talked with students in Emmaus, community leaders in Kresgeville, business owners in Palmerton, and moms in Hellertown.

We’ve been on TV ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b38c1a7fdd&e=1090c5c412)), on the radio (WMGH-FM, WGPA-AM, WLSH-AM), in the news ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=8a570b411c&e=1090c5c412) and [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=feb45cc168&e=1090c5c412)), and on social media ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=1d98dea233&e=1090c5c412) and [here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2d87ccbbf3&e=1090c5c412)). We’ve had so many positive interactions, signing up new voters, having people switch registrations to vote in the primary, adding to our team of volunteers. We are confident and energized heading into the home stretch.

This week, I’ll be knocking on doors in the Slate Belt and Lehighton, meeting with veterans in Center Valley, attending a meet-and-greet in Macungie, and speaking with community leaders in Allentown. My schedule is posted on my campaign website ([here](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9c72d8626c&e=1090c5c412)) and summarized below. If we haven’t already met, there are still plenty of chances to meet before the primary election on Tuesday, May 17.

If you would like to get involved, please email [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com) or click on the “volunteer” button below. If you care about strong families, good jobs, and safe communities, there’s still time to join our team, and help us Keep America Free!

Sincerely,

---
|
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=22faa596d3&e=1090c5c412)
---
| | If you would like to show your support for Kevin Dellicker by displaying a Dellicker for Congress Yard Sign, knocking on doors, making phone calls or working a poll, please email: [swankoskil@hotmail.com](mailto:swankoskil@hotmail.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20volunteer) or click on the "Volunteer" button below.
---
| [Volunteer](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=9680ccbe63&e=1090c5c412 "Volunteer")
---
| [Donate to Kevin's Campaign](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=f97fa3f660&e=1090c5c412 "Donate to Kevin's Campaign")
---
|
---
| **Strong Families**
---
|
---
| Last week, I delivered a sermon in my hometown Christian church, discussed Middle Eastern politics with a local Jewish leader, and shared a Ramadan meal at an Allentown Islamic Center. We are blessed to live in a community where religious freedom is alive and well. But we cannot rest in its defense.

Religious freedom is America’s first freedom. As your Congressman, I will fight to preserve religious freedom for all Americans. And I'll defend all our other freedoms that are granted by God and protected by the U.S. Constitution.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=ff6d59769b&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Good Jobs**
---
|
---
| I visited with students at Emmaus High School who posed the following question to a group of local leaders, “Why are you a Republican?” The answers varied from person to person, but they all had one thing in common: Republicans are the party of limited government.

This is the key to America’s success. When people are free to work, save, and invest, they can achieve the American Dream. But when government micromanages our affairs, it stifles our ability to get ahead.

We must restore freedom in our economic affairs. When I get to Congress, I want a spot on the Small Business Committee so I can roll back oppressive regulations and unleash American entrepreneurship. We owe that to our young people in Emmaus and everywhere across this great nation.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=b3401ffeae&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| **Safe Communities**
---
| [ ](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=0ddb42d46e&e=1090c5c412)
---
| This picture of me was taken on the way home from Afghanistan 13 years ago this week. It was the fourth time I returned home from the combat zone after deploying to support the Global War on Terrorism. To my family and me, service is more than a talking point. It’s a way of life.

Protecting our country from foreign threats is the core function of our federal government, yet we have fewer veterans serving in Congress at any time since World War II. In Congress, I'll apply my military experience to keep our nation safe from foreign threats, just like I've done in uniform for 26 years.

---
| [Learn More](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=535a200308&e=1090c5c412 "Learn More")
---
|
---
| | **Kevin Dellicker in the Community**

Tuesday, 05/3: Veteran SMART Roundtable Discussion | 11 AM
LV Chamber Membership Event | DeSales University, Center Valley

Tuesday, 05/03: Carbon County Restaurant Week
I'll be making stops in Lehighton around 5:30 PM

Wednesday 05/03: High School Awards Banquet | 11:00 AM
Private Event, Nesquehoning, PA

Wednesday, 05/04: Meet-and-Greet | 6:00 PM
Private Event, Macungie, PA

Thursday 05/5: Press Conference | 12:30 PM
Dellicker Agenda for Strong Families
Join us outside in the Parking Lot of the former Office Depot
480 South Cedar Crest Blvd., Allentown

Thursday, 05/5: GOP Women's Luncheon | 1 PM
Carrabba's Italian Grill, 510 South Cedar Crest Boulevard

Thursday, 05/05: Cohesion Network Event | 6 PM
Casa Guadalupe Center, 218 N. Second Street, Allentown

Friday, 05/6: Door to Door
Location to Be Determined

Saturday 05/07: Door to Door
Slate Belt

Saturday, 05/7: Kentucky Derby Event | 7 PM
Pomfret Club, Easton PA

Email kevin@dellickerforcongress.com with questions or
Visit our [Events](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=2b43d35813&e=1090c5c412) page: https://dellickerforcongress.com/events/ or
Find us on Facebook: [Kevin Dellicker for Congress | Facebook](https://dellickerforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2bced6f51ed1caf3f5b731ec5&id=e33993b81e&e=1090c5c412)

name: Charles Booker
subject: We’re ready
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

You may have read from our previous emails that we had a major fundraising
deadline this past weekend — April 30. And
Peter, with your
help, I’m proud to say we reached our goal for April.

Your support is a testament to the power of the grassroots movement like
ours — a movement more powerful than super PAC money. From the bottom of
my heart, thank you.

But on the same day we reached our fundraising goal for April, Rand Paul
officially launched his re-election campaign — and he’s already drawing in
support from the richest and most corrupt in our society.

In 15 days, Kentuckians will decide who is our best shot to defeat Rand
Paul and to fight for the issues that matter most to people. We are
gaining momentum, and once we win the primary, we will defeat him at the
polls in November — but we can’t slow down our fundraising now.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220502?refcode=em20220502-1861&t=1020&refcode2=1861_346206_6qumwl&akid=1861%2E346206%2E6qumwl ]So we’re asking everyone: can you rush $5 (or whatever you can) to our
campaign to make sure Charles pulls off a grassroots victory in the
primary and goes on to defeat Rand Paul?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220502?refcode=em20220502-1861&t=1021&refcode2=1861_346206_6qumwl&akid=1861%2E346206%2E6qumwl ]Contribute $5

While Rand Paul takes in millions of dollars of dark money, our campaign
is creating a grassroots movement filled with small dollar donors from
everyday Americans.

Rand may have money and corporate interests, but our campaign has
something even better: everyday, working Kentuckians rising up in a
historic movement to end this chapter of failed politics.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-20220502?refcode=em20220502-1861&t=1022&refcode2=1861_346206_6qumwl&akid=1861%2E346206%2E6qumwl ]Join our small-dollar, people-led grassroots movement to help elect
Charles and defeat Rand Paul in November today. Please give $5, $10, $15 —
whatever you can — so we can win the primary and keep this movement going
strong through Election Day.

Thank you for your support,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220502-1861-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1861_346206_6qumwl&akid=1861%2E346206%2E6qumwl

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1861%2E346206%2E6qumwl

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

subject: We missed our goal.

body:
| | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wDJSxiYwIObpoERRcxDTs8R7Pd64c4gzFd01MYfYP5LR-ub1Ks_Aqk9-Fd-ejyFQk56A38KwPLIJv7BQE-9SA1mnYXq2pkEVdtuPVFE39zlnVTa05W9DkmdVdjGGz3D4lHIO4pGaxRJrRY-XUbkZJOKnSm9CCqaToU6RkoqNmsjwNAlvkSACX4tqUNOlF8QM_N8tTrRE72av22o3BnXYOpKqgr1GBw2Ic2p84hKAh-ZEVzTaYtiKdJXZxBqB8z6oIS-v2mpxUHO_bfgKbHgTmmjpUFQo6w7rGfEDlhg8PSwA/3lp/iwzkbi8ZTCGl8GM8Mw6LTg/h0/LK5NXe5Fe_l_cDsfzZzQfjvHPOmMigcjdnrYz4NEPZE) Peter, it’s Jessica Cisneros. Fellow Conservative,

My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race.

Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high.

We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory.

Fellow Conservative, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border.

When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. [**Will you join my fight and help send a conservative fighter to Washington to fix the mess the Democrats have made?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=6eb382f4a5674128a741501d919273b4&_e=ajjGEBVyEGNzIViAO9qP5xdAVip158UxEOspJt60-xbJAJwQEqwsCEYgIzOle6xAJDWG6dlYlwWFRNqTOfSi81AJUIZLY2BNQCaP3mc8YAABLYldy19Dt_Z-2qY7mDmaNtriXycj1E7SO10yu6q51HXD_qd2NfPF0VXdQlnYPO18IdQg2T03EIiGtDohyJhkvUHPiExHzQXCWSGvjMueMNQx4DK7XAkE9gBN5nTGMsvESlMe5KvElhi3Sjkg0HHA4Yw3_MnVG-2psz97M0A0C6_3fmeLDhozlzaGtdPJBT0dQNiHwytB51ZEm-GXas5zR3jl0MsqBHKdpOcZ3sPT4BeEs3g7Y6dL_jbyMH5S-10qfWuCtg38ICpGBKiJEpfj_9cHuWC170m5ehAgnQYVfg%3D%3D)

Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them.

**Mark Kelly** is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona.

**Mark Kelly** voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders.

**Mark Kelly** has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety.

**Mark Kelly** has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation.

Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today.

Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess?

clean_body: We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. | Fellow Conservative, My name is General Mick McGuire and I’m running against Democrat Mark Kelly in Arizona’s critical Senate race. Thanks to Kelly and the Senate Democrats woke mob agenda - Americans are suffering. Our border is wide open, violent crime has skyrocketed, Americans are paying $5 a gallon, and inflation is at a record high. We are in the midst of a fight for our country and we need to elect proven leaders to lead us to victory. Fellow Conservative, as a two-star general I’ve fought many battles for our country and WON. I’ve had experience flying F-16s in combat over Baghdad, commanding over 8,300 Arizona National Guard Troops, and protecting our southern border. When I see a problem, I run towards it, which is exactly why I joined this Senate race. Washington is full of career politicians who put their own ambitions over the people who elected them. Mark Kelly is no different. While he pledged to be YOUR independent voice in the Senate - he has instead chosen to vote strictly along party lines, voting 97.7% of the time with Biden’s agenda and continues to ignore the issues here in Arizona. Mark Kelly voted for Justice Kentanji Brown Jackson to the Supreme Court - despite her lenient sentences for violent sex offenders. Mark Kelly has ignored the crisis at our border which has allowed hundreds of thousands of illegal immigrants to flood our communities and jeopardize our children’s safety. Mark Kelly has refused to act while Americans are suffering from record unemployment and record inflation. Make no mistake - we are in a battle for our country and in order for me to WIN I need your help today. Will you please join my team and contribute any amount and help send a two-star general to Washington to clean up the Democrats mess? For Liberty, Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire USAF (Ret.) | Maj. Gen. Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) has dedicated nearly 38 years of his life to serving our country. Millionaires, billionaires, and big corporations are paying a lower tax rate than regular people like us, so we need as many people as possible to call on lawmakers to tax the rich.

Even as the COVID-19 pandemic brought the inequities that workers face into stark focus, and millions of our fellow Americans were bearing the brunt of the economic devastation of the pandemic, Jaime and the GOP left workers out in the cold. Along with the rest of the House GOP, she voted against the PRO Act, legislation that would restore some fairness to the economy by strengthening the federal laws by protecting workers' rights to unionize. Right now, too many companies treat workers like cogs in a machine, trading the lives of their employees for profit. Members of Congress must guarantee that workers are able to negotiate for fair treatment. I stand in solidarity with striking workers across the country who are demanding better working conditions and fair pay for their hard work. And in the House of Representatives, you can count on me to continue fighting for legislation like the PRO Act to protect organizers' rights. **[Help me get my name in front of more voters with union-made signs and let's #FlipWA03!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zdG1fUgG8aFKTw4TdAFcV3OYIkIXLeXYGdiD76HGOclWZYG428h3SLdZNmun5o9X55y8kQc5MnjsVJQoW6dhEa4SlEzR9kH_bJGZ2vCtqhVBzLglWC7KGcSHwip-QE2NC5xaIvn0_ZjGKvNxFbVG_t0GfZn2uRfy4-suORo02_s45azey1fXaA-7POqHID5Fyp7jZtURQ-nzD1UbcIkOuC6aYMJ_MjPhCafGbwG-w2UTK64b1xHRy5Hb5nwObkNkroWbO7ho-68d2CF2zrYa-JyN1KpqaWesf6H9fmsnKfgDkSqJC1MKZ_X31zI4HQxyRwhsgwEzeDAxAblB_oNAIe2MkiOjdYiyQorqRdgv__YA/3lp/ON1rVGpWR7GG3GkPadHf4A/h3/NMXaJ5KKNGsUBqrk03cnFT5nrvYDtFbKUMhEYUZe2zs)** -Brent

name: Team Greitens
subject: Eric Greitens Statement on Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greitens for U
body:
Those who leaked this Supreme Court draft opinion is trying to weaponize the court.
---
| | | | | |
---
| Eric Greitens Statement on Roe v. Wade
---
| St. Louis, MO - Former Missouri governor and candidate for U.S. Senate Eric Greitens released the following statement on the Supreme Court draft opinion leaked tonight: "Those who leaked this Supreme Court draft opinion is trying to weaponize the court and turn the sacred institution into a political cudgel during the midterm elections. Life is precious and worthy of protection--especially the unborn who are the most vulnerable. As governor of Missouri, I called the first ever pro-life special session because we had weak, establishment RINOs who refused to protect life and defend the sanctity of life. In spite of their efforts, we passed pro-life legislation that made Missouri the safest state in the country for the unborn. That 'Missouri Miracle' became the blueprint for other states to introduce their own legislation. "We can now take the miracle we made in Missouri, and turn it into an American Miracle."
[Watch this video on why the fight to protect the unborn is so important](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vSgMQ4h0dZdVaeO44ub3f9v-Xvyd5dnOTQ2J1w8NQM07UTvCyEuAtKdue7FVLySpTcaZcdYP87epN2jyFt5-EJkXFsrl5gUlaJQx-oy_1PIXHJyjWl6VCduoFU5qvBXEA4x6BqqUIvV6MOL49knpIg==&c=icPwy-9-pCpQoLxpvq8WtUe_bDrA6vNZRm1PQMsGH6kqVBi1PCxyMg==&ch=S6bU2ujXSIYcmbxjT-Ey5lIxv1ig58IDQcyGeScoxO-MIFRuYca2tQ==)

subject: What we feared: Roe v. Wade to be overturned
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
But this fight is not over.
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: Leaked draft opinion reveals Supreme Court WILL overturn _Roe v. Wade_**
Peter,

A draft opinion by the U.S. Supreme Court has revealed what we've long feared: **a**** majority of justices have decided to overturn abortion rights.**

Their decision will end decades of precedent afforded by landmark decisions in _Roe v. Wade_ and _Planned Parenthood v. Casey_ , with conservative Justice Samuel Alito penning, "Roe was egregiously wrong from the start." **[But this fight isn't over: When Abby is elected to the U.S. Senate, she will vote to codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law. Donate $5 now to help her defeat Sen. Grassley.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44847212/343378760/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1017-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkM2NiN2VjYS05MmNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EpZ_8OZkLHQOx9MPzCkQ2iRk442t9gRuNBpNmsorNDI=)**
When Sen. Grassley first entered office 40 years ago, one of his first votes was for a constitutional amendment to overturn _Roe v. Wade_. **Decades later, he's about to see all of his work come to fruition at the expense of women and girls across America.**
We must codify _Roe v. Wade_ into law, and we absolutely must strengthen our Senate majority. That starts with defeating Sen. Grassley and sending pro-choice Democrat Abby Finkenauer to the Senate to PROTECT the right to choose. **In moments like this, we must come together and do whatever we can to fight back. clean_body: But this fight is not over. | | | BREAKING NEWS: Leaked draft opinion reveals Supreme Court WILL overturn Roe v. Wade Peter, A draft opinion by the U.S. Supreme Court has revealed what we've long feared: a majority of justices have decided to overturn abortion rights. Their decision will end decades of precedent afforded by landmark decisions in Roe v. Wade and Planned Parenthood v. Casey , with conservative Justice Samuel Alito penning, "Roe was egregiously wrong from the start." = When Sen. Grassley first entered office 40 years ago, one of his first votes was for a constitutional amendment to overturn Roe v. Wade. Decades later, he's about to see all of his work come to fruition at the expense of women and girls across America. We must codify Roe v. Wade into law, and we absolutely must strengthen our Senate majority. That starts with defeating Sen. Grassley and sending pro-choice Democrat Abby Finkenauer to the Senate to PROTECT the right to choose. In moments like this, we must come together and do whatever we can to fight back. That's why we're asking:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = | |

clean_body: Not on my watch- Fellow Minnesotan, Did you know that Minnesota is one of 12 states that still taxes Social Security? To what avail? We need to provide relief to our senior citizens and END the tax on Social Security NOW. Our senior Minnesotans want to be close to their families, volunteer at local churches and organizations, invest in our communities, and for some, still have active careers. So why do we want to drive them out of our state? Thank you, Senator Paul Gazelka Candidate for Governor | | | ---|---|--- Paid for and Provided by Gazelka for Governor P.O. Box 175 Little Falls, MN 56345

body:
Leaked Supreme Court documents published tonight show the Supreme Court has likely voted to strike down Roe v. Wade, eliminating legal protection for abortion rights.

I have awful news, team:
**Leaked Supreme Court documents published tonight show the Supreme Court has likely voted to strike down Roe v. Wade, eliminating legal protection for abortion rights.**
**[With abortion rights left up to states, Ohio needs a pro-choice governor like never before. Pitch in $5 right now to help me flip Ohio.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44847266/343379206/-1623009051?refcode=nw_em_220502_2_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ0NDU1NC05NWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sV6erw8X6tBLcQJBBH09K0IS6H1WQoujSWoTC5wmwyQ=)**
As governor, Mike DeWine has signed extreme anti-choice legislation that has threatened abortion access in our state.
That includes a law that would ban all abortion after six weeks of pregnancy. That law has been on hold because of federal legal protections – but **without Roe, it is likely to be upheld and abortion will effectively be illegal in Ohio.**
The only way to protect abortion access in Ohio is to elect state leaders who will make abortion legal in our state.
I have _always_ been pro-choice and I will fight my hardest to protect abortion in Ohio, but first, I urgently need your support. And with the general election in Ohio starting **tomorrow** , this is an especially critical time to donate to our campaign.
**[This is our chance to elect a pro-choice governor and protect the right to an abortion in Ohio – no matter what happens at the Supreme Court. Rush in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/44847267/343379207/-1623009051?refcode=nw_em_220502_2_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWQ0NDU1NC05NWNhLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sV6erw8X6tBLcQJBBH09K0IS6H1WQoujSWoTC5wmwyQ=)**
I’ll be honest, I am furious and devastated. But I know that we can’t give up now — our fight is just beginning. Let’s go defend our rights.
Onward,
Nan Whaley
